CZECHMATE 1.8.0
CzechMate — šachový systém (FW 1.8.0): LED deska, V1 reed matice v repu a na videu; komerční V2 s Hall senzory — viz docs/reference/HARDWARE_VERZE.md

198static const char *TAG = "GAME_TASK";
199
200#ifndef NDEBUG
201#define STAGING_LOGI(tag, fmt, ...) ESP_LOGI(tag, "[STAGING] " fmt, ##__VA_ARGS__)
202#else
203#define STAGING_LOGI(tag, fmt, ...) ((void)0)
204#endif

206// ============================================================================
207// WDT WRAPPER FUNCTIONS
208// ============================================================================
209
224static esp_err_t game_task_wdt_reset_safe(void) {
225 esp_err_t ret = esp_task_wdt_reset();
226
227 if (ret == ESP_ERR_NOT_FOUND) {
228 // Log as WARNING instead of ERROR - task not registered yet
229 ESP_LOGW(
230 TAG,
231 "WDT reset: task not registered yet (this is normal during startup)");
232 return ESP_OK; // Treat as success for our purposes
233 } else if (ret != ESP_OK) {
234 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "WDT reset failed: %s", esp_err_to_name(ret));
235 return ret;
236 }
237
238 return ESP_OK;
239}

620// Flag pro endgame report request (místo volání z timer callbacku)

623// Typ konce hry pro lepší rozlišení v reportu
624typedef enum {
625 // Checkmate variations
626 ENDGAME_REASON_CHECKMATE = 0,
627 ENDGAME_REASON_CHECKMATE_EN_PASSANT = 1, // Šachmat pomocí en passant
628 ENDGAME_REASON_CHECKMATE_CASTLING = 2, // Šachmat pomocí rošády
629 ENDGAME_REASON_CHECKMATE_PROMOTION = 3, // Šachmat po promoci pěšce
630 ENDGAME_REASON_CHECKMATE_DISCOVERED = 4, // Šachmat odkrytým šachem
631
632 // Draw conditions
633 ENDGAME_REASON_STALEMATE = 10,
634 ENDGAME_REASON_50_MOVE = 11,
635 ENDGAME_REASON_REPETITION = 12,
636 ENDGAME_REASON_INSUFFICIENT = 13,
637
638 // Player actions
639 ENDGAME_REASON_TIMEOUT = 20,
640 ENDGAME_REASON_RESIGNATION = 21
641} endgame_reason_t;

643static endgame_reason_t current_endgame_reason = ENDGAME_REASON_CHECKMATE;

670// Captured pieces tracking
671#define MAX_CAPTURED_PIECES 16
672static piece_t white_captured_pieces[MAX_CAPTURED_PIECES];
673static piece_t black_captured_pieces[MAX_CAPTURED_PIECES];
674static uint32_t white_captured_count = 0;
675static uint32_t black_captured_count = 0;
676static uint32_t white_captured_index = 0;
677static uint32_t black_captured_index = 0;
678
679// Material advantage tracking (pro graf výhody v průběhu hry)
680#define MAX_ADVANTAGE_HISTORY 200
681static int8_t material_advantage_history
682 [MAX_ADVANTAGE_HISTORY]; // -127 až +127 (White positive, Black negative)
683static uint32_t advantage_history_count = 0;
684
688static char piece_to_char(piece_t piece) {
689 switch (piece) {
690 case PIECE_EMPTY:
691 return ' ';
692 case PIECE_WHITE_PAWN:
693 return 'P';
694 case PIECE_WHITE_KNIGHT:
695 return 'N';
696 case PIECE_WHITE_BISHOP:
697 return 'B';
698 case PIECE_WHITE_ROOK:
699 return 'R';
700 case PIECE_WHITE_QUEEN:
701 return 'Q';
702 case PIECE_WHITE_KING:
703 return 'K';
704 case PIECE_BLACK_PAWN:
705 return 'p';
706 case PIECE_BLACK_KNIGHT:
707 return 'n';
708 case PIECE_BLACK_BISHOP:
709 return 'b';
710 case PIECE_BLACK_ROOK:
711 return 'r';
712 case PIECE_BLACK_QUEEN:
713 return 'q';
714 case PIECE_BLACK_KING:
715 return 'k';
716 default:
717 return ' ';
718 }
719}
720
725static int8_t game_calculate_material_advantage(void) {
726 int white_material = 0;
727 int black_material = 0;
728
729 // Hodnoty figur
730 const int pawn_value = 1;
731 const int knight_value = 3;
732 const int bishop_value = 3;
733 const int rook_value = 5;
734 const int queen_value = 9;
735
736 // Spocitat material na boardu
737 for (int row = 0; row < 8; row++) {
738 for (int col = 0; col < 8; col++) {
739 piece_t piece = board[row][col];
740 switch (piece) {
741 case PIECE_WHITE_PAWN:
742 white_material += pawn_value;
743 break;
744 case PIECE_WHITE_KNIGHT:
745 white_material += knight_value;
746 break;
747 case PIECE_WHITE_BISHOP:
748 white_material += bishop_value;
749 break;
750 case PIECE_WHITE_ROOK:
751 white_material += rook_value;
752 break;
753 case PIECE_WHITE_QUEEN:
754 white_material += queen_value;
755 break;
756 case PIECE_BLACK_PAWN:
757 black_material += pawn_value;
758 break;
759 case PIECE_BLACK_KNIGHT:
760 black_material += knight_value;
761 break;
762 case PIECE_BLACK_BISHOP:
763 black_material += bishop_value;
764 break;
765 case PIECE_BLACK_ROOK:
766 black_material += rook_value;
767 break;
768 case PIECE_BLACK_QUEEN:
769 black_material += queen_value;
770 break;
771 default:
772 break;
773 }
774 }
775 }
776
777 int advantage = white_material - black_material;
778 // Omezit na int8_t rozsah
779 if (advantage > 127)
780 advantage = 127;
781 if (advantage < -127)
782 advantage = -127;
783
784 return (int8_t)advantage;
785}
786
790static void game_record_material_advantage(void) {
791 if (advantage_history_count >= MAX_ADVANTAGE_HISTORY) {
792 return; // Historie plna
793 }
794
795 int8_t advantage = game_calculate_material_advantage();
796 material_advantage_history[advantage_history_count++] = advantage;
797}
798
802static void add_captured_piece(piece_t piece) {
803 // Determine which array to use based on piece color
804 if (piece >= PIECE_WHITE_PAWN && piece <= PIECE_WHITE_KING) {
805 // White piece captured by black
806 if (black_captured_index < MAX_CAPTURED_PIECES) {
807 black_captured_pieces[black_captured_index++] = piece;
808 black_captured_count++;
809 black_captures++;
810 }
811 } else if (piece >= PIECE_BLACK_PAWN && piece <= PIECE_BLACK_KING) {
812 // Black piece captured by white
813 if (white_captured_index < MAX_CAPTURED_PIECES) {
814 white_captured_pieces[white_captured_index++] = piece;
815 white_captured_count++;
816 white_captures++;
817 }
818 }
819}
820

841// Include ctype.h for tolower function
842#include <ctype.h>
843
844// ============================================================================
845// FORWARD DECLARATIONS
846// ============================================================================
847
848// Promotion functions - MUST BE FIRST (called from game_initialize_board)
849// Note: These are defined later in the file (around line 3800)
850static void game_check_promotion_needed(void);
851static void game_update_promotion_anchor_led(void);
852static void game_process_promotion_button(uint8_t button_id);
853static bool game_execute_promotion(promotion_choice_t choice);
854
855void game_print_board_enhanced(void);
856bool game_execute_move_enhanced(chess_move_extended_t *move);
857uint32_t game_generate_legal_moves(player_t player);
858game_state_t game_analyze_position(player_t player);
859
860// Error recovery functions
861void game_update_error_blink(void);
862void game_stop_error_blink(void);
863
864// ============================================================================
865// POSITION HASHING AND DRAW DETECTION
866// ============================================================================
867
872uint32_t game_calculate_position_hash(void) {
873 uint32_t hash = 0;
874
875 // Hash board pieces
876 for (int row = 0; row < 8; row++) {
877 for (int col = 0; col < 8; col++) {
878 piece_t piece = board[row][col];
879 if (piece != PIECE_EMPTY) {
880 // Combine piece type, position, and color
881 uint32_t piece_hash = (piece << 16) | (row << 8) | col;
882 hash = ((hash << 5) + hash) ^ piece_hash; // Simple hash function
883 }
884 }
885 }
886
887 // Include current player in hash
888 hash = ((hash << 5) + hash) ^ (current_player << 24);
889
890 // Include castling rights
891 uint32_t castling_rights = 0;
892 if (!piece_moved[0][4])
893 castling_rights |= 0x01; // White king
894 if (!piece_moved[0][0])
895 castling_rights |= 0x02; // White rook a1
896 if (!piece_moved[0][7])
897 castling_rights |= 0x04; // White rook h1
898 if (!piece_moved[7][4])
899 castling_rights |= 0x08; // Black king
900 if (!piece_moved[7][0])
901 castling_rights |= 0x10; // Black rook a8
902 if (!piece_moved[7][7])
903 castling_rights |= 0x20; // Black rook h8
904 hash = ((hash << 5) + hash) ^ castling_rights;
905
906 // Include en passant state
907 if (en_passant_available) {
908 uint32_t en_passant_hash =
909 (en_passant_target_row << 8) | en_passant_target_col;
910 hash = ((hash << 5) + hash) ^ en_passant_hash;
911 }
912
913 return hash;
914}
915
921bool game_is_position_repeated(void) {
922 uint32_t current_hash = game_calculate_position_hash();
923 int repetition_count = 0;
924
925 // Count how many times current position appears in history
926 for (int i = 0; i < position_history_count; i++) {
927 if (position_history[i] == current_hash) {
928 repetition_count++;
929 if (repetition_count >= 3) {
930 return true; // Threefold repetition detected
931 }
932 }
933 }
934
935 return false;
936}
937
941void game_add_position_to_history(void) {
942 uint32_t current_hash = game_calculate_position_hash();
943
944 if (position_history_count < 100) {
945 position_history[position_history_count++] = current_hash;
946 } else {
947 // Shift history and add new position
948 for (int i = 0; i < 99; i++) {
949 position_history[i] = position_history[i + 1];
950 }
951 position_history[99] = current_hash;
952 }
953}
954
955// ============================================================================
956// MATERIAL CALCULATION AND SCORING
957// ============================================================================
958
959// Standard piece values
960static const int piece_values[] = {
961 0, // PIECE_EMPTY
962 1, // PIECE_WHITE_PAWN
963 3, // PIECE_WHITE_KNIGHT
964 3, // PIECE_WHITE_BISHOP
965 5, // PIECE_WHITE_ROOK
966 9, // PIECE_WHITE_QUEEN
967 0, // PIECE_WHITE_KING (infinite value)
968 1, // PIECE_BLACK_PAWN
969 3, // PIECE_BLACK_KNIGHT
970 3, // PIECE_BLACK_BISHOP
971 5, // PIECE_BLACK_ROOK
972 9, // PIECE_BLACK_QUEEN
973 0 // PIECE_BLACK_KING (infinite value)
974};
975
983int game_calculate_material_balance(int *white_material, int *black_material) {
984 int white_total = 0;
985 int black_total = 0;
986
987 for (int row = 0; row < 8; row++) {
988 for (int col = 0; col < 8; col++) {
989 piece_t piece = board[row][col];
990 if (piece != PIECE_EMPTY) {
991 if (piece >= PIECE_WHITE_PAWN && piece <= PIECE_WHITE_QUEEN) {
992 white_total += piece_values[piece];
993 } else if (piece >= PIECE_BLACK_PAWN && piece <= PIECE_BLACK_QUEEN) {
994 black_total +=
995 piece_values[piece - 6]; // Adjust index for black pieces
996 }
997 }
998 }
999 }
1000
1001 if (white_material)
1002 *white_material = white_total;
1003 if (black_material)
1004 *black_material = black_total;
1005
1006 return white_total - black_total;
1007}
1008
1014void game_get_material_string(char *buffer, size_t buffer_size) {
1015 int white_material, black_material;
1016 int balance =
1017 game_calculate_material_balance(&white_material, &black_material);
1018
1019 if (balance > 0) {
1020 snprintf(buffer, buffer_size, "White +%d", balance);
1021 } else if (balance < 0) {
1022 snprintf(buffer, buffer_size, "Black +%d", -balance);
1023 } else {
1024 snprintf(buffer, buffer_size, "Even (+0)");
1025 }
1026}
1027
1028// ============================================================================
1029// GAME STATISTICS DISPLAY
1030// ============================================================================
1031
1036static void game_update_endgame_statistics(game_result_type_t result_type) {
1037 switch (result_type) {
1038 case RESULT_WHITE_WINS:
1039 white_wins++;
1040 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "📊 Statistics: White wins! (Total: %" PRIu32 ")",
1041 white_wins);
1042 break;
1043 case RESULT_BLACK_WINS:
1044 black_wins++;
1045 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "📊 Statistics: Black wins! (Total: %" PRIu32 ")",
1046 black_wins);
1047 break;
1048 case RESULT_DRAW_STALEMATE:
1049 case RESULT_DRAW_50_MOVE:
1050 case RESULT_DRAW_REPETITION:
1051 case RESULT_DRAW_INSUFFICIENT:
1052 draws++;
1053 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "📊 Statistics: Draw! (Total: %" PRIu32 ")", draws);
1054 break;
1055 }
1056 total_games++;
1057 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "📊 Total games: %" PRIu32, total_games);
1058}
1059
1065// ============================================================================
1066// ENDGAME REPORT FORMATTING HELPERS
1067// ============================================================================
1068
1078static void print_report_header(const char *title) {
1079 printf("\r\n");
1080 printf("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\r\n");
1081 printf("%s\r\n", title);
1082 printf("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\r\n");
1083}
1084
1091static void print_separator(void) {
1092 printf("───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\r\n");
1093}
1094
1110static void print_report_line(const char *label, const char *fmt, ...) {
1111 printf(" • %s: ", label);
1112
1113 va_list args;
1114 va_start(args, fmt);
1115 vprintf(fmt, args);
1116 va_end(args);
1117
1118 printf("\r\n");
1119}
1120
1121static void game_print_endgame_report_uart(game_result_type_t result_type) {
1122 uint32_t current_time = esp_timer_get_time() / 1000;
1123 uint32_t game_duration =
1124 (game_start_time > 0) ? (current_time - game_start_time) : 0;
1125 uint32_t minutes = game_duration / 60;
1126 uint32_t seconds = game_duration % 60;
1127
1128 // Print endgame announcement
1129 print_report_header("🏆 ENDGAME REPORT");
1130
1131 // Určit výsledek a typ ukončení podle current_endgame_reason
1132 const char *winner = "";
1133 const char *loser = "";
1134 const char *end_reason = "";
1135
1136 // Nejprve určíme vítěze z result_type
1137 if (result_type == RESULT_WHITE_WINS) {
1138 winner = "White";
1139 loser = "Black";
1140 } else if (result_type == RESULT_BLACK_WINS) {
1141 winner = "Black";
1142 loser = "White";
1143 } else {
1144 winner = "Draw";
1145 loser = "Draw";
1146 }
1147
1148 // Pak určíme důvod konce hry a vytiskneme výsledek
1149 switch (current_endgame_reason) {
1150 // === CHECKMATE VARIATIONS ===
1151 case ENDGAME_REASON_CHECKMATE:
1152 printf("🎯 Game Result: %s WINS BY CHECKMATE\r\n",
1153 (result_type == RESULT_WHITE_WINS) ? "WHITE" : "BLACK");
1154 end_reason = "Checkmate";
1155 break;
1156 case ENDGAME_REASON_CHECKMATE_EN_PASSANT:
1157 printf("⚔️ Game Result: %s WINS BY EN PASSANT CHECKMATE!\r\n",
1158 (result_type == RESULT_WHITE_WINS) ? "WHITE" : "BLACK");
1159 end_reason = "Checkmate (En Passant)";
1160 break;
1161 case ENDGAME_REASON_CHECKMATE_CASTLING:
1162 printf("🏰 Game Result: %s WINS BY CASTLING CHECKMATE!\r\n",
1163 (result_type == RESULT_WHITE_WINS) ? "WHITE" : "BLACK");
1164 end_reason = "Checkmate (Castling)";
1165 break;
1166 case ENDGAME_REASON_CHECKMATE_PROMOTION:
1167 printf("👑 Game Result: %s WINS BY PROMOTION CHECKMATE!\r\n",
1168 (result_type == RESULT_WHITE_WINS) ? "WHITE" : "BLACK");
1169 end_reason = "Checkmate (Promotion)";
1170 break;
1171 case ENDGAME_REASON_CHECKMATE_DISCOVERED:
1172 printf("💥 Game Result: %s WINS BY DISCOVERED CHECK CHECKMATE!\r\n",
1173 (result_type == RESULT_WHITE_WINS) ? "WHITE" : "BLACK");
1174 end_reason = "Checkmate (Discovered Check)";
1175 break;
1176
1177 // === PLAYER ACTIONS ===
1178 case ENDGAME_REASON_RESIGNATION:
1179 printf("🏳️ Game Result: %s WINS BY RESIGNATION\r\n",
1180 (result_type == RESULT_WHITE_WINS) ? "WHITE" : "BLACK");
1181 end_reason = "Resignation";
1182 break;
1183 case ENDGAME_REASON_TIMEOUT:
1184 printf("⏰ Game Result: %s WINS BY TIMEOUT\r\n",
1185 (result_type == RESULT_WHITE_WINS) ? "WHITE" : "BLACK");
1186 end_reason = "Timeout";
1187 break;
1188
1189 // === DRAW CONDITIONS ===
1190 case ENDGAME_REASON_STALEMATE:
1191 printf("🤝 Game Result: DRAW - Stalemate\r\n");
1192 end_reason = "Stalemate";
1193 break;
1194 case ENDGAME_REASON_50_MOVE:
1195 printf("🤝 Game Result: DRAW - 50-move rule\r\n");
1196 end_reason = "50-move rule";
1197 break;
1198 case ENDGAME_REASON_REPETITION:
1199 printf("🤝 Game Result: DRAW - Three-fold repetition\r\n");
1200 end_reason = "Threefold repetition";
1201 break;
1202 case ENDGAME_REASON_INSUFFICIENT:
1203 printf("🤝 Game Result: DRAW - Insufficient material\r\n");
1204 end_reason = "Insufficient material";
1205 break;
1206 }
1207
1208 print_separator();
1209 printf("📋 Game Summary:\r\n");
1210 print_report_line("Winner", "%s", winner);
1211 if (result_type != RESULT_DRAW_STALEMATE &&
1212 result_type != RESULT_DRAW_50_MOVE &&
1213 result_type != RESULT_DRAW_REPETITION &&
1214 result_type != RESULT_DRAW_INSUFFICIENT) {
1215 print_report_line("Loser", "%s", loser);
1216 }
1217 print_report_line("End Reason", "%s", end_reason);
1218 print_report_line("Total Moves", "%" PRIu32, move_count);
1219 print_report_line("Game Duration", "%" PRIu32 ":%02" PRIu32 " (mm:ss)",
1220 minutes, seconds);
1221
1222 // Vypočítat material advantage
1223 int white_material = 0, black_material = 0;
1224 for (uint32_t i = 0; i < white_captured_count; i++) {
1225 piece_t p = white_captured_pieces[i];
1226 if (p == PIECE_BLACK_PAWN)
1227 white_material += 1;
1228 else if (p == PIECE_BLACK_KNIGHT || p == PIECE_BLACK_BISHOP)
1229 white_material += 3;
1230 else if (p == PIECE_BLACK_ROOK)
1231 white_material += 5;
1232 else if (p == PIECE_BLACK_QUEEN)
1233 white_material += 9;
1234 }
1235 for (uint32_t i = 0; i < black_captured_count; i++) {
1236 piece_t p = black_captured_pieces[i];
1237 if (p == PIECE_WHITE_PAWN)
1238 black_material += 1;
1239 else if (p == PIECE_WHITE_KNIGHT || p == PIECE_WHITE_BISHOP)
1240 black_material += 3;
1241 else if (p == PIECE_WHITE_ROOK)
1242 black_material += 5;
1243 else if (p == PIECE_WHITE_QUEEN)
1244 black_material += 9;
1245 }
1246 int material_diff = white_material - black_material;
1247
1248 print_separator();
1249 printf("📊 Game Statistics:\r\n");
1250 print_report_line("White Moves", "%" PRIu32, (move_count + 1) / 2);
1251 print_report_line("Black Moves", "%" PRIu32, move_count / 2);
1252 if (game_duration > 0 && move_count > 0) {
1253 print_report_line("Avg Time per Move", "%" PRIu32 "s",
1254 game_duration / move_count);
1255 }
1256
1257 print_separator();
1258 printf("⚔️ Combat Statistics:\r\n");
1259 print_report_line("White Captures", "%" PRIu32 " pieces (%d points)",
1260 white_captures, white_material);
1261 print_report_line("Black Captures", "%" PRIu32 " pieces (%d points)",
1262 black_captures, black_material);
1263 if (material_diff > 0) {
1264 print_report_line("Material Advantage", "White +%d", material_diff);
1265 } else if (material_diff < 0) {
1266 print_report_line("Material Advantage", "Black +%d", -material_diff);
1267 } else {
1268 print_report_line("Material Advantage", "Equal (0)");
1269 }
1270 print_report_line("White Checks", "%" PRIu32, white_checks);
1271 print_report_line("Black Checks", "%" PRIu32, black_checks);
1272
1273 // Captured pieces vizuálně
1274 if (white_captured_count > 0) {
1275 printf(" • White Captured: ");
1276 for (uint32_t i = 0; i < white_captured_count && i < MAX_CAPTURED_PIECES;
1277 i++) {
1278 char piece_char = piece_to_char(white_captured_pieces[i]);
1279 printf("%c ", piece_char);
1280 }
1281 printf("\r\n");
1282 }
1283 if (black_captured_count > 0) {
1284 printf(" • Black Captured: ");
1285 for (uint32_t i = 0; i < black_captured_count && i < MAX_CAPTURED_PIECES;
1286 i++) {
1287 char piece_char = piece_to_char(black_captured_pieces[i]);
1288 printf("%c ", piece_char);
1289 }
1290 printf("\r\n");
1291 }
1292
1293 // Castling info
1294 print_report_line("White Castling", "%s", white_castles > 0 ? "Yes" : "No");
1295 print_report_line("Black Castling", "%s", black_castles > 0 ? "Yes" : "No");
1296
1297 print_separator();
1298 printf("📈 Overall Statistics:\r\n");
1299 print_report_line("Total Games Played", "%" PRIu32, total_games);
1300 print_report_line("White Wins", "%" PRIu32 " (%.0f%%)", white_wins,
1301 total_games > 0 ? (white_wins * 100.0f / total_games)
1302 : 0.0f);
1303 print_report_line("Black Wins", "%" PRIu32 " (%.0f%%)", black_wins,
1304 total_games > 0 ? (black_wins * 100.0f / total_games)
1305 : 0.0f);
1306 print_report_line("Draws", "%" PRIu32 " (%.0f%%)", draws,
1307 total_games > 0 ? (draws * 100.0f / total_games) : 0.0f);
1308
1309 printf("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\r\n");
1310 printf("\r\n");
1311
1312 // Flush stdout pro okamžité zobrazení
1313 fflush(stdout);
1314}
1315
1319uint32_t game_get_white_wins(void) { return white_wins; }
1320
1324uint32_t game_get_black_wins(void) { return black_wins; }
1325
1329uint32_t game_get_draws(void) { return draws; }
1330
1334uint32_t game_get_total_games(void) { return total_games; }
1335
1339const char *game_get_game_state_string(void) {
1340 switch (current_game_state) {
1341 case GAME_STATE_ACTIVE:
1342 return "Active";
1343 case GAME_STATE_PAUSED:
1344 return "Paused";
1345 case GAME_STATE_FINISHED:
1346 return "Finished";
1347 case GAME_STATE_PROMOTION:
1348 return "Promotion";
1349 case GAME_STATE_IDLE:
1350 return "Idle";
1351 case GAME_STATE_WAITING_FOR_BOARD_SETUP:
1352 return "WaitingForBoardSetup";
1353 default:
1354 return "Unknown";
1355 }
1356}
1357
1361void game_print_game_stats(void) {
1362 uint32_t current_time = esp_timer_get_time() / 1000;
1363 uint32_t game_duration = current_time - game_start_time;
1364 uint32_t minutes = game_duration / 60;
1365 uint32_t seconds = game_duration % 60;
1366
1367 // Calculate average time per move
1368 uint32_t white_avg_time =
1369 (white_moves_count > 0) ? white_time_total / white_moves_count : 0;
1370 uint32_t black_avg_time =
1371 (black_moves_count > 0) ? black_time_total / black_moves_count : 0;
1372
1373 // Get material balance
1374 char material_str[32];
1375 game_get_material_string(material_str, sizeof(material_str));
1376
1377 // Print atmospheric header
1378 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "╔═══════════════════════════════╗");
1379 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "║ ESP32 CHESS v2.4 ║");
1380 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "║ Move %" PRIu32 " - %s to play ║", move_count,
1381 (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? "White" : "Black");
1382 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "║ Material: %s ║", material_str);
1383 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "╚═══════════════════════════════╝");
1384
1385 // Game duration and move info
1386 ESP_LOGI(TAG,
1387 "Game duration: %02" PRIu32 ":%02" PRIu32 ", Move %" PRIu32
1388 " (%s to play)",
1389 minutes, seconds, move_count,
1390 (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? "White" : "Black");
1391
1392 // Capture statistics
1393 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Captures: White %" PRIu32 " pieces, Black %" PRIu32 " pieces",
1394 white_captures, black_captures);
1395
1396 // Check and castle statistics
1397 ESP_LOGI(TAG,
1398 "Checks: White %" PRIu32 ", Black %" PRIu32
1399 " | Castles: White %" PRIu32 ", Black %" PRIu32 "",
1400 white_checks, black_checks, white_castles, black_castles);
1401
1402 // Material breakdown
1403 int white_material, black_material;
1404 game_calculate_material_balance(&white_material, &black_material);
1405 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Material: White %d points, Black %d points (%s)",
1406 white_material, black_material, material_str);
1407
1408 // Time statistics
1409 if (timer_enabled) {
1410 ESP_LOGI(TAG,
1411 "Time per move: White avg %" PRIu32 "s, Black avg %" PRIu32 "s",
1412 white_avg_time, black_avg_time);
1413 }
1414
1415 // Draw detection info
1416 if (moves_without_capture > 30) {
1417 ESP_LOGI(TAG,
1418 "⚠️ %" PRIu32 " moves without capture (50-move rule approaching)",
1419 moves_without_capture);
1420 }
1421
1422 if (game_is_position_repeated()) {
1423 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "⚠️ Position repeated (potential draw by repetition)");
1424 }
1425
1426 // Game save status
1427 if (game_saved) {
1428 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "💾 Game saved as: %s", saved_game_name);
1429 }
1430
1431 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "═══════════════════════════════");
1432}
1433
1434// Last move tracking for board display
1435static uint8_t last_move_from_row = 0;
1436static uint8_t last_move_from_col = 0;
1437static uint8_t last_move_to_row = 0;
1438static uint8_t last_move_to_col = 0;
1439static bool has_last_move = false;
1440
1441// Captured pieces counter (removed - already declared above with char arrays)
1442
1443// ============================================================================
1444// ENHANCED MOVE VALIDATION SYSTEM
1445// ============================================================================
1446
1447// Tutorial mode state
1448static bool tutorial_mode_active = false;
1449static bool show_hints = true;
1451static bool board_setup_tutorial_active = false;
1452typedef struct {
1453 uint8_t id;
1454 uint8_t difficulty;
1455 const char *title;
1456 const char *teaser;
1457 const char *fen;
1458 const char *solution_from;
1459 const char *solution_to;
1460} game_puzzle_definition_t;
1461
1462typedef enum {
1463 PUZZLE_FEEDBACK_NONE = 0,
1464 PUZZLE_FEEDBACK_WRONG = 1,
1465 PUZZLE_FEEDBACK_SOLVED = 2,
1466 PUZZLE_FEEDBACK_ILLEGAL = 3
1467} puzzle_feedback_t;
1468
1469static const game_puzzle_definition_t game_puzzles[] = {
1470 {1, 1, "Mat 1 – Dáma na poslední řadě",
1471 "Klasický motiv: otevřený f-sloupec, dáma dá mat na f8.",
1472 "7k/7p/8/8/8/8/5Q2/6K1 w - - 0 1", "f2", "f8"},
1473 {2, 2, "Mat 1 – Dáma po sloupci",
1474 "Útok po ose: dáma stoupá z b2 na b8.",
1475 "6k1/5ppp/8/8/8/8/1Q6/6K1 w - - 0 1", "b2", "b8"},
1476 {3, 3, "Mat 1 – Věž bere věž",
1477 "Taktika zadní řady: bílá věž sebere černou na e8 a matuje krále.",
1478 "4r1k1/5ppp/8/8/8/8/4R3/4K3 w - - 0 1", "e2", "e8"},
1479 {4, 4, "Mat 1 – Školácký mat",
1480 "Známá ukázková pozice: střelec na c4, dáma na h5 — mat na f7.",
1481 "r1bqkb1r/pppp1ppp/2n2n2/4p2Q/2B1P3/8/PPPP1PPP/RNB1K1NR w KQkq - 0 1",
1482 "h5", "f7"},
1483 {5, 5, "Mat 1 – Dáma na d8",
1484 "Centrální úder: dáma z d4 uzavře mat na poli d8.",
1485 "6k1/5ppp/8/8/3Q4/8/6PP/6K1 w - - 0 1", "d4", "d8"},
1486};
1487static bool puzzle_active = false;
1489static bool puzzle_setup_active = false;
1490static uint8_t puzzle_setup_id = 0;
1491static uint8_t puzzle_active_id = 0;
1492static uint8_t puzzle_solution_from_row = 0;
1493static uint8_t puzzle_solution_from_col = 0;
1494static uint8_t puzzle_solution_to_row = 0;
1495static uint8_t puzzle_solution_to_col = 0;
1496static puzzle_feedback_t puzzle_feedback = PUZZLE_FEEDBACK_NONE;
1497// Game analysis flags (for future use)
1498// static bool show_warnings = true;
1499// static bool show_analysis = true;
1500
1501// Move analysis cache (for future use)
1502// static move_suggestion_t move_suggestions[100];
1503// static uint32_t suggestion_count = 0;
1504// static uint32_t last_analysis_time = 0;
1505
1506// Piece symbols for display (ASCII) - FIXED INDEXES
1507static const char *piece_symbols[] = {
1508 " ", // 0: PIECE_EMPTY
1509 "p", // 1: PIECE_WHITE_PAWN
1510 "n", // 2: PIECE_WHITE_KNIGHT
1511 "b", // 3: PIECE_WHITE_BISHOP
1512 "r", // 4: PIECE_WHITE_ROOK
1513 "q", // 5: PIECE_WHITE_QUEEN
1514 "k", // 6: PIECE_WHITE_KING
1515 "P", // 7: PIECE_BLACK_PAWN
1516 "N", // 8: PIECE_BLACK_KNIGHT
1517 "B", // 9: PIECE_BLACK_BISHOP
1518 "R", // 10: PIECE_BLACK_ROOK
1519 "Q", // 11: PIECE_BLACK_QUEEN
1520 "K" // 12: PIECE_BLACK_KING
1521};
1522
1523// ============================================================================
1524// GAME INITIALIZATION FUNCTIONS
1525// ============================================================================
1526
1528#define GAME_START_POS_MATRIX_SAMPLES 5
1529#define GAME_START_POS_MAJORITY_VOTES 3
1530
1531static bool game_board_starting_occupancy_matches(const uint8_t state[64]) {
1532 for (int row = 2; row < 6; row++) {
1533 for (int col = 0; col < 8; col++) {
1534 if (state[row * 8 + col] != 0) {
1535 return false;
1536 }
1537 }
1538 }
1539 for (int row = 0; row < 2; row++) {
1540 for (int col = 0; col < 8; col++) {
1541 if (state[row * 8 + col] == 0) {
1542 return false;
1543 }
1544 }
1545 }
1546 for (int row = 6; row < 8; row++) {
1547 for (int col = 0; col < 8; col++) {
1548 if (state[row * 8 + col] == 0) {
1549 return false;
1550 }
1551 }
1552 }
1553 return true;
1554}
1555
1556static void game_log_first_startpos_mismatch(const uint8_t state[64]) {
1557 char sq[4];
1558 for (int row = 2; row < 6; row++) {
1559 for (int col = 0; col < 8; col++) {
1560 int idx = row * 8 + col;
1561 if (state[idx] != 0) {
1562 matrix_square_to_notation((uint8_t)idx, sq);
1563 ESP_LOGW(TAG,
1564 "starting position: rank 3–6 square %s must be empty "
1565 "(majority vote saw piece)",
1566 sq);
1567 return;
1568 }
1569 }
1570 }
1571 for (int row = 0; row < 2; row++) {
1572 for (int col = 0; col < 8; col++) {
1573 int idx = row * 8 + col;
1574 if (state[idx] == 0) {
1575 matrix_square_to_notation((uint8_t)idx, sq);
1576 ESP_LOGW(TAG,
1577 "starting position: rank 1–2 square %s must be occupied "
1578 "(majority vote saw empty)",
1579 sq);
1580 return;
1581 }
1582 }
1583 }
1584 for (int row = 6; row < 8; row++) {
1585 for (int col = 0; col < 8; col++) {
1586 int idx = row * 8 + col;
1587 if (state[idx] == 0) {
1588 matrix_square_to_notation((uint8_t)idx, sq);
1589 ESP_LOGW(TAG,
1590 "starting position: rank 7–8 square %s must be occupied "
1591 "(majority vote saw empty)",
1592 sq);
1593 return;
1594 }
1595 }
1596 }
1597}
1598
1605static bool game_is_board_in_starting_position(void) {
1606 uint8_t votes[64] = {0};
1607
1608 for (int s = 0; s < GAME_START_POS_MATRIX_SAMPLES; s++) {
1609 uint8_t snap[64];
1610 matrix_get_state(snap);
1611 for (int i = 0; i < 64; i++) {
1612 votes[i] += snap[i];
1613 }
1614 if (s + 1 < GAME_START_POS_MATRIX_SAMPLES) {
1615 vTaskDelay(pdMS_TO_TICKS(12));
1616 }
1617 }
1618
1619 uint8_t stable[64];
1620 for (int i = 0; i < 64; i++) {
1621 stable[i] = (votes[i] >= GAME_START_POS_MAJORITY_VOTES) ? 1 : 0;
1622 }
1623
1624 if (game_board_starting_occupancy_matches(stable)) {
1625 return true;
1626 }
1627 game_log_first_startpos_mismatch(stable);
1628 return false;
1629}
1630
1637static void game_show_missing_pieces_led(void) {
1638 uint8_t matrix_state[64] = {0};
1639 matrix_get_state(matrix_state);
1640
1641 // Vyčistit desku
1642 led_clear_board_only();
1643
1644 // Definice očekávané počáteční pozice (row-major order)
1645 // Rows 0-1 a 6-7 by měly být obsazené, rows 2-5 prázdné
1646 for (int row = 0; row < 2; row++) {
1647 for (int col = 0; col < 8; col++) {
1648 int idx = row * 8 + col;
1649 if (matrix_state[idx] == 0) {
1650 // Chybí figurka na bílém základním řádku
1651 led_set_pixel_safe(chess_pos_to_led_index(row, col), 255, 0, 0); // Červená
1652 }
1653 }
1654 }
1655 for (int row = 6; row < 8; row++) {
1656 for (int col = 0; col < 8; col++) {
1657 int idx = row * 8 + col;
1658 if (matrix_state[idx] == 0) {
1659 // Chybí figurka na černém základním řádku
1660 led_set_pixel_safe(chess_pos_to_led_index(row, col), 255, 0, 0); // Červená
1661 }
1662 }
1663 }
1664 for (int row = 2; row < 6; row++) {
1665 for (int col = 0; col < 8; col++) {
1666 int idx = row * 8 + col;
1667 if (matrix_state[idx] != 0) {
1668 // Náhodná figurka uprostřed desky - také červeně
1669 led_set_pixel_safe(chess_pos_to_led_index(row, col), 255, 0, 0); // Červená
1670 }
1671 }
1672 }
1673
1674 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🔴 LED: Showing missing pieces in red");
1675}
1676
1690void game_initialize_board(void) {
1691 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Initializing enhanced chess board...");
1692
1693 // Clear board
1694 memset(board, 0, sizeof(board));
1695 memset(piece_moved, 0, sizeof(piece_moved));
1696
1697 // Set up white pieces (bottom rank - row 1, index 0)
1698 board[0][0] = PIECE_WHITE_ROOK; // a1
1699 board[0][1] = PIECE_WHITE_KNIGHT; // b1
1700 board[0][2] = PIECE_WHITE_BISHOP; // c1
1701 board[0][3] = PIECE_WHITE_QUEEN; // d1
1702 board[0][4] = PIECE_WHITE_KING; // e1
1703 board[0][5] = PIECE_WHITE_BISHOP; // f1
1704 board[0][6] = PIECE_WHITE_KNIGHT; // g1
1705 board[0][7] = PIECE_WHITE_ROOK; // h1
1706
1707 // Set up white pawns (row 2, index 1)
1708 for (int col = 0; col < 8; col++) {
1709 board[1][col] = PIECE_WHITE_PAWN;
1710 }
1711
1712 // Rows 3-6 (indices 2-5) remain empty
1713
1714 // Set up black pawns (row 7, index 6)
1715 for (int col = 0; col < 8; col++) {
1716 board[6][col] = PIECE_BLACK_PAWN;
1717 }
1718
1719 // Set up black pieces (top rank - row 8, index 7)
1720 board[7][0] = PIECE_BLACK_ROOK; // a8
1721 board[7][1] = PIECE_BLACK_KNIGHT; // b8
1722 board[7][2] = PIECE_BLACK_BISHOP; // c8
1723 board[7][3] = PIECE_BLACK_QUEEN; // d8
1724 board[7][4] = PIECE_BLACK_KING; // e8
1725 board[7][5] = PIECE_BLACK_BISHOP; // f8
1726 board[7][6] = PIECE_BLACK_KNIGHT; // g8
1727 board[7][7] = PIECE_BLACK_ROOK; // h8
1728
1729 // Reset game state
1730 current_player = PLAYER_WHITE;
1731 current_game_state = GAME_STATE_ACTIVE;
1732 move_count = 0;
1733
1734 // Reset castling flags (declared later in the file)
1735 white_king_moved = false;
1736 white_rook_a_moved = false;
1737 white_rook_h_moved = false;
1738 black_king_moved = false;
1739 black_rook_a_moved = false;
1740 black_rook_h_moved = false;
1741
1742 // Reset internal castling state machine.
1743 memset(&castling_state, 0, sizeof(castling_state));
1744
1745 // Reset en passant (declared later in the file)
1746 // en_passant_available = false;
1747
1748 // Reset other counters (declared later in the file)
1749 // fifty_move_counter = 0;
1750 // position_history_count = 0;
1751
1752 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Enhanced chess board initialized successfully");
1753 ESP_LOGI(TAG,
1754 "Initial position: White pieces at bottom, Black pieces at top");
1755
1756 // Update promotion LED indications.
1757 game_check_promotion_needed();
1758
1759 // Board will be displayed after all tasks are initialized
1760}
1761
1762static void game_bump_revision_and_notify(void) {
1763 game_task_wdt_reset_safe();
1764 game_state_revision++;
1765 if (game_state_revision == 0U) {
1766 game_state_revision = 1U;
1767 }
1768 game_task_wdt_reset_safe();
1769 czechmate_on_game_state_changed();
1770 game_task_wdt_reset_safe();
1771}
1772
1773uint32_t game_get_state_revision(void) { return game_state_revision; }
1774
1791void game_reset_game(void) {
1792 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Resetting game...");
1793
1794 // Zastavit resignation timer pokud běží (tichý cleanup, hra se resetuje)
1795 if (resignation_state.active) {
1796 resignation_stop(true);
1797 }
1798
1799 // Reset game state
1800 current_game_state = GAME_STATE_IDLE;
1801 current_player = PLAYER_WHITE;
1802 game_start_time = 0;
1803 last_move_time = 0;
1804 move_count = 0;
1805 game_active = false;
1806
1807 // Reset extended statistics
1808 white_time_total = 0;
1809 black_time_total = 0;
1810 white_moves_count = 0;
1811 black_moves_count = 0;
1812 white_captures = 0;
1813 black_captures = 0;
1814 white_checks = 0;
1815 black_checks = 0;
1816 white_castles = 0;
1817 black_castles = 0;
1818 moves_without_capture = 0;
1819 max_moves_without_capture = 0;
1820 position_history_count = 0;
1821 game_result = GAME_STATE_IDLE;
1822 current_result_type = RESULT_WHITE_WINS; // Reset pro novou hru
1823 current_endgame_reason = ENDGAME_REASON_CHECKMATE; // Reset endgame reason.
1824 last_move_type = LAST_MOVE_NORMAL; // Reset last move type.
1825 game_saved = false;
1826 saved_game_name[0] = '\0';
1827
1828 // Clear move history
1829 memset(move_history, 0, sizeof(move_history));
1830 memset(move_history_kind, 0, sizeof(move_history_kind));
1831 history_index = 0;
1832 puzzle_active = false;
1833 puzzle_active_id = 0;
1834 puzzle_setup_active = false;
1835 puzzle_setup_id = 0;
1836 puzzle_feedback = PUZZLE_FEEDBACK_NONE;
1837
1838 // Clear captured pieces
1839 white_captured_count = 0;
1840 black_captured_count = 0;
1841 white_captured_index = 0;
1842 black_captured_index = 0;
1843
1844 // Clear material advantage history
1845 advantage_history_count = 0;
1846 memset(material_advantage_history, 0, sizeof(material_advantage_history));
1847
1848 // Clear last move tracking
1849 has_last_move = false;
1850
1851 // Kompletní reset error recovery state
1852 error_recovery_state.has_invalid_piece = false;
1853 error_recovery_state.invalid_row = 0;
1854 error_recovery_state.invalid_col = 0;
1855 error_recovery_state.original_valid_row = 0;
1856 error_recovery_state.original_valid_col = 0;
1857 error_recovery_state.piece_type = PIECE_EMPTY;
1858 error_recovery_state.waiting_for_move_correction = false;
1859 error_recovery_state.error_count = 0;
1860
1861 // Reset opponent piece recovery state
1862 opponent_piece_moved = false;
1863 opponent_piece_type = PIECE_EMPTY;
1864 opponent_original_row = 0;
1865 opponent_original_col = 0;
1866 opponent_current_row = 0;
1867 opponent_current_col = 0;
1868
1869 // Reset capture state
1870 capture_in_progress = false;
1871 capture_target_row = 0;
1872 capture_target_col = 0;
1873 capture_removed_piece = PIECE_EMPTY;
1874
1875 // Reset guided capture state
1876 guided_capture_state.active = false;
1877 guided_capture_state.target_row = 0;
1878 guided_capture_state.target_col = 0;
1879 guided_capture_state.target_piece = PIECE_EMPTY;
1880 guided_capture_state.attacker_count = 0;
1881 memset(guided_capture_state.attacker_rows, 0,
1882 sizeof(guided_capture_state.attacker_rows));
1883 memset(guided_capture_state.attacker_cols, 0,
1884 sizeof(guided_capture_state.attacker_cols));
1885 memset(guided_capture_state.attacker_pieces, 0,
1886 sizeof(guided_capture_state.attacker_pieces));
1887
1888 // Reset matrix guard pause state
1889 memset(&matrix_guard_pause_state, 0, sizeof(matrix_guard_pause_state));
1890 resync_required_after_restore = false;
1891
1892 // Reset promotion state to prevent blocking moves in a new game.
1893 promotion_state.pending = false;
1894 promotion_state.square_row = 0;
1895 promotion_state.square_col = 0;
1896 promotion_state.player = PLAYER_WHITE;
1897
1898 // Reset lifted piece state.
1899 piece_lifted = false;
1900 lifted_piece_row = 0;
1901 lifted_piece_col = 0;
1902 lifted_piece = PIECE_EMPTY;
1903
1904 /* Každý plný reset hry končí tutoriál rozestavení; vstup do tutoriálu ho hned
1905 * znovu zapne (game_enter_board_setup_tutorial). Dřív zůstával true po „Nová
1906 * hra“ z webu → ignorovaný matrix guard a zamrzlá detekce z matice. */
1907 board_setup_tutorial_active = false;
1908
1909 // Reset auto-new game detection flags.
1910 // This allows auto-new game to work after manual resets or when pieces are
1911 // manually arranged into starting position
1912 auto_new_game_in_starting_position = false;
1913 auto_new_game_triggered = false;
1914 auto_new_game_blocked_until_move = false; // Reset block flag too
1915 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "✅ Auto new game detection flags reset in game_reset_game()");
1916
1917 // Zastavit endgame animaci při resetu hry
1918 led_stop_endgame_animation();
1919
1920 // Reinitialize board
1921 game_initialize_board();
1922
1923 matrix_abort_ambiguous_guard_baseline();
1924
1925 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Game reset completed");
1926 game_bump_revision_and_notify();
1927}
1928
1933static void game_apply_empty_logical_board_after_full_reset(void) {
1934 memset(board, 0, sizeof(board));
1935 memset(piece_moved, 0, sizeof(piece_moved));
1936 current_game_state = GAME_STATE_IDLE;
1937 game_active = false;
1938 move_count = 0;
1939 white_king_moved = true;
1940 white_rook_a_moved = true;
1941 white_rook_h_moved = true;
1942 black_king_moved = true;
1943 black_rook_a_moved = true;
1944 black_rook_h_moved = true;
1945 memset(&castling_state, 0, sizeof(castling_state));
1946 en_passant_available = false;
1947 game_check_promotion_needed();
1948}
1949
1950void game_enter_board_setup_tutorial(void) {
1951 game_puzzle_cancel();
1952 game_reset_game();
1953 game_apply_empty_logical_board_after_full_reset();
1954 board_setup_tutorial_active = true;
1955 STAGING_LOGI(TAG,
1956 "board_setup_tutorial: entered (empty logical, guard bypass)");
1957}
1958
1959void game_exit_board_setup_tutorial(bool apply_full_start_position) {
1960 board_setup_tutorial_active = false;
1961 if (apply_full_start_position) {
1962 game_start_new_game();
1963 STAGING_LOGI(TAG, "board_setup_tutorial: exited with full start position");
1964 return;
1965 }
1966 game_reset_game();
1967 game_apply_empty_logical_board_after_full_reset();
1968 STAGING_LOGI(TAG, "board_setup_tutorial: cancelled (empty logical board)");
1969}
1970
1971bool game_is_board_setup_tutorial_active(void) {
1972 return board_setup_tutorial_active;
1973}
1974
1975bool game_is_physical_board_starting_occupancy(void) {
1976 return game_is_board_in_starting_position();
1977}
1978
1979bool game_finish_board_setup_tutorial_from_web(void) {
1980 bool physical_ok = false;
1981 if (game_mutex != NULL) {
1982 if (xSemaphoreTake(game_mutex, pdMS_TO_TICKS(2000)) != pdTRUE) {
1983 return false;
1984 }
1985 }
1986 if (!board_setup_tutorial_active) {
1987 if (game_mutex != NULL) {
1988 xSemaphoreGive(game_mutex);
1989 }
1990 return false;
1991 }
1992 physical_ok = game_is_board_in_starting_position();
1993 if (!physical_ok) {
1994 if (game_mutex != NULL) {
1995 xSemaphoreGive(game_mutex);
1996 }
1997 return false;
1998 }
1999 board_setup_tutorial_active = false;
2000 if (game_mutex != NULL) {
2001 xSemaphoreGive(game_mutex);
2002 }
2003 game_start_new_game();
2004 STAGING_LOGI(TAG,
2005 "board_setup_tutorial: finish OK — physical start, new game");
2006 return true;
2007}
2008
2009static bool game_parse_piece_from_fen(char c, piece_t *out_piece) {
2010 if (out_piece == NULL) {
2011 return false;
2012 }
2013 switch (c) {
2014 case 'P':
2015 *out_piece = PIECE_WHITE_PAWN;
2016 return true;
2017 case 'N':
2018 *out_piece = PIECE_WHITE_KNIGHT;
2019 return true;
2020 case 'B':
2021 *out_piece = PIECE_WHITE_BISHOP;
2022 return true;
2023 case 'R':
2024 *out_piece = PIECE_WHITE_ROOK;
2025 return true;
2026 case 'Q':
2027 *out_piece = PIECE_WHITE_QUEEN;
2028 return true;
2029 case 'K':
2030 *out_piece = PIECE_WHITE_KING;
2031 return true;
2032 case 'p':
2033 *out_piece = PIECE_BLACK_PAWN;
2034 return true;
2035 case 'n':
2036 *out_piece = PIECE_BLACK_KNIGHT;
2037 return true;
2038 case 'b':
2039 *out_piece = PIECE_BLACK_BISHOP;
2040 return true;
2041 case 'r':
2042 *out_piece = PIECE_BLACK_ROOK;
2043 return true;
2044 case 'q':
2045 *out_piece = PIECE_BLACK_QUEEN;
2046 return true;
2047 case 'k':
2048 *out_piece = PIECE_BLACK_KING;
2049 return true;
2050 default:
2051 return false;
2052 }
2053}
2054
2055static bool game_load_position_from_fen(const char *fen, player_t *active_player) {
2056 if (fen == NULL || active_player == NULL) {
2057 return false;
2058 }
2059
2060 memset(board, 0, sizeof(board));
2061
2062 int row = 7;
2063 int col = 0;
2064 const char *p = fen;
2065 while (*p != '\0' && *p != ' ') {
2066 if (*p == '/') {
2067 if (col != 8) {
2068 return false;
2069 }
2070 row--;
2071 col = 0;
2072 p++;
2073 continue;
2074 }
2075 if (*p >= '1' && *p <= '8') {
2076 col += (*p - '0');
2077 if (col > 8) {
2078 return false;
2079 }
2080 p++;
2081 continue;
2082 }
2083 piece_t piece = PIECE_EMPTY;
2084 if (!game_parse_piece_from_fen(*p, &piece)) {
2085 return false;
2086 }
2087 if (row < 0 || row > 7 || col < 0 || col > 7) {
2088 return false;
2089 }
2090 board[row][col] = piece;
2091 col++;
2092 p++;
2093 }
2094
2095 if (row != 0 || col != 8 || *p != ' ') {
2096 return false;
2097 }
2098
2099 p++;
2100 if (*p == 'w') {
2101 *active_player = PLAYER_WHITE;
2102 } else if (*p == 'b') {
2103 *active_player = PLAYER_BLACK;
2104 } else {
2105 return false;
2106 }
2107 return true;
2108}
2109
2110static const game_puzzle_definition_t *game_get_puzzle_definition(uint8_t puzzle_id) {
2111 for (size_t i = 0; i < (sizeof(game_puzzles) / sizeof(game_puzzles[0])); i++) {
2112 if (game_puzzles[i].id == puzzle_id) {
2113 return &game_puzzles[i];
2114 }
2115 }
2116 return NULL;
2117}
2118
2120static bool game_fen_expected_occupancy_64(const char *fen, uint8_t exp[64]) {
2121 memset(exp, 0, 64);
2122 if (fen == NULL) {
2123 return false;
2124 }
2125 int row = 7;
2126 int col = 0;
2127 const char *p = fen;
2128 while (*p != '\0' && *p != ' ') {
2129 if (*p == '/') {
2130 if (col != 8) {
2131 return false;
2132 }
2133 row--;
2134 col = 0;
2135 p++;
2136 continue;
2137 }
2138 if (*p >= '1' && *p <= '8') {
2139 col += (*p - '0');
2140 if (col > 8) {
2141 return false;
2142 }
2143 p++;
2144 continue;
2145 }
2146 if (row < 0 || row > 7 || col < 0 || col > 7) {
2147 return false;
2148 }
2149 exp[row * 8 + col] = 1;
2150 col++;
2151 p++;
2152 }
2153 return (row == 0 && col == 8 && *p == ' ');
2154}
2155
2156static bool game_puzzle_physical_matches_fen(const char *fen) {
2157 uint8_t exp[64];
2158 if (!game_fen_expected_occupancy_64(fen, exp)) {
2159 return false;
2160 }
2161 uint8_t phys[64];
2162 matrix_get_state(phys);
2163 for (int i = 0; i < 64; i++) {
2164 uint8_t want = exp[i] ? (uint8_t)1 : (uint8_t)0;
2165 uint8_t got = phys[i] ? (uint8_t)1 : (uint8_t)0;
2166 if (want != got) {
2167 return false;
2168 }
2169 }
2170 return true;
2171}
2172
2173bool game_puzzle_enter_setup(uint8_t puzzle_id) {
2174 const game_puzzle_definition_t *puzzle = game_get_puzzle_definition(puzzle_id);
2175 if (puzzle == NULL) {
2176 return false;
2177 }
2178 if (board_setup_tutorial_active) {
2179 game_exit_board_setup_tutorial(false);
2180 }
2181 game_puzzle_cancel();
2182 game_reset_game();
2183 game_apply_empty_logical_board_after_full_reset();
2184 puzzle_setup_active = true;
2185 puzzle_setup_id = puzzle_id;
2186 led_clear_board_only();
2187 STAGING_LOGI(TAG, "puzzle: enter setup id=%u", (unsigned)puzzle_id);
2188 return true;
2189}
2190
2191bool game_is_puzzle_setup_active(void) { return puzzle_setup_active; }
2192
2193bool game_puzzle_start(uint8_t puzzle_id) {
2194 const game_puzzle_definition_t *puzzle = game_get_puzzle_definition(puzzle_id);
2195 if (puzzle == NULL) {
2196 return false;
2197 }
2198
2199 game_reset_game();
2200
2201 player_t fen_player = PLAYER_WHITE;
2202 if (!game_load_position_from_fen(puzzle->fen, &fen_player)) {
2203 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "puzzle: failed to load FEN for id=%u", (unsigned)puzzle_id);
2204 return false;
2205 }
2206
2207 uint8_t from_row = 0, from_col = 0, to_row = 0, to_col = 0;
2208 if (!convert_notation_to_coords(puzzle->solution_from, &from_row, &from_col) ||
2209 !convert_notation_to_coords(puzzle->solution_to, &to_row, &to_col)) {
2210 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "puzzle: invalid solution notation for id=%u",
2211 (unsigned)puzzle_id);
2212 return false;
2213 }
2214
2215 current_player = fen_player;
2216 current_game_state = GAME_STATE_ACTIVE;
2217 game_active = true;
2218 game_start_time = esp_timer_get_time() / 1000;
2219 last_move_time = game_start_time;
2220 board_setup_tutorial_active = false;
2221 puzzle_setup_active = false;
2222 puzzle_setup_id = 0;
2223 puzzle_active = true;
2224 puzzle_active_id = puzzle_id;
2225 puzzle_solution_from_row = from_row;
2226 puzzle_solution_from_col = from_col;
2227 puzzle_solution_to_row = to_row;
2228 puzzle_solution_to_col = to_col;
2229 puzzle_feedback = PUZZLE_FEEDBACK_NONE;
2230 led_clear_board_only();
2231 game_highlight_movable_pieces();
2232 STAGING_LOGI(TAG, "puzzle: started id=%u difficulty=%u",
2233 (unsigned)puzzle->id, (unsigned)puzzle->difficulty);
2234 return true;
2235}
2236
2237void game_puzzle_cancel(void) {
2238 bool was = puzzle_active || puzzle_setup_active;
2239 puzzle_active = false;
2240 puzzle_active_id = 0;
2241 puzzle_setup_active = false;
2242 puzzle_setup_id = 0;
2243 puzzle_feedback = PUZZLE_FEEDBACK_NONE;
2244 if (was) {
2245 STAGING_LOGI(TAG, "puzzle: cancelled");
2246 }
2247}
2248
2249bool game_is_puzzle_active(void) {
2250 return puzzle_active;
2251}
2252
2253static const char *game_puzzle_feedback_key(void) {
2254 switch (puzzle_feedback) {
2255 case PUZZLE_FEEDBACK_WRONG:
2256 return "wrong";
2257 case PUZZLE_FEEDBACK_SOLVED:
2258 return "solved";
2259 case PUZZLE_FEEDBACK_ILLEGAL:
2260 return "illegal";
2261 case PUZZLE_FEEDBACK_NONE:
2262 default:
2263 return "none";
2264 }
2265}
2266
2267static const char *game_puzzle_feedback_message(void) {
2268 switch (puzzle_feedback) {
2269 case PUZZLE_FEEDBACK_WRONG:
2270 return "To neni spravne reseni, vrat figurku na puvodni pole.";
2271 case PUZZLE_FEEDBACK_SOLVED:
2272 return "Spravne! Puzzle je vyresene.";
2273 case PUZZLE_FEEDBACK_ILLEGAL:
2274 return "Nelegalni tah, zkus jiny.";
2275 case PUZZLE_FEEDBACK_NONE:
2276 default:
2277 return "";
2278 }
2279}
2280
2296void game_start_new_game(void) {
2297 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Starting new game...");
2298
2299 game_task_wdt_reset_safe();
2300 (void)config_erase_key_from_nvs(CONFIG_NVS_KEY_GAME_SNAPSHOT_FULL);
2301 (void)config_erase_key_from_nvs(CONFIG_NVS_KEY_GAME_SNAPSHOT_MIN);
2302 (void)config_erase_key_from_nvs(CONFIG_NVS_KEY_BOOT_TRACKER);
2303 game_task_wdt_reset_safe();
2304
2305 snapshot_save_failed = false;
2306 snapshot_restore_failed = false;
2307
2308 // Reset game
2309 game_reset_game();
2310 game_task_wdt_reset_safe();
2311
2312 // Reset timer před novou hrou
2313 game_reset_timer();
2314 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Timer reset for new game");
2315
2316 // BUG FIX 1: Kontrola fyzické desky před aktivací hry (pouze pokud je hlídání zapnuto)
2317 if (starting_position_check_enabled && !game_is_board_in_starting_position()) {
2318 // Deska není fyzicky připravena - přejít do stavu čekání
2319 current_game_state = GAME_STATE_WAITING_FOR_BOARD_SETUP;
2320 game_active = false;
2321
2322 // LED indikace: červené blikání chybějících polí
2323 game_show_missing_pieces_led();
2324
2325 // Notify web
2326 game_bump_revision_and_notify();
2327
2328 ESP_LOGW(TAG, "Board not in starting position - waiting for physical setup");
2329 return;
2330 }
2331
2332 // Set game state - pouze když je deska OK
2333 current_game_state = GAME_STATE_ACTIVE;
2334 game_active = true;
2335 game_start_time = esp_timer_get_time() / 1000;
2336 last_move_time = game_start_time;
2337
2338 // Start timer for white player if time control is active
2339 if (game_is_timer_active()) {
2340 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Starting timer for white player at game start");
2341 game_start_timer_move(true); // Start timer for white
2342 }
2343
2344 // Initialize extended statistics
2345 white_time_total = 0;
2346 black_time_total = 0;
2347 white_moves_count = 0;
2348 black_moves_count = 0;
2349 white_captures = 0;
2350 black_captures = 0;
2351 white_checks = 0;
2352 black_checks = 0;
2353 white_castles = 0;
2354 black_castles = 0;
2355 moves_without_capture = 0;
2356 max_moves_without_capture = 0;
2357 position_history_count = 0;
2358 game_result = GAME_STATE_IDLE;
2359 game_saved = false;
2360 saved_game_name[0] = '\0';
2361
2362 total_games++;
2363
2364 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "New game started - White to move");
2365 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Total games: %" PRIu32, total_games);
2366
2367 // Boot sequence: first game vs. restart.
2368 if (total_games > 1) {
2369 // Restart hry - zastavit všechny animace
2370 unified_animation_stop_all();
2371 led_stop_endgame_animation(); // Legacy endgame animations
2372 stop_endgame_animation(); // Stop NEW endgame animations system
2373 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "✅ All animations stopped for new game (restart)");
2374 } else {
2375 // První hra - boot sequence stále probíhá
2376 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "⏸️ Boot sequence: Skipping animation stop (first game)");
2377 }
2378
2379 // Wait for boot animation to finish if running (critical for button LEDs)
2380 while (led_is_booting()) {
2381 vTaskDelay(pdMS_TO_TICKS(100));
2382 game_task_wdt_reset_safe();
2383 }
2384
2385 // Update promotion LED indications
2386 game_check_promotion_needed();
2387 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "✅ Updated promotion button LED indications");
2388
2389 // Reset auto-new game flags for all games (not just the first).
2390 // This allows auto-new game detection to work after manual resets
2391 auto_new_game_in_starting_position = false;
2392 auto_new_game_triggered = false;
2393 auto_new_game_blocked_until_move = false; // Reset block flag too
2394 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "✅ Auto new game detection flags reset for new game");
2395
2396 // Boot sequence: first game vs. restart.
2397 if (total_games >= 1) { // Povolit highlight i pro první hru!
2398 // Restart hry - zvýraznit pohyblivé figurky
2399 vTaskDelay(pdMS_TO_TICKS(100)); // Krátká pauza pro stabilizaci
2400 game_task_wdt_reset_safe();
2401 game_highlight_movable_pieces();
2402 game_task_wdt_reset_safe();
2403 ESP_LOGI(TAG,
2404 "✅ Highlighted movable pieces for starting player (restart)");
2405 } else {
2406 // První hra - boot sequence stále probíhá, skipnout highlight
2407 ESP_LOGI(
2408 TAG,
2409 "⏸️ Boot sequence: Skipping movable pieces highlight (first game)");
2410 }
2411 game_bump_revision_and_notify();
2412}
2413
2414void game_start_new_game_from_fen(const char *fen) {
2415 if (fen == NULL || fen[0] == '\0') {
2416 game_start_new_game();
2417 return;
2418 }
2419
2420 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Starting new game from FEN...");
2421 game_task_wdt_reset_safe();
2422 (void)config_erase_key_from_nvs(CONFIG_NVS_KEY_GAME_SNAPSHOT_FULL);
2423 (void)config_erase_key_from_nvs(CONFIG_NVS_KEY_GAME_SNAPSHOT_MIN);
2424 (void)config_erase_key_from_nvs(CONFIG_NVS_KEY_BOOT_TRACKER);
2425 game_task_wdt_reset_safe();
2426
2427 snapshot_save_failed = false;
2428 snapshot_restore_failed = false;
2429
2430 game_reset_game();
2431 game_task_wdt_reset_safe();
2432 game_reset_timer();
2433
2434 player_t fen_player = PLAYER_WHITE;
2435 if (!game_load_position_from_fen(fen, &fen_player)) {
2436 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "FEN parse failed, falling back to standard new game");
2437 game_start_new_game();
2438 return;
2439 }
2440
2441 white_king_moved = true;
2442 black_king_moved = true;
2443 white_rook_a_moved = true;
2444 white_rook_h_moved = true;
2445 black_rook_a_moved = true;
2446 black_rook_h_moved = true;
2447 en_passant_available = false;
2448 en_passant_target_row = 0;
2449 en_passant_target_col = 0;
2450 en_passant_victim_row = 0;
2451 en_passant_victim_col = 0;
2452
2453 puzzle_active = false;
2454 puzzle_active_id = 0;
2455 puzzle_setup_active = false;
2456 puzzle_setup_id = 0;
2457 puzzle_feedback = PUZZLE_FEEDBACK_NONE;
2458 board_setup_tutorial_active = false;
2459
2460 current_player = fen_player;
2461 current_game_state = GAME_STATE_ACTIVE;
2462 game_active = true;
2463 game_start_time = esp_timer_get_time() / 1000;
2464 last_move_time = game_start_time;
2465
2466 if (game_is_timer_active()) {
2467 game_start_timer_move(fen_player == PLAYER_WHITE);
2468 }
2469
2470 white_time_total = 0;
2471 black_time_total = 0;
2472 white_moves_count = 0;
2473 black_moves_count = 0;
2474 white_captures = 0;
2475 black_captures = 0;
2476 white_checks = 0;
2477 black_checks = 0;
2478 white_castles = 0;
2479 black_castles = 0;
2480 moves_without_capture = 0;
2481 max_moves_without_capture = 0;
2482 position_history_count = 0;
2483 game_result = GAME_STATE_IDLE;
2484 game_saved = false;
2485 saved_game_name[0] = '\0';
2486 total_games++;
2487
2488 if (total_games > 1) {
2489 unified_animation_stop_all();
2490 led_stop_endgame_animation();
2491 stop_endgame_animation();
2492 }
2493
2494 while (led_is_booting()) {
2495 vTaskDelay(pdMS_TO_TICKS(100));
2496 game_task_wdt_reset_safe();
2497 }
2498
2499 game_check_promotion_needed();
2500 auto_new_game_in_starting_position = false;
2501 auto_new_game_triggered = false;
2502 auto_new_game_blocked_until_move = false;
2503
2504 if (total_games >= 1) {
2505 vTaskDelay(pdMS_TO_TICKS(100));
2506 game_task_wdt_reset_safe();
2507 game_highlight_movable_pieces();
2508 game_task_wdt_reset_safe();
2509 }
2510 game_bump_revision_and_notify();
2511}
2512
2513// ============================================================================
2514// BOARD UTILITY FUNCTIONS
2515// ============================================================================
2516
2517bool game_is_valid_position(int row, int col) {
2518 return (row >= 0 && row < 8 && col >= 0 && col < 8);
2519}
2520
2521piece_t game_get_piece(int row, int col) {
2522 if (!game_is_valid_position(row, col)) {
2523 return PIECE_EMPTY;
2524 }
2525 return board[row][col];
2526}
2527
2528void game_set_piece(int row, int col, piece_t piece) {
2529 if (!game_is_valid_position(row, col)) {
2530 return;
2531 }
2532 board[row][col] = piece;
2533}
2534
2535bool game_is_empty(int row, int col) {
2536 return game_get_piece(row, col) == PIECE_EMPTY;
2537}
2538
2539bool game_is_white_piece(piece_t piece) {
2540 return (piece >= PIECE_WHITE_PAWN && piece <= PIECE_WHITE_KING);
2541}
2542
2543bool game_is_black_piece(piece_t piece) {
2544 return (piece >= PIECE_BLACK_PAWN && piece <= PIECE_BLACK_KING);
2545}
2546
2547bool game_is_same_color(piece_t piece1, piece_t piece2) {
2548 if (piece1 == PIECE_EMPTY || piece2 == PIECE_EMPTY) {
2549 return false;
2550 }
2551 return (game_is_white_piece(piece1) && game_is_white_piece(piece2)) ||
2552 (game_is_black_piece(piece1) && game_is_black_piece(piece2));
2553}
2554
2555bool game_is_opponent_piece(piece_t piece, player_t player) {
2556 if (piece == PIECE_EMPTY) {
2557 return false;
2558 }
2559
2560 if (player == PLAYER_WHITE) {
2561 return game_is_black_piece(piece);
2562 } else {
2563 return game_is_white_piece(piece);
2564 }
2565}
2566
2567// ============================================================================
2568// MOVE VALIDATION FUNCTIONS
2569// ============================================================================
2570
2571move_error_t game_is_valid_move(const chess_move_t *move) {
2572 if (!move) {
2573 return MOVE_ERROR_INVALID_MOVE_STRUCTURE;
2574 }
2575
2576 if (!game_is_valid_position(move->from_row, move->from_col) ||
2577 !game_is_valid_position(move->to_row, move->to_col)) {
2578 return MOVE_ERROR_OUT_OF_BOUNDS;
2579 }
2580
2581 if (!game_active) {
2582 return MOVE_ERROR_GAME_NOT_ACTIVE;
2583 }
2584
2585 // Check if source position has a piece
2586 piece_t source_piece = game_get_piece(move->from_row, move->from_col);
2587
2588 // Pokud je source_piece prázdné (král je zvednutý během resignation timeru),
2589 // použít move->piece místo source_piece
2590 if (source_piece == PIECE_EMPTY) {
2591 // Pokud je resignation timer aktivní a move->piece je král, použít
2592 // move->piece
2593 if (resignation_state.active && move->piece != PIECE_EMPTY &&
2594 (move->piece == PIECE_WHITE_KING || move->piece == PIECE_BLACK_KING) &&
2595 resignation_state.king_row == move->from_row &&
2596 resignation_state.king_col == move->from_col) {
2597 source_piece = move->piece;
2598 ESP_LOGI(TAG,
2599 "🏰 game_is_valid_move: Using move->piece (%d) because king is "
2600 "lifted (resignation timer active)",
2601 move->piece);
2602 } else {
2603 return MOVE_ERROR_NO_PIECE;
2604 }
2605 }
2606
2607 // Check if source piece belongs to current player
2608 if ((current_player == PLAYER_WHITE && !game_is_white_piece(source_piece)) ||
2609 (current_player == PLAYER_BLACK && !game_is_black_piece(source_piece))) {
2610 return MOVE_ERROR_WRONG_COLOR;
2611 }
2612
2613 // Check if destination is occupied by own piece
2614 piece_t dest_piece = game_get_piece(move->to_row, move->to_col);
2615 if (dest_piece != PIECE_EMPTY &&
2616 game_is_same_color(source_piece, dest_piece)) {
2617 return MOVE_ERROR_DESTINATION_OCCUPIED;
2618 }
2619
2620 // KONTROLA ROŠÁDY V PROGRESS - PŘED validací pohybu figurky
2621 // Pokud je to správný rošáda tah věže, přeskočit standardní validaci pohybu
2622 // figurky (která by jinak zjistila, že cesta je blokovaná králem)
2623 bool is_castling_rook_move = false;
2624 if (castling_state.in_progress) {
2625 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🏰 game_is_valid_move: Castling in progress - checking if "
2626 "this is the expected rook move");
2627 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🏰 Expected: from %c%d to %c%d, actual: from %c%d to %c%d",
2628 'a' + castling_state.rook_from_col,
2629 castling_state.rook_from_row + 1, 'a' + castling_state.rook_to_col,
2630 castling_state.rook_to_row + 1, 'a' + move->from_col,
2631 move->from_row + 1, 'a' + move->to_col, move->to_row + 1);
2632
2633 // Očekáváme tah věže
2634 if (move->from_row != castling_state.rook_from_row ||
2635 move->from_col != castling_state.rook_from_col) {
2636 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "❌ Castling in progress - expected rook move from %c%d",
2637 'a' + castling_state.rook_from_col,
2638 castling_state.rook_from_row + 1);
2639 return MOVE_ERROR_CASTLING_BLOCKED; // Použijeme existující error code
2640 }
2641
2642 if (move->to_row != castling_state.rook_to_row ||
2643 move->to_col != castling_state.rook_to_col) {
2644 ESP_LOGE(
2645 TAG, "❌ Incorrect rook destination during castling - expected %c%d",
2646 'a' + castling_state.rook_to_col, castling_state.rook_to_row + 1);
2647 return MOVE_ERROR_CASTLING_BLOCKED; // Použijeme existující error code
2648 }
2649
2650 // Toto je správný rošáda tah věže - přeskočit standardní validaci pohybu
2651 // figurky
2652 is_castling_rook_move = true;
2653 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "✅ Correct rook move for castling completion - skipping "
2654 "standard piece validation (path would be blocked by king)");
2655 }
2656
2657 // Validate move based on piece type (POUZE pokud NENÍ rošáda tah věže)
2658 if (!is_castling_rook_move) {
2659 move_error_t piece_error =
2660 game_validate_piece_move_enhanced(move, source_piece);
2661 if (piece_error != MOVE_ERROR_NONE) {
2662 return piece_error;
2663 }
2664 } else {
2665 ESP_LOGI(TAG,
2666 "🏰 Skipping standard piece validation for castling rook move");
2667 }
2668
2669 // Check if move would leave king in check
2670 if (game_would_move_leave_king_in_check(move)) {
2671 return MOVE_ERROR_KING_IN_CHECK;
2672 }
2673
2674 return MOVE_ERROR_NONE;
2675}
2676
2677// Keep the old function for backward compatibility
2678bool game_is_valid_move_bool(const chess_move_t *move) {
2679 return (game_is_valid_move(move) == MOVE_ERROR_NONE);
2680}
2681
2682move_error_t game_validate_piece_move_enhanced(const chess_move_t *move,
2683 piece_t piece) {
2684 // int row_diff = move->to_row - move->from_row;
2685 // int col_diff = move->to_col - move->from_col;
2686 // int abs_row_diff = abs(row_diff);
2687 // int abs_col_diff = abs(col_diff);
2688
2689 switch (piece) {
2690 case PIECE_WHITE_PAWN:
2691 case PIECE_BLACK_PAWN:
2692 return game_validate_pawn_move_enhanced(move, piece);
2693
2694 case PIECE_WHITE_KNIGHT:
2695 case PIECE_BLACK_KNIGHT:
2696 return game_validate_knight_move_enhanced(move);
2697
2698 case PIECE_WHITE_BISHOP:
2699 case PIECE_BLACK_BISHOP:
2700 return game_validate_bishop_move_enhanced(move);
2701
2702 case PIECE_WHITE_ROOK:
2703 case PIECE_BLACK_ROOK:
2704 return game_validate_rook_move_enhanced(move);
2705
2706 case PIECE_WHITE_QUEEN:
2707 case PIECE_BLACK_QUEEN:
2708 return game_validate_queen_move_enhanced(move);
2709
2710 case PIECE_WHITE_KING:
2711 case PIECE_BLACK_KING:
2712 return game_validate_king_move_enhanced(move);
2713
2714 default:
2715 return MOVE_ERROR_INVALID_PATTERN;
2716 }
2717}
2718
2719// Keep the old function for backward compatibility
2720bool game_validate_piece_move(const chess_move_t *move, piece_t piece) {
2721 return (game_validate_piece_move_enhanced(move, piece) == MOVE_ERROR_NONE);
2722}
2723
2748move_error_t game_validate_pawn_move_enhanced(const chess_move_t *move,
2749 piece_t piece) {
2750 int row_diff = move->to_row - move->from_row;
2751 int col_diff = move->to_col - move->from_col;
2752 int abs_col_diff = abs(col_diff);
2753
2754 bool is_white = game_is_white_piece(piece);
2755 int direction = is_white ? 1 : -1;
2756 int start_row = is_white ? 1 : 6;
2757
2758 // Logovani validace pesce
2759 char from_sq[3], to_sq[3];
2760 game_coords_to_square(move->from_row, move->from_col, from_sq);
2761 game_coords_to_square(move->to_row, move->to_col, to_sq);
2762 piece_t dest_piece = game_get_piece(move->to_row, move->to_col);
2763
2764 // Forward move
2765 if (col_diff == 0) {
2766 // Check if moving backwards (invalid for pawns)
2767 if (row_diff * direction < 0) {
2768 ESP_LOGD(TAG, "❌ Pawn %s→%s: cannot move backwards", from_sq, to_sq);
2769 return MOVE_ERROR_INVALID_PATTERN;
2770 }
2771
2772 // Single square move
2773 if (row_diff == direction) {
2774 if (game_is_empty(move->to_row, move->to_col)) {
2775 return MOVE_ERROR_NONE;
2776 } else {
2777 ESP_LOGD(TAG, "🔍 Pawn %s->%s: blocked by piece", from_sq, to_sq);
2778 return MOVE_ERROR_BLOCKED_PATH;
2779 }
2780 }
2781
2782 // Double square move from starting position
2783 if (row_diff == 2 * direction && move->from_row == start_row) {
2784 if (game_is_empty(move->from_row + direction, move->from_col) &&
2785 game_is_empty(move->to_row, move->to_col)) {
2786 return MOVE_ERROR_NONE;
2787 } else {
2788 ESP_LOGD(TAG, "🔍 Pawn %s->%s: blocked path double move", from_sq,
2789 to_sq);
2790 return MOVE_ERROR_BLOCKED_PATH;
2791 }
2792 }
2793
2794 ESP_LOGD(TAG, "🔍 Pawn %s->%s: invalid forward distance", from_sq, to_sq);
2795 return MOVE_ERROR_INVALID_PATTERN;
2796 }
2797
2798 // Capture move (diagonal)
2799 if (abs_col_diff == 1 && row_diff == direction) {
2800 if (dest_piece != PIECE_EMPTY && !game_is_same_color(piece, dest_piece)) {
2801 ESP_LOGD(TAG, "✅ Pawn %s→%s: valid capture of %s", from_sq, to_sq,
2802 game_get_piece_name(dest_piece));
2803 return MOVE_ERROR_NONE;
2804 }
2805
2806 // Check for en passant
2807 if (game_is_en_passant_possible(move)) {
2808 ESP_LOGD(TAG, "✅ Pawn %s→%s: valid en passant", from_sq, to_sq);
2809 return MOVE_ERROR_NONE;
2810 }
2811
2812 if (dest_piece == PIECE_EMPTY) {
2813 ESP_LOGD(TAG, "❌ Pawn %s→%s: diagonal to empty square (not en passant)",
2814 from_sq, to_sq);
2815 } else {
2816 ESP_LOGD(TAG, "❌ Pawn %s→%s: trying to capture own piece", from_sq,
2817 to_sq);
2818 }
2819 return MOVE_ERROR_INVALID_PATTERN;
2820 }
2821
2822 ESP_LOGD(TAG,
2823 "❌ Pawn %s→%s: invalid move pattern (col_diff=%d, row_diff=%d)",
2824 from_sq, to_sq, col_diff, row_diff);
2825 return MOVE_ERROR_INVALID_PATTERN;
2826}
2827
2828// Keep the old function for backward compatibility
2829bool game_validate_pawn_move(const chess_move_t *move, piece_t piece) {
2830 return (game_validate_pawn_move_enhanced(move, piece) == MOVE_ERROR_NONE);
2831}
2832
2833move_error_t game_validate_knight_move_enhanced(const chess_move_t *move) {
2834 int row_diff = move->to_row - move->from_row;
2835 int col_diff = move->to_col - move->from_col;
2836 int abs_row_diff = abs(row_diff);
2837 int abs_col_diff = abs(col_diff);
2838
2839 // Knight moves in L-shape: 2 squares in one direction, 1 square perpendicular
2840 if ((abs_row_diff == 2 && abs_col_diff == 1) ||
2841 (abs_row_diff == 1 && abs_col_diff == 2)) {
2842 return MOVE_ERROR_NONE;
2843 }
2844
2845 return MOVE_ERROR_INVALID_PATTERN;
2846}
2847
2848// Keep the old function for backward compatibility
2849bool game_validate_knight_move(const chess_move_t *move) {
2850 return (game_validate_knight_move_enhanced(move) == MOVE_ERROR_NONE);
2851}
2852
2871move_error_t game_validate_bishop_move_enhanced(const chess_move_t *move) {
2872 int row_diff = move->to_row - move->from_row;
2873 int col_diff = move->to_col - move->from_col;
2874 int abs_row_diff = abs(row_diff);
2875 int abs_col_diff = abs(col_diff);
2876
2877 // Bishop moves diagonally
2878 if (abs_row_diff != abs_col_diff) {
2879 return MOVE_ERROR_INVALID_PATTERN;
2880 }
2881
2882 // Check if path is blocked
2883 // Původně: while (...&& ...) - končilo předčasně
2884 // Nově: while (...|| ...) - kontroluje až do cíle
2885 int row_step = (row_diff > 0) ? 1 : -1;
2886 int col_step = (col_diff > 0) ? 1 : -1;
2887
2888 int current_row = move->from_row + row_step;
2889 int current_col = move->from_col + col_step;
2890
2891 // SAFETY: Prevent infinite loop (max 8 squares on diagonal)
2892 int steps = 0;
2893 while ((current_row != move->to_row || current_col != move->to_col) &&
2894 steps < 8) {
2895 if (!game_is_empty(current_row, current_col)) {
2896 ESP_LOGD(TAG, "🔍 Bishop blocked at %c%d", 'a' + current_col,
2897 current_row + 1);
2898 return MOVE_ERROR_BLOCKED_PATH;
2899 }
2900 current_row += row_step;
2901 current_col += col_step;
2902 steps++;
2903 }
2904
2905 // Safety check: if loop ended without reaching target, something is wrong
2906 if (steps >= 8 &&
2907 (current_row != move->to_row || current_col != move->to_col)) {
2908 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "🔍 Bishop validation error: loop exceeded max steps");
2909 return MOVE_ERROR_INVALID_PATTERN;
2910 }
2911
2912 return MOVE_ERROR_NONE;
2913}
2914
2915// Keep the old function for backward compatibility
2916bool game_validate_bishop_move(const chess_move_t *move) {
2917 return (game_validate_bishop_move_enhanced(move) == MOVE_ERROR_NONE);
2918}
2919
2920move_error_t game_validate_rook_move_enhanced(const chess_move_t *move) {
2921 int row_diff = move->to_row - move->from_row;
2922 int col_diff = move->to_col - move->from_col;
2923
2924 // Rook moves horizontally or vertically
2925 if (row_diff != 0 && col_diff != 0) {
2926 return MOVE_ERROR_INVALID_PATTERN;
2927 }
2928
2929 // Check if path is blocked
2930 if (row_diff == 0) {
2931 // Horizontal move
2932 int col_step = (col_diff > 0) ? 1 : -1;
2933 int current_col = move->from_col + col_step;
2934
2935 while (current_col != move->to_col) {
2936 if (!game_is_empty(move->from_row, current_col)) {
2937 return MOVE_ERROR_BLOCKED_PATH;
2938 }
2939 current_col += col_step;
2940 }
2941 } else {
2942 // Vertical move
2943 int row_step = (row_diff > 0) ? 1 : -1;
2944 int current_row = move->from_row + row_step;
2945
2946 while (current_row != move->to_row) {
2947 if (!game_is_empty(current_row, move->from_col)) {
2948 return MOVE_ERROR_BLOCKED_PATH;
2949 }
2950 current_row += row_step;
2951 }
2952 }
2953
2954 return MOVE_ERROR_NONE;
2955}
2956
2957// Keep the old function for backward compatibility
2958bool game_validate_rook_move(const chess_move_t *move) {
2959 return (game_validate_rook_move_enhanced(move) == MOVE_ERROR_NONE);
2960}
2961
2962move_error_t game_validate_queen_move_enhanced(const chess_move_t *move) {
2963 int row_diff = move->to_row - move->from_row;
2964 int col_diff = move->to_col - move->from_col;
2965 int abs_row_diff = abs(row_diff);
2966 int abs_col_diff = abs(col_diff);
2967
2968 // Queen moves like rook (horizontally/vertically) or bishop (diagonally)
2969 if (row_diff == 0 || col_diff == 0) {
2970 // Rook-like move
2971 return game_validate_rook_move_enhanced(move);
2972 } else if (abs_row_diff == abs_col_diff) {
2973 // Bishop-like move
2974 return game_validate_bishop_move_enhanced(move);
2975 }
2976
2977 return MOVE_ERROR_INVALID_PATTERN;
2978}
2979
2980// Keep the old function for backward compatibility
2981bool game_validate_queen_move(const chess_move_t *move) {
2982 return (game_validate_queen_move_enhanced(move) == MOVE_ERROR_NONE);
2983}
2984
3001move_error_t game_validate_king_move_enhanced(const chess_move_t *move) {
3002 int row_diff = move->to_row - move->from_row;
3003 int col_diff = move->to_col - move->from_col;
3004 int abs_row_diff = abs(row_diff);
3005 int abs_col_diff = abs(col_diff);
3006
3007 // King moves one square in any direction
3008 // Musi se pohnout alespon o 1 pole (ne 0,0)
3009 // Puvodni: povoloval tah na stejne pole
3010 if (abs_row_diff <= 1 && abs_col_diff <= 1 &&
3011 (abs_row_diff > 0 || abs_col_diff > 0)) {
3012 return MOVE_ERROR_NONE;
3013 }
3014
3015 // Check for castling
3016 if (abs_row_diff == 0 && abs_col_diff == 2) {
3017 return game_validate_castling(move);
3018 }
3019
3020 return MOVE_ERROR_INVALID_PATTERN;
3021}
3022
3023// Keep the old function for backward compatibility
3024bool game_validate_king_move(const chess_move_t *move) {
3025 return (game_validate_king_move_enhanced(move) == MOVE_ERROR_NONE);
3026}
3027
3045bool game_would_move_leave_king_in_check(const chess_move_t *move) {
3046 if (!move)
3047 return true; // Safety check
3048
3049 // Save original board state
3050 piece_t original_from_piece = board[move->from_row][move->from_col];
3051 piece_t original_to_piece = board[move->to_row][move->to_col];
3052
3053 // Pokud je from_piece prázdné (král je zvednutý během resignation timeru),
3054 // použít move->piece místo original_from_piece
3055 if (original_from_piece == PIECE_EMPTY && move->piece != PIECE_EMPTY) {
3056 original_from_piece = move->piece;
3057 ESP_LOGD(TAG,
3058 "🏰 game_would_move_leave_king_in_check: Using move->piece (%d) "
3059 "because from square is empty (king lifted)",
3060 move->piece);
3061 }
3062
3063 // Check if this is an en passant move
3064 bool is_en_passant = game_is_en_passant_possible(move);
3065 piece_t original_en_passant_piece = PIECE_EMPTY;
3066 uint8_t en_passant_victim_row_local = 0;
3067 uint8_t en_passant_victim_col_local = 0;
3068
3069 // If en passant, save the victim pawn position
3070 if (is_en_passant) {
3071 original_en_passant_piece =
3072 board[en_passant_victim_row][en_passant_victim_col];
3073 en_passant_victim_row_local = en_passant_victim_row;
3074 en_passant_victim_col_local = en_passant_victim_col;
3075 // Remove the victim pawn for simulation
3076 board[en_passant_victim_row][en_passant_victim_col] = PIECE_EMPTY;
3077 }
3078
3079 // Make the move temporarily
3080 board[move->to_row][move->to_col] = original_from_piece;
3081 board[move->from_row][move->from_col] = PIECE_EMPTY;
3082
3083 // Determine which player's king to check
3084 player_t player =
3085 (game_is_white_piece(original_from_piece)) ? PLAYER_WHITE : PLAYER_BLACK;
3086
3087 // Check if king is in check after this move
3088 bool king_in_check = game_is_king_in_check(player);
3089
3090 // Undo the move
3091 board[move->from_row][move->from_col] = original_from_piece;
3092 board[move->to_row][move->to_col] = original_to_piece;
3093
3094 // Restore en passant victim if it was removed
3095 if (is_en_passant) {
3096 board[en_passant_victim_row_local][en_passant_victim_col_local] =
3097 original_en_passant_piece;
3098 }
3099
3100 return king_in_check;
3101}
3102
3117bool game_is_en_passant_possible(const chess_move_t *move) {
3118 if (!has_last_move) {
3119 ESP_LOGD(TAG, "🔍 En passant: no last move");
3120 return false;
3121 }
3122
3123 // Check if the last move was a pawn moving two squares
3124 piece_t last_piece = board[last_move_to_row][last_move_to_col];
3125 bool last_was_pawn =
3126 (last_piece == PIECE_WHITE_PAWN || last_piece == PIECE_BLACK_PAWN);
3127
3128 if (!last_was_pawn) {
3129 ESP_LOGD(TAG, "🔍 En passant: last move was not pawn");
3130 return false;
3131 }
3132
3133 // Check if last move was a double square move
3134 int last_row_diff = abs((int)last_move_to_row - (int)last_move_from_row);
3135 if (last_row_diff != 2) {
3136 ESP_LOGD(TAG, "🔍 En passant: last move was not 2 squares (diff=%d)",
3137 last_row_diff);
3138 return false;
3139 }
3140
3141 // Zkontrolovat, zda útočící pěšec je na stejném řádku jako právě
3142 // pohnutý pěšec
3143 if (move->from_row != last_move_to_row) {
3144 ESP_LOGD(TAG,
3145 "🔍 En passant: attacking pawn not on same row (from_row=%d, "
3146 "last_to_row=%d)",
3147 move->from_row, last_move_to_row);
3148 return false;
3149 }
3150
3151 // Zkontrolovat, zda útočící pěšec je přesně vedle právě pohnutého
3152 // pěšce
3153 int col_diff = abs((int)move->from_col - (int)last_move_to_col);
3154 if (col_diff != 1) {
3155 ESP_LOGD(TAG, "🔍 En passant: pawn not adjacent (col_diff=%d)", col_diff);
3156 return false;
3157 }
3158
3159 // En passant pole je vždy uprostřed mezi from a to (prostý průměr)
3160 int en_passant_target_row = (last_move_from_row + last_move_to_row) / 2;
3161
3162 ESP_LOGD(TAG,
3163 "🔍 En passant check: last=%c%d→%c%d, target=%c%d, move=%c%d→%c%d",
3164 'a' + last_move_from_col, last_move_from_row + 1,
3165 'a' + last_move_to_col, last_move_to_row + 1, 'a' + last_move_to_col,
3166 en_passant_target_row + 1, 'a' + move->from_col, move->from_row + 1,
3167 'a' + move->to_col, move->to_row + 1);
3168
3169 if (move->to_row == en_passant_target_row &&
3170 move->to_col == last_move_to_col) {
3171 ESP_LOGD(TAG, "✅ En passant VALID!");
3172 return true;
3173 }
3174
3175 ESP_LOGD(TAG,
3176 "❌ En passant: target mismatch (to_row=%d vs target=%d, to_col=%d "
3177 "vs last_col=%d)",
3178 move->to_row, en_passant_target_row, move->to_col, last_move_to_col);
3179 return false;
3180}
3181
3204move_error_t game_validate_castling(const chess_move_t *move) {
3205 if (!move) {
3206 return MOVE_ERROR_INVALID_MOVE_STRUCTURE;
3207 }
3208
3209 piece_t piece = move->piece;
3210 bool is_white = game_is_white_piece(piece);
3211
3212 // Check if it's a king
3213 if (piece != PIECE_WHITE_KING && piece != PIECE_BLACK_KING) {
3214 return MOVE_ERROR_INVALID_PATTERN;
3215 }
3216
3217 // Check if king has moved
3218 if ((is_white && white_king_moved) || (!is_white && black_king_moved)) {
3219 ESP_LOGD(TAG, "❌ Castling: king has moved");
3220 return MOVE_ERROR_CASTLING_BLOCKED;
3221 }
3222
3223 // Pokud je resignation timer aktivní a král je zvednutý,
3224 // použít uloženou pozici krále z resignation_state místo kontroly desky
3225 int king_row = is_white ? 0 : 7;
3226 int expected_king_col = 4; // e-file
3227
3228 // Pokud je resignation timer aktivní a král patří aktuálnímu hráči,
3229 // použít uloženou pozici krále z resignation_state
3230 if (resignation_state.active &&
3231 resignation_state.player == (is_white ? PLAYER_WHITE : PLAYER_BLACK)) {
3232 // Král je zvednutý - použít uloženou pozici z resignation_state
3233 king_row = resignation_state.king_row;
3234 expected_king_col = resignation_state.king_col;
3235 ESP_LOGI(TAG,
3236 "🏰 Castling validation: Using stored king position from "
3237 "resignation_state: %c%d",
3238 'a' + expected_king_col, king_row + 1);
3239 }
3240
3241 // Kontrola, zda from_row/from_col odpovídá očekávané pozici krále
3242 // (buď z desky, nebo z resignation_state)
3243 if (move->from_row != king_row || move->from_col != expected_king_col) {
3244 ESP_LOGD(
3245 TAG,
3246 "❌ Castling: king not in starting position (from %c%d, expected %c%d)",
3247 'a' + move->from_col, move->from_row + 1, 'a' + expected_king_col,
3248 king_row + 1);
3249 return MOVE_ERROR_CASTLING_BLOCKED;
3250 }
3251
3252 // Determine castling direction
3253 bool is_kingside = (move->to_col == 6);
3254 bool is_queenside = (move->to_col == 2);
3255
3256 if (!is_kingside && !is_queenside) {
3257 return MOVE_ERROR_INVALID_PATTERN;
3258 }
3259
3260 // Determine rook position
3261 int rook_col = is_kingside ? 7 : 0;
3262
3263 // Check if rook exists at expected position
3264 piece_t expected_rook = is_white ? PIECE_WHITE_ROOK : PIECE_BLACK_ROOK;
3265 piece_t rook_piece = board[king_row][rook_col];
3266 if (rook_piece != expected_rook) {
3267 ESP_LOGD(TAG, "❌ Castling: rook not found at expected position %c%d",
3268 'a' + rook_col, king_row + 1);
3269 return MOVE_ERROR_CASTLING_BLOCKED;
3270 }
3271
3272 // Check if corresponding rook has moved
3273 if (is_white) {
3274 if (is_kingside && white_rook_h_moved) {
3275 ESP_LOGD(TAG, "❌ Castling: kingside rook has moved");
3276 return MOVE_ERROR_CASTLING_BLOCKED;
3277 }
3278 if (is_queenside && white_rook_a_moved) {
3279 ESP_LOGD(TAG, "❌ Castling: queenside rook has moved");
3280 return MOVE_ERROR_CASTLING_BLOCKED;
3281 }
3282 } else {
3283 if (is_kingside && black_rook_h_moved) {
3284 ESP_LOGD(TAG, "❌ Castling: kingside rook has moved");
3285 return MOVE_ERROR_CASTLING_BLOCKED;
3286 }
3287 if (is_queenside && black_rook_a_moved) {
3288 ESP_LOGD(TAG, "❌ Castling: queenside rook has moved");
3289 return MOVE_ERROR_CASTLING_BLOCKED;
3290 }
3291 }
3292
3293 // Check if squares between king and rook are empty
3294 // rook_col již definováno výše
3295 int start_col =
3296 (move->from_col < rook_col) ? move->from_col + 1 : rook_col + 1;
3297 int end_col = (move->from_col < rook_col) ? rook_col : move->from_col;
3298
3299 for (int col = start_col; col < end_col; col++) {
3300 if (!game_is_empty(king_row, col)) {
3301 return MOVE_ERROR_CASTLING_BLOCKED;
3302 }
3303 }
3304
3305 // Check if king is currently in check
3306 if (game_is_king_in_check(is_white ? PLAYER_WHITE : PLAYER_BLACK)) {
3307 return MOVE_ERROR_CASTLING_BLOCKED;
3308 }
3309
3310 // Check if king would move through check or end in check
3311 int step = is_kingside ? 1 : -1;
3312 for (int col = move->from_col; col != move->to_col + step; col += step) {
3313 if (col == move->from_col)
3314 continue; // Skip starting position
3315
3316 // Create temporary move to test this square
3317 chess_move_t temp_move = {.from_row = move->from_row,
3318 .from_col = move->from_col,
3319 .to_row = move->to_row,
3320 .to_col = col,
3321 .piece = piece,
3322 .captured_piece = PIECE_EMPTY,
3323 .timestamp = 0};
3324
3325 if (game_would_move_leave_king_in_check(&temp_move)) {
3326 return MOVE_ERROR_CASTLING_BLOCKED;
3327 }
3328 }
3329
3330 return MOVE_ERROR_NONE;
3331}
3332
