3333// ============================================================================
3334// ERROR FORMATTING HELPER
3335// ============================================================================
3336
3348static void print_error_detail(const char *label, const char *fmt, ...) {
3349 va_list args;
3350 char buffer[256];
3351
3352 va_start(args, fmt);
3353 vsnprintf(buffer, sizeof(buffer), fmt, args);
3354 va_end(args);
3355
3356 // Format based on label type
3357 if (strcmp(label, "Reason") == 0) {
3358 printf(ANSI_RED " • %s: " ANSI_BOLD "%s" ANSI_RESET "\r\n", label,
3359 buffer);
3360 } else if (strcmp(label, "Hint") == 0 || strcmp(label, "Solution") == 0) {
3361 printf(FMT_HINT(" • %s: %s") "\r\n", label, buffer);
3362 } else {
3363 printf(" • %s: %s\r\n", label, buffer);
3364 }
3365}
3366
3386void game_display_move_error(move_error_t error, const chess_move_t *move) {
3387 char from_square[3], to_square[3];
3388 game_coords_to_square(move->from_row, move->from_col, from_square);
3389 game_coords_to_square(move->to_row, move->to_col, to_square);
3390
3391 const char *piece_name = game_get_piece_name(move->piece);
3392 const char *player_name =
3393 (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? "White" : "Black";
3394 piece_t source_piece = board[move->from_row][move->from_col];
3395 piece_t dest_piece = board[move->to_row][move->to_col];
3396
3397 // Enhanced error messages with colors and detailed reasoning
3398 printf("\r\n");
3399 printf(FMT_ERROR("❌ INVALID MOVE!") "\r\n");
3400 printf(FMT_INFO(" • Move: %s → %s") "\r\n", from_square, to_square);
3401 printf(FMT_INFO(" • Piece: %s") "\r\n", piece_name);
3402
3403 switch (error) {
3404 case MOVE_ERROR_NO_PIECE:
3405 print_error_detail("Reason", "No piece at %s", from_square);
3406 print_error_detail("Solution", "Choose a square with your piece");
3407 break;
3408
3409 case MOVE_ERROR_WRONG_COLOR:
3410 print_error_detail("Reason", "%s cannot move %s's piece", player_name,
3411 (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? "Black" : "White");
3412 print_error_detail("Solution", "Move only your own pieces");
3413 break;
3414
3415 case MOVE_ERROR_BLOCKED_PATH:
3416 print_error_detail("Reason", "Path from %s to %s is blocked", from_square,
3417 to_square);
3418 print_error_detail("Hint", "Another piece is blocking the way");
3419 print_error_detail("Solution",
3420 "Clear the path or choose different destination");
3421 break;
3422
3423 case MOVE_ERROR_INVALID_PATTERN:
3424 // VYLEPŠENÉ REASONING pro pěšce
3425 if (source_piece == PIECE_WHITE_PAWN || source_piece == PIECE_BLACK_PAWN) {
3426 int col_diff = abs((int)move->to_col - (int)move->from_col);
3427 bool is_diagonal = (col_diff == 1);
3428
3429 if (is_diagonal && dest_piece == PIECE_EMPTY) {
3430 print_error_detail(
3431 "Reason",
3432 "Pawn can only capture diagonally when enemy piece is present");
3433 print_error_detail("Hint",
3434 "Square %s is empty - pawns cannot move diagonally "
3435 "to empty squares",
3436 to_square);
3437 print_error_detail(
3438 "Solution",
3439 "Move pawn forward or capture diagonally where enemy piece is");
3440 } else if (!is_diagonal && dest_piece != PIECE_EMPTY) {
3441 print_error_detail("Reason", "Pawn cannot capture straight ahead");
3442 print_error_detail(
3443 "Hint", "Square %s is occupied - pawns can only capture diagonally",
3444 to_square);
3445 print_error_detail("Solution",
3446 "Capture the piece diagonally, not forward");
3447 } else {
3448 print_error_detail("Reason", "Pawn cannot move in this pattern");
3449 print_error_detail("Hint", "Pawns move forward 1 square (or 2 from "
3450 "start), capture diagonally");
3451 print_error_detail("Solution", "Follow pawn movement rules");
3452 }
3453 } else {
3454 print_error_detail("Reason", "%s cannot move from %s to %s", piece_name,
3455 from_square, to_square);
3456 print_error_detail("Solution", "Follow the piece's movement rules");
3457 }
3458 break;
3459
3460 case MOVE_ERROR_KING_IN_CHECK:
3461 print_error_detail("Reason",
3462 "This move would leave/keep your king in check");
3463 // Find and display king position
3464 printf(FMT_HINT(" • Hint: Your king at "));
3465 piece_t king_piece =
3466 (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? PIECE_WHITE_KING : PIECE_BLACK_KING;
3467 for (int r = 0; r < 8; r++) {
3468 for (int c = 0; c < 8; c++) {
3469 if (board[r][c] == king_piece) {
3470 char king_sq[3];
3471 game_coords_to_square(r, c, king_sq);
3472 printf("%s would be under attack\r\n", king_sq);
3473 goto king_found;
3474 }
3475 }
3476 }
3477 printf("is under attack\r\n");
3478 king_found:
3479 print_error_detail(
3480 "Solution",
3481 "Protect your king by blocking, capturing attacker, or moving king");
3482 break;
3483
3484 case MOVE_ERROR_CASTLING_BLOCKED:
3485 print_error_detail("Reason", "Castling is not allowed");
3486 print_error_detail(
3487 "Hint", "King/Rook moved, squares under attack, or path blocked");
3488 print_error_detail(
3489 "Solution", "Castling requires unmoved king and rook with clear path");
3490 break;
3491
3492 case MOVE_ERROR_EN_PASSANT_INVALID:
3493 print_error_detail("Reason", "En passant is not possible here");
3494 print_error_detail("Hint", "En passant only works immediately after "
3495 "opponent's 2-square pawn move");
3496 print_error_detail("Solution", "Capture normally or make different move");
3497 break;
3498
3499 case MOVE_ERROR_DESTINATION_OCCUPIED:
3500 print_error_detail("Reason", "Destination %s is occupied by your own %s",
3501 to_square, game_get_piece_name(dest_piece));
3502 print_error_detail("Hint", "You cannot capture your own pieces");
3503 print_error_detail("Solution",
3504 "Choose empty square or capture opponent's piece");
3505 break;
3506
3507 case MOVE_ERROR_OUT_OF_BOUNDS:
3508 print_error_detail("Reason", "Coordinates are out of board bounds");
3509 print_error_detail("Solution", "Use valid chess notation (a1-h8)");
3510 break;
3511
3512 case MOVE_ERROR_GAME_NOT_ACTIVE:
3513 print_error_detail("Reason", "Game is not active");
3514 print_error_detail("Solution",
3515 "Start a new game first (use GAME_NEW command)");
3516 break;
3517
3518 case MOVE_ERROR_INVALID_MOVE_STRUCTURE:
3519 print_error_detail("Reason", "Move structure is invalid");
3520 print_error_detail("Solution",
3521 "Use proper move format (e.g., e2e4 or e2-e4)");
3522 break;
3523
3524 default:
3525 print_error_detail("Reason", "Unknown error occurred (code: %d)", error);
3526 print_error_detail("Solution", "Try a different move");
3527 break;
3528 }
3529
3530 // Zobrazit stav pole
3531 if (dest_piece != PIECE_EMPTY) {
3532 printf(FMT_DATA(" • Target: %s at %s") "\r\n",
3533 game_get_piece_name(dest_piece), to_square);
3534 } else {
3535 printf(FMT_DATA(" • Target: Empty square at %s") "\r\n", to_square);
3536 }
3537
3538 printf("\r\n");
3539
3540 // Show helpful suggestions
3541 if (tutorial_mode_active && show_hints) {
3542 game_show_move_suggestions(move->from_row, move->from_col);
3543 }
3544}
3545
3551const char *game_get_piece_name(piece_t piece) {
3552 switch (piece) {
3553 case PIECE_EMPTY:
3554 return "Empty";
3555 case PIECE_WHITE_PAWN:
3556 return "White Pawn";
3557 case PIECE_WHITE_KNIGHT:
3558 return "White Knight";
3559 case PIECE_WHITE_BISHOP:
3560 return "White Bishop";
3561 case PIECE_WHITE_ROOK:
3562 return "White Rook";
3563 case PIECE_WHITE_QUEEN:
3564 return "White Queen";
3565 case PIECE_WHITE_KING:
3566 return "White King";
3567 case PIECE_BLACK_PAWN:
3568 return "Black Pawn";
3569 case PIECE_BLACK_KNIGHT:
3570 return "Black Knight";
3571 case PIECE_BLACK_BISHOP:
3572 return "Black Bishop";
3573 case PIECE_BLACK_ROOK:
3574 return "Black Rook";
3575 case PIECE_BLACK_QUEEN:
3576 return "Black Queen";
3577 case PIECE_BLACK_KING:
3578 return "Black King";
3579 default:
3580 return "Unknown";
3581 }
3582}
3583
3584// ============================================================================
3585// STRING BUILDING HELPER
3586// ============================================================================
3587
3601static int append_square(char *buffer, size_t size, int pos,
3602 const char *square) {
3603 // Pridat separator pokud uz neco v bufferu je
3604 if (pos > 0) {
3605 pos += snprintf(buffer + pos, size - pos, ", ");
3606 }
3607
3608 // Pridat square
3609 pos += snprintf(buffer + pos, size - pos, "%s", square);
3610
3611 return pos;
3612}
3613
3619void game_show_move_suggestions(uint8_t row, uint8_t col) {
3620 piece_t piece = board[row][col];
3621 if (piece == PIECE_EMPTY) {
3622 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "💡 Hint: No piece at this position");
3623 return;
3624 }
3625
3626 // Get available moves for this piece
3627 move_suggestion_t suggestions[50];
3628 uint32_t count = game_get_available_moves(row, col, suggestions, 50);
3629
3630 if (count == 0) {
3631 char from_square[3];
3632 game_coords_to_square(row, col, from_square);
3633 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "💡 Hint: %s at %s has no legal moves",
3634 game_get_piece_name(piece), from_square);
3635 return;
3636 }
3637
3638 char from_square[3];
3639 game_coords_to_square(row, col, from_square);
3640 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "💡 Hint: %s at %s can move to:", game_get_piece_name(piece),
3641 from_square);
3642
3643 // Group moves by type
3644 char normal_moves[128] = "";
3645 char capture_moves[128] = "";
3646 char special_moves[128] = "";
3647
3648 int normal_pos = 0, capture_pos = 0, special_pos = 0;
3649
3650 for (uint32_t i = 0; i < count && i < 20;
3651 i++) { // Limit to 20 moves for display
3652 char to_square[3];
3653 game_coords_to_square(suggestions[i].to_row, suggestions[i].to_col,
3654 to_square);
3655
3656 if (suggestions[i].is_capture) {
3657 capture_pos = append_square(capture_moves, sizeof(capture_moves),
3658 capture_pos, to_square);
3659 } else if (suggestions[i].is_castling || suggestions[i].is_en_passant) {
3660 special_pos = append_square(special_moves, sizeof(special_moves),
3661 special_pos, to_square);
3662 } else {
3663 normal_pos = append_square(normal_moves, sizeof(normal_moves), normal_pos,
3664 to_square);
3665 }
3666 }
3667
3668 if (normal_pos > 0) {
3669 ESP_LOGI(TAG, " Normal moves: %s", normal_moves);
3670 }
3671 if (capture_pos > 0) {
3672 ESP_LOGI(TAG, " Capture moves: %s", capture_moves);
3673 }
3674 if (special_pos > 0) {
3675 ESP_LOGI(TAG, " Special moves: %s", special_moves);
3676 }
3677
3678 if (count > 20) {
3679 ESP_LOGI(TAG, " ... and %" PRIu32 " more moves", count - 20);
3680 }
3681}
3682
3691uint32_t game_get_available_moves(uint8_t row, uint8_t col,
3692 move_suggestion_t *suggestions,
3693 uint32_t max_suggestions) {
3694 if (suggestions == NULL || max_suggestions == 0) {
3695 return 0;
3696 }
3697
3698 piece_t piece = board[row][col];
3699
3700 // Pokud je piece prázdné a resignation timer je aktivní pro tuto pozici,
3701 // použít uloženou pozici krále z resignation_state
3702 if (piece == PIECE_EMPTY) {
3703 if (resignation_state.active && resignation_state.king_row == row &&
3704 resignation_state.king_col == col) {
3705 // Král je zvednutý během resignation timeru - použít typ krále z
3706 // resignation_state.player
3707 piece = (resignation_state.player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? PIECE_WHITE_KING
3708 : PIECE_BLACK_KING;
3709 ESP_LOGI(TAG,
3710 "🏰 game_get_available_moves: Using stored king piece (%d) "
3711 "because king is lifted (resignation timer active)",
3712 piece);
3713 } else {
3714 return 0;
3715 }
3716 }
3717
3718 uint32_t count = 0;
3719
3720 // Pokud je rošáda v progress a zvedá se věž z rook_from, přidat tah na
3721 // rook_to jako valid move
3722 if (castling_state.in_progress) {
3723 ESP_LOGI(
3724 TAG,
3725 "🏰 game_get_available_moves: castling_state.in_progress=true, "
3726 "checking row=%d col=%d piece=%d, rook_from_row=%d rook_from_col=%d",
3727 row, col, piece, castling_state.rook_from_row,
3728 castling_state.rook_from_col);
3729
3730 if (row == castling_state.rook_from_row &&
3731 col == castling_state.rook_from_col &&
3732 (piece == PIECE_WHITE_ROOK || piece == PIECE_BLACK_ROOK)) {
3733 // Toto je věž pro rošádu - přidat tah na rook_to jako valid move
3734 ESP_LOGI(TAG,
3735 "🏰 Castling rook detected at %c%d - adding valid move to %c%d",
3736 'a' + col, row + 1, 'a' + castling_state.rook_to_col,
3737 castling_state.rook_to_row + 1);
3738
3739 if (count < max_suggestions) {
3740 suggestions[count].from_row = row;
3741 suggestions[count].from_col = col;
3742 suggestions[count].to_row = castling_state.rook_to_row;
3743 suggestions[count].to_col = castling_state.rook_to_col;
3744 suggestions[count].piece = piece;
3745 suggestions[count].is_capture = false;
3746 suggestions[count].is_check = false;
3747 suggestions[count].is_castling = false;
3748 suggestions[count].is_en_passant = false;
3749 suggestions[count].score = 0;
3750 count++;
3751 ESP_LOGI(
3752 TAG,
3753 "🏰 Castling rook: Added valid move from %c%d to %c%d (count=%u)",
3754 'a' + col, row + 1, 'a' + castling_state.rook_to_col,
3755 castling_state.rook_to_row + 1, count);
3756 return count; // Vrátit pouze tento tah - ostatní tahy jsou blokované
3757 } else {
3758 ESP_LOGW(
3759 TAG,
3760 "🏰 Castling rook: max_suggestions=%lu reached, cannot add move",
3761 max_suggestions);
3762 }
3763 } else {
3764 ESP_LOGD(TAG,
3765 "🏰 game_get_available_moves: Not castling rook - row=%d col=%d "
3766 "piece=%d vs rook_from_row=%d rook_from_col=%d",
3767 row, col, piece, castling_state.rook_from_row,
3768 castling_state.rook_from_col);
3769 }
3770 }
3771
3772 // Optimized move generation based on piece type
3773 switch (piece) {
3774 case PIECE_WHITE_KNIGHT:
3775 case PIECE_BLACK_KNIGHT:
3776 // Knight moves in L-shape: 8 possible positions
3777 for (int i = 0; i < 8 && count < max_suggestions; i++) {
3778 int to_row = row + knight_moves[i][0];
3779 int to_col = col + knight_moves[i][1];
3780
3781 if (!game_is_valid_square(to_row, to_col))
3782 continue;
3783
3784 piece_t target = board[to_row][to_col];
3785 player_t player =
3786 (piece == PIECE_WHITE_KNIGHT) ? PLAYER_WHITE : PLAYER_BLACK;
3787
3788 // Skip if occupied by own piece
3789 if (game_is_own_piece(target, player))
3790 continue;
3791
3792 // Create temporary move for validation
3793 chess_move_t temp_move = {.from_row = row,
3794 .from_col = col,
3795 .to_row = to_row,
3796 .to_col = to_col,
3797 .piece = piece,
3798 .captured_piece = target,
3799 .timestamp = 0};
3800
3801 // Check if move is valid (including check validation)
3802 move_error_t error = game_is_valid_move(&temp_move);
3803 if (error == MOVE_ERROR_NONE) {
3804 suggestions[count].from_row = row;
3805 suggestions[count].from_col = col;
3806 suggestions[count].to_row = to_row;
3807 suggestions[count].to_col = to_col;
3808 suggestions[count].piece = piece;
3809 suggestions[count].is_capture = (target != PIECE_EMPTY);
3810 suggestions[count].is_check = false; // TODO: Implement check detection
3811 suggestions[count].is_castling = false;
3812 suggestions[count].is_en_passant = false;
3813 suggestions[count].score = 0;
3814 count++;
3815 }
3816 }
3817 break;
3818
3819 default:
3820 // For other pieces, use the original method (less efficient but works)
3821 for (int to_row = 0; to_row < 8 && count < max_suggestions; to_row++) {
3822 for (int to_col = 0; to_col < 8 && count < max_suggestions; to_col++) {
3823 // Skip same position
3824 if (to_row == row && to_col == col) {
3825 continue;
3826 }
3827
3828 // Create temporary move for validation
3829 chess_move_t temp_move = {.from_row = row,
3830 .from_col = col,
3831 .to_row = to_row,
3832 .to_col = to_col,
3833 .piece = piece,
3834 .captured_piece = board[to_row][to_col],
3835 .timestamp = 0};
3836
3837 // Check if move is valid
3838 move_error_t error = game_is_valid_move(&temp_move);
3839 if (error == MOVE_ERROR_NONE) {
3840 // Add to suggestions
3841 suggestions[count].from_row = row;
3842 suggestions[count].from_col = col;
3843 suggestions[count].to_row = to_row;
3844 suggestions[count].to_col = to_col;
3845 suggestions[count].piece = piece;
3846 suggestions[count].is_capture =
3847 (board[to_row][to_col] != PIECE_EMPTY);
3848 suggestions[count].is_check =
3849 false; // TODO: Implement check detection
3850
3851 // Detect castling
3852 suggestions[count].is_castling =
3853 (piece == PIECE_WHITE_KING || piece == PIECE_BLACK_KING) &&
3854 (abs((int)to_col - (int)col) == 2);
3855
3856 // Detect en passant
3857 suggestions[count].is_en_passant =
3858 game_is_en_passant_possible(&temp_move);
3859
3860 // Update capture flag for en passant
3861 if (suggestions[count].is_en_passant) {
3862 suggestions[count].is_capture = true;
3863 }
3864
3865 suggestions[count].score = 0; // TODO: Implement move scoring
3866
3867 count++;
3868 }
3869 }
3870 }
3871 break;
3872 }
3873
3874 return count;
3875}
3876
3877// ============================================================================
3878// GAME STATE VARIABLES
3879// ============================================================================
3880
3881// Fifty-move rule counter
3882static uint32_t fifty_move_counter = 0;
3883
3884// ============================================================================
3885// MOVE EXECUTION FUNCTIONS
3886// ============================================================================
3887
3891game_state_t game_analyze_position(player_t player) {
3892 bool king_in_check = game_is_king_in_check(player);
3893 uint32_t legal_moves = game_generate_legal_moves(player);
3894
3895 if (legal_moves == 0) {
3896 if (king_in_check) {
3897 // Checkmate
3898 game_result = GAME_STATE_FINISHED;
3899 game_result_type_t result_type =
3900 player == PLAYER_WHITE ? RESULT_BLACK_WINS : RESULT_WHITE_WINS;
3901 current_result_type = result_type; // Uložit pro web API
3902 game_update_endgame_statistics(result_type);
3903 game_print_endgame_report_uart(result_type);
3904 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🎯 CHECKMATE! %s wins!",
3905 player == PLAYER_WHITE ? "Black" : "White");
3906 return GAME_STATE_FINISHED;
3907 } else {
3908 // Stalemate
3909 game_result = GAME_STATE_FINISHED;
3910 current_result_type = RESULT_DRAW_STALEMATE; // Uložit pro web API
3911 game_update_endgame_statistics(RESULT_DRAW_STALEMATE);
3912 game_print_endgame_report_uart(RESULT_DRAW_STALEMATE);
3913 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🤝 STALEMATE! Game drawn!");
3914 return GAME_STATE_FINISHED;
3915 }
3916 }
3917
3918 // Check for fifty-move rule
3919 if (fifty_move_counter >= 100) { // 50 moves per side
3920 game_result = GAME_STATE_FINISHED;
3921 current_result_type = RESULT_DRAW_50_MOVE; // Uložit pro web API
3922 game_update_endgame_statistics(RESULT_DRAW_50_MOVE);
3923 game_print_endgame_report_uart(RESULT_DRAW_50_MOVE);
3924 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🤝 DRAW! Fifty-move rule!");
3925 return GAME_STATE_FINISHED;
3926 }
3927
3928 // Check for insufficient material (simplified)
3929 int white_pieces = 0, black_pieces = 0;
3930 bool white_has_major = false, black_has_major = false;
3931
3932 for (int row = 0; row < 8; row++) {
3933 for (int col = 0; col < 8; col++) {
3934 piece_t piece = board[row][col];
3935 if (piece == PIECE_EMPTY)
3936 continue;
3937
3938 if (game_is_white_piece(piece)) {
3939 white_pieces++;
3940 if (piece == PIECE_WHITE_QUEEN || piece == PIECE_WHITE_ROOK ||
3941 piece == PIECE_WHITE_PAWN) {
3942 white_has_major = true;
3943 }
3944 } else {
3945 black_pieces++;
3946 if (piece == PIECE_BLACK_QUEEN || piece == PIECE_BLACK_ROOK ||
3947 piece == PIECE_BLACK_PAWN) {
3948 black_has_major = true;
3949 }
3950 }
3951 }
3952 }
3953
3954 if (white_pieces <= 2 && black_pieces <= 2 && !white_has_major &&
3955 !black_has_major) {
3956 game_result = GAME_STATE_FINISHED;
3957 current_result_type = RESULT_DRAW_INSUFFICIENT; // Uložit pro web API
3958 game_update_endgame_statistics(RESULT_DRAW_INSUFFICIENT);
3959 game_print_endgame_report_uart(RESULT_DRAW_INSUFFICIENT);
3960 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🤝 DRAW! Insufficient material!");
3961 return GAME_STATE_FINISHED;
3962 }
3963
3964 return GAME_STATE_ACTIVE;
3965}
3966
3967bool game_execute_move(const chess_move_t *move) {
3968 if (!move) {
3969 return false;
3970 }
3971
3972 const bool api_immediate_promo = s_uart_move_immediate_promotion;
3973 const promotion_choice_t api_promo_choice = s_uart_move_immediate_promotion_piece;
3974 s_uart_move_immediate_promotion = false;
3975
3976 move_error_t error = game_is_valid_move(move);
3977 if (error != MOVE_ERROR_NONE) {
3978 ESP_LOGW(TAG, "Invalid move attempted: %d", error);
3979 return false;
3980 }
3981
3982 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Executing move: %c%d-%c%d", 'a' + move->from_col,
3983 move->from_row + 1, 'a' + move->to_col, move->to_row + 1);
3984
3985 // Get pieces
3986 piece_t source_piece = game_get_piece(move->from_row, move->from_col);
3987 piece_t dest_piece = game_get_piece(move->to_row, move->to_col);
3988
3989 // Create extended move for proper handling of special cases
3990 chess_move_extended_t extended_move = {.from_row = move->from_row,
3991 .from_col = move->from_col,
3992 .to_row = move->to_row,
3993 .to_col = move->to_col,
3994 .piece = source_piece,
3995 .captured_piece = dest_piece,
3996 .move_type = MOVE_TYPE_NORMAL,
3997 .promotion_piece = PROMOTION_QUEEN,
3998 .timestamp =
3999 esp_timer_get_time() / 1000,
4000 .is_check = false,
4001 .is_checkmate = false,
4002 .is_stalemate = false};
4003
4004 // Detect special move types
4005
4006 // Disable special move detection during error recovery
4007 // During error recovery, ALL moves are treated as NORMAL moves to prevent
4008 // state conflicts
4009 if (!error_recovery_state.waiting_for_move_correction) {
4010 // 1. Check for castling
4011 if ((source_piece == PIECE_WHITE_KING ||
4012 source_piece == PIECE_BLACK_KING) &&
4013 abs(move->to_col - move->from_col) == 2) {
4014 extended_move.move_type = (move->to_col > move->from_col)
4015 ? MOVE_TYPE_CASTLE_KING
4016 : MOVE_TYPE_CASTLE_QUEEN;
4017 }
4018
4019 // 2. Check for en passant
4020 else if ((source_piece == PIECE_WHITE_PAWN ||
4021 source_piece == PIECE_BLACK_PAWN) &&
4022 abs(move->to_col - move->from_col) == 1 &&
4023 dest_piece == PIECE_EMPTY) {
4024 if (game_is_en_passant_possible(move)) {
4025 extended_move.move_type = MOVE_TYPE_EN_PASSANT;
4026 }
4027
4028 }
4029
4030 // 3. Check for promotion
4031 else if ((source_piece == PIECE_WHITE_PAWN && move->to_row == 7) ||
4032 (source_piece == PIECE_BLACK_PAWN && move->to_row == 0)) {
4033 extended_move.move_type = MOVE_TYPE_PROMOTION;
4034
4035 if (api_immediate_promo && api_promo_choice <= PROMOTION_KNIGHT) {
4036 extended_move.promotion_piece = api_promo_choice;
4037 ESP_LOGI(TAG,
4038 "👑 API immediate promotion (choice=%d) — skip pending state",
4039 (int)api_promo_choice);
4040 } else {
4041 // OKAMŽITĚ nastavit promotion_state před voláním
4042 // game_execute_move_enhanced() Toto zajistí, že
4043 // game_execute_move_enhanced() neprovádí auto-promoci Použít recursive
4044 // mutex funkce (promotion_mutex je recursive mutex)
4045 if (xSemaphoreTakeRecursive(promotion_mutex, pdMS_TO_TICKS(100)) ==
4046 pdTRUE) {
4047 promotion_state.pending = true;
4048 promotion_state.square_row = move->to_row;
4049 promotion_state.square_col = move->to_col;
4050 promotion_state.player = current_player;
4051 xSemaphoreGiveRecursive(promotion_mutex);
4052
4053 ESP_LOGI(TAG,
4054 "⏸️ Promotion detected - setting pending state at %c%d for %s "
4055 "player",
4056 'a' + move->to_col, move->to_row + 1,
4057 current_player == PLAYER_WHITE ? "White" : "Black");
4058 } else {
4059 ESP_LOGE(TAG,
4060 "❌ Failed to acquire promotion mutex during move detection!");
4061 }
4062 }
4063 }
4064
4065 // 4. Check for capture
4066 else if (dest_piece != PIECE_EMPTY) {
4067 extended_move.move_type = MOVE_TYPE_CAPTURE;
4068 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Capture: %s captures %s",
4069 game_get_piece_name(source_piece),
4070 game_get_piece_name(dest_piece));
4071
4072 // Add captured piece to tracking
4073 add_captured_piece(dest_piece);
4074 }
4075 } else {
4076 // During error recovery, treat everything as NORMAL move (or CAPTURE if
4077 // opponent piece present)
4078 if (dest_piece != PIECE_EMPTY) {
4079 extended_move.move_type = MOVE_TYPE_CAPTURE;
4080 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Error recovery: treating as simple capture");
4081 } else {
4082 extended_move.move_type = MOVE_TYPE_NORMAL;
4083 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Error recovery: treating as normal move");
4084 }
4085 }
4086
4087 // Execute the enhanced move
4088 bool success = game_execute_move_enhanced(&extended_move);
4089
4090 ESP_LOGI(TAG,
4091 "🔍 game_execute_move: success=%d, current_player before change=%s",
4092 success, current_player == PLAYER_WHITE ? "White" : "Black");
4093
4094 if (success) {
4095 // Update last move tracking for future en passant detection
4096 last_move_from_row = move->from_row;
4097 last_move_from_col = move->from_col;
4098 last_move_to_row = move->to_row;
4099 last_move_to_col = move->to_col;
4100 has_last_move = true;
4101
4102 // Rošáda = jeden tah v historii (král už byl přidán; tah věže nepřidávat)
4103 bool is_castling_rook_completion =
4104 (castling_state.in_progress &&
4105 move->from_row == castling_state.rook_from_row &&
4106 move->from_col == castling_state.rook_from_col &&
4107 move->to_row == castling_state.rook_to_row &&
4108 move->to_col == castling_state.rook_to_col);
4109
4110 if (!is_castling_rook_completion) {
4111 // Add to move history
4112 if (history_index < MAX_MOVES_HISTORY) {
4113 move_history[history_index] = *move;
4114 move_history[history_index].piece = source_piece;
4115 move_history[history_index].captured_piece = dest_piece;
4116 move_history[history_index].timestamp = esp_timer_get_time() / 1000;
4117 move_history_kind[history_index] = extended_move.move_type;
4118 history_index++;
4119 }
4120
4121 // Update game state
4122 move_count++;
4123 last_move_time = esp_timer_get_time() / 1000;
4124
4125 // Record material advantage pro graf
4126 game_record_material_advantage();
4127 } else {
4128 last_move_time = esp_timer_get_time() / 1000;
4129 }
4130
4131 // ENHANCED CASTLING DETECTION
4132 if (extended_move.move_type == MOVE_TYPE_CASTLE_KING ||
4133 extended_move.move_type == MOVE_TYPE_CASTLE_QUEEN) {
4134 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🏰 CASTLING DETECTED! King moved 2 squares");
4135
4136 // Nastavit castling state pro tracking
4137 castling_state.in_progress = true;
4138 castling_state.player = current_player;
4139 castling_state.is_kingside = (move->to_col > move->from_col);
4140
4141 // Vypočítat očekávané pozice věže
4142 uint8_t rook_row = move->from_row;
4143 if (castling_state.is_kingside) {
4144 castling_state.rook_from_row = rook_row;
4145 castling_state.rook_from_col = 7; // h-file
4146 castling_state.rook_to_row = rook_row;
4147 castling_state.rook_to_col = 5; // f-file
4148 } else {
4149 castling_state.rook_from_row = rook_row;
4150 castling_state.rook_from_col = 0; // a-file
4151 castling_state.rook_to_row = rook_row;
4152 castling_state.rook_to_col = 3; // d-file
4153 }
4154
4155 // Ukázat LED indikaci pro věž s pulzováním pro lepší viditelnost
4156 led_clear_board_only();
4157
4158 uint8_t rook_from_led = chess_pos_to_led_index(
4159 castling_state.rook_from_row, castling_state.rook_from_col);
4160 uint8_t rook_to_led = chess_pos_to_led_index(castling_state.rook_to_row,
4161 castling_state.rook_to_col);
4162
4163 // Pulzování pro lepší viditelnost (3 cykly s plynulým přechodem)
4164 // Použít správný výpočet brightness pro plynulé pulzování
4165 for (int pulse = 0; pulse < 3; pulse++) {
4166 // Plynulé pulzování: 0.5 -> 1.0 -> 0.5
4167 // Použít sin() s normalizací - sin() vrací -1 až 1, normalizujeme na
4168 // 0-1, pak na 0.5-1.0
4169 float phase = (float)pulse * 2.0f * 3.14159f / 3.0f; // 0, 2π/3, 4π/3
4170 float brightness =
4171 0.5f + 0.5f * (1.0f + sin(phase)) /
4172 2.0f; // Normalizace: sin() -> 0-1 -> 0.5-1.0
4173
4174 // Stříbrná pro věž (source) s pulzováním
4175 led_set_pixel_safe(rook_from_led, (uint8_t)(192 * brightness),
4176 (uint8_t)(192 * brightness),
4177 (uint8_t)(192 * brightness));
4178
4179 // Zelená pro cíl věže (destination) s pulzováním
4180 led_set_pixel_safe(rook_to_led, 0, (uint8_t)(255 * brightness), 0);
4181
4182 vTaskDelay(pdMS_TO_TICKS(200));
4183 }
4184
4185 // Finální statické zobrazení
4186 led_set_pixel_safe(rook_from_led, 192, 192, 192); // Stříbrná pro věž
4187 led_set_pixel_safe(rook_to_led, 0, 255, 0); // Zelená pro cíl věže
4188
4189 // NEMĚNIT HRÁČE pro castling!
4190 ESP_LOGI(
4191 TAG, "⏳ Waiting for rook move from %c%d to %c%d",
4192 'a' + castling_state.rook_from_col, castling_state.rook_from_row + 1,
4193 'a' + castling_state.rook_to_col, castling_state.rook_to_row + 1);
4194 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🏰 Castling in progress - player remains %s",
4195 current_player == PLAYER_WHITE ? "White" : "Black");
4196 game_persist_after_valid_move();
4197 return success; // Return success but don't change player - hráč se změní
4198 // až po dokončení rošády
4199 }
4200
4201 // Check for promotion - start promotion animation (jen když nebyla API okamžitá)
4202 if (extended_move.move_type == MOVE_TYPE_PROMOTION) {
4203 const bool api_promo_inline =
4204 api_immediate_promo && api_promo_choice <= PROMOTION_KNIGHT;
4205 if (!api_promo_inline) {
4206 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "👑 PROMOTION DETECTED! Starting promotion animation...");
4207
4208 // #2: Mutex protection for promotion_state
4209 // Použít recursive mutex funkce (promotion_mutex je recursive mutex)
4210 if (xSemaphoreTakeRecursive(promotion_mutex, pdMS_TO_TICKS(100)) ==
4211 pdTRUE) {
4212 // Set promotion state to pending
4213 // This blocks further moves and enables selection via buttons/UART/web
4214 promotion_state.pending = true;
4215 promotion_state.square_row = move->to_row;
4216 promotion_state.square_col = move->to_col;
4217 promotion_state.player = current_player;
4218 xSemaphoreGiveRecursive(promotion_mutex);
4219
4220 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "⏸️ Promotion pending at %c%d for %s player",
4221 'a' + move->to_col, move->to_row + 1,
4222 current_player == PLAYER_WHITE ? "White" : "Black");
4223 } else {
4224 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "❌ Failed to acquire promotion mutex!");
4225 return false;
4226 }
4227
4228 // Start promotion animation
4229 led_command_t promote_cmd = {
4230 .type = LED_CMD_ANIM_PROMOTE,
4231 .led_index = chess_pos_to_led_index(move->to_row, move->to_col),
4232 .red = 255,
4233 .green = 215,
4234 .blue = 0, // Gold
4235 .duration_ms = 2000,
4236 .data = NULL};
4237 led_execute_command_new(&promote_cmd);
4238
4239 // Update LED button indications (green for promotion buttons)
4240 game_check_promotion_needed();
4241
4242 // CRITICAL: Return here WITHOUT changing player
4243 // Player will change AFTER promotion selection in
4244 // game_process_promotion_command()
4245 ESP_LOGI(
4246 TAG,
4247 "🏁 Promotion flow started - awaiting selection (buttons/UART/web)");
4248 game_persist_after_valid_move();
4249 return success; // Don't change player - wait for promotion choice
4250 }
4251 ESP_LOGI(TAG,
4252 "👑 Inline API promotion — continuing (player switch below)");
4253 }
4254
4255 // KONTROLA DOKONČENÍ ROŠÁDY
4256 if (castling_state.in_progress) {
4257 // Je to tah věže pro dokončení rošády?
4258 if (move->from_row == castling_state.rook_from_row &&
4259 move->from_col == castling_state.rook_from_col &&
4260 move->to_row == castling_state.rook_to_row &&
4261 move->to_col == castling_state.rook_to_col) {
4262
4263 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "✅ CASTLING COMPLETED! Rook moved correctly");
4264
4265 // Provedeme posun věže v board[][]
4266 board[move->to_row][move->to_col] = move->piece;
4267 board[castling_state.rook_from_row][castling_state.rook_from_col] =
4268 PIECE_EMPTY;
4269
4270 // Počet rošád pro výukový přehled / API
4271 if (castling_state.player == PLAYER_WHITE) {
4272 white_castles++;
4273 } else {
4274 black_castles++;
4275 }
4276
4277 // Aktualizovat příznaky pro krále a věž
4278 if (castling_state.player == PLAYER_WHITE) {
4279 white_king_moved = true;
4280 if (castling_state.rook_from_col == 7)
4281 white_rook_h_moved = true;
4282 else
4283 white_rook_a_moved = true;
4284 } else {
4285 black_king_moved = true;
4286 if (castling_state.rook_from_col == 7)
4287 black_rook_h_moved = true;
4288 else
4289 black_rook_a_moved = true;
4290 }
4291
4292 // Zlatá animace dokončení rošády
4293 show_castling_completion_animation();
4294
4295 /* Vždy ukončit stav rošády před přepnutím hráče / kontrolou konce hry.
4296 * Dříve se in_progress vynulovalo jen v ne-endgame větvi — po matu/patu
4297 * zůstalo true a validace dál odmítala tahy jako „čeká se na věž“. */
4298 castling_state.in_progress = false;
4299 STAGING_LOGI(TAG,
4300 "castling: completion cleared in_progress (before endgame "
4301 "check)");
4302
4303 // TEPRVE NYÍ změnit hráče po dokončení rošády
4304 player_t previous_player = current_player;
4305 current_player =
4306 (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? PLAYER_BLACK : PLAYER_WHITE;
4307
4308 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🎉 Castling completed! Player changed to %s",
4309 current_player == PLAYER_WHITE ? "White" : "Black");
4310
4311 // Timer integration: End timer for previous player and start for new
4312 // player
4313 ESP_LOGI(TAG,
4314 "🔄 Timer switch (castling): ending for %s, starting for %s",
4315 previous_player == PLAYER_WHITE ? "White" : "Black",
4316 current_player == PLAYER_WHITE ? "White" : "Black");
4317 game_end_timer_move();
4318 game_start_timer_move(current_player == PLAYER_WHITE);
4319
4320 // Endgame kontrola PŘED player change animací!
4321 // Pokud je endgame, player change se NESPOUŠTÍ
4322 game_state_t end_game_result = game_check_end_game_conditions();
4323 if (end_game_result == GAME_STATE_FINISHED) {
4324 current_game_state = GAME_STATE_FINISHED;
4325 game_active = false;
4326
4327 // Najít pozici krále vítěze pro endgame animaci
4328 player_t winner =
4329 (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? PLAYER_BLACK : PLAYER_WHITE;
4330 uint8_t king_pos = 28; // default e4
4331 for (int i = 0; i < 64; i++) {
4332 piece_t piece = board[i / 8][i % 8];
4333 if ((winner == PLAYER_WHITE && piece == PIECE_WHITE_KING) ||
4334 (winner == PLAYER_BLACK && piece == PIECE_BLACK_KING)) {
4335 king_pos = i;
4336 break;
4337 }
4338 }
4339
4340 ESP_LOGI(TAG,
4341 "🎯 Game finished after castling! Starting endgame "
4342 "animation at position %d",
4343 king_pos);
4344
4345 // Spustit endgame animaci (wave z krále vítěze)
4346 led_command_t endgame_cmd = {.type = LED_CMD_ANIM_ENDGAME,
4347 .led_index = king_pos,
4348 .red = 255,
4349 .green = 255,
4350 .blue = 0, // Yellow
4351 .duration_ms = 0, // Endless
4352 .data = NULL};
4353 led_execute_command_new(&endgame_cmd);
4354
4355 ESP_LOGI(
4356 TAG,
4357 "✅ Endgame animation started - player change animation SKIPPED");
4358 } else {
4359 // Není endgame - spustit player change animaci
4360 uint8_t player_color =
4361 (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? 1 : 0; // 1=white, 0=black
4362 led_command_t player_change_cmd = {
4363 .type = LED_CMD_ANIM_PLAYER_CHANGE, // Použít
4364 // ANIM_PLAYER_CHANGE místo
4365 // PLAYER_CHANGE
4366 .led_index = 0,
4367 .red = 0,
4368 .green = 0,
4369 .blue = 0,
4370 .duration_ms = 0,
4371 .data = &player_color // Předat barvu hráče
4372 };
4373 led_execute_command_new(&player_change_cmd);
4374
4375 // Zobrazit pohyblivé figury pro nového hráče
4376 led_clear_board_only();
4377 game_highlight_movable_pieces();
4378
4379 // Zkontrolovat, zda je nový hráč v šachu
4380 bool in_check = game_is_king_in_check(current_player);
4381 if (in_check) {
4382 // Najít pozici krále
4383 int king_row = -1, king_col = -1;
4384 piece_t king_piece = (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE)
4385 ? PIECE_WHITE_KING
4386 : PIECE_BLACK_KING;
4387 for (int row = 0; row < 8; row++) {
4388 for (int col = 0; col < 8; col++) {
4389 if (board[row][col] == king_piece) {
4390 king_row = row;
4391 king_col = col;
4392 break;
4393 }
4394 }
4395 if (king_row != -1)
4396 break;
4397 }
4398
4399 if (king_row != -1 && king_col != -1) {
4400 if (game_led_guidance_show_check_anim()) {
4401 uint8_t king_led_index =
4402 chess_pos_to_led_index(king_row, king_col);
4403 // Spustit check animaci - růžové svícení na králi
4404 led_command_t check_cmd = {.type = LED_CMD_ANIM_CHECK,
4405 .led_index = king_led_index,
4406 .red = 0,
4407 .green = 0,
4408 .blue = 0,
4409 .duration_ms =
4410 0, // Trvalé až do dalšího tahu
4411 .data = NULL};
4412 led_execute_command_new(&check_cmd);
4413 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "⚠️ CHECK! %s is in check",
4414 current_player == PLAYER_WHITE ? "White" : "Black");
4415 }
4416 }
4417 }
4418 }
4419
4420 // RETURN po dokončení rošády - hráč se už změnil
4421 game_persist_after_valid_move();
4422 return success;
4423 } else {
4424 // Wrong move during castling
4425 // Check if user is aborting by moving King back or elsewhere
4426 if (move->piece == PIECE_WHITE_KING ||
4427 move->piece == PIECE_BLACK_KING) {
4428 ESP_LOGW(TAG, "🚫 Castling ABORTED by King move %c%d-%c%d",
4429 'a' + move->from_col, move->from_row + 1, 'a' + move->to_col,
4430 move->to_row + 1);
4431
4432 // Abort castling state
4433 castling_state.in_progress = false;
4434 // Clear LEDs
4435 led_clear_board_only();
4436 // Treat as normal move (Undo usually)
4437 // We return true (success) so the move is accepted update the board
4438 // But we MUST ensure the player switches/unswitches correctly?
4439 // Actually, if they undo the move, they are just moving King back.
4440 // But 'game_execute_move' logic for NORMAL moves switches player.
4441 // If King G1->E1 (Undo), it switches to opponent?
4442 // Yes. That's fine. It's a move.
4443
4444 // Wait, if it was G1->E1, logic board updates G1->E1.
4445 // Player switches.
4446 // Game continues.
4447
4448 // We need to fall through to NORMAL move processing below?
4449 // No, we are inside the 'if (castling_state.in_progress)' block which
4450 // is BEFORE normal processing? Wait, the structure is:
4451 /*
4452 if (castling_state.in_progress) {
4453 if (is_rook_move) { ... return success; }
4454 else { ... return success; }
4455 }
4456 */
4457 // So if we abort, we should probably fall through to normal logic?
4458 // But 'castling_state.in_progress' block returns.
4459
4460 // Let's just Execute the move here manually or modify logic to fall
4461 // through. The cleanest way: Set in_progress = false, then fall
4462 // through? But the block wraps the return.
4463
4464 // I will Copy-Paste the 'Normal Move' logic essentially, or better:
4465 // Just fall through! I will remove the 'return success' and 'else'
4466 // structure slightly.
4467
4468 // REWRITE:
4469 /*
4470 if (castling_state.in_progress) {
4471 if (is_rook_move) {
4472 ...
4473 return success;
4474 }
4475 // Not rook move - Abort?
4476 castling_state.in_progress = false;
4477 ESP_LOGW(TAG, "Castling aborted");
4478 led_clear_board_only();
4479 // Fall through to normal processing!
4480 }
4481 */
4482 } else {
4483 ESP_LOGE(
4484 TAG,
4485 "❌ Wrong move during castling - expected rook from %c%d to %c%d",
4486 'a' + castling_state.rook_from_col,
4487 castling_state.rook_from_row + 1,
4488 'a' + castling_state.rook_to_col, castling_state.rook_to_row + 1);
4489 // Nezměnit hráče - stále čekáme na správný tah věže
4490 game_persist_after_valid_move();
4491 return success; // Return success but don't change player
4492 }
4493 }
4494 }
4495
4496 // Fallthrough for Aborted Castling (treat as normal move)
4497
4498 // NORMÁLNÍ TAHY - změnit hráče (move animace se spouští v
4499 // game_process_drop_command) Switch player BEFORE checking
4500 // endgame conditions (podle starého projektu)
4501 player_t previous_player = current_player;
4502 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🔄 Changing player from %s to %s",
4503 previous_player == PLAYER_WHITE ? "White" : "Black",
4504 (previous_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? "Black" : "White");
4505 current_player =
4506 (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? PLAYER_BLACK : PLAYER_WHITE;
4507
4508 ESP_LOGI(TAG,
4509 "✅ Move executed successfully. %s to move (current_player=%s)",
4510 (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? "White" : "Black",
4511 current_player == PLAYER_WHITE ? "White" : "Black");
4512
4513 // Check for endgame conditions after move execution (podle
4514 // starého projektu)
4515 game_state_t end_game_result = game_check_end_game_conditions();
4516 if (end_game_result == GAME_STATE_FINISHED) {
4517 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🎯 Endgame detected after move execution");
4518 current_game_state = GAME_STATE_FINISHED;
4519 game_active = false;
4520 }
4521 }
4522
4523 // Update promotion LED indications after move
4524 if (success) {
4525 game_check_promotion_needed();
4526 game_persist_after_valid_move();
4527 game_bump_revision_and_notify();
4528 }
4529
4530 return success;
4531}
4532
4533// ============================================================================
4534// GAME STATUS FUNCTIONS
4535// ============================================================================
4536
4537game_state_t game_get_state(void) { return current_game_state; }
4538
4539player_t game_get_current_player(void) { return current_player; }
4540
4541void game_set_guided_capture_hints_enabled(bool enabled) {
4542 guided_capture_hints_enabled = enabled;
4543 STAGING_LOGI(TAG, "Guided capture hints set to: %s",
4544 enabled ? "ON" : "OFF");
4545
4546 if (guided_capture_state.active) {
4547 game_show_guided_capture_leds();
4548 }
4549}
4550
4551bool game_get_guided_capture_hints_enabled(void) {
4552 return guided_capture_hints_enabled;
4553}
4554
4555bool game_matrix_allow_second_sequential_lift(void) {
4556 if (matrix_guard_pause_state.active) {
4557 return false;
4558 }
4559 if (guided_capture_state.active) {
4560 return true;
4561 }
4562 if (resignation_state.active || promotion_state.pending ||
4563 castling_state.in_progress || game_is_castle_animation_active() ||
4564 error_recovery_state.waiting_for_move_correction ||
4565 capture_in_progress) {
4566 return false;
4567 }
4568 if (!piece_lifted || lifted_piece == PIECE_EMPTY) {
4569 return false;
4570 }
4571 bool is_white_piece =
4572 (lifted_piece >= PIECE_WHITE_PAWN && lifted_piece <= PIECE_WHITE_KING);
4573 bool is_black_piece =
4574 (lifted_piece >= PIECE_BLACK_PAWN && lifted_piece <= PIECE_BLACK_KING);
4575 if (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE && is_white_piece) {
4576 return true;
4577 }
4578 if (current_player == PLAYER_BLACK && is_black_piece) {
4579 return true;
4580 }
4581 return false;
4582}
4583
4584uint8_t game_get_led_guidance_level(void) { return led_guidance_level; }
4585
4586void game_set_led_guidance_level(uint8_t level) {
4587 if (level < 1U) {
4588 level = 1;
4589 }
4590 if (level > 5U) {
4591 level = 5;
4592 }
4593 led_guidance_level = level;
4594 bool want_gc = (level >= 5);
4595 if (guided_capture_hints_enabled != want_gc) {
4596 game_set_guided_capture_hints_enabled(want_gc);
4597 }
4598}
4599
4600bool game_is_matrix_guard_active(void) { return matrix_guard_pause_state.active; }
4601
4602uint8_t game_get_matrix_guard_conflict_count(void) {
4603 return matrix_guard_pause_state.conflict_count;
4604}
4605
4606uint32_t game_get_matrix_guard_lifted_mask_low(void) {
4607 return matrix_guard_pause_state.lifted_mask_low;
4608}
4609
4610uint32_t game_get_matrix_guard_lifted_mask_high(void) {
4611 return matrix_guard_pause_state.lifted_mask_high;
4612}
4613
4614uint32_t game_get_matrix_guard_dropped_mask_low(void) {
4615 return matrix_guard_pause_state.dropped_mask_low;
4616}
4617
4618uint32_t game_get_matrix_guard_dropped_mask_high(void) {
4619 return matrix_guard_pause_state.dropped_mask_high;
4620}
4621
4622bool game_was_snapshot_loaded_on_boot(void) { return snapshot_loaded_on_boot; }
4623
4624bool game_is_snapshot_fallback_used(void) { return snapshot_fallback_used; }
4625
4626bool game_has_snapshot_restore_failure(void) { return snapshot_restore_failed; }
4627
4628bool game_has_snapshot_save_failure(void) { return snapshot_save_failed; }
4629
4630bool game_is_resync_required_after_restore(void) {
4631 return resync_required_after_restore;
4632}
4633
4634bool game_was_boot_new_game_triggered(void) { return boot_new_game_triggered; }
4635
4636void game_print_board(void) {
4637 // Add spacing before board
4638 printf("\r\n");
4639
4640// Enhanced ANSI color codes
4641#define COLOR_RESET "\033[0m"
4642#define COLOR_BOLD "\033[1m"
4643#define COLOR_BRIGHT_WHITE "\033[97m"
4644#define COLOR_BRIGHT_RED "\033[91m"
4645#define COLOR_BRIGHT_GREEN "\033[92m"
4646#define COLOR_BRIGHT_YELLOW "\033[93m"
4647#define COLOR_BRIGHT_BLUE "\033[94m"
4648#define COLOR_BRIGHT_CYAN "\033[96m"
4649#define BG_WHITE "\033[47m"
4650#define BG_BLACK "\033[40m"
4651#define BG_YELLOW "\033[43m"
4652
4653 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "=== Chess Board ===");
4654
4655 // Print board header with coordinates
4656 printf(COLOR_BRIGHT_CYAN " a b c d e f g h\n" COLOR_RESET);
4657 printf(COLOR_BRIGHT_CYAN " +---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+\n" COLOR_RESET);
4658
4659 // Print board rows (8 to 1) - FIXED: row 7 = rank 8, row 0 = rank 1
4660 for (int row = 7; row >= 0; row--) {
4661 char row_header[16];
4662 snprintf(row_header, sizeof(row_header),
4663 COLOR_BRIGHT_CYAN " %d " COLOR_RESET, row + 1);
4664 printf("%s", row_header);
4665
4666 // Print pieces in this row
4667 for (int col = 0; col < 8; col++) {
4668 piece_t piece = board[row][col];
4669
4670 // Check if this square is part of the last move
4671 bool is_last_move =
4672 has_last_move &&
4673 ((row == last_move_from_row && col == last_move_from_col) ||
4674 (row == last_move_to_row && col == last_move_to_col));
4675
4676 // Determine square color (white/black)
4677 bool is_white_square = ((row + col) % 2) == 0;
4678
4679 if (piece == PIECE_EMPTY) {
4680 if (is_last_move) {
4681 printf(BG_YELLOW COLOR_BRIGHT_CYAN
4682 " * " COLOR_RESET); // Highlight empty square from last move
4683 } else {
4684 if (is_white_square) {
4685 printf(BG_WHITE " " COLOR_RESET);
4686 } else {
4687 printf(BG_BLACK " " COLOR_RESET);
4688 }
4689 }
4690 } else {
4691 // Determine piece color
4692 bool is_white_piece =
4693 (piece >= PIECE_WHITE_PAWN && piece <= PIECE_WHITE_KING);
4694 const char *piece_color =
4695 is_white_piece ? COLOR_BRIGHT_WHITE : COLOR_BRIGHT_RED;
4696
4697 if (is_last_move) {
4698 printf(BG_YELLOW COLOR_BRIGHT_CYAN "*" COLOR_RESET);
4699 printf(BG_YELLOW "%s%s" COLOR_RESET, piece_color,
4700 piece_symbols[piece]);
4701 printf(BG_YELLOW COLOR_BRIGHT_CYAN
4702 "*" COLOR_RESET); // Highlight piece from last move
4703 } else {
4704 if (is_white_square) {
4705 printf(BG_WHITE "%s%s " COLOR_RESET, piece_color,
4706 piece_symbols[piece]);
4707 } else {
4708 printf(BG_BLACK "%s%s " COLOR_RESET, piece_color,
4709 piece_symbols[piece]);
4710 }
4711 }
4712 }
4713 }
4714 char row_footer[16];
4715 snprintf(row_footer, sizeof(row_footer),
4716 COLOR_BRIGHT_CYAN " %d\n" COLOR_RESET, row + 1);
4717 printf("%s", row_footer);
4718
4719 // Print row separator (except after last row)
4720 if (row > 0) {
4721 printf(COLOR_BRIGHT_CYAN
4722 " +---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+\n" COLOR_RESET);
4723 }
4724 }
4725
4726 printf(COLOR_BRIGHT_CYAN " +---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+\n" COLOR_RESET);
4727 printf(COLOR_BRIGHT_CYAN " a b c d e f g h\n" COLOR_RESET);
4728
4729 // Print game status information
4730 printf("\r\n");
4731 printf(COLOR_BOLD COLOR_BRIGHT_GREEN "🎮 GAME STATUS:\r\n" COLOR_RESET);
4732 printf(COLOR_BRIGHT_YELLOW " • Current player: " COLOR_RESET);
4733 if (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) {
4734 printf(COLOR_BRIGHT_WHITE "♔ WHITE" COLOR_RESET);
4735 } else {
4736 printf(COLOR_BRIGHT_RED "♚ BLACK" COLOR_RESET);
4737 }
4738 printf("\r\n");
4739
4740 printf(COLOR_BRIGHT_YELLOW " • Move number: " COLOR_RESET COLOR_BOLD
4741 "%" PRIu32 "\r\n" COLOR_RESET,
4742 move_count + 1);
4743
4744 // Print last move information
4745 if (has_last_move) {
4746 char from_square[4], to_square[4];
4747 game_coords_to_square(last_move_from_row, last_move_from_col, from_square);
4748 game_coords_to_square(last_move_to_row, last_move_to_col, to_square);
4749 printf(COLOR_BRIGHT_YELLOW " • Last move: " COLOR_RESET COLOR_BOLD
4750 "%s → %s\r\n" COLOR_RESET,
4751 from_square, to_square);
4752 }
4753
4754 // Check for special conditions
4755 if (game_is_king_in_check(current_player)) {
4756 printf(COLOR_BRIGHT_RED " ⚠️ " COLOR_BOLD "CHECK!" COLOR_RESET "\r\n");
4757 }
4758
4759 printf("\r\n");
4760
4761 // Print captured pieces
4762 if (white_captured_count > 0 || black_captured_count > 0) {
4763 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Captured pieces:");
4764 if (white_captured_count > 0) {
4765 printf(" White captured: ");
4766 for (uint32_t i = 0; i < white_captured_index; i++) {
4767 printf("%s ", piece_symbols[(int)white_captured_pieces[i]]);
4768 }
4769 printf("(%lu total)\n", (unsigned long)white_captured_count);
4770 }
4771 if (black_captured_count > 0) {
4772 printf(" Black captured: ");
4773 for (uint32_t i = 0; i < black_captured_index; i++) {
4774 printf("%s ", piece_symbols[(int)black_captured_pieces[i]]);
4775 }
4776 printf("(%lu total)\n", (unsigned long)black_captured_count);
4777 }
4778 }
4779
4780 // Print piece legend
4781 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Piece Legend:");
4782 ESP_LOGI(TAG, " White: p=pawn, n=knight, b=bishop, r=rook, q=queen, k=king");
4783 ESP_LOGI(TAG, " Black: P=pawn, N=knight, B=bishop, R=rook, Q=queen, K=king");
4784 ESP_LOGI(TAG, " Empty: space, * = last move");
4785
4786 // Print game status
4787 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Game Status:");
4788 ESP_LOGI(TAG, " Current player: %s",
4789 (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? "White" : "Black");
4790 ESP_LOGI(TAG, " Move count: %lu", move_count);
4791 ESP_LOGI(TAG, " Game state: %s",
4792 (current_game_state == GAME_STATE_ACTIVE) ? "Active"
4793 : (current_game_state == GAME_STATE_IDLE) ? "Idle"
4794 : (current_game_state == GAME_STATE_PAUSED) ? "Paused"
4795 : "Finished");
4796}
4797
4798void game_print_move_history(void) {
4799 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Move history (%lu moves):", history_index);
4800
4801 for (uint32_t i = 0; i < history_index; i++) {
4802 const chess_move_t *move = &move_history[i];
4803 ESP_LOGI(TAG, " %lu. %c%d-%c%d %s", i + 1, 'a' + move->from_col,
4804 move->from_row + 1, 'a' + move->to_col, move->to_row + 1,
4805 game_get_piece_name(move->piece));
4806 }
4807}
4808
4809// ============================================================================
4810// GENIUS COMPATIBILITY FUNCTIONS
4811// ============================================================================
4812
4816static void game_send_response_to_uart(const char *message, bool is_error,
4817 QueueHandle_t response_queue) {
4818 if (response_queue == NULL) {
4819 // Fallback to logging if no response queue
4820 if (is_error) {
4821 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "GAME_ERROR: %s", message ? message : "Unknown error");
4822 } else {
4823 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "GAME_SUCCESS: %s", message ? message : "Success");
4824 }
4825 return;
4826 }
4827
4828 // Create simple response message
4829 char response_message[256];
4830 if (message) {
4831 strncpy(response_message, message, sizeof(response_message) - 1);
4832 response_message[sizeof(response_message) - 1] = '\0';
4833 } else {
4834 strcpy(response_message, is_error ? "Unknown error" : "Success");
4835 }
4836
4837 // Send response to UART task as game_response_t
4838 game_response_t response = {
4839 .type = is_error ? GAME_RESPONSE_ERROR : GAME_RESPONSE_SUCCESS,
4840 .command_type = 0, // Will be set by caller if needed
4841 .error_code = is_error ? 1 : 0,
4842 .message = "",
4843 .timestamp = esp_timer_get_time() / 1000};
4844 strcpy(response.data, response_message);
4845
4846 /* Bez game_mutex: odeslání do fronty jen kopíruje připravený řetězec; mutex by
4847 * mohl deadlocknout (game_task × HTTP GET držící mutex pro JSON) nebo zdvojit
4848 * nest-rekurzivní zámek. Čtení stavu pro UART je vždy přes předaný `message`. */
4849 if (xQueueSend(response_queue, &response, pdMS_TO_TICKS(100)) != pdTRUE) {
4850 ESP_LOGW(TAG,
4851 "Failed to send response to UART task (queue full or timeout)");
4852 } else {
4853 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Response sent to UART task: %s",
4854 is_error ? "ERROR" : "SUCCESS");
4855 }
4856}
4857
4861static void game_send_board_to_uart(QueueHandle_t response_queue) {
4862 if (response_queue == NULL) {
4863 ESP_LOGW(TAG, "No response queue available for board data");
4864 return;
4865 }
4866
4867 // Reset WDT before starting operation
4868 game_task_wdt_reset_safe();
4869
4870 // MEMORY OPTIMIZATION: Use streaming output instead of malloc(3072)
4871 // This eliminates heap fragmentation and reduces memory usage
4872 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "📡 Using streaming output for board display (no malloc)");
4873
4874 // Configure streaming for queue output
4875 esp_err_t ret = streaming_set_queue_output(response_queue);
4876 if (ret != ESP_OK) {
4877 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to configure streaming output: %s",
4878 esp_err_to_name(ret));
4879 return;
4880 }
4881
4882 // MEMORY OPTIMIZATION: Use streaming output instead of large buffer
4883
4884 // Stream board header
4885 stream_writeln(" a b c d e f g h");
4886 stream_writeln(" +---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+");
4887
4888 // Stream board rows
4889 for (int row = 7; row >= 0; row--) {
4890 // Reset watchdog every row to prevent timeouts
4891 game_task_wdt_reset_safe();
4892
4893 stream_printf("%d |", row + 1);
4894
4895 for (int col = 0; col < 8; col++) {
4896 piece_t piece = board[row][col];
4897 const char *symbol;
4898
4899 switch (piece) {
4900 case PIECE_WHITE_PAWN:
4901 symbol = "P";
4902 break;
4903 case PIECE_WHITE_KNIGHT:
4904 symbol = "N";
4905 break;
4906 case PIECE_WHITE_BISHOP:
4907 symbol = "B";
4908 break;
4909 case PIECE_WHITE_ROOK:
4910 symbol = "R";
4911 break;
4912 case PIECE_WHITE_QUEEN:
4913 symbol = "Q";
4914 break;
4915 case PIECE_WHITE_KING:
4916 symbol = "K";
4917 break;
4918 case PIECE_BLACK_PAWN:
4919 symbol = "p";
4920 break;
4921 case PIECE_BLACK_KNIGHT:
4922 symbol = "n";
4923 break;
4924 case PIECE_BLACK_BISHOP:
4925 symbol = "b";
4926 break;
4927 case PIECE_BLACK_ROOK:
4928 symbol = "r";
4929 break;
4930 case PIECE_BLACK_QUEEN:
4931 symbol = "q";
4932 break;
4933 case PIECE_BLACK_KING:
4934 symbol = "k";
4935 break;
4936 default:
4937 symbol = "·";
4938 break;
4939 }
4940
4941 stream_printf(" %s |", symbol);
4942 }
4943
4944 stream_printf(" %d\n", row + 1);
4945
4946 if (row > 0) {
4947 stream_writeln(" +---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+");
4948 }
4949 }
4950
4951 // Stream board footer
4952 stream_writeln(" +---+---+---+---+---+---+---+---+");
4953 stream_writeln(" a b c d e f g h");
4954
4955 // Stream game status
4956 stream_printf("\nCurrent player: %s\n",
4957 current_player == PLAYER_WHITE ? "White" : "Black");
4958
4959 stream_printf("Move count: %" PRIu32 "\n", move_count);
4960
4961 // Stream helpful tip
4962 stream_writeln("💡 Use 'UP <square>' to lift piece, 'DN <square>' to place");
4963
4964 // MEMORY OPTIMIZATION: Streaming output handles data transmission
4965 // Send completion message to response queue
4966 game_response_t completion_response = {
4967 .type = GAME_RESPONSE_SUCCESS,
4968 .command_type = GAME_CMD_SHOW_BOARD,
4969 .error_code = 0,
4970 .message = "Board display streaming completed successfully",
4971 .timestamp = esp_timer_get_time() / 1000};
4972 strcpy(completion_response.data, "streaming completed");
4973
4974 if (response_queue != NULL) {
4975 xQueueSend(response_queue, &completion_response, pdMS_TO_TICKS(100));
4976 }
4977
4978 // No need for manual queue management or large buffers
4979 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "✅ Board display streaming completed successfully");
4980
4981 // Final WDT reset
4982 game_task_wdt_reset_safe();
4983}
4984
4985// Function removed - using game_send_board_to_uart(QueueHandle_t) instead
4986
4987static bool game_cmd_is_matrix_origin(const chess_move_command_t *cmd) {
4988 if (cmd == NULL) {
4989 return false;
4990 }
4991 return (cmd->response_queue == NULL &&
4992 (cmd->type == GAME_CMD_PICKUP || cmd->type == GAME_CMD_DROP));
4993}
4994
4995static uint8_t game_count_mask_bits(uint32_t low, uint32_t high) {
4996 uint8_t count = 0;
4997 while (low != 0) {
4998 count += (uint8_t)(low & 1U);
4999 low >>= 1;
5000 }
5001 while (high != 0) {
5002 count += (uint8_t)(high & 1U);
5003 high >>= 1;
5004 }
5005 return count;
5006}
5007
5008static bool game_matrix_guard_mode_conflict_active(void) {
5009 return (board_setup_tutorial_active || puzzle_setup_active || puzzle_active ||
5010 promotion_state.pending ||
5011 castling_state.in_progress || castle_animation_active ||
5012 resignation_state.active || guided_capture_state.active ||
5013 error_recovery_state.waiting_for_move_correction);
5014}
5015
5016static void game_render_matrix_guard_leds(void) {
5017 if (!matrix_guard_pause_state.active) {
5018 return;
5019 }
5020
5021 led_clear_board_only();
5022 uint64_t mask = ((uint64_t)matrix_guard_pause_state.lifted_mask_high << 32) |
5023 matrix_guard_pause_state.lifted_mask_low |
5024 ((uint64_t)matrix_guard_pause_state.dropped_mask_high << 32) |
5025 matrix_guard_pause_state.dropped_mask_low;
5026
5027 uint8_t phys[64] = {0};
5028 matrix_get_state(phys);
5029
5030 for (uint8_t square = 0; square < 64; square++) {
5031 if ((mask & (1ULL << square)) == 0) {
5032 continue;
5033 }
5034 uint8_t row = square / 8;
5035 uint8_t col = square % 8;
5036 piece_t piece = board[row][col];
5037 if (piece >= PIECE_WHITE_PAWN && piece <= PIECE_WHITE_KING) {
5038 led_set_pixel_safe(chess_pos_to_led_index(row, col), 255, 255, 0);
5039 } else if (piece >= PIECE_BLACK_PAWN && piece <= PIECE_BLACK_KING) {
5040 led_set_pixel_safe(chess_pos_to_led_index(row, col), 0, 0, 255);
5041 } else if (phys[square] != 0) {
5042 /* Logika říká prázdno, senzor hlásí figurku — zvýraznit (oranžová). */
5043 led_set_pixel_safe(chess_pos_to_led_index(row, col), 255, 140, 0);
5044 } else {
5045 /* Chybí figurka oproti logice — bílá výplň */
5046 led_set_pixel_safe(chess_pos_to_led_index(row, col), 220, 220, 220);
5047 }
5048 }
5049}
5050
5051static void game_handle_matrix_guard_command(const chess_move_command_t *cmd) {
5052 if (cmd == NULL || cmd->type != GAME_CMD_MATRIX_GUARD) {
5053 return;
5054 }
5055
5056 uint8_t action = cmd->timer_data.matrix_guard.action;
5057 if (action == 0) {
5058 matrix_guard_pause_state.active = false;
5059 matrix_guard_pause_state.lifted_mask_low = 0;
5060 matrix_guard_pause_state.lifted_mask_high = 0;
5061 matrix_guard_pause_state.dropped_mask_low = 0;
5062 matrix_guard_pause_state.dropped_mask_high = 0;
5063 matrix_guard_pause_state.conflict_count = 0;
5064 resync_required_after_restore = false;
5065 STAGING_LOGI(TAG, "Matrix guard cleared");
5066 led_clear_board_only();
5067 game_highlight_movable_pieces();
5068 return;
5069 }
5070
5071 if (game_matrix_guard_mode_conflict_active()) {
5072 STAGING_LOGI(TAG,
5073 "Matrix guard ignored (special mode) — clearing matrix local "
5074 "guard so UP/DN continues");
5075 matrix_abort_ambiguous_guard_baseline();
5076 return;
5077 }
5078
5079 matrix_guard_pause_state.active = true;
5080 matrix_guard_pause_state.lifted_mask_low =
5081 cmd->timer_data.matrix_guard.lifted_mask_low;
5082 matrix_guard_pause_state.lifted_mask_high =
5083 cmd->timer_data.matrix_guard.lifted_mask_high;
5084 matrix_guard_pause_state.dropped_mask_low =
5085 cmd->timer_data.matrix_guard.dropped_mask_low;
5086 matrix_guard_pause_state.dropped_mask_high =
5087 cmd->timer_data.matrix_guard.dropped_mask_high;
5088 matrix_guard_pause_state.conflict_count = game_count_mask_bits(
5089 matrix_guard_pause_state.lifted_mask_low |
5090 matrix_guard_pause_state.dropped_mask_low,
5091 matrix_guard_pause_state.lifted_mask_high |
5092 matrix_guard_pause_state.dropped_mask_high);
5093
5094 // Freeze matrix move flow and clear transient lift state.
5095 piece_lifted = false;
5096 lifted_piece = PIECE_EMPTY;
5097 lifted_piece_row = 0;
5098 lifted_piece_col = 0;
5099 capture_in_progress = false;
5100
5101 STAGING_LOGI(TAG, "Matrix guard active, conflict_count=%u",
5102 matrix_guard_pause_state.conflict_count);
5103 game_render_matrix_guard_leds();
5104}
5105
5106static uint32_t game_crc32_simple(const uint8_t *data, size_t len) {
5107 uint32_t h = 2166136261u;
5108 if (data == NULL) {
5109 return h;
5110 }
5111 for (size_t i = 0; i < len; i++) {
5112 h ^= data[i];
5113 h *= 16777619u;
5114 }
5115 return h;
5116}
5117
5118static void game_snapshot_fill_board(uint8_t out_board[64]) {
5119 if (out_board == NULL) {
5120 return;
5121 }
5122 for (uint8_t row = 0; row < 8; row++) {
5123 for (uint8_t col = 0; col < 8; col++) {
5124 out_board[row * 8 + col] = (uint8_t)board[row][col];
5125 }
5126 }
5127}
5128
5129static void game_snapshot_apply_board(const uint8_t in_board[64]) {
5130 if (in_board == NULL) {
5131 return;
5132 }
5133 for (uint8_t row = 0; row < 8; row++) {
5134 for (uint8_t col = 0; col < 8; col++) {
5135 board[row][col] = (piece_t)in_board[row * 8 + col];
5136 }
5137 }
5138}
5139
5140static esp_err_t game_save_snapshot_to_nvs(void) {
5141 game_snapshot_full_t full = {0};
5142 full.version = GAME_SNAPSHOT_VERSION;
5143 full.format = 2;
5144 game_snapshot_fill_board(full.board);
5145 full.current_player = (uint8_t)current_player;
5146 full.game_state = (uint8_t)current_game_state;
5147 full.move_count = move_count;
5148 full.white_king_moved = (uint8_t)white_king_moved;
5149 full.white_rook_a_moved = (uint8_t)white_rook_a_moved;
5150 full.white_rook_h_moved = (uint8_t)white_rook_h_moved;
5151 full.black_king_moved = (uint8_t)black_king_moved;
5152 full.black_rook_a_moved = (uint8_t)black_rook_a_moved;
5153 full.black_rook_h_moved = (uint8_t)black_rook_h_moved;
5154 full.en_passant_available = (uint8_t)en_passant_available;
5155 full.en_passant_target_row = en_passant_target_row;
5156 full.en_passant_target_col = en_passant_target_col;
5157 full.en_passant_victim_row = en_passant_victim_row;
5158 full.en_passant_victim_col = en_passant_victim_col;
5159 full.promotion_pending = (uint8_t)promotion_state.pending;
5160 full.promotion_row = promotion_state.square_row;
5161 full.promotion_col = promotion_state.square_col;
5162 full.promotion_player = (uint8_t)promotion_state.player;
5163 full.white_time_total = white_time_total;
5164 full.black_time_total = black_time_total;
5165 full.white_remaining_ms = game_get_remaining_time(true);
5166 full.black_remaining_ms = game_get_remaining_time(false);
5167 full.history_count = (history_index > GAME_SNAPSHOT_HISTORY_CAP)
5168 ? GAME_SNAPSHOT_HISTORY_CAP
5169 : (uint8_t)history_index;
5170 if (full.history_count > 0) {
5171 uint32_t start = history_index - full.history_count;
5172 for (uint8_t i = 0; i < full.history_count; i++) {
5173 full.history[i] = move_history[start + i];
5174 }
5175 }
5176 full.crc32 = game_crc32_simple(((const uint8_t *)&full) + 8, sizeof(full) - 8);
5177
5178 esp_err_t ret = config_save_blob_to_nvs(CONFIG_NVS_KEY_GAME_SNAPSHOT_FULL, &full,
5179 sizeof(full));
5180 if (ret == ESP_OK) {
5181 snapshot_fallback_used = false;
5182 snapshot_save_failed = false;
5183 return ESP_OK;
5184 }
5185
5186 game_snapshot_min_t min = {0};
5187 min.version = GAME_SNAPSHOT_VERSION;
5188 min.format = 1;
5189 memcpy(min.board, full.board, sizeof(min.board));
5190 min.current_player = full.current_player;
5191 min.game_state = full.game_state;
5192 min.move_count = full.move_count;
5193 min.white_king_moved = full.white_king_moved;
5194 min.white_rook_a_moved = full.white_rook_a_moved;
5195 min.white_rook_h_moved = full.white_rook_h_moved;
5196 min.black_king_moved = full.black_king_moved;
5197 min.black_rook_a_moved = full.black_rook_a_moved;
5198 min.black_rook_h_moved = full.black_rook_h_moved;
5199 min.en_passant_available = full.en_passant_available;
5200 min.en_passant_target_row = full.en_passant_target_row;
5201 min.en_passant_target_col = full.en_passant_target_col;
5202 min.en_passant_victim_row = full.en_passant_victim_row;
5203 min.en_passant_victim_col = full.en_passant_victim_col;
5204 min.promotion_pending = full.promotion_pending;
5205 min.promotion_row = full.promotion_row;
5206 min.promotion_col = full.promotion_col;
5207 min.promotion_player = full.promotion_player;
5208 min.crc32 = game_crc32_simple(((const uint8_t *)&min) + 8, sizeof(min) - 8);
5209
5210 ret = config_save_blob_to_nvs(CONFIG_NVS_KEY_GAME_SNAPSHOT_MIN, &min, sizeof(min));
5211 if (ret == ESP_OK) {
5212 snapshot_fallback_used = true;
5213 snapshot_save_failed = false;
5214 } else {
5215 snapshot_save_failed = true;
5216 }
5217 return ret;
5218}
5219
5221static bool game_nvs_has_valid_snapshot(void) {
5222 game_snapshot_full_t full = {0};
5223 size_t full_len = sizeof(full);
5224 esp_err_t ret =
5225 config_load_blob_from_nvs(CONFIG_NVS_KEY_GAME_SNAPSHOT_FULL, &full, &full_len);
5226 if (ret == ESP_OK && full_len == sizeof(full) &&
5227 full.version == GAME_SNAPSHOT_VERSION &&
5228 full.crc32 ==
5229 game_crc32_simple(((const uint8_t *)&full) + 8, sizeof(full) - 8)) {
5230 return true;
5231 }
5232
5233 game_snapshot_min_t min = {0};
5234 size_t min_len = sizeof(min);
5235 ret = config_load_blob_from_nvs(CONFIG_NVS_KEY_GAME_SNAPSHOT_MIN, &min, &min_len);
5236 if (ret == ESP_OK && min_len == sizeof(min) && min.version == GAME_SNAPSHOT_VERSION &&
5237 min.crc32 ==
5238 game_crc32_simple(((const uint8_t *)&min) + 8, sizeof(min) - 8)) {
5239 return true;
5240 }
5241 return false;
5242}
5243
5244static esp_err_t game_load_snapshot_from_nvs(void) {
5245 game_snapshot_full_t full = {0};
5246 size_t full_len = sizeof(full);
5247 esp_err_t ret =
5248 config_load_blob_from_nvs(CONFIG_NVS_KEY_GAME_SNAPSHOT_FULL, &full, &full_len);
5249 if (ret == ESP_OK && full_len == sizeof(full) &&
5250 full.version == GAME_SNAPSHOT_VERSION &&
5251 full.crc32 ==
5252 game_crc32_simple(((const uint8_t *)&full) + 8, sizeof(full) - 8)) {
5253 snapshot_restore_failed = false;
5254 game_snapshot_apply_board(full.board);
5255 current_player = (player_t)full.current_player;
5256 current_game_state = (game_state_t)full.game_state;
5257 move_count = full.move_count;
5258 white_king_moved = full.white_king_moved;
5259 white_rook_a_moved = full.white_rook_a_moved;
5260 white_rook_h_moved = full.white_rook_h_moved;
5261 black_king_moved = full.black_king_moved;
5262 black_rook_a_moved = full.black_rook_a_moved;
5263 black_rook_h_moved = full.black_rook_h_moved;
5264 en_passant_available = full.en_passant_available;
5265 en_passant_target_row = full.en_passant_target_row;
5266 en_passant_target_col = full.en_passant_target_col;
5267 en_passant_victim_row = full.en_passant_victim_row;
5268 en_passant_victim_col = full.en_passant_victim_col;
5269 promotion_state.pending = full.promotion_pending;
5270 promotion_state.square_row = full.promotion_row;
5271 promotion_state.square_col = full.promotion_col;
5272 promotion_state.player = (player_t)full.promotion_player;
5273 white_time_total = full.white_time_total;
5274 black_time_total = full.black_time_total;
5275 history_index = full.history_count;
5276 if (history_index > 0) {
5277 memcpy(move_history, full.history, sizeof(chess_move_t) * history_index);
5278 }
5279 snapshot_loaded_on_boot = true;
5280 snapshot_fallback_used = false;
5281 /*
5282 * Po obnove NVS: game_active musi sedet s current_game_state (drive nastavoval
5283 * vzdy GAME_CMD_NEW_GAME z main). Jinak game_is_valid_move() vraci
5284 * MOVE_ERROR_GAME_NOT_ACTIVE.
5285 */
5286 game_active = (current_game_state != GAME_STATE_IDLE &&
5287 current_game_state != GAME_STATE_FINISHED);
5288 return ESP_OK;
5289 }
5290
5291 game_snapshot_min_t min = {0};
5292 size_t min_len = sizeof(min);
5293 ret = config_load_blob_from_nvs(CONFIG_NVS_KEY_GAME_SNAPSHOT_MIN, &min, &min_len);
5294 if (ret == ESP_OK && min_len == sizeof(min) && min.version == GAME_SNAPSHOT_VERSION &&
5295 min.crc32 ==
5296 game_crc32_simple(((const uint8_t *)&min) + 8, sizeof(min) - 8)) {
5297 snapshot_restore_failed = false;
5298 game_snapshot_apply_board(min.board);
5299 current_player = (player_t)min.current_player;
5300 current_game_state = (game_state_t)min.game_state;
5301 move_count = min.move_count;
5302 white_king_moved = min.white_king_moved;
5303 white_rook_a_moved = min.white_rook_a_moved;
5304 white_rook_h_moved = min.white_rook_h_moved;
5305 black_king_moved = min.black_king_moved;
5306 black_rook_a_moved = min.black_rook_a_moved;
5307 black_rook_h_moved = min.black_rook_h_moved;
5308 en_passant_available = min.en_passant_available;
5309 en_passant_target_row = min.en_passant_target_row;
5310 en_passant_target_col = min.en_passant_target_col;
5311 en_passant_victim_row = min.en_passant_victim_row;
5312 en_passant_victim_col = min.en_passant_victim_col;
5313 promotion_state.pending = min.promotion_pending;
5314 promotion_state.square_row = min.promotion_row;
5315 promotion_state.square_col = min.promotion_col;
5316 promotion_state.player = (player_t)min.promotion_player;
5317 history_index = 0;
5318 snapshot_loaded_on_boot = true;
5319 snapshot_fallback_used = true;
5320 /* Minimalni snapshot: stejna logika game_active jako u plneho zaznamu. */
5321 game_active = (current_game_state != GAME_STATE_IDLE &&
5322 current_game_state != GAME_STATE_FINISHED);
5323 return ESP_OK;
5324 }
5325
5326 /* Zadny platny snapshot (prvni flash / smazana hra) — neni chyba obnovy. */
5327 snapshot_restore_failed = false;
5328 return ESP_ERR_NOT_FOUND;
5329}
5330
5331static void game_boot_tracker_update_on_move(void) {
5332 game_boot_tracker_t trk = {0};
5333 size_t len = sizeof(trk);
5334 bool loaded =
5335 (config_load_blob_from_nvs(CONFIG_NVS_KEY_BOOT_TRACKER, &trk, &len) == ESP_OK &&
5336 len == sizeof(trk) && trk.version == GAME_SNAPSHOT_VERSION &&
5337 trk.crc32 == game_crc32_simple(((const uint8_t *)&trk) + 8, sizeof(trk) - 8));
5338
5339 if (!loaded) {
5340 time_t now = time(NULL);
5341 trk.version = GAME_SNAPSHOT_VERSION;
5342 trk.first_boot_epoch_s = (now >= 1700000000) ? (uint32_t)now : 0u;
5343 trk.boot_counter_window = 1u;
5344 }
5345 trk.moved_since_boot = 1u;
5346 trk.crc32 = game_crc32_simple(((const uint8_t *)&trk) + 8, sizeof(trk) - 8);
5347 (void)config_save_blob_to_nvs(CONFIG_NVS_KEY_BOOT_TRACKER, &trk, sizeof(trk));
5348}
5349
5350static bool game_boot_tracker_should_force_new_game(void) {
5351 time_t now = time(NULL);
5352 const bool wall_time_ok = (now >= 1700000000);
5353 const uint32_t now_s = wall_time_ok ? (uint32_t)now : 0u;
5354
5355 game_boot_tracker_t trk = {0};
5356 size_t len = sizeof(trk);
5357 bool loaded =
5358 (config_load_blob_from_nvs(CONFIG_NVS_KEY_BOOT_TRACKER, &trk, &len) == ESP_OK &&
5359 len == sizeof(trk) && trk.version == GAME_SNAPSHOT_VERSION &&
5360 trk.crc32 == game_crc32_simple(((const uint8_t *)&trk) + 8, sizeof(trk) - 8));
5361
5362 bool in_window = false;
5363 if (loaded) {
5364 if (wall_time_ok) {
5365 in_window = (now_s >= trk.first_boot_epoch_s &&
5366 (now_s - trk.first_boot_epoch_s) <= BOOT_WINDOW_SECONDS);
5367 } else {
5368 /* Bez SNTP neumíme 60s okno — držíme stejnou „session“ jako minulý záznam. */
5369 in_window = true;
5370 }
5371 }
5372
5373 /* Po prvním bootu v okně je v NVS counter==1. Druhý boot (stále bez tahu) spustí novou hru. */
5374 bool force_new_game = false;
5375 if (wall_time_ok && loaded && trk.moved_since_boot == 0u && in_window &&
5376 trk.boot_counter_window == 1u) {
5377 force_new_game = true;
5378 }
5379
5380 game_boot_tracker_t next = {0};
5381 next.version = GAME_SNAPSHOT_VERSION;
5382 next.moved_since_boot = 0u;
5383 if (loaded && in_window) {
5384 next.first_boot_epoch_s = trk.first_boot_epoch_s;
5385 next.boot_counter_window = trk.boot_counter_window + 1u;
5386 } else if (wall_time_ok) {
5387 next.first_boot_epoch_s = now_s;
5388 next.boot_counter_window = 1u;
5389 } else {
5390 next.first_boot_epoch_s = loaded ? trk.first_boot_epoch_s : 0u;
5391 next.boot_counter_window = 1u;
5392 }
5393 next.crc32 = game_crc32_simple(((const uint8_t *)&next) + 8, sizeof(next) - 8);
5394 (void)config_save_blob_to_nvs(CONFIG_NVS_KEY_BOOT_TRACKER, &next, sizeof(next));
5395
5396 return force_new_game;
5397}
5398
5399static void game_check_resync_needed_after_restore(void) {
5400 uint8_t matrix_state_now[64] = {0};
5401 matrix_get_state(matrix_state_now);
5402
5403 uint32_t lifted_low = 0, lifted_high = 0;
5404 uint8_t conflicts = 0;
5405 for (uint8_t i = 0; i < 64; i++) {
5406 uint8_t expected = (((uint8_t)board[i / 8][i % 8]) == PIECE_EMPTY) ? 0 : 1;
5407 if (matrix_state_now[i] != expected) {
5408 if (i < 32) {
5409 lifted_low |= (1UL << i);
5410 } else {
5411 lifted_high |= (1UL << (i - 32));
5412 }
5413 conflicts++;
5414 }
5415 }
5416
5417 if (conflicts == 0) {
5418 resync_required_after_restore = false;
5419 return;
5420 }
5421
5422 matrix_guard_pause_state.active = true;
5423 matrix_guard_pause_state.lifted_mask_low = lifted_low;
5424 matrix_guard_pause_state.lifted_mask_high = lifted_high;
5425 matrix_guard_pause_state.dropped_mask_low = 0;
5426 matrix_guard_pause_state.dropped_mask_high = 0;
5427 matrix_guard_pause_state.conflict_count = conflicts;
5428 resync_required_after_restore = true;
5429 game_render_matrix_guard_leds();
5430}
5431
5432static void game_persist_after_valid_move(void) {
5433 esp_err_t ret = game_save_snapshot_to_nvs();
5434 if (ret != ESP_OK) {
5435 ESP_LOGW(TAG, "Game snapshot save failed: %s", esp_err_to_name(ret));
5436 }
5437 game_boot_tracker_update_on_move();
5438}
5439
5440static void game_try_clear_local_guard_from_matrix(void) {
5441 if (!matrix_guard_pause_state.active) {
5442 return;
5443 }
5444 uint8_t matrix_state_now[64] = {0};
5445 matrix_get_state(matrix_state_now);
5446 for (uint8_t i = 0; i < 64; i++) {
5447 uint8_t expected = (((uint8_t)board[i / 8][i % 8]) == PIECE_EMPTY) ? 0 : 1;
5448 if (matrix_state_now[i] != expected) {
5449 return;
5450 }
5451 }
5452
5453 matrix_guard_pause_state.active = false;
5454 matrix_guard_pause_state.lifted_mask_low = 0;
5455 matrix_guard_pause_state.lifted_mask_high = 0;
5456 matrix_guard_pause_state.dropped_mask_low = 0;
5457 matrix_guard_pause_state.dropped_mask_high = 0;
5458 matrix_guard_pause_state.conflict_count = 0;
5459 resync_required_after_restore = false;
5460 led_clear_board_only();
5461 game_highlight_movable_pieces();
5462}
5463
5464static void game_reset_guided_capture_state(void) {
5465 guided_capture_state.active = false;
5466 guided_capture_state.target_row = 0;
5467 guided_capture_state.target_col = 0;
5468 guided_capture_state.target_piece = PIECE_EMPTY;
5469 guided_capture_state.attacker_count = 0;
5470 memset(guided_capture_state.attacker_rows, 0,
5471 sizeof(guided_capture_state.attacker_rows));
5472 memset(guided_capture_state.attacker_cols, 0,
5473 sizeof(guided_capture_state.attacker_cols));
5474 memset(guided_capture_state.attacker_pieces, 0,
5475 sizeof(guided_capture_state.attacker_pieces));
5476}
5477
5478static bool game_guided_capture_has_mode_conflict(void) {
5479 if (promotion_state.pending || castling_state.in_progress ||
5480 castle_animation_active || resignation_state.active ||
5481 error_recovery_state.waiting_for_move_correction ||
5482 current_game_state == GAME_STATE_WAITING_FOR_RETURN ||
5483 current_game_state == GAME_STATE_FINISHED) {
5484 return true;
5485 }
5486 return false;
5487}
5488
5495static bool game_find_legal_attackers_to_square(uint8_t target_row,
5496 uint8_t target_col,
5497 piece_t target_piece) {
5498 guided_capture_state.attacker_count = 0;
5499
5500 piece_t current_player_king =
5501 (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? PIECE_WHITE_KING : PIECE_BLACK_KING;
5502
5503 for (uint8_t row = 0; row < 8; row++) {
5504 for (uint8_t col = 0; col < 8; col++) {
5505 piece_t candidate_piece = board[row][col];
5506 if (candidate_piece == PIECE_EMPTY ||
5507 !game_is_same_color(candidate_piece, current_player_king)) {
5508 continue;
5509 }
5510
5511 chess_move_t capture_attempt = {.from_row = row,
5512 .from_col = col,
5513 .to_row = target_row,
5514 .to_col = target_col,
5515 .piece = candidate_piece,
5516 .captured_piece = target_piece,
5517 .timestamp = esp_timer_get_time() / 1000};
5518
5519 if (game_is_valid_move(&capture_attempt) == MOVE_ERROR_NONE &&
5520 guided_capture_state.attacker_count < GUIDED_CAPTURE_MAX_ATTACKERS) {
5521 uint8_t idx = guided_capture_state.attacker_count++;
5522 guided_capture_state.attacker_rows[idx] = row;
5523 guided_capture_state.attacker_cols[idx] = col;
5524 guided_capture_state.attacker_pieces[idx] = candidate_piece;
5525 }
5526 }
5527 }
5528
5529 return guided_capture_state.attacker_count > 0;
5530}
5531
5532static bool game_refresh_guided_attackers(void) {
5533 if (!guided_capture_state.active) {
5534 return false;
5535 }
5536 return game_find_legal_attackers_to_square(guided_capture_state.target_row,
5537 guided_capture_state.target_col,
5538 guided_capture_state.target_piece);
5539}
5540
5542static bool game_guided_capture_is_selected_attacker_lifted(void) {
5543 if (!guided_capture_state.active || !piece_lifted ||
5544 lifted_piece == PIECE_EMPTY) {
5545 return false;
5546 }
5547 for (uint8_t i = 0; i < guided_capture_state.attacker_count; i++) {
5548 if (guided_capture_state.attacker_rows[i] == lifted_piece_row &&
5549 guided_capture_state.attacker_cols[i] == lifted_piece_col &&
5550 guided_capture_state.attacker_pieces[i] == lifted_piece) {
5551 return true;
5552 }
5553 }
5554 return false;
5555}
5556
5564static void game_show_guided_capture_leds(void) {
5565 if (!guided_capture_state.active) {
5566 return;
5567 }
5568
5569 if (game_guided_capture_is_selected_attacker_lifted()) {
5570 led_clear_board_only();
5571 led_set_pixel_safe(
5572 chess_pos_to_led_index(guided_capture_state.target_row,
5573 guided_capture_state.target_col),
5574 128, 0, 128); // Purple = drop here to complete capture
5575 return;
5576 }
5577
5578 led_clear_board_only();
5579 led_set_pixel_safe(
5580 chess_pos_to_led_index(guided_capture_state.target_row,
5581 guided_capture_state.target_col),
5582 128, 0, 128); // Purple = opponent square / capture target
5583
5584 bool show_attacker_squares = guided_capture_hints_enabled ||
5585 game_led_guidance_show_movable_yellow();
5586 if (show_attacker_squares) {
5587 for (uint8_t i = 0; i < guided_capture_state.attacker_count; i++) {
5588 led_set_pixel_safe(
5589 chess_pos_to_led_index(guided_capture_state.attacker_rows[i],
5590 guided_capture_state.attacker_cols[i]),
5591 255, 255, 0); // Yellow = pieces that can capture here
5592 }
5593 }
5594}
5595
5596static void game_exit_guided_capture(bool restore_highlights) {
5597 game_reset_guided_capture_state();
5598 piece_lifted = false;
5599 lifted_piece = PIECE_EMPTY;
5600 lifted_piece_row = 0;
5601 lifted_piece_col = 0;
5602
5603 if (restore_highlights) {
5604 led_clear_board_only();
5605 game_highlight_movable_pieces();
5606 }
5607}
5608
5609static void game_enter_guided_capture(uint8_t target_row, uint8_t target_col,
5610 piece_t target_piece) {
5611 guided_capture_state.active = true;
5612 guided_capture_state.target_row = target_row;
5613 guided_capture_state.target_col = target_col;
5614 guided_capture_state.target_piece = target_piece;
5615 piece_lifted = false;
5616 lifted_piece_row = 0;
5617 lifted_piece_col = 0;
5618 lifted_piece = PIECE_EMPTY;
5619}
5620
5624static void game_process_pickup_command(const chess_move_command_t *cmd) {
5625 if (!cmd)
5626 return;
5627
5628 // BUG FIX 1: Během čekání na rozestavení blokovat tahy
5629 if (current_game_state == GAME_STATE_WAITING_FOR_BOARD_SETUP) {
5630 game_send_response_to_uart(
5631 "⏳ Hra čeká na fyzické rozestavení figurek. "
5632 "Umístěte všechny figurky na výchozí pozice.",
5633 true, (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
5634 return;
5635 }
5636
5637 if (matrix_guard_pause_state.active) {
5638 if (game_cmd_is_matrix_origin(cmd)) {
5639 game_try_clear_local_guard_from_matrix();
5640 if (!matrix_guard_pause_state.active) {
5641 return;
5642 }
5643 game_render_matrix_guard_leds();
5644 return;
5645 }
5646 game_send_response_to_uart(
5647 "⏸️ Čeká se na srovnání fyzické desky (matrix guard). "
5648 "PICKUP z UART/Web je blokován.",
5649 true, (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
5650 return;
5651 }
5652
5653 // PROMOTION (swap_then_choose, swap volitelný):
5654 // - Povolit fyzický UP/DN pouze na promočním poli (bez běžného pickup flow).
5655 // - Mimo promoční pole ignorovat (hra je logicky pozastavená) a poslat
5656 // krátkou hlášku.
5657 if (promotion_state.pending) {
5658 // Bezpečnostní kontrola notation stringu
5659 if (strlen(cmd->from_notation) == 0 || strlen(cmd->from_notation) > 7) {
5660 ESP_LOGE(TAG,
5661 "❌ Invalid or corrupted notation string (promotion pending)");
