5662 game_send_response_to_uart("❌ Invalid notation format", true,
5663 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
5664 return;
5665 }
5666
5667 // Parse square i během promotion pending
5668 uint8_t p_row, p_col;
5669 if (!convert_notation_to_coords(cmd->from_notation, &p_row, &p_col)) {
5670 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "❌ Invalid notation during promotion: %s",
5671 cmd->from_notation);
5672 game_send_response_to_uart("❌ Invalid square notation", true,
5673 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
5674 return;
5675 }
5676
5677 bool is_promo_square = (p_row == promotion_state.square_row &&
5678 p_col == promotion_state.square_col);
5679
5680 if (is_promo_square) {
5681 ESP_LOGI(TAG,
5682 "👑 Promotion pending: PICKUP on promo square %c%d allowed "
5683 "(swap_then_choose)",
5684 'a' + p_col, p_row + 1);
5685
5686 char info_msg[256];
5687 snprintf(info_msg, sizeof(info_msg),
5688 "👑 Promotion pending at %c%d\n"
5689 "🔁 You can swap the pawn here now (optional)\n"
5690 "➡️ Next: choose piece via green buttons / PROMOTE / web",
5691 'a' + promotion_state.square_col,
5692 promotion_state.square_row + 1);
5693 game_send_response_to_uart(info_msg, false,
5694 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
5695 return; // Neprovádět standardní pickup flow
5696 }
5697
5698 ESP_LOGI(TAG,
5699 "⏸️ Promotion pending: PICKUP blocked outside promo square (%s)",
5700 cmd->from_notation);
5701
5702 char info_msg[256];
5703 snprintf(info_msg, sizeof(info_msg),
5704 "⏸️ Promotion pending at %c%d\n"
5705 "🔁 Swap allowed only on %c%d (optional)\n"
5706 "➡️ Then choose piece via green buttons / PROMOTE / web",
5707 'a' + promotion_state.square_col, promotion_state.square_row + 1,
5708 'a' + promotion_state.square_col, promotion_state.square_row + 1);
5709 game_send_response_to_uart(info_msg, false,
5710 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
5711 return;
5712 }
5713
5714 // PŘERUŠIT BLIKÁNÍ při zvednutí figurky
5715 game_stop_error_blink();
5716
5717 // Bezpečnostní kontrola notation stringu (array je vždy != NULL)
5718 if (strlen(cmd->from_notation) == 0 || strlen(cmd->from_notation) > 7) {
5719 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "❌ Invalid or corrupted notation string");
5720 game_send_response_to_uart("❌ Invalid notation format", true,
5721 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
5722 return;
5723 }
5724
5725 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🎯 Processing PICKUP command: %s", cmd->from_notation);
5726
5727 // Convert notation to coordinates
5728 uint8_t from_row, from_col;
5729 if (!convert_notation_to_coords(cmd->from_notation, &from_row, &from_col)) {
5730 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "❌ Invalid notation: %s", cmd->from_notation);
5731 game_send_response_to_uart("❌ Invalid square notation", true,
5732 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
5733 return;
5734 }
5735
5736 // KONTROLA ERROR RECOVERY STAVU
5737 if (error_recovery_state.waiting_for_move_correction) {
5738 // KONTROLA: Je to správná neplatná pozice?
5739 if (from_row == error_recovery_state.invalid_row &&
5740 from_col == error_recovery_state.invalid_col) {
5741
5742 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🔄 Lifting piece from invalid position %s (error #%d)",
5743 cmd->from_notation, error_recovery_state.error_count);
5744 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "💡 Showing valid moves from ORIGINAL position %c%d",
5745 'a' + error_recovery_state.original_valid_col,
5746 error_recovery_state.original_valid_row + 1);
5747
5748 // Aktualizovat lifted piece state
5749 piece_lifted = true;
5750 lifted_piece_row = from_row;
5751 lifted_piece_col = from_col;
5752 lifted_piece = error_recovery_state.piece_type;
5753
5754 // KLÍČOVÉ: Ukázat validní tahy z PŮVODNÍ pozice, ne z posledního
5755 // pokusu
5756 move_suggestion_t suggestions[64];
5757 uint32_t valid_moves = game_get_available_moves(
5758 error_recovery_state.original_valid_row,
5759 error_recovery_state.original_valid_col, suggestions, 64);
5760
5761 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "💡 Found %lu valid moves from original position",
5762 valid_moves);
5763
5764 // VYČISTIT A NASTAVIT LED
5765 led_clear_board_only();
5766
5767 // Žlutá na aktuální pozici (kde je figurka nyní)
5768 led_set_pixel_safe(chess_pos_to_led_index(from_row, from_col), 255, 255,
5769 0);
5770
5771 // MODRÁ na původní validní pozici
5772 led_set_pixel_safe(
5773 chess_pos_to_led_index(error_recovery_state.original_valid_row,
5774 error_recovery_state.original_valid_col),
5775 0, 0, 255);
5776
5777 // ZELENÉ LED pro validní cílová pole (z původní pozice)
5778 if (game_led_guidance_show_destinations()) {
5779 for (uint32_t i = 0; i < valid_moves; i++) {
5780 uint8_t dest_led = chess_pos_to_led_index(suggestions[i].to_row,
5781 suggestions[i].to_col);
5782
5783 // Nepřepisovat žlutou (aktuální pozici) a modrou (původní pozici)
5784 if (dest_led != chess_pos_to_led_index(from_row, from_col) &&
5785 dest_led != chess_pos_to_led_index(
5786 error_recovery_state.original_valid_row,
5787 error_recovery_state.original_valid_col)) {
5788 if (suggestions[i].is_capture) {
5789 led_set_pixel_safe(dest_led, 255, 165, 0); // Oranžová pro capture
5790 } else {
5791 led_set_pixel_safe(dest_led, 0, 255, 0); // Zelená pro normální tah
5792 }
5793 }
5794 }
5795 }
5796
5797 char success_msg[256];
5798 snprintf(success_msg, sizeof(success_msg),
5799 "🔄 Lifted from invalid position - %u valid moves from ORIGINAL "
5800 "%c%d (blue)",
5801 (unsigned int)valid_moves,
5802 'a' + error_recovery_state.original_valid_col,
5803 error_recovery_state.original_valid_row + 1);
5804 game_send_response_to_uart(success_msg, false,
5805 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
5806 return;
5807 } else {
5808 // UP z jiné pozice během error recovery - ignorovat nebo resetovat?
5809 ESP_LOGW(TAG,
5810 "⚠️ UP from different position during error recovery: %s "
5811 "(expected %c%d)",
5812 cmd->from_notation, 'a' + error_recovery_state.invalid_col,
5813 error_recovery_state.invalid_row + 1);
5814
5815 char warning_msg[128];
5816 snprintf(warning_msg, sizeof(warning_msg),
5817 "⚠️ Error recovery active - lift piece from %c%d first",
5818 'a' + error_recovery_state.invalid_col,
5819 error_recovery_state.invalid_row + 1);
5820 game_send_response_to_uart(warning_msg, true,
5821 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
5822 return;
5823 }
5824 }
5825
5826 // Check if there's a piece at the square
5827 piece_t piece = board[from_row][from_col];
5828 if (piece == PIECE_EMPTY) {
5829 char error_msg[128];
5830 // Bezpečný snprintf s kontrolou návratové hodnoty
5831 int written = snprintf(error_msg, sizeof(error_msg), "❌ No piece at %s",
5832 cmd->from_notation);
5833 if (written >= sizeof(error_msg)) {
5834 strcpy(error_msg, "❌ No piece at square");
5835 }
5836 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "❌ No piece at %s", cmd->from_notation);
5837 game_send_response_to_uart(error_msg, true,
5838 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
5839 return;
5840 }
5841
5842 if (guided_capture_state.active) {
5843 if (game_guided_capture_has_mode_conflict()) {
5844 STAGING_LOGI(TAG, "Guided capture cancelled due to mode conflict (pickup)");
5845 game_exit_guided_capture(true);
5846 game_send_response_to_uart(
5847 "⚠️ Guided capture cancelled due to higher-priority game state.", true,
5848 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
5849 return;
5850 }
5851 if (!game_refresh_guided_attackers()) {
5852 STAGING_LOGI(TAG, "Guided capture cancelled (no legal attackers after refresh)");
5853 game_exit_guided_capture(true);
5854 game_send_response_to_uart(
5855 "⚠️ Guided capture cancelled - no legal capture available now.", true,
5856 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
5857 return;
5858 }
5859
5860 bool is_target_square = (from_row == guided_capture_state.target_row &&
5861 from_col == guided_capture_state.target_col);
5862 bool is_allowed_attacker = false;
5863
5864 for (uint8_t i = 0; i < guided_capture_state.attacker_count; i++) {
5865 if (guided_capture_state.attacker_rows[i] == from_row &&
5866 guided_capture_state.attacker_cols[i] == from_col &&
5867 guided_capture_state.attacker_pieces[i] == piece) {
5868 is_allowed_attacker = true;
5869 break;
5870 }
5871 }
5872
5873 if (is_target_square) {
5874 // Cancel/escape path: user picked up target opponent piece again.
5875 game_exit_guided_capture(true);
5876 game_send_response_to_uart(
5877 "↩️ Guided capture cancelled. Opponent piece returned to normal flow.",
5878 false,
5879 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
5880 return;
5881 }
5882
5883 if (!is_allowed_attacker) {
5884 game_show_guided_capture_leds();
5885 game_send_response_to_uart(
5886 guided_capture_hints_enabled
5887 ? "⚠️ Guided capture active: lift highlighted YELLOW piece only."
5888 : "⚠️ Guided capture active: lift your piece, then drop on PURPLE.",
5889 true,
5890 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
5891 return;
5892 }
5893
5894 piece_lifted = true;
5895 lifted_piece_row = from_row;
5896 lifted_piece_col = from_col;
5897 lifted_piece = piece;
5898 game_show_guided_capture_leds();
5899 game_send_response_to_uart(
5900 "✅ Attacker lifted. Drop on PURPLE target square to capture.", false,
5901 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
5902 return;
5903 }
5904
5905 // Check if piece belongs to current player
5906 bool is_white_piece =
5907 (piece >= PIECE_WHITE_PAWN && piece <= PIECE_WHITE_KING);
5908 bool is_black_piece =
5909 (piece >= PIECE_BLACK_PAWN && piece <= PIECE_BLACK_KING);
5910
5911 if ((current_player == PLAYER_WHITE && !is_white_piece) ||
5912 (current_player == PLAYER_BLACK && !is_black_piece)) {
5913
5914 // 3-STEP CAPTURE FLOW: UP own → UP opponent (remove) → DN own (execute)
5915 // Rozlišit capture vs error
5916
5917 // ISSUE 1: NESMÍ se povolit capture během error recovery!
5918 if (piece_lifted && lifted_piece != PIECE_EMPTY &&
5919 !error_recovery_state.waiting_for_move_correction &&
5920 ((current_player == PLAYER_WHITE && lifted_piece >= PIECE_WHITE_PAWN &&
5921 lifted_piece <= PIECE_WHITE_KING) ||
5922 (current_player == PLAYER_BLACK && lifted_piece >= PIECE_BLACK_PAWN &&
5923 lifted_piece <= PIECE_BLACK_KING))) {
5924
5925 // STEP 2 of CAPTURE: Zkontrolovat zda lifted piece MŮŽE sebrat
5926 // opponent piece
5927 chess_move_t capture_attempt = {.from_row = lifted_piece_row,
5928 .from_col = lifted_piece_col,
5929 .to_row = from_row,
5930 .to_col = from_col,
5931 .piece = lifted_piece,
5932 .captured_piece = piece,
5933 .timestamp = esp_timer_get_time() / 1000};
5934
5935 move_error_t capture_valid = game_is_valid_move(&capture_attempt);
5936
5937 if (capture_valid == MOVE_ERROR_NONE) {
5938 // VALIDNÍ CAPTURE: Remove opponent piece, wait for DN
5939 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "♟️ Step 2/3 Capture: Removing opponent piece at %s",
5940 cmd->from_notation);
5941
5942 // Odstranit opponent piece z boardu
5943 board[from_row][from_col] = PIECE_EMPTY;
5944
5945 // Nastavit capture state
5946 capture_in_progress = true;
5947 capture_target_row = from_row;
5948 capture_target_col = from_col;
5949 capture_removed_piece = piece;
5950
5951 // Decentní LED feedback: Žlutá na lifted piece, FIALOVÁ na target (kde
5952 // má polož it)
5953 led_clear_board_only();
5954 led_set_pixel_safe(
5955 chess_pos_to_led_index(lifted_piece_row, lifted_piece_col), 255,
5956 255, 0); // Yellow
5957 led_set_pixel_safe(chess_pos_to_led_index(from_row, from_col), 128, 0,
5958 128); // Purple = target
5959
5960 // Poslat info message
5961 char info_msg[128];
5962 snprintf(info_msg, sizeof(info_msg),
5963 "♟️ Step 2/3: Opponent piece removed. Place %s on PURPLE "
5964 "square (%s) to capture",
5965 game_get_piece_name(lifted_piece), cmd->from_notation);
5966 game_send_response_to_uart(info_msg, false,
5967 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
5968 return;
5969 } else {
5970 // INVALID CAPTURE: Proceed to error flow
5971 ESP_LOGW(TAG,
5972 "⚠️ Invalid capture attempt: %s from %c%d CANNOT capture %s",
5973 game_get_piece_name(lifted_piece), 'a' + lifted_piece_col,
5974 lifted_piece_row + 1, cmd->from_notation, capture_valid);
5975 }
5976 }
5977
5978 const char *safe_notation =
5979 (strlen(cmd->from_notation) > 0) ? cmd->from_notation : "??";
5980
5981 if (!error_recovery_state.waiting_for_move_correction && !piece_lifted &&
5982 !game_guided_capture_has_mode_conflict() &&
5983 game_find_legal_attackers_to_square(from_row, from_col, piece)) {
5984 game_enter_guided_capture(from_row, from_col, piece);
5985
5986 STAGING_LOGI(TAG,
5987 "Guided capture armed for %s, attackers=%u, player=%s",
5988 safe_notation, guided_capture_state.attacker_count,
5989 current_player == PLAYER_WHITE ? "White" : "Black");
5990 game_show_guided_capture_leds();
5991
5992 char guided_msg[256];
5993 snprintf(guided_msg, sizeof(guided_msg),
5994 "♟️ Capture is legal on %s\n",
5995 safe_notation);
5996 if (guided_capture_hints_enabled) {
5997 strncat(guided_msg,
5998 "🟡 Lift any YELLOW attacker and place it on PURPLE target",
5999 sizeof(guided_msg) - strlen(guided_msg) - 1);
6000 } else {
6001 strncat(guided_msg,
6002 "ℹ️ Guided capture hints are OFF. Lift your piece and drop on target square.",
6003 sizeof(guided_msg) - strlen(guided_msg) - 1);
6004 }
6005 game_send_response_to_uart(guided_msg, false,
6006 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
6007 return;
6008 }
6009
6010 STAGING_LOGI(TAG, "No legal attacker for %s - fallback to red blink",
6011 safe_notation);
6012
6013 // ERROR FLOW: Wrong color piece lifted inappropriately
6014 game_reset_guided_capture_state();
6015
6016 if (error_recovery_state.waiting_for_move_correction) {
6017 ESP_LOGW(TAG,
6018 "⚠️ Cannot capture during error recovery - opponent piece at %s "
6019 "ignored",
6020 safe_notation);
6021 } else if (piece_lifted) {
6022 ESP_LOGW(TAG,
6023 "⚠️ Cannot capture opponent piece at %s - invalid move for %s",
6024 safe_notation, game_get_piece_name(lifted_piece));
6025 } else {
6026 ESP_LOGW(
6027 TAG,
6028 "⚠️ Opponent's piece lifted WITHOUT own piece lifted at %s - ERROR",
6029 safe_notation);
6030 }
6031
6032 // KRITICKÉ: Nastavit error_recovery_state pro proper recovery flow
6033 error_recovery_state.has_invalid_piece = true;
6034 error_recovery_state.waiting_for_move_correction = true;
6035 error_recovery_state.piece_type = piece;
6036 error_recovery_state.invalid_row = from_row;
6037 error_recovery_state.invalid_col = from_col;
6038 error_recovery_state.original_valid_row =
6039 from_row; // Původní pozice = kde má být vrácena
6040 error_recovery_state.original_valid_col = from_col;
6041 error_recovery_state.error_count++;
6042
6043 // Uložit informace o opponent piece (backward compatibility)
6044 opponent_piece_type = piece;
6045 opponent_original_row = from_row;
6046 opponent_original_col = from_col;
6047 opponent_current_row = from_row;
6048 opponent_current_col = from_col;
6049 opponent_piece_moved = true;
6050
6051 // Odstranit figurku z boardu (byla zvednuta)
6052 board[from_row][from_col] = PIECE_EMPTY;
6053
6054 // Nastavit recovery stav
6055 current_game_state = GAME_STATE_WAITING_FOR_RETURN;
6056
6057 // LED: Spustit červené blikání na původní pozici
6058 led_clear_board_only();
6059 game_show_invalid_move_error_with_blink(from_row, from_col);
6060
6061 // Nastavit lifted piece state pro případné drop
6062 piece_lifted = true;
6063 lifted_piece_row = from_row;
6064 lifted_piece_col = from_col;
6065 lifted_piece = piece;
6066
6067 char error_msg[256];
6068 int written =
6069 snprintf(error_msg, sizeof(error_msg),
6070 "❌ Wrong color piece! %s belongs to opponent\n"
6071 "🔴 Return piece to BLINKING RED square (%s) to continue\n"
6072 "💡 To capture: lift YOUR piece first, then opponent's piece",
6073 safe_notation, safe_notation);
6074 if (written >= sizeof(error_msg)) {
6075 strcpy(error_msg, "❌ Return opponent's piece to RED square");
6076 }
6077
6078 game_send_response_to_uart(error_msg, true,
6079 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
6080 return;
6081 }
6082
6083 // CASTLING IN PROGRESS: User lifted the king (already moved). Do NOT start
6084 // resignation – we are waiting for the rook move. Show guidance instead.
6085 if (castling_state.in_progress &&
6086 (piece == PIECE_WHITE_KING || piece == PIECE_BLACK_KING)) {
6087 led_clear_board_only();
6088 uint8_t from_led = chess_pos_to_led_index(castling_state.rook_from_row,
6089 castling_state.rook_from_col);
6090 uint8_t to_led = chess_pos_to_led_index(castling_state.rook_to_row,
6091 castling_state.rook_to_col);
6092 led_set_pixel_safe(from_led, 255, 255, 0); // Yellow – rook source
6093 led_set_pixel_safe(to_led, 0, 255, 0); // Green – rook destination
6094 char msg[128];
6095 int n = snprintf(msg, sizeof(msg),
6096 "🏰 Dokončete rošádu: přesuňte věž z %c%d na %c%d",
6097 (char)('a' + castling_state.rook_from_col),
6098 castling_state.rook_from_row + 1,
6099 (char)('a' + castling_state.rook_to_col),
6100 castling_state.rook_to_row + 1);
6101 if (n >= (int)sizeof(msg)) {
6102 strcpy(msg, "🏰 Dokončete rošádu: přesuňte věž na zelené pole");
6103 }
6104 game_send_response_to_uart(msg, false,
6105 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
6106 return; // Do not set piece_lifted – king stays on board
6107 }
6108
6109 // KING RESIGNATION: Detekce zvednutí vlastního krále (skip v demo mode)
6110 if (!cmd->is_demo_mode &&
6111 ((piece == PIECE_WHITE_KING && current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ||
6112 (piece == PIECE_BLACK_KING && current_player == PLAYER_BLACK))) {
6113 // Nejdřív spustit resignation timer (nastaví oranžovo-červenou na source)
6114 // Pak zobrazit valid moves (včetně castling moves jako modré)
6115 // Clear previous highlights
6116 led_clear_board_only();
6117
6118 // Spustit resignation timer PŘED zobrazením valid moves
6119 // resignation_start() nastaví oranžovo-červenou mix na source square
6120 resignation_start(current_player, from_row, from_col);
6121
6122 // Get valid moves pro krále (PO odstranění z boardu v resignation_start())
6123 // Poznámka: game_get_available_moves() musí fungovat i když je král
6124 // odstraněn z boardu (použije resignation_state.king_row/col pokud je
6125 // resignation aktivní)
6126 move_suggestion_t suggestions[64];
6127 uint32_t valid_moves =
6128 game_get_available_moves(from_row, from_col, suggestions, 64);
6129
6130 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🔄 Showing possible moves for king from %s (%lu moves)",
6131 cmd->from_notation, valid_moves);
6132
6133 // Zobrazit valid moves (zelená/oranžová/modrá pro castling)
6134 if (valid_moves > 0 && game_led_guidance_show_destinations()) {
6135 for (uint32_t i = 0; i < valid_moves; i++) {
6136 uint8_t dest_row = suggestions[i].to_row;
6137 uint8_t dest_col = suggestions[i].to_col;
6138 uint8_t led_index = chess_pos_to_led_index(dest_row, dest_col);
6139
6140 // Check if this is a castling move - zobrazit jako modré
6141 if (suggestions[i].is_castling) {
6142 // Blue for castling moves (special move - rošáda)
6143 led_set_pixel_safe(led_index, 0, 0, 255);
6144 ESP_LOGI(TAG,
6145 "🏰 Castling move highlighted at %c%d (blue) during "
6146 "resignation pickup",
6147 'a' + dest_col, dest_row + 1);
6148 } else {
6149 // Normal move handling
6150 piece_t dest_piece = board[dest_row][dest_col];
6151 bool is_opponent_piece = (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE &&
6152 dest_piece >= PIECE_BLACK_PAWN &&
6153 dest_piece <= PIECE_BLACK_KING) ||
6154 (current_player == PLAYER_BLACK &&
6155 dest_piece >= PIECE_WHITE_PAWN &&
6156 dest_piece <= PIECE_WHITE_KING);
6157
6158 if (is_opponent_piece) {
6159 // Orange for opponent's pieces (capture)
6160 led_set_pixel_safe(led_index, 255, 165, 0);
6161 } else {
6162 // Green for empty squares
6163 led_set_pixel_safe(led_index, 0, 255, 0);
6164 }
6165 }
6166 }
6167 }
6168
6169 // Give FreeRTOS scheduler time to process LED commands
6170 vTaskDelay(pdMS_TO_TICKS(10)); // BUG FIX 3a: Změněno z 50ms na 10ms
6171
6172 // Nastavit lifted piece state
6173 piece_lifted = true;
6174 lifted_piece_row = from_row;
6175 lifted_piece_col = from_col;
6176 lifted_piece = piece;
6177
6178 // Poznámka: resignation_start() už nastaví oranžovo-červenou mix na source
6179 // square Valid moves (zelená/oranžová) zůstanou zobrazené, protože
6180 // resignation_start() nevolá led_clear_board_only()
6181
6182 char msg[128];
6183 snprintf(msg, sizeof(msg),
6184 "👑 King lifted - resignation timer started (10s) - %" PRIu32
6185 " valid moves",
6186 valid_moves);
6187 game_send_response_to_uart(msg, false, (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
6188 return; // Nepokračovat s normálním pickup flow
6189 }
6190
6191 // CASTLING INTERCEPTION: Re-lift of rook during active castling
6192 // If we are in castling mode (standard timer based), suppress standard move
6193 // hints and just reinforce guidance
6194 if (game_is_castle_animation_active()) {
6195 piece_lifted = true;
6196 lifted_piece_row = from_row;
6197 lifted_piece_col = from_col;
6198 lifted_piece = piece;
6199
6200 // Force refresh of castling guidance immediately
6201 uint8_t from_led = chess_pos_to_led_index(rook_from_row, rook_from_col);
6202 uint8_t to_led = chess_pos_to_led_index(rook_to_row, rook_to_col);
6203 led_clear_board_only();
6204 led_set_pixel_safe(from_led, 255, 255, 0); // Yellow
6205 led_set_pixel_safe(to_led, 0, 255, 0); // Green
6206
6207 char msg[128];
6208 snprintf(msg, sizeof(msg),
6209 "🏰 Continue castling: Move to flashing GREEN square");
6210 game_send_response_to_uart(msg, false, (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
6211
6212 return; // SKIP standard move calculation
6213 }
6214
6215 // ED: No animation when lifting piece, just highlight possible moves
6216 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🔄 Piece lifted from %s - showing possible moves",
6217 cmd->from_notation);
6218
6219 // Clear previous highlights before showing new ones
6220 led_clear_board_only();
6221
6222 // Send LED command to highlight source square using new game state logic
6223 led_set_pixel_safe(chess_pos_to_led_index(from_row, from_col), 255, 255,
6224 0); // Yellow for source
6225
6226 // Track the lifted piece
6227 piece_lifted = true;
6228 lifted_piece_row = from_row;
6229 lifted_piece_col = from_col;
6230 lifted_piece = piece;
6231
6232 // Give FreeRTOS scheduler time to process LED commands
6233 vTaskDelay(pdMS_TO_TICKS(10)); // BUG FIX 3a: Změněno z 50ms na 10ms
6234
6235 // Show possible moves
6236 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🔄 Showing possible moves from %s", cmd->from_notation);
6237
6238 // Get valid moves for this piece
6239 move_suggestion_t suggestions[64];
6240 uint32_t valid_moves =
6241 game_get_available_moves(from_row, from_col, suggestions, 64);
6242
6243 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Found %lu valid moves for piece at %s", valid_moves,
6244 cmd->from_notation);
6245
6246 // Send LED commands to highlight possible destinations
6247 if (valid_moves > 0 && game_led_guidance_show_destinations()) {
6248 for (uint32_t i = 0; i < valid_moves; i++) {
6249 uint8_t dest_row = suggestions[i].to_row;
6250 uint8_t dest_col = suggestions[i].to_col;
6251 uint8_t led_index = chess_pos_to_led_index(dest_row, dest_col);
6252
6253 // Check if this is a castling move - zobrazit jako speciální tah
6254 if (suggestions[i].is_castling) {
6255 // Blue for castling moves (special move - rošáda)
6256 led_set_pixel_safe(led_index, 0, 0, 255);
6257 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🏰 Castling move highlighted at %c%d (blue)",
6258 'a' + dest_col, dest_row + 1);
6259 } else {
6260 // Normal move handling (existing code)
6261 piece_t dest_piece = board[dest_row][dest_col];
6262 bool is_opponent_piece =
6263 (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE && dest_piece >= PIECE_BLACK_PAWN &&
6264 dest_piece <= PIECE_BLACK_KING) ||
6265 (current_player == PLAYER_BLACK && dest_piece >= PIECE_WHITE_PAWN &&
6266 dest_piece <= PIECE_WHITE_KING);
6267
6268 if (is_opponent_piece) {
6269 // Orange for opponent's pieces (capture)
6270 led_set_pixel_safe(led_index, 255, 165, 0);
6271 } else {
6272 // Green for empty squares
6273 led_set_pixel_safe(led_index, 0, 255, 0);
6274 }
6275 }
6276 }
6277 }
6278
6279 // Give FreeRTOS scheduler time to process LED commands
6280 vTaskDelay(pdMS_TO_TICKS(10)); // BUG FIX 3a: Změněno z 50ms na 10ms
6281
6282 // MATRIX COMPATIBILITY: Show opponent pieces after pickup (same as matrix
6283 // flow)
6284 if (!guided_capture_state.active && !game_is_castle_animation_active() &&
6285 !game_is_castling_expected()) {
6286 game_highlight_movable_pieces();
6287 }
6288
6289 // Send success response
6290 char success_msg[128];
6291 // Bezpečný snprintf pro success message
6292 int written = snprintf(success_msg, sizeof(success_msg),
6293 "✅ Piece lifted from %s - %" PRIu32 " possible moves",
6294 cmd->from_notation, valid_moves);
6295 if (written >= sizeof(success_msg)) {
6296 snprintf(success_msg, sizeof(success_msg),
6297 "✅ Piece lifted - %" PRIu32 " moves", valid_moves);
6298 }
6299 game_send_response_to_uart(success_msg, false,
6300 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
6301}
6302
6319void game_process_drop_command(const chess_move_command_t *cmd) {
6320 if (!cmd)
6321 return;
6322
6323 // BUG FIX 1: Během čekání na rozestavení blokovat tahy
6324 if (current_game_state == GAME_STATE_WAITING_FOR_BOARD_SETUP) {
6325 game_send_response_to_uart(
6326 "⏳ Hra čeká na fyzické rozestavení figurek. "
6327 "Umístěte všechny figurky na výchozí pozice.",
6328 true, (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
6329 return;
6330 }
6331
6332 if (matrix_guard_pause_state.active) {
6333 if (game_cmd_is_matrix_origin(cmd)) {
6334 game_try_clear_local_guard_from_matrix();
6335 if (!matrix_guard_pause_state.active) {
6336 return;
6337 }
6338 game_render_matrix_guard_leds();
6339 return;
6340 }
6341 game_send_response_to_uart(
6342 "⏸️ Čeká se na srovnání fyzické desky (matrix guard). "
6343 "DROP z UART/Web je blokován.",
6344 true, (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
6345 return;
6346 }
6347
6348 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🎯 Processing DROP command: %s (START)", cmd->to_notation);
6349
6350 // MOVED: New game detection moved to end of function to avoid false
6351 // positives during move sequence
6352
6353 // Convert notation to coordinates
6354 uint8_t to_row, to_col;
6355 if (!convert_notation_to_coords(cmd->to_notation, &to_row, &to_col)) {
6356 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "❌ Invalid notation: %s", cmd->to_notation);
6357 game_send_response_to_uart("❌ Invalid square notation", true,
6358 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
6359 return;
6360 }
6361
6362 // Při každém položení figurky (DROP) vždy přerušit červené blikání – ať už
6363 // uživatel položil během animace nebo po ní; zvednutí–položení rychle za
6364 // sebou tak vždy zastaví blink před dalším překreslením.
6365 game_stop_error_blink();
6366
6367 if (guided_capture_state.active) {
6368 if (game_guided_capture_has_mode_conflict()) {
6369 STAGING_LOGI(TAG, "Guided capture cancelled due to mode conflict (drop)");
6370 game_exit_guided_capture(true);
6371 game_send_response_to_uart(
6372 "⚠️ Guided capture cancelled due to higher-priority game state.", true,
6373 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
6374 return;
6375 }
6376
6377 if (!game_refresh_guided_attackers()) {
6378 STAGING_LOGI(TAG, "Guided capture cancelled (no legal attackers at drop)");
6379 game_exit_guided_capture(true);
6380 game_send_response_to_uart(
6381 "⚠️ Guided capture cancelled - no legal capture available now.", true,
6382 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
6383 return;
6384 }
6385
6386 if (!piece_lifted || lifted_piece == PIECE_EMPTY) {
6387 // Escape/cancel path: opponent piece dropped back to target square.
6388 if (to_row == guided_capture_state.target_row &&
6389 to_col == guided_capture_state.target_col) {
6390 game_exit_guided_capture(true);
6391 game_send_response_to_uart(
6392 "↩️ Guided capture cancelled. Opponent piece returned to target square.",
6393 false, (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
6394 return;
6395 }
6396 game_show_guided_capture_leds();
6397 game_send_response_to_uart(
6398 guided_capture_hints_enabled
6399 ? "⚠️ Guided capture active: lift highlighted YELLOW piece first."
6400 : "⚠️ Guided capture active: lift your piece first, then drop on PURPLE.",
6401 true,
6402 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
6403 return;
6404 }
6405
6406 bool is_allowed_attacker = false;
6407 for (uint8_t i = 0; i < guided_capture_state.attacker_count; i++) {
6408 if (guided_capture_state.attacker_rows[i] == lifted_piece_row &&
6409 guided_capture_state.attacker_cols[i] == lifted_piece_col &&
6410 guided_capture_state.attacker_pieces[i] == lifted_piece) {
6411 is_allowed_attacker = true;
6412 break;
6413 }
6414 }
6415
6416 if (!is_allowed_attacker) {
6417 // Prevent stale "piece still lifted" state when attacker set changed.
6418 piece_lifted = false;
6419 lifted_piece = PIECE_EMPTY;
6420 lifted_piece_row = 0;
6421 lifted_piece_col = 0;
6422 game_show_guided_capture_leds();
6423 game_send_response_to_uart(
6424 guided_capture_hints_enabled
6425 ? "⚠️ This piece is not allowed. Use highlighted YELLOW attacker."
6426 : "⚠️ This piece is not allowed. Use a piece that can capture.",
6427 true,
6428 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
6429 return;
6430 }
6431
6432 if (to_row != guided_capture_state.target_row ||
6433 to_col != guided_capture_state.target_col) {
6434 // User put the attacker back on source square -> graceful cancel.
6435 if (to_row == lifted_piece_row && to_col == lifted_piece_col) {
6436 game_exit_guided_capture(true);
6437 game_send_response_to_uart(
6438 "↩️ Guided capture cancelled. Attacker returned to source square.",
6439 false, (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
6440 return;
6441 }
6442
6443 // Wrong destination was used; clear lifted state to avoid ghost-lift.
6444 piece_lifted = false;
6445 lifted_piece = PIECE_EMPTY;
6446 lifted_piece_row = 0;
6447 lifted_piece_col = 0;
6448 game_show_guided_capture_leds();
6449 game_send_response_to_uart(
6450 "⚠️ Wrong destination. Lift attacker again and drop on PURPLE target.",
6451 true,
6452 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
6453 return;
6454 }
6455
6456 uint8_t source_row = lifted_piece_row;
6457 uint8_t source_col = lifted_piece_col;
6458 chess_move_t guided_capture_move = {.from_row = source_row,
6459 .from_col = source_col,
6460 .to_row = to_row,
6461 .to_col = to_col,
6462 .piece = lifted_piece,
6463 .captured_piece =
6464 guided_capture_state.target_piece,
6465 .timestamp =
6466 esp_timer_get_time() / 1000};
6467
6468 if (!game_execute_move(&guided_capture_move)) {
6469 STAGING_LOGI(TAG, "Guided capture rejected %c%d -> %c%d", 'a' + source_col,
6470 source_row + 1, 'a' + to_col, to_row + 1);
6471 game_show_guided_capture_leds();
6472 game_send_response_to_uart(
6473 "❌ Guided capture rejected by legality checks. Try another attacker.",
6474 true, (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
6475 return;
6476 }
6477
6478 STAGING_LOGI(TAG, "Guided capture completed %c%d -> %c%d", 'a' + source_col,
6479 source_row + 1, 'a' + to_col, to_row + 1);
6480
6481 game_exit_guided_capture(true);
6482 game_send_response_to_uart("✅ Guided capture complete!", false,
6483 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
6484 return;
6485 }
6486
6487 // CASTLING INTERCEPTION: Handle rook moves during castling phase
6488 // This logic must be BEFORE standard validation to avoid "Blocked by King"
6489 // errors
6490 if (game_is_castle_animation_active()) {
6491 // 1. Check for completion (Drop on destination)
6492 // Use lifted_piece position if available, otherwise assume auto-recovery
6493 // from rook_from
6494 uint8_t effective_from_row =
6495 piece_lifted ? lifted_piece_row : rook_from_row;
6496 uint8_t effective_from_col =
6497 piece_lifted ? lifted_piece_col : rook_from_col;
6498
6499 if (game_complete_castle_animation(effective_from_row, effective_from_col,
6500 to_row, to_col)) {
6501 piece_lifted = false;
6502 lifted_piece = PIECE_EMPTY;
6503 game_send_response_to_uart("✅ Castling completed", false,
6504 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
6505 return;
6506 }
6507
6508 // 2. Check for "put back" (Drop on source) - Allow retry
6509 if (to_row == rook_from_row && to_col == rook_from_col) {
6510 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🏰 Rook put back on start square - waiting for lift");
6511 piece_lifted = false;
6512 lifted_piece = PIECE_EMPTY;
6513 game_send_response_to_uart(
6514 "🏰 Rook put back - lift it again to complete castling", false,
6515 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
6516 return; // Keep castling active
6517 }
6518
6519 // 3. Intermediate Move (Dynamic Source) - Robustness for "fumbled" moves
6520 // If dropped on an empty square that is NOT the destination, move the rook
6521 // there and update the animation source!
6522 if (board[to_row][to_col] == PIECE_EMPTY) {
6523 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🏰 Intermediate rook move to %c%d (updating source)",
6524 'a' + to_col, to_row + 1);
6525
6526 // Move piece in board simulation
6527 board[to_row][to_col] = board[rook_from_row][rook_from_col];
6528 board[rook_from_row][rook_from_col] = PIECE_EMPTY;
6529
6530 // Update Static Vars for animation source
6531 rook_from_row = to_row;
6532 rook_from_col = to_col;
6533
6534 // Update Lifted State
6535 piece_lifted = false;
6536 lifted_piece = PIECE_EMPTY;
6537
6538 // Calculate LED indices for immediate feedback
6539 uint8_t from_led = chess_pos_to_led_index(rook_from_row, rook_from_col);
6540 uint8_t to_led = chess_pos_to_led_index(rook_to_row, rook_to_col);
6541 led_set_pixel_safe(from_led, 255, 255, 0); // Yellow (New Source)
6542 led_set_pixel_safe(to_led, 0, 255, 0); // Green (Target)
6543
6544 char msg[128];
6545 snprintf(msg, sizeof(msg),
6546 "🏰 Rook moved to %c%d - now move to GREEN pulsing square",
6547 'a' + to_col, to_row + 1);
6548 game_send_response_to_uart(msg, false,
6549 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
6550 return;
6551 }
6552
6553 // 4. Invalid move (Occupied square)
6554 ESP_LOGW(TAG, "❌ Invalid rook move during castling to %c%d (Occupied)",
6555 'a' + to_col, to_row + 1);
6556 game_send_response_to_uart(
6557 "❌ Square occupied - move rook to flashing green square", true,
6558 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
6559 // Do not clear state, allow user to try again
6560 return;
6561 }
6562
6563 // PROMOTION (swap_then_choose, swap volitelný):
6564 // - Povolit fyzický DN pouze na promočním poli (bez běžného drop/move flow).
6565 // - Mimo promoční pole ignorovat a poslat krátkou hlášku.
6566 if (promotion_state.pending) {
6567 bool is_promo_square = (to_row == promotion_state.square_row &&
6568 to_col == promotion_state.square_col);
6569
6570 if (is_promo_square) {
6571 ESP_LOGI(TAG,
6572 "👑 Promotion pending: DROP on promo square %c%d allowed "
6573 "(swap_then_choose)",
6574 'a' + to_col, to_row + 1);
6575
6576 char info_msg[256];
6577 snprintf(info_msg, sizeof(info_msg),
6578 "👑 Promotion pending at %c%d\n"
6579 "✅ Swap on promo square registered (optional)\n"
6580 "➡️ Next: choose piece via green buttons / PROMOTE / web",
6581 'a' + promotion_state.square_col,
6582 promotion_state.square_row + 1);
6583 game_send_response_to_uart(info_msg, false,
6584 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
6585 return; // Neprovádět standardní drop flow
6586 }
6587
6588 ESP_LOGI(TAG,
6589 "⏸️ Promotion pending: DROP blocked outside promo square (%s)",
6590 cmd->to_notation);
6591
6592 char info_msg[256];
6593 snprintf(info_msg, sizeof(info_msg),
6594 "⏸️ Promotion pending at %c%d\n"
6595 "🔁 Swap allowed only on %c%d (optional)\n"
6596 "➡️ Then choose piece via green buttons / PROMOTE / web",
6597 'a' + promotion_state.square_col, promotion_state.square_row + 1,
6598 'a' + promotion_state.square_col, promotion_state.square_row + 1);
6599 game_send_response_to_uart(info_msg, false,
6600 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
6601 return;
6602 }
6603
6604 // KING RESIGNATION: Zrušit pouze když uživatel položí krále na jeho původní
6605 // pole. Při vrácení soupeřovy figury (opponent return) NIKDY nerušit – král
6606 // zůstává v ruce.
6607 bool in_opponent_return =
6608 (current_game_state == GAME_STATE_WAITING_FOR_RETURN &&
6609 opponent_piece_moved);
6610 if (resignation_state.active && in_opponent_return) {
6611 ESP_LOGI(TAG,
6612 "🔄 [STAGING] DROP during opponent return – keeping resignation "
6613 "timer (king still in hand)");
6614 }
6615 if (resignation_state.active && !in_opponent_return &&
6616 to_row == resignation_state.king_row &&
6617 to_col == resignation_state.king_col) {
6618 ESP_LOGI(TAG,
6619 "👑 DROP on king square %c%d – cancelling resignation (king "
6620 "placed back)",
6621 'a' + to_col, to_row + 1);
6622 resignation_stop(false);
6623 // Po opponent-return jsme vyčistili piece_lifted; král se vrací bez tracku.
6624 if (!piece_lifted) {
6625 led_clear_board_only();
6626 game_highlight_movable_pieces();
6627 game_send_response_to_uart("✅ King placed - resignation cancelled",
6628 false, (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
6629 return;
6630 }
6631 }
6632
6633 // POST-GAME PERSISTENCE: If game is finished, just update board visuals
6634 // This handles the "King Resignation" scenario where the user puts the King
6635 // down AFTER the timer has already ended the game. We must not lose the King!
6636 if (current_game_state == GAME_STATE_FINISHED && piece_lifted) {
6637 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🏁 Game finished - preserving piece drop at %s",
6638 cmd->to_notation);
6639
6640 // Force update board to match physical reality
6641 board[to_row][to_col] = lifted_piece;
6642
6643 // Clear lifted status
6644 piece_lifted = false;
6645 lifted_piece = PIECE_EMPTY;
6646 lifted_piece_row = 0;
6647 lifted_piece_col = 0;
6648
6649 // Update LED to show the piece is there (maybe gold/winner color? or just
6650 // standard) For now, let the victory animation take over, or just clear. We
6651 // send a generic response.
6652 game_send_response_to_uart("✅ Board synced (Game Over)", false,
6653 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
6654 return;
6655 }
6656
6657 // 3-STEP CAPTURE: Check if completing capture
6658 if (capture_in_progress) {
6659 if (to_row == capture_target_row && to_col == capture_target_col) {
6660 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "♟️ Capture complete at %c%d", 'a' + to_col, to_row + 1);
6661
6662 // KRITICKÁ OPRAVA: Pokud je resignation timer aktivní a král dělá capture
6663 // tah, zrušit resignation timer PŘED voláním game_execute_move()
6664 if (resignation_state.active && (lifted_piece == PIECE_WHITE_KING ||
6665 lifted_piece == PIECE_BLACK_KING)) {
6666 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "👑 King made a capture move during resignation timer - "
6667 "cancelling resignation");
6668 resignation_stop(false);
6669 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "👑 Resignation cancelled - king captured piece at %c%d",
6670 'a' + to_col, to_row + 1);
6671 }
6672
6673 chess_move_t capture_move = {.from_row = lifted_piece_row,
6674 .from_col = lifted_piece_col,
6675 .to_row = to_row,
6676 .to_col = to_col,
6677 .piece = lifted_piece,
6678 .captured_piece = capture_removed_piece,
6679 .timestamp = esp_timer_get_time() / 1000};
6680
6681 // Temporarily restore captured piece for validation
6682 // game_is_valid_move needs to see the opponent piece to validate capture
6683 board[to_row][to_col] = capture_removed_piece;
6684
6685 if (game_execute_move(&capture_move)) {
6686 capture_in_progress = false;
6687 capture_target_row = 0;
6688 capture_target_col = 0;
6689 capture_removed_piece = PIECE_EMPTY;
6690
6691 // NO manual player switch - game_execute_move() already does it!
6692 // Player is already switched by game_execute_move()
6693
6694 // Timer already handled by game_execute_move() too
6695 // Just do post-move cleanup
6696
6697 piece_lifted = false;
6698 lifted_piece_row = 0;
6699 lifted_piece_col = 0;
6700 lifted_piece = PIECE_EMPTY;
6701
6702 // Pokud capture tah vyvolal promoci, NESPÍNAT normal post-move LED,
6703 // aby se nepřebil promotion UX (promo square anchor + zelená tlačítka).
6704 if (promotion_state.pending) {
6705 ESP_LOGI(TAG,
6706 "👑 Capture resulted in promotion pending at %c%d - keeping "
6707 "promotion UX",
6708 'a' + promotion_state.square_col,
6709 promotion_state.square_row + 1);
6710
6711 // Udržet promo square anchor (bez clear)
6712 game_update_promotion_anchor_led();
6713
6714 char promo_msg[256];
6715 snprintf(promo_msg, sizeof(promo_msg),
6716 "👑 Promotion required at %c%d\n"
6717 "🔁 You may swap on this square now (optional)\n"
6718 "➡️ Next: choose piece via green buttons / PROMOTE / web",
6719 'a' + promotion_state.square_col,
6720 promotion_state.square_row + 1);
6721 game_send_response_to_uart(promo_msg, false,
6722 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
6723 return;
6724 }
6725
6726 led_clear_board_only();
6727 game_highlight_movable_pieces();
6728
6729 game_send_response_to_uart("✅ Capture complete!", false,
6730 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
6731 return;
6732 }
6733 } else {
6734 // Cancel capture
6735 board[capture_target_row][capture_target_col] = capture_removed_piece;
6736 capture_in_progress = false;
6737 game_send_response_to_uart("⚠️ Capture cancelled", true,
6738 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
6739 return;
6740 }
6741 }
6742
6743 // Kontrola opponent piece recovery
6744 if (current_game_state == GAME_STATE_WAITING_FOR_RETURN &&
6745 opponent_piece_moved) {
6746 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🔄 Processing opponent piece return");
6747
6748 if (to_row == opponent_original_row && to_col == opponent_original_col) {
6749 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "✅ Opponent piece returned to original position %c%d",
6750 'a' + to_col, to_row + 1);
6751
6752 // Vrátit figurku na board
6753 board[to_row][to_col] = opponent_piece_type;
6754
6755 // Resetovat error_recovery_state (byl nastaven při PICKUP)
6756 if (error_recovery_state.waiting_for_move_correction) {
6757 ESP_LOGI(
6758 TAG,
6759 "🔄 Clearing error_recovery_state after opponent piece return");
6760 game_reset_error_recovery_state();
6761 }
6762
6763 // Resetovat opponent piece recovery stav
6764 opponent_piece_moved = false;
6765 opponent_piece_type = PIECE_EMPTY;
6766 opponent_original_row = 0;
6767 opponent_original_col = 0;
6768 opponent_current_row = 0;
6769 opponent_current_col = 0;
6770 current_game_state = GAME_STATE_ACTIVE;
6771
6772 // Resetovat lifted piece state
6773 piece_lifted = false;
6774 lifted_piece_row = 0;
6775 lifted_piece_col = 0;
6776 lifted_piece = PIECE_EMPTY;
6777
6778 // Resetovat lifted piece state
6779 piece_lifted = false;
6780 lifted_piece_row = 0;
6781 lifted_piece_col = 0;
6782 lifted_piece = PIECE_EMPTY;
6783
6784 // Vyčistit LED a ukázat normální stav
6785 led_clear_board_only();
6786 game_highlight_movable_pieces();
6787
6788 game_send_response_to_uart("✅ Opponent piece returned - continue game",
6789 false, (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
6790 return;
6791 }
6792
6793 // NESPRÁVNÉ POLOŽENÍ: Figurka se pokládá na jinou pozici
6794 ESP_LOGW(TAG,
6795 "⚠️ Opponent piece placed at wrong position %c%d (should be %c%d)",
6796 'a' + to_col, to_row + 1, 'a' + opponent_original_col,
6797 opponent_original_row + 1);
6798
6799 // Aktualizovat aktuální pozici
6800 opponent_current_row = to_row;
6801 opponent_current_col = to_col;
6802
6803 // Aktualizovat board (figurka je nyní na nové pozici)
6804 board[to_row][to_col] = opponent_piece_type;
6805
6806 // Aktualizovat lifted piece state pro další pokus
6807 lifted_piece_row = to_row;
6808 lifted_piece_col = to_col;
6809
6810 // LED: Zobrazit červenou LED na původní pozici (kde má být figurka
6811 // vrácena)
6812 led_clear_board_only();
6813 led_set_pixel_safe(
6814 chess_pos_to_led_index(opponent_original_row, opponent_original_col),
6815 255, 0, 0); // Solid red
6816
6817 char error_msg[256];
6818 int written =
6819 snprintf(error_msg, sizeof(error_msg),
6820 "⚠️ Opponent piece at wrong position %c%d\n"
6821 "🔴 Return to RED square (%c%d) to continue",
6822 'a' + to_col, to_row + 1, 'a' + opponent_original_col,
6823 opponent_original_row + 1);
6824 if (written >= sizeof(error_msg)) {
6825 strcpy(error_msg, "⚠️ Return opponent piece to RED square");
6826 }
6827
6828 game_send_response_to_uart(error_msg, true,
6829 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
6830 return;
6831 }
6832
6833 // KONTROLA: Je figurka v error recovery stavu?
6834 if (error_recovery_state.waiting_for_move_correction) {
6835 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🔄 Processing move correction from error state");
6836
6837 // KONTROLA NÁVRATU NA PŮVODNÍ POZICI
6838 if (to_row == error_recovery_state.original_valid_row &&
6839 to_col == error_recovery_state.original_valid_col) {
6840
6841 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "↩️ Piece returned to ORIGINAL valid position %c%d",
6842 'a' + to_col, to_row + 1);
6843
6844 // KRITICKÉ: Opravit board stav
6845 // Odstranit figurku z neplatné pozice
6846 board[error_recovery_state.invalid_row]
6847 [error_recovery_state.invalid_col] = PIECE_EMPTY;
6848
6849 // Vrátit figurku na původní validní pozici
6850 board[to_row][to_col] = error_recovery_state.piece_type;
6851
6852 // RESETOVAT error stav
6853 game_reset_error_recovery_state();
6854
6855 // RESETOVAT lifted piece state
6856 piece_lifted = false;
6857 lifted_piece_row = 0;
6858 lifted_piece_col = 0;
6859 lifted_piece = PIECE_EMPTY;
6860
6861 // Vyčistit LED a ukázat normální stav
6862 game_stop_error_blink(); // STOP blinking red LED!
6863 led_clear_board_only();
6864 game_highlight_movable_pieces();
6865
6866 game_send_response_to_uart("✅ Piece returned to original valid position",
6867 false, (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
6868 return;
6869 }
6870
6871 // Pokus o jiný tah z error pozice - validovat jako normální tah
6872 chess_move_t correction_move = {
6873 .from_row = error_recovery_state.invalid_row,
6874 .from_col = error_recovery_state.invalid_col,
6875 .to_row = to_row,
6876 .to_col = to_col,
6877 .piece = error_recovery_state.piece_type,
6878 .captured_piece = board[to_row][to_col],
6879 .timestamp = esp_timer_get_time() / 1000};
6880
6881 move_error_t error = game_is_valid_move(&correction_move);
6882 if (error == MOVE_ERROR_NONE) {
6883 // Validní korekční tah!
6884 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "✅ Valid correction move from error position");
6885
6886 // Aktualizovat board stav
6887 board[error_recovery_state.invalid_row]
6888 [error_recovery_state.invalid_col] = PIECE_EMPTY;
6889 board[to_row][to_col] = error_recovery_state.piece_type;
6890
6891 // Provést normální move execution
6892 if (game_execute_move(&correction_move)) {
6893 // Úspěšný tah - resetovat error stav
6894 game_reset_error_recovery_state();
6895
6896 // Změnit hráče a přepnout timer
6897 player_t previous_player = current_player;
6898 current_player =
6899 (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? PLAYER_BLACK : PLAYER_WHITE;
6900
6901 // Timer integration: End timer for previous player and start for new
6902 // player
6903 ESP_LOGI(TAG,
6904 "🔄 Timer switch (correction): ending for %s, starting for %s",
6905 previous_player == PLAYER_WHITE ? "White" : "Black",
6906 current_player == PLAYER_WHITE ? "White" : "Black");
6907 game_end_timer_move();
6908 game_start_timer_move(current_player == PLAYER_WHITE);
6909
6910 // KRITICKÁ OPRAVA: Kontrola checkmate/stalemate po correction tahu!
6911 game_state_t end_game_result = game_check_end_game_conditions();
6912 if (end_game_result == GAME_STATE_FINISHED) {
6913 current_game_state = GAME_STATE_FINISHED;
6914 game_active = false;
6915 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🎉 Game finished detected in correction move!");
6916 }
6917
6918 // Resetovat lifted piece state
6919 piece_lifted = false;
6920 lifted_piece_row = 0;
6921 lifted_piece_col = 0;
6922 lifted_piece = PIECE_EMPTY;
6923
6924 // Vyčistit LED a ukázat nový stav (blikání už přerušeno na začátku DROP)
6925 led_clear_board_only();
6926 game_highlight_movable_pieces();
6927
6928 char success_msg[128];
6929 snprintf(success_msg, sizeof(success_msg),
6930 "✅ Correction move successful: %s", cmd->to_notation);
6931 game_send_response_to_uart(success_msg, false,
6932 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
6933 return;
6934 }
6935 }
6936
6937 // Stále neplatný tah - pokračovat v error stavu
6938 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "❌ Correction move still invalid: error %d", error);
6939
6940 // KRITICKÝ: Aktualizovat board stav a invalid pozici!
6941 // Figurka se FYZICKY přesunula z A5 na H5, musíme to reflektovat
6942
6943 // 1. Přesunout figurku na boardu z old invalid na new invalid
6944 board[error_recovery_state.invalid_row][error_recovery_state.invalid_col] =
6945 PIECE_EMPTY;
6946 board[to_row][to_col] = error_recovery_state.piece_type;
6947
6948 // 2. Aktualizovat invalid pozici na novou
6949 error_recovery_state.invalid_row = to_row; // H5
6950 error_recovery_state.invalid_col = to_col;
6951
6952 // 3. Aktualizovat lifted piece tracking
6953 lifted_piece_row = to_row;
6954 lifted_piece_col = to_col;
6955
6956 ESP_LOGI(TAG,
6957 "🔧 Successive invalid move: updated invalid position to %c%d "
6958 "(original_valid still %c%d)",
6959 'a' + to_col, to_row + 1,
6960 'a' + error_recovery_state.original_valid_col,
6961 error_recovery_state.original_valid_row + 1);
6962
6963 // 4. Poslat odpověď UART
6964 char error_msg[256];
6965 snprintf(error_msg, sizeof(error_msg),
6966 "❌ Still invalid move to %c%d - return to ORIGINAL %c%d or find "
6967 "valid move",
6968 'a' + to_col, to_row + 1,
6969 'a' + error_recovery_state.original_valid_col,
6970 error_recovery_state.original_valid_row + 1);
6971 game_send_response_to_uart(error_msg, true,
6972 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
6973
6974 // 5. Blikat červeně na NOVÉ invalid pozici (H5, ne A5!)
6975 game_show_invalid_move_error_with_blink(error_recovery_state.invalid_row,
6976 error_recovery_state.invalid_col);
6977 return;
6978 }
6979
6980 // NORMÁLNÍ PROCESSING - kontrola jestli máme lifted piece
6981 if (!piece_lifted) {
6982 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "❌ No piece was lifted - use UP command first");
6983 game_send_response_to_uart("❌ No piece was lifted - use UP command first",
6984 true, (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
6985 return;
6986 }
6987
6988 // KONTROLA ZRUŠENÍ TAHU (drop na stejné pole)
6989 if (to_row == lifted_piece_row && to_col == lifted_piece_col) {
6990 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🔄 Move cancelled: piece placed on source square %c%d",
6991 'a' + to_col, to_row + 1);
6992
6993 // Reset lifted piece state
6994 piece_lifted = false;
6995 lifted_piece_row = 0;
6996 lifted_piece_col = 0;
6997 lifted_piece = PIECE_EMPTY;
6998
6999 // Zobrazit pohyblivé figurky (blikání už přerušeno na začátku DROP)
7000 led_clear_board_only();
7001 game_highlight_movable_pieces();
7002
7003 game_send_response_to_uart("✅ Move cancelled", false,
7004 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
7005 return;
7006 }
7007
7008 // VALIDACE TAHU
7009 chess_move_t move = {.from_row = lifted_piece_row,
7010 .from_col = lifted_piece_col,
7011 .to_row = to_row,
7012 .to_col = to_col,
7013 .piece = lifted_piece,
7014 .captured_piece = board[to_row][to_col],
7015 .timestamp = esp_timer_get_time() / 1000};
7016
7017 // Detekce castling PŘED validací (pro resignation timer handling)
7018 bool is_castling =
7019 (lifted_piece == PIECE_WHITE_KING || lifted_piece == PIECE_BLACK_KING) &&
7020 abs((int)to_col - (int)lifted_piece_col) == 2;
7021
7022 // Pokud je castling tah a resignation timer je aktivní, zrušit resignation
7023 if (is_castling && resignation_state.active) {
7024 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🏰 Castling detected during resignation timer - cancelling "
7025 "resignation");
7026 resignation_stop(false);
7027 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🏰 Resignation cancelled - continuing with castling flow");
7028 }
7029
7030 move_error_t error = game_is_valid_move(&move);
7031 if (error == MOVE_ERROR_NONE) {
7032 // VALIDNÍ TAH - normální processing
7033 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "✅ Valid move detected");
7034
7035 if (puzzle_active) {
7036 bool is_expected_solution = (lifted_piece_row == puzzle_solution_from_row &&
7037 lifted_piece_col == puzzle_solution_from_col &&
7038 to_row == puzzle_solution_to_row &&
7039 to_col == puzzle_solution_to_col);
7040 if (!is_expected_solution) {
7041 bool already_in_error = error_recovery_state.waiting_for_move_correction;
7042 puzzle_feedback = PUZZLE_FEEDBACK_WRONG;
7043 STAGING_LOGI(TAG, "puzzle: wrong move %c%d -> %c%d for id=%u",
7044 'a' + lifted_piece_col, lifted_piece_row + 1, 'a' + to_col,
7045 to_row + 1, (unsigned)puzzle_active_id);
7046
7047 error_recovery_state.waiting_for_move_correction = true;
7048 error_recovery_state.has_invalid_piece = true;
7049 error_recovery_state.piece_type = lifted_piece;
7050 error_recovery_state.invalid_row = to_row;
7051 error_recovery_state.invalid_col = to_col;
7052
7053 if (!already_in_error) {
7054 error_recovery_state.original_valid_row = lifted_piece_row;
7055 error_recovery_state.original_valid_col = lifted_piece_col;
7056 }
7057
7058 board[lifted_piece_row][lifted_piece_col] = PIECE_EMPTY;
7059 board[to_row][to_col] = lifted_piece;
7060 lifted_piece_row = to_row;
7061 lifted_piece_col = to_col;
7062
7063 game_show_invalid_move_error_with_blink(to_row, to_col);
7064
7065 char error_msg[256];
7066 snprintf(
7067 error_msg, sizeof(error_msg),
7068 "❌ Puzzle: to neni ono (%s). Vrat figurku na ORIGINAL %c%d.",
7069 cmd->to_notation, 'a' + error_recovery_state.original_valid_col,
7070 error_recovery_state.original_valid_row + 1);
7071 game_send_response_to_uart(error_msg, true,
7072 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
7073 return;
7074 }
7075 }
7076
7077 // KRITICKÁ OPRAVA: Pokud je resignation timer aktivní a král udělá validní
7078 // tah (ne castling, ne položití zpět), zrušit resignation timer Castling už
7079 // je ošetřen výše, takže tady kontrolujeme normální tahy krále
7080 if (resignation_state.active &&
7081 (lifted_piece == PIECE_WHITE_KING ||
7082 lifted_piece == PIECE_BLACK_KING) &&
7083 !is_castling) {
7084 // Kontrola, zda se král nepokládá zpět na původní pozici (to je handled
7085 // jinde) Pokud je to jiná pozice než původní, je to normální tah → zrušit
7086 // resignation
7087 if (to_row != resignation_state.king_row ||
7088 to_col != resignation_state.king_col) {
7089 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "👑 King made a normal move during resignation timer - "
7090 "cancelling resignation");
7091 resignation_stop(false);
7092 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "👑 Resignation cancelled - king moved to %c%d",
7093 'a' + to_col, to_row + 1);
7094 }
7095 }
7096
7097 // KRITICKÁ OPRAVA: Zkontrolovat castling_state.in_progress PŘED voláním
7098 // game_execute_move() protože game_execute_move_enhanced() resetuje
7099 // castling_state.in_progress = false Pokud je castling_state.in_progress,
7100 // player change animace už se spustí v game_execute_move_enhanced()
7101 bool is_castling_completion_before_move = castling_state.in_progress;
7102
7103 ESP_LOGI(TAG,
7104 "🔍 game_process_drop_command: BEFORE game_execute_move, "
7105 "current_player=%s, is_castling_completion_before_move=%d",
7106 current_player == PLAYER_WHITE ? "White" : "Black",
7107 is_castling_completion_before_move);
7108 bool move_success = game_execute_move(&move);
7109 ESP_LOGI(TAG,
7110 "🔍 game_process_drop_command: AFTER game_execute_move, "
7111 "move_success=%d",
7112 move_success);
7113
7114 if (move_success) {
7115 if (puzzle_active) {
7116 puzzle_active = false;
7117 puzzle_feedback = PUZZLE_FEEDBACK_SOLVED;
7118 STAGING_LOGI(TAG, "puzzle: solved id=%u", (unsigned)puzzle_active_id);
7119 }
7120 // KRITICKÁ OPRAVA: Reset error state při jakémkoliv validním tahu!
7121 if (error_recovery_state.waiting_for_move_correction) {
7122 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "✅ Valid move - clearing error recovery state");
7123 game_reset_error_recovery_state();
7124 }
7125
7126 // #1: Check if promotion is pending - if so, SKIP
7127 // timer/animations They will execute in
7128 // game_process_promotion_command() after user selects piece
7129 if (promotion_state.pending) {
7130 ESP_LOGI(TAG,
7131 "⏸️ Promotion pending at %c%d - skipping timer switch and "
7132 "animations",
7133 'a' + promotion_state.square_col,
7134 promotion_state.square_row + 1);
7135 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "⏸️ Awaiting promotion selection via buttons/UART/web");
7136 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "⏸️ Timer remains with %s player",
7137 current_player == PLAYER_WHITE ? "White" : "Black");
7138
7139 // Keep promo square visually anchored (does not clear board)
7140 game_update_promotion_anchor_led();
7141
7142 // Send success response without animations
7143 char success_msg[256];
7144 snprintf(
7145 success_msg, sizeof(success_msg),
7146 "✅ Valid move: %c%d → %c%d\n"
7147 "👑 Promotion required at %c%d\n"
7148 "🔁 Optional: swap on %c%d now\n"
7149 "➡️ Then choose piece (green buttons / PROMOTE / web)",
7150 'a' + move.from_col, move.from_row + 1, 'a' + to_col, to_row + 1,
7151 'a' + promotion_state.square_col, promotion_state.square_row + 1,
7152 'a' + promotion_state.square_col, promotion_state.square_row + 1);
7153 game_send_response_to_uart(success_msg, false,
7154 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
7155 return; // Exit here - no timer switch, no animations
7156 }
7157
7158 // Použít is_castling_completion_before_move (uložené PŘED
7159 // game_execute_move()) protože game_execute_move_enhanced() resetuje
7160 // castling_state.in_progress = false Pokud je
7161 // is_castling_completion_before_move, player change animace už se
7162 // spustila v game_execute_move_enhanced()
7163
7164 if (!is_castling && !is_castling_completion_before_move) {
7165 // Spustit move path animaci PŘED změnou hráče (podle starého
7166 // projektu)
7167 uint8_t from_led = chess_pos_to_led_index(move.from_row, move.from_col);
7168 uint8_t to_led = chess_pos_to_led_index(move.to_row, move.to_col);
7169 led_command_t move_path_cmd = {
7170 .type = LED_CMD_ANIM_MOVE_PATH,
7171 .led_index = from_led,
7172 .red = 255,
7173 .green = 255,
7174 .blue = 0, // Yellow
7175 .duration_ms = 1000,
7176 .data = &to_led // Cílová pozice v data
7177 };
7178 led_execute_command_new(&move_path_cmd);
7179
7180 // STABILITY FIX: Animace běží asynchronně, neblokujeme zpracování
7181 // Animace jsou spuštěny v led_task a běží nezávisle
7182 // (vTaskDelay odstraněn pro lepší throughput)
7183
7184 // HRÁČ SE UŽ ZMĚNIL V game_execute_move() - použít aktuálního hráče
7185 // Timer integration: End timer for previous player and start for new
7186 // player
7187 player_t previous_player =
7188 (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? PLAYER_BLACK : PLAYER_WHITE;
7189 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🔄 Timer switch (drop): ending for %s, starting for %s",
7190 previous_player == PLAYER_WHITE ? "White" : "Black",
7191 current_player == PLAYER_WHITE ? "White" : "Black");
7192 game_end_timer_move();
7193 game_start_timer_move(current_player == PLAYER_WHITE);
7194
7195 // KRITICKÉ: Endgame kontrola PŘED player change animací!
7196 // Pokud je endgame, player change se NESPOUŠTÍ
7197 game_state_t end_game_result = game_check_end_game_conditions();
7198 if (end_game_result == GAME_STATE_FINISHED) {
7199 current_game_state = GAME_STATE_FINISHED;
7200 game_active = false;
7201
7202 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "✅ Game finished detected - animation triggered by "
7203 "check function");
7204 ESP_LOGI(
7205 TAG,
7206 "✅ Endgame animation started - player change animation SKIPPED");
7207 } else if (!is_castling_completion_before_move) {
7208 // Nespouštět player change animaci pokud je to castling dokončení
7209 // (player change animace už se spustila v
7210 // game_execute_move_enhanced()) Není endgame a není castling
7211 // dokončení - spustit player change animaci s NOVÝM hráčem
7212 // (current_player)
7213 uint8_t player_color =
7214 (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? 1 : 0; // 1=white, 0=black
7215 led_command_t player_change_cmd = {
7216 .type = LED_CMD_ANIM_PLAYER_CHANGE, // Použít
7217 // ANIM_PLAYER_CHANGE místo
7218 // PLAYER_CHANGE
7219 .led_index = 0,
7220 .red = 0,
7221 .green = 0,
7222 .blue = 0,
7223 .duration_ms = 0,
7224 .data = &player_color // Předat barvu NOVÉHO hráče
7225 };
7226 led_execute_command_new(&player_change_cmd);
7227 } else {
7228 // Castling dokončení - player change animace už se spustila v
7229 // game_execute_move_enhanced()
7230 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🏰 Castling completion - player change animation "
7231 "already triggered in game_execute_move_enhanced()");
7232 }
7233 } // Konec bloku if (!is_castling && !is_castling_completion_before_move)
7234
7235 // Check animace se spustí vždy (i při castling dokončení)
7236 // Zkontrolovat, zda je nový hráč v šachu (pouze pokud move_success)
7237 bool in_check = game_is_king_in_check(current_player);
7238 if (in_check) {
7239 // Najít pozici krále
7240 int king_row = -1, king_col = -1;
7241 piece_t king_piece = (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE)
7242 ? PIECE_WHITE_KING
7243 : PIECE_BLACK_KING;
7244 for (int row = 0; row < 8; row++) {
7245 for (int col = 0; col < 8; col++) {
7246 if (board[row][col] == king_piece) {
7247 king_row = row;
7248 king_col = col;
7249 break;
7250 }
7251 }
7252 if (king_row != -1)
7253 break;
7254 }
7255
7256 if (king_row != -1 && king_col != -1) {
7257 if (game_led_guidance_show_check_anim()) {
7258 uint8_t king_led_index = chess_pos_to_led_index(king_row, king_col);
7259 // Spustit check animaci - růžové svícení na králi
7260 led_command_t check_cmd = {.type = LED_CMD_ANIM_CHECK,
7261 .led_index = king_led_index,
7262 .red = 0,
7263 .green = 0,
7264 .blue = 0,
7265 .duration_ms =
7266 0, // Trvalé až do dalšího tahu
7267 .data = NULL};
7268 led_execute_command_new(&check_cmd);
7269 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "⚠️ CHECK! %s is in check",
7270 current_player == PLAYER_WHITE ? "White" : "Black");
7271 }
7272 }
7273 }
7274
7275 // Reset lifted piece state po úspěšném tahu
7276 piece_lifted = false;
7277 lifted_piece_row = 0;
7278 lifted_piece_col = 0;
7279 lifted_piece = PIECE_EMPTY;
7280
7281 // MATRIX COMPATIBILITY: Show opponent pieces after successful move
7282 // (same as matrix flow) - ONLY if game is active
7283 if (current_game_state == GAME_STATE_ACTIVE &&
7284 !game_is_castle_animation_active() && !game_is_castling_expected()) {
7285 game_highlight_movable_pieces();
7286 }
7287
7288 char success_msg[128];
7289 convert_coords_to_notation(move.from_row, move.from_col, success_msg);
7290 snprintf(success_msg + strlen(success_msg),
7291 sizeof(success_msg) - strlen(success_msg), " -> %s",
7292 cmd->to_notation);
7293 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "📤 Sending success response...");
7294 game_send_response_to_uart(success_msg, false,
7295 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
7296 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "📤 Success response sent");
7297 }
7298 } else {
7299 // NEVALIDNÍ TAH - ENHANCED ERROR HANDLING
7300 ESP_LOGW(TAG, "❌ Invalid move attempt: %s", cmd->to_notation);
7301 if (puzzle_active) {
7302 puzzle_feedback = PUZZLE_FEEDBACK_ILLEGAL;
7303 }
7304
7305 // KRITICKÝ: Rozlišit první error vs další errory
7306 bool already_in_error = error_recovery_state.waiting_for_move_correction;
7307
7308 // SPOLEČNÉ NASTAVENÍ pro všechny chyby
7309 error_recovery_state.waiting_for_move_correction = true;
7310 error_recovery_state.has_invalid_piece = true;
7311 error_recovery_state.piece_type = lifted_piece;
7312 error_recovery_state.invalid_row =
7313 to_row; // Aktualizovat na novou neplatnou pozici
7314 error_recovery_state.invalid_col = to_col;
7315
7316 // KRITICKÝ: Nastavit original_valid POUZE při PRVNÍM erroru!
7317 // Při dalších errorech NEPŘEPISOVAT - original zůstává stejné (A2)
7318 if (!already_in_error) {
7319 error_recovery_state.original_valid_row =
7320 lifted_piece_row; // A2 - první validní pozice
7321 error_recovery_state.original_valid_col = lifted_piece_col;
7322 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🔧 First error: original_valid set to %c%d",
7323 'a' + lifted_piece_col, lifted_piece_row + 1);
7324 } else {
7325 ESP_LOGI(TAG,
7326 "🔧 Successive error: original_valid stays at %c%d (invalid "
7327 "moves to %c%d)",
7328 'a' + error_recovery_state.original_valid_col,
7329 error_recovery_state.original_valid_row + 1, 'a' + to_col,
7330 to_row + 1);
7331 }
7332
7333 // AKTUALIZOVAT board stav - figurka je nyní na neplatném poli (fyzická
7334 // realita) Board musí odpovídat fyzickému stavu, aby PICKUP fungoval
7335 // správně!
7336 board[lifted_piece_row][lifted_piece_col] =
7337 PIECE_EMPTY; // původní pole prázdné
7338 board[to_row][to_col] = lifted_piece; // neplatné pole má figurku
7339
7340 // AKTUALIZOVAT lifted_piece tracking na novou neplatnou pozici
7341 lifted_piece_row = to_row;
7342 lifted_piece_col = to_col;
7343 // piece_lifted = true; // Zůstává true!
7344
7345 // LED INDIKACE - červené blikání na neplatném poli
7346 game_show_invalid_move_error_with_blink(to_row, to_col);
7347
7348 char error_msg[256];
7349 snprintf(
7350 error_msg, sizeof(error_msg),
7351 "❌ Invalid move to %s - return to ORIGINAL %c%d or find valid move",
7352 cmd->to_notation, 'a' + error_recovery_state.original_valid_col,
7353 error_recovery_state.original_valid_row + 1);
7354 game_send_response_to_uart(error_msg, true,
7355 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
7356 }
7357}
7358
7364void game_show_invalid_move_error_with_blink(uint8_t error_row,
7365 uint8_t error_col) {
7366 // Přerušit předchozí blikání
7367 game_stop_error_blink();
7368
7369 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🚨 Starting non-blocking blink at %c%d", 'a' + error_col,
7370 error_row + 1);
7371 led_clear_board_only();
7372
7373 blink_state.active = true;
7374 blink_state.led_index = chess_pos_to_led_index(error_row, error_col);
7375 blink_state.blink_count = 0;
7376 blink_state.max_blinks = 10;
7377 blink_state.last_toggle_time = esp_timer_get_time() / 1000;
7378 blink_state.blink_interval_ms = 300;
7379 blink_state.led_state = false;
7380
7381 // Spustit první toggle
7382 game_update_error_blink();
7383}
7384
7388void game_update_error_blink(void) {
7389 if (!blink_state.active) {
7390 return;
7391 }
7392
7393 uint32_t current_time = esp_timer_get_time() / 1000;
7394
7395 // Kontrola timeoutu pro toggle
7396 if (current_time - blink_state.last_toggle_time >=
7397 blink_state.blink_interval_ms) {
7398 blink_state.blink_count++;
7399
7400 // Toggle LED
7401 if (blink_state.led_state) {
7402 // Vypnout LED
7403 led_set_pixel_safe(blink_state.led_index, 0, 0, 0);
7404 blink_state.led_state = false;
7405 } else {
7406 // Zapnout LED
7407 led_set_pixel_safe(blink_state.led_index, 255, 0, 0); // Červená
7408 blink_state.led_state = true;
7409 }
7410
7411 blink_state.last_toggle_time = current_time;
7412
7413 // Kontrola ukončení blikání
7414 if (blink_state.blink_count >= blink_state.max_blinks) {
7415 blink_state.active = false;
7416 // Nechat LED rozsvícenou na konci
7417 led_set_pixel_safe(blink_state.led_index, 255, 0, 0);
7418 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "✅ Error blink completed");
7419 }
7420 }
7421}
7422
7426void game_stop_error_blink(void) {
7427 if (blink_state.active) {
7428 blink_state.active = false;
7429 led_set_pixel_safe(blink_state.led_index, 0, 0, 0); // Vypnout LED
7430 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🛑 Error blink interrupted by user action");
7431 }
7432}
7433
7445static void game_trigger_victory_animation(player_t winner) {
7446 uint8_t king_pos = 27; // default fallback (d4)
7447 piece_t winning_king =
7448 (winner == PLAYER_WHITE) ? PIECE_WHITE_KING : PIECE_BLACK_KING;
7449
7450 // Find king position of the WINNER
7451 for (int i = 0; i < 64; i++) {
7452 int r = i / 8;
7453 int c = i % 8;
7454 if (board[r][c] == winning_king) {
7455 king_pos = i;
7456 break;
7457 }
7458 }
7459
7460 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🏆 Triggering Victory Animation for %s (King at %d)",
7461 (winner == PLAYER_WHITE) ? "White" : "Black", king_pos);
7462
7463 // Použít LED_CMD_ANIM_ENDGAME místo start_endgame_animation()
7464 // Toto volá led_anim_endgame() v led_task.c, která má správné barvy
7465 // (zelená pro vítěze, červená pro poraženého, modrá pro prázdná pole)
7466 led_command_t endgame_cmd = {
7467 .type = LED_CMD_ANIM_ENDGAME,
7468 .led_index = king_pos,
7469 .red = 0, // Barvy nejsou použity - animace si je určí sama
7470 .green = 0,
7471 .blue = 0,
7472 .duration_ms = 0, // Endless
7473 .data = NULL};
7474 led_execute_command_new(&endgame_cmd);
7475}
7476
7480void game_reset_error_recovery_state(void) {
7481 error_recovery_state.has_invalid_piece = false;
7482 error_recovery_state.waiting_for_move_correction = false;
7483 error_recovery_state.error_count = 0;
7484 error_recovery_state.invalid_row = 0;
7485 error_recovery_state.invalid_col = 0;
7486 error_recovery_state.original_valid_row = 0;
7487 error_recovery_state.original_valid_col = 0;
7488 error_recovery_state.piece_type = PIECE_EMPTY;
7489
7490 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "✅ Error recovery state reset");
7491}
7492
7493// ============================================================================
7494// PROMOTION HELPER FUNCTIONS
7495// ============================================================================
7496
7505static void game_update_promotion_anchor_led(void) {
7506 if (!promotion_state.pending) {
7507 return;
7508 }
7509
7510 uint8_t row = promotion_state.square_row;
7511 uint8_t col = promotion_state.square_col;
7512 uint8_t led_index = chess_pos_to_led_index(row, col);
7513
7514 // Pulse between purple (pending) and gold (choice/upgrade) for clarity
7515 uint32_t now_ms = (uint32_t)(esp_timer_get_time() / 1000ULL);
7516 float t = (float)(now_ms % 1000U) / 1000.0f; // 0..1
7517 float phase = t * 2.0f * 3.14159f;
7518 float mix = 0.5f + 0.5f * sinf(phase); // 0..1
7519
7520 // Purple base
7521 float pr = 128.0f, pg = 0.0f, pb = 128.0f;
7522 // Gold target
7523 float gr = 255.0f, gg = 215.0f, gb = 0.0f;
7524
7525 uint8_t r = (uint8_t)(pr * (1.0f - mix) + gr * mix);
7526 uint8_t g = (uint8_t)(pg * (1.0f - mix) + gg * mix);
7527 uint8_t b = (uint8_t)(pb * (1.0f - mix) + gb * mix);
7528
7529 led_set_pixel_safe(led_index, r, g, b);
7530}
7531
7550static void game_check_promotion_needed(void) {
7551 // Reset promotion state
7552 promotion_state.pending = false;
7553 promotion_state.square_row = 0;
7554 promotion_state.square_col = 0;
7555 promotion_state.player = current_player;
7556
7557 // Check for pawns on promotion squares
7558 for (int col = 0; col < 8; col++) {
7559 // White pawn on rank 8 (row 7)
7560 if (board[7][col] == PIECE_WHITE_PAWN) {
7561 promotion_state.pending = true;
7562 promotion_state.square_row = 7;
7563 promotion_state.square_col = col;
7564 promotion_state.player = PLAYER_WHITE;
7565 current_game_state = GAME_STATE_PROMOTION; // Set game state to PROMOTION
7566
7567 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🎯 White promotion needed at %c%d", 'a' + col, 8);
7568
7569 // Print promotion menu to UART
7570 printf("\r\n");
7571 printf("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\r"
7572 "\n");
7573 printf("👑 PAWN PROMOTION AVAILABLE!\r\n");
7574 printf("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\r"
7575 "\n");
7576 printf("📍 Square: %c%d\r\n", 'a' + col, 8);
7577 printf("🎮 Player: White\r\n");
7578 printf("\r\n");
7579 printf("🎯 Choose promotion piece:\r\n");
7580 printf("\r\n");
7581 printf("💡 PHYSICAL BUTTONS (press one):\r\n");
7582 printf(" • Button 0 (LED 64 🟢) → QUEEN (most powerful)\r\n");
7583 printf(" • Button 1 (LED 65 🟢) → ROOK\r\n");
7584 printf(" • Button 2 (LED 66 🟢) → BISHOP\r\n");
7585 printf(" • Button 3 (LED 67 🟢) → KNIGHT\r\n");
7586 printf("\r\n");
7587 printf("📝 UART COMMANDS (alternative):\r\n");
7588 printf(" • PROMOTE %c%d=Q → Queen\r\n", 'a' + col, 8);
7589 printf(" • PROMOTE %c%d=R → Rook\r\n", 'a' + col, 8);
7590 printf(" • PROMOTE %c%d=B → Bishop\r\n", 'a' + col, 8);
7591 printf(" • PROMOTE %c%d=N → Knight\r\n", 'a' + col, 8);
7592 printf("\r\n");
7593 printf("⚠️ Note: Until promotion is completed, only the promotion square "
7594 "may be touched for optional swap.\r\n");
7595 printf("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\r"
7596 "\n");
7597 printf("\r\n");
7598
7599 break;
7600 }
7601
7602 // Black pawn on rank 1 (row 0)
7603 if (board[0][col] == PIECE_BLACK_PAWN) {
7604 promotion_state.pending = true;
7605 promotion_state.square_row = 0;
7606 promotion_state.square_col = col;
7607 promotion_state.player = PLAYER_BLACK;
7608 current_game_state = GAME_STATE_PROMOTION; // Set game state to PROMOTION
7609
7610 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🎯 Black promotion needed at %c%d", 'a' + col, 1);
7611
7612 // Print promotion menu to UART
7613 printf("\r\n");
7614 printf("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\r"
7615 "\n");
7616 printf("👑 PAWN PROMOTION AVAILABLE!\r\n");
7617 printf("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\r"
7618 "\n");
7619 printf("📍 Square: %c%d\r\n", 'a' + col, 1);
7620 printf("🎮 Player: Black\r\n");
7621 printf("\r\n");
7622 printf("🎯 Choose promotion piece:\r\n");
7623 printf("\r\n");
7624 printf("💡 PHYSICAL BUTTONS (press one):\r\n");
7625 printf(" • Button 0 (LED 68 🟢) → QUEEN (most powerful)\r\n");
7626 printf(" • Button 1 (LED 69 🟢) → ROOK\r\n");
7627 printf(" • Button 2 (LED 70 🟢) → BISHOP\r\n");
7628 printf(" • Button 3 (LED 71 🟢) → KNIGHT\r\n");
7629 printf("\r\n");
7630 printf("📝 UART COMMANDS (alternative):\r\n");
7631 printf(" • PROMOTE %c%d=Q → Queen\r\n", 'a' + col, 1);
7632 printf(" • PROMOTE %c%d=R → Rook\r\n", 'a' + col, 1);
7633 printf(" • PROMOTE %c%d=B → Bishop\r\n", 'a' + col, 1);
7634 printf(" • PROMOTE %c%d=N → Knight\r\n", 'a' + col, 1);
7635 printf("\r\n");
7636 printf("⚠️ Note: Until promotion is completed, only the promotion square "
7637 "may be touched for optional swap.\r\n");
7638 printf("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\r"
7639 "\n");
7640 printf("\r\n");
7641
7642 break;
7643 }
7644 }
7645
7646 // Update LED indications for all promotion buttons
7647 if (promotion_state.pending) {
7648 if (promotion_state.player == PLAYER_WHITE) {
7649 // White promotion buttons (64-67): GREEN
7650 for (int i = 64; i <= 67; i++) {
7651 led_set_pixel_safe(i, 0, 255, 0); // Green
7652 }
7653 // Black promotion buttons (68-71): BLUE
7654 for (int i = 68; i <= 71; i++) {
7655 led_set_pixel_safe(i, 0, 0, 255); // Blue
7656 }
7657 } else {
7658 // White promotion buttons (64-67): BLUE
7659 for (int i = 64; i <= 67; i++) {
7660 led_set_pixel_safe(i, 0, 0, 255); // Blue
7661 }
7662 // Black promotion buttons (68-71): GREEN
7663 for (int i = 68; i <= 71; i++) {
7664 led_set_pixel_safe(i, 0, 255, 0); // Green
7665 }
7666 }
7667 } else {
7668 // No promotion pending - all promotion buttons BLUE
7669 for (int i = 64; i <= 71; i++) {
7670 led_set_pixel_safe(i, 0, 0, 255); // Blue
7671 }
7672 }
7673
7674 // Reset button (LED 72): Always GREEN (always active)
7675 led_set_pixel_safe(72, 0, 255, 0); // Green
7676}
7677
7692static void game_process_promotion_button(uint8_t button_id) {
7693 // #2 & #3: Atomic check with mutex
7694 // Použít recursive mutex funkce (promotion_mutex je recursive mutex)
7695 if (xSemaphoreTakeRecursive(promotion_mutex, pdMS_TO_TICKS(100)) != pdTRUE) {
7696 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "❌ Failed to acquire promotion mutex");
7697 return;
7698 }
7699
7700 // Check if promotion is pending
7701 if (!promotion_state.pending) {
7702 xSemaphoreGiveRecursive(promotion_mutex);
7703 ESP_LOGW(TAG, "⚠️ Promotion already processed");
7704 return;
7705 }
7706
7707 // Map physical button ID (0-3) to promotion choice
7708 // Physical buttons are shared between players:
7709 // - Button 0: QUEEN (both white and black)
7710 // - Button 1: ROOK (both white and black)
7711 // - Button 2: BISHOP (both white and black)
7712 // - Button 3: KNIGHT (both white and black)
7713 promotion_choice_t choice;
7714 const char *piece_name;
7715
7716 if (button_id <= 3) {
7717 // Valid physical button (0-3)
7718 choice = (promotion_choice_t)button_id;
7719 } else {
7720 xSemaphoreGiveRecursive(promotion_mutex); // Release mutex on invalid button
7721 ESP_LOGW(TAG, "⚠️ Invalid promotion button ID: %d (expected 0-3)",
7722 button_id);
7723 return;
7724 }
7725
7726 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "👑 Physical promotion button pressed: button=%d, choice=%d",
7727 button_id, choice);
7728
7729 // Get piece name
7730 switch (choice) {
7731 case PROMOTION_QUEEN:
7732 piece_name = "Queen";
7733 break;
7734 case PROMOTION_ROOK:
7735 piece_name = "Rook";
7736 break;
7737 case PROMOTION_BISHOP:
7738 piece_name = "Bishop";
7739 break;
7740 case PROMOTION_KNIGHT:
7741 piece_name = "Knight";
7742 break;
7743 default:
7744 piece_name = "Unknown";
7745 break;
7746 }
7747
7748 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "👑 Processing promotion button %d: %s", button_id, piece_name);
7749
7750 // Execute promotion
7751 if (game_execute_promotion(choice)) {
7752 // Clear promotion state (mutex already held from beginning)
7753 promotion_state.pending = false;
7754
7755 // Log success
7756 printf("\r\n");
7757 printf("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\r"
7758 "\n");
7759 printf("👑 PAWN PROMOTION SUCCESSFUL!\r\n");
7760 printf(" • Square: %c%d\r\n", 'a' + promotion_state.square_col,
7761 promotion_state.square_row + 1);
7762 printf(" • Promoted to: %s\r\n", piece_name);
7763 printf(" • Player: %s\r\n",
7764 promotion_state.player == PLAYER_WHITE ? "White" : "Black");
7765 printf("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\r"
7766 "\n");
7767 printf("\r\n");
7768
7769 // Switch to next player after promotion
7770 player_t previous_player = current_player;
7771 current_player =
7772 (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? PLAYER_BLACK : PLAYER_WHITE;
7773
7774 // Po dokončení promoce už žádná figurka není zvednutá – aby se zobrazily
7775 // movable pieces (game_highlight_movable_pieces nesmí skipnout kvůli
7776 // piece_lifted).
7777 piece_lifted = false;
7778 lifted_piece_row = 0;
7779 lifted_piece_col = 0;
7780 lifted_piece = PIECE_EMPTY;
7781
7782 // #3: Timer switch AFTER button promotion choice
7783 ESP_LOGI(
7784 TAG,
7785 "🔄 Timer switch (button promotion): ending for %s, starting for %s",
7786 previous_player == PLAYER_WHITE ? "White" : "Black",
7787 current_player == PLAYER_WHITE ? "White" : "Black");
7788 game_end_timer_move();
7789 game_start_timer_move(current_player == PLAYER_WHITE);
7790
7791 // KRITICKÉ: Endgame kontrola PŘED player change animací!
7792 // Pokud je endgame, player change se NESPOUŠTÍ
7793 game_state_t end_game_result = game_check_end_game_conditions();
7794 if (end_game_result == GAME_STATE_FINISHED) {
7795 current_game_state = GAME_STATE_FINISHED;
7796 game_active = false;
7797
7798 // Najít pozici krále vítěze pro endgame animaci
7799 player_t winner =
7800 (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? PLAYER_BLACK : PLAYER_WHITE;
7801 uint8_t king_pos = 28; // default e4
7802 for (int i = 0; i < 64; i++) {
7803 piece_t piece = board[i / 8][i % 8];
7804 if ((winner == PLAYER_WHITE && piece == PIECE_WHITE_KING) ||
7805 (winner == PLAYER_BLACK && piece == PIECE_BLACK_KING)) {
7806 king_pos = i;
7807 break;
7808 }
7809 }
7810
7811 ESP_LOGI(TAG,
7812 "🎯 Game finished after promotion! Starting endgame animation "
7813 "at position %d",
7814 king_pos);
7815
7816 // Spustit endgame animaci (wave z krále vítěze)
7817 led_command_t endgame_cmd = {.type = LED_CMD_ANIM_ENDGAME,
7818 .led_index = king_pos,
7819 .red = 255,
7820 .green = 255,
7821 .blue = 0, // Yellow
7822 .duration_ms = 0, // Endless
7823 .data = NULL};
7824 led_execute_command_new(&endgame_cmd);
7825
7826 ESP_LOGI(
7827 TAG,
7828 "✅ Endgame animation started - player change animation SKIPPED");
7829 } else {
7830 // Není endgame - spustit player change animaci
7831 uint8_t player_color =
7832 (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? 1 : 0; // 1=white, 0=black
7833 led_command_t player_change_cmd = {
7834 .type = LED_CMD_ANIM_PLAYER_CHANGE, // Použít
7835 // ANIM_PLAYER_CHANGE místo
7836 // PLAYER_CHANGE
7837 .led_index = 0,
7838 .red = 0,
7839 .green = 0,
7840 .blue = 0,
7841 .duration_ms = 0,
7842 .data = &player_color // Předat barvu hráče
7843 };
7844 led_execute_command_new(&player_change_cmd);
7845
7846 // Update LED indications
7847 game_check_promotion_needed();
7848 game_highlight_movable_pieces();
7849 led_force_immediate_update(); // Commit highlight so movable pieces show
7850 // right after player change animation
7851 }
7852
7853 // Zkontrolovat, zda je nový hráč v šachu
7854 bool in_check = game_is_king_in_check(current_player);
7855 if (in_check) {
7856 // Najít pozici krále
7857 int king_row = -1, king_col = -1;
7858 piece_t king_piece = (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? PIECE_WHITE_KING
7859 : PIECE_BLACK_KING;
7860 for (int row = 0; row < 8; row++) {
7861 for (int col = 0; col < 8; col++) {
7862 if (board[row][col] == king_piece) {
7863 king_row = row;
7864 king_col = col;
7865 break;
7866 }
7867 }
7868 if (king_row != -1)
7869 break;
7870 }
7871
7872 if (king_row != -1 && king_col != -1) {
7873 if (game_led_guidance_show_check_anim()) {
7874 uint8_t king_led_index = chess_pos_to_led_index(king_row, king_col);
7875 // Spustit check animaci - růžové svícení na králi
7876 led_command_t check_cmd = {.type = LED_CMD_ANIM_CHECK,
7877 .led_index = king_led_index,
7878 .red = 0,
7879 .green = 0,
7880 .blue = 0,
7881 .duration_ms =
7882 0, // Trvalé až do dalšího tahu
7883 .data = NULL};
