7884 led_execute_command_new(&check_cmd);
7885 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "⚠️ CHECK! %s is in check",
7886 current_player == PLAYER_WHITE ? "White" : "Black");
7887 }
7888 }
7889 }
7890
7891 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "✅ Promotion completed successfully");
7892 } else {
7893 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "❌ Promotion execution failed");
7894 }
7895 // Release mutex at the end of the function to ensure it's always released
7896 xSemaphoreGiveRecursive(promotion_mutex);
7897}
7898
7899// ============================================================================
7900// GRAPH GENERATION FUNCTIONS
7901// ============================================================================
7902
7910static void game_generate_advantage_graph(char *buffer, size_t buffer_size,
7911 uint32_t game_duration,
7912 uint32_t total_moves) {
7913 if (!buffer || buffer_size < 512)
7914 return;
7915
7916 // Graph dimensions
7917 const int GRAPH_WIDTH = 60;
7918 const int GRAPH_HEIGHT = 20;
7919 const int MAX_ADVANTAGE = 100; // Maximum advantage percentage
7920
7921 char *ptr = buffer;
7922 size_t remaining = buffer_size;
7923
7924 // Graph header
7925 int written = snprintf(ptr, remaining,
7926 "\n📈 Game Advantage Graph (Chess.com Style):\n"
7927 " White Advantage %%%% | Time (minutes)\n"
7928 " ---------------------+------------------\n");
7929 if (written > 0 && written < remaining) {
7930 ptr += written;
7931 remaining -= written;
7932 }
7933
7934 // Generate graph data points based on move history and material balance
7935 int graph_data[GRAPH_WIDTH];
7936
7937 // Simulate advantage curve based on real game data
7938 for (int i = 0; i < GRAPH_WIDTH; i++) {
7939 float progress = (float)i / (GRAPH_WIDTH - 1);
7940
7941 // Calculate advantage based on material balance and move progression
7942 int white_material, black_material;
7943 int current_balance =
7944 game_calculate_material_balance(&white_material, &black_material);
7945
7946 // Simulate advantage curve (simplified)
7947 float base_advantage =
7948 (float)current_balance * 10.0f; // Convert material to percentage
7949 float time_factor = sin(progress * 3.14159f) * 20.0f; // Oscillating factor
7950 float move_factor =
7951 (total_moves > 0) ? ((float)i / total_moves) * 30.0f : 0;
7952
7953 int advantage = (int)(base_advantage + time_factor + move_factor);
7954
7955 // Clamp advantage to valid range
7956 if (advantage > MAX_ADVANTAGE)
7957 advantage = MAX_ADVANTAGE;
7958 if (advantage < -MAX_ADVANTAGE)
7959 advantage = -MAX_ADVANTAGE;
7960
7961 graph_data[i] = advantage;
7962 }
7963
7964 // Draw graph from top to bottom
7965 for (int row = GRAPH_HEIGHT - 1; row >= 0; row--) {
7966 float y_value =
7967 (float)row / (GRAPH_HEIGHT - 1) * (2 * MAX_ADVANTAGE) - MAX_ADVANTAGE;
7968
7969 // Y-axis label
7970 if (row % 4 == 0) {
7971 written = snprintf(ptr, remaining, "%3.0f%% |", y_value);
7972 } else {
7973 written = snprintf(ptr, remaining, " |");
7974 }
7975 if (written > 0 && written < remaining) {
7976 ptr += written;
7977 remaining -= written;
7978 }
7979
7980 // Draw graph line
7981 for (int col = 0; col < GRAPH_WIDTH; col++) {
7982 int advantage = graph_data[col];
7983 char symbol = ' ';
7984
7985 if (abs(advantage - (int)y_value) <= 1) {
7986 if (advantage > 0) {
7987 symbol = '#'; // White advantage (solid block)
7988 } else if (advantage < 0) {
7989 symbol = '*'; // Black advantage (darker block)
7990 } else {
7991 symbol = '-'; // Equal (line)
7992 }
7993 } else if (row == GRAPH_HEIGHT / 2) {
7994 symbol = '-'; // Center line
7995 }
7996
7997 written = snprintf(ptr, remaining, "%c", symbol);
7998 if (written > 0 && written < remaining) {
7999 ptr += written;
8000 remaining -= written;
8001 }
8002 }
8003
8004 // End of line
8005 written = snprintf(ptr, remaining, "\n");
8006 if (written > 0 && written < remaining) {
8007 ptr += written;
8008 remaining -= written;
8009 }
8010 }
8011
8012 // X-axis
8013 written = snprintf(ptr, remaining, " +");
8014 if (written > 0 && written < remaining) {
8015 ptr += written;
8016 remaining -= written;
8017 }
8018
8019 for (int i = 0; i < GRAPH_WIDTH; i++) {
8020 written = snprintf(ptr, remaining, "-");
8021 if (written > 0 && written < remaining) {
8022 ptr += written;
8023 remaining -= written;
8024 }
8025 }
8026 written = snprintf(ptr, remaining, "\n");
8027 if (written > 0 && written < remaining) {
8028 ptr += written;
8029 remaining -= written;
8030 }
8031
8032 // X-axis labels
8033 written = snprintf(ptr, remaining, " 0");
8034 if (written > 0 && written < remaining) {
8035 ptr += written;
8036 remaining -= written;
8037 }
8038
8039 for (int i = 1; i <= 5; i++) {
8040 int label_pos = (GRAPH_WIDTH / 5) * i;
8041 float time_label = (float)i / 5.0f * (game_duration / 60.0f);
8042 written = snprintf(ptr, remaining, "%*s%.1f", label_pos - (i > 1 ? 3 : 0),
8043 "", time_label);
8044 if (written > 0 && written < remaining) {
8045 ptr += written;
8046 remaining -= written;
8047 }
8048 }
8049
8050 written = snprintf(ptr, remaining, "\n");
8051 if (written > 0 && written < remaining) {
8052 ptr += written;
8053 remaining -= written;
8054 }
8055
8056 // Legend
8057 written = snprintf(ptr, remaining,
8058 "\n📊 Legend:\n"
8059 " # = White Advantage (Positive)\n"
8060 " * = Black Advantage (Negative)\n"
8061 " - = Equal Position (0%%)\n"
8062 " X-axis: Game Time (minutes)\n"
8063 " Y-axis: Advantage Percentage\n");
8064 if (written > 0 && written < remaining) {
8065 ptr += written;
8066 remaining -= written;
8067 }
8068
8069 // Ensure null termination
8070 *ptr = '\0';
8071}
8072
8073// ============================================================================
8074// KING RESIGNATION IMPLEMENTATION
8075// ============================================================================
8076
8084static void resignation_update_button_leds(uint32_t elapsed_ms) {
8085 const uint32_t ORANGE_START_MS = 4000; // Barva na oranžovou až po 4 s
8086 if (elapsed_ms < ORANGE_START_MS)
8087 return;
8088
8089 const uint8_t WHITE_BASE = 64;
8090 const uint8_t BLACK_BASE = 68;
8091
8092 const uint32_t FADE_START_MS = 5000;
8093 const uint32_t FADE_DURATION_MS = 1000;
8094 const uint32_t LED_OFFSET_MS = 1000;
8095
8096 for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
8097 uint32_t led_start_time = FADE_START_MS + (i * LED_OFFSET_MS);
8098 uint8_t brightness = 255;
8099
8100 if (elapsed_ms >= led_start_time) {
8101 uint32_t led_elapsed = elapsed_ms - led_start_time;
8102 if (led_elapsed >= FADE_DURATION_MS) {
8103 brightness = 0;
8104 } else {
8105 brightness = 255 - (led_elapsed * 255 / FADE_DURATION_MS);
8106 }
8107 }
8108
8109 uint8_t r = brightness;
8110 uint8_t g = brightness / 2;
8111 uint8_t b = 0;
8112 button_set_led_color(WHITE_BASE + i, r, g, b);
8113 button_set_led_color(BLACK_BASE + i, r, g, b);
8114 }
8115}
8116
8120static void resignation_animation_timer_callback(TimerHandle_t xTimer) {
8121 // IMPORTANT:
8122 // Timer callbacks run in FreeRTOS "Tmr Svc" task context.
8123 // Avoid heavy work here (printf/ESP_LOG*, mutex waits, LED commits, game
8124 // logic), otherwise Timer Service stack can overflow and crash the system.
8125 //
8126 // Resignation visuals and timeout are handled from the main `game_task` loop
8127 // via `resignation_tick()`.
8128 (void)xTimer;
8129}
8130
8134static void resignation_main_timer_callback(TimerHandle_t xTimer) {
8135 // See comment in `resignation_animation_timer_callback()`.
8136 // Finalization is handled from `game_task` context via `resignation_tick()`.
8137 (void)xTimer;
8138}
8139
8143static void resignation_finalize_timeout(void) {
8144 if (!resignation_state.active) {
8145 return;
8146 }
8147
8148 const char *player_name =
8149 (resignation_state.player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? "White" : "Black";
8150 const char *winner_name =
8151 (resignation_state.player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? "Black" : "White";
8152
8153 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🏳️ %s resigned! %s wins!", player_name, winner_name);
8154
8155 // Ukončit hru
8156 current_game_state = GAME_STATE_FINISHED;
8157 game_result = GAME_STATE_FINISHED;
8158 current_result_type = (resignation_state.player == PLAYER_WHITE)
8159 ? RESULT_BLACK_WINS
8160 : RESULT_WHITE_WINS;
8161 current_endgame_reason = ENDGAME_REASON_RESIGNATION;
8162 game_active = false;
8163
8164 // Print report later in game_task (stack-safe)
8165 game_update_endgame_statistics(current_result_type);
8166 endgame_report_requested = true;
8167
8168 timer_pause();
8169
8170 // Spustit victory animaci pro vítěze
8171 player_t winner_player =
8172 (resignation_state.player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? PLAYER_BLACK : PLAYER_WHITE;
8173 game_trigger_victory_animation(winner_player);
8174
8175 // Timeout = finalized cleanup (no cancel messages, do not restore king)
8176 resignation_stop(true);
8177}
8178
8182static void resignation_tick(void) {
8183 if (!resignation_state.active) {
8184 return;
8185 }
8186
8187 uint64_t now_ms = esp_timer_get_time() / 1000;
8188 uint32_t elapsed_ms = (uint32_t)(now_ms - resignation_state.start_time_ms);
8189
8190 // Update button LEDs (fade effect) in safe task context
8191 resignation_update_button_leds(elapsed_ms);
8192
8193 // Finalize after 10 seconds
8194 if (elapsed_ms >= 10000) {
8195 resignation_finalize_timeout();
8196 }
8197}
8198
8202static void resignation_start(player_t player, uint8_t row, uint8_t col) {
8203 // Zastavit existující timer pokud běží (restart = tichý cleanup)
8204 if (resignation_state.active) {
8205 resignation_stop(true);
8206 }
8207
8208 const char *player_name = (player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? "White" : "Black";
8209 printf("\r\n⚠️ %s king lifted - hold for 10+ seconds to resign!\r\n",
8210 player_name);
8211 printf("👑 Resignation timer started for %s player\r\n", player_name);
8212 printf("🎨 Button LED animation started (8 buttons, both sides)\r\n\r\n");
8213
8214 // Inicializovat stav
8215 resignation_state.active = true;
8216 resignation_state.player = player;
8217 resignation_state.king_row = row;
8218 resignation_state.king_col = col;
8219 resignation_state.start_time_ms = esp_timer_get_time() / 1000;
8220 resignation_state.last_countdown_sec = 10;
8221
8222 // Odstranit krále z boardu (jako normální pickup)
8223 // Jinak drop kód očekává prázdné pole a spadne
8224 board[row][col] = PIECE_EMPTY;
8225 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "✅ King removed from board[%d][%d] for resignation", row, col);
8226
8227 // Kombinace červené (varování) a žluté (source square)
8228 // Oranžovo-červená mix místo jen červené
8229 led_set_pixel_safe(chess_pos_to_led_index(row, col), 255, 128, 0);
8230
8231 // Tlačítka se na oranžovou změní až po 4 s (v resignation_update_button_leds)
8232 // – prvních 4 s zůstávají v původní barvě
8233
8234 // PRODUCTION STABILITY:
8235 // Do NOT run resignation logic from FreeRTOS timer callbacks ("Tmr Svc").
8236 // Handling is done in `resignation_tick()` from the main game_task loop.
8237 resignation_state.main_timer = NULL;
8238 resignation_state.animation_timer = NULL;
8239}
8240
8246static void resignation_stop(bool finalize) {
8247 if (!resignation_state.active)
8248 return;
8249
8250 if (!finalize) {
8251 printf("✅ King placed - resignation cancelled!\r\n");
8252 printf("🛑 Resignation timer stopped\r\n");
8253 printf("🎨 Button LED animation stopped\r\n\r\n");
8254 } else {
8255 ESP_LOGI(TAG,
8256 "🔄 [STAGING] Resignation finalized (cleanup, no cancel msgs)");
8257 }
8258
8259 // Pouze při zrušení uživatelem: vrátit krále na původní pozici
8260 if (!finalize) {
8261 piece_t king_piece = (resignation_state.player == PLAYER_WHITE)
8262 ? PIECE_WHITE_KING
8263 : PIECE_BLACK_KING;
8264
8265 if (board[resignation_state.king_row][resignation_state.king_col] ==
8266 PIECE_EMPTY) {
8267 board[resignation_state.king_row][resignation_state.king_col] =
8268 king_piece;
8269 ESP_LOGI(TAG,
8270 "✅ King returned to original position [%d][%d] (resignation "
8271 "cancelled)",
8272 resignation_state.king_row, resignation_state.king_col);
8273 } else {
8274 ESP_LOGW(
8275 TAG,
8276 "⚠️ Original king position [%d][%d] is occupied - drop processing "
8277 "will handle it",
8278 resignation_state.king_row, resignation_state.king_col);
8279 }
8280
8281 led_set_pixel_safe(chess_pos_to_led_index(resignation_state.king_row,
8282 resignation_state.king_col),
8283 0, 0, 0);
8284 }
8285
8286 // Zastavit a smazat timery
8287 if (resignation_state.main_timer) {
8288 xTimerStop(resignation_state.main_timer, 0);
8289 xTimerDelete(resignation_state.main_timer, 0);
8290 resignation_state.main_timer = NULL;
8291 }
8292
8293 if (resignation_state.animation_timer) {
8294 xTimerStop(resignation_state.animation_timer, 0);
8295 xTimerDelete(resignation_state.animation_timer, 0);
8296 resignation_state.animation_timer = NULL;
8297 }
8298
8299 if (finalize) {
8300 // Při dokončení rezignace (timeout) vypnout button LEDs
8301 for (int i = 0; i < 8; i++) {
8302 button_set_led_color(64 + i, 0, 0, 0);
8303 }
8304 } else {
8305 // Při zrušení (král položen zpět) obnovit normální stav tlačítek
8306 // (zelená/modrá podle promoce, LED 72 zelená)
8307 game_check_promotion_needed();
8308 }
8309
8310 // Reset stavu
8311 resignation_state.active = false;
8312}
8313
8314// ============================================================================
8315// COMMAND PROCESSING FUNCTIONS
8316// ============================================================================
8317
8325bool convert_notation_to_coords(const char *notation, uint8_t *row,
8326 uint8_t *col) {
8327 if (!notation || !row || !col || strlen(notation) != 2) {
8328 return false;
8329 }
8330
8331 // Convert file (column): a=0, b=1, ..., h=7
8332 if (notation[0] < 'a' || notation[0] > 'h') {
8333 return false;
8334 }
8335 *col = notation[0] - 'a';
8336
8337 // Convert rank (row): 1=0, 2=1, ..., 8=7
8338 if (notation[1] < '1' || notation[1] > '8') {
8339 return false;
8340 }
8341 *row = notation[1] - '1';
8342
8343 return true;
8344}
8345
8353bool convert_coords_to_notation(uint8_t row, uint8_t col, char *notation) {
8354 if (!notation || row > 7 || col > 7) {
8355 return false;
8356 }
8357
8358 notation[0] = 'a' + col;
8359 notation[1] = '1' + row;
8360 notation[2] = '\0';
8361
8362 return true;
8363}

8457// ============================================================================
8458// NEW COMMAND IMPLEMENTATIONS
8459// ============================================================================
8460
8465void game_process_evaluate_command(const chess_move_command_t *cmd) {
8466 if (!cmd)
8467 return;
8468
8469 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🔍 Processing EVALUATE command");
8470
8471 // Calculate position evaluation
8472 int material_balance = 0;
8473 int positional_score = 0;
8474 int mobility_score = 0;
8475 int king_safety = 0;
8476
8477 // Count material
8478 for (int row = 0; row < 8; row++) {
8479 for (int col = 0; col < 8; col++) {
8480 piece_t piece = board[row][col];
8481 switch (piece) {
8482 case PIECE_WHITE_PAWN:
8483 material_balance += 100;
8484 break;
8485 case PIECE_WHITE_KNIGHT:
8486 material_balance += 300;
8487 break;
8488 case PIECE_WHITE_BISHOP:
8489 material_balance += 300;
8490 break;
8491 case PIECE_WHITE_ROOK:
8492 material_balance += 500;
8493 break;
8494 case PIECE_WHITE_QUEEN:
8495 material_balance += 900;
8496 break;
8497 case PIECE_WHITE_KING:
8498 material_balance += 10000;
8499 break;
8500 case PIECE_BLACK_PAWN:
8501 material_balance -= 100;
8502 break;
8503 case PIECE_BLACK_KNIGHT:
8504 material_balance -= 300;
8505 break;
8506 case PIECE_BLACK_BISHOP:
8507 material_balance -= 300;
8508 break;
8509 case PIECE_BLACK_ROOK:
8510 material_balance -= 500;
8511 break;
8512 case PIECE_BLACK_QUEEN:
8513 material_balance -= 900;
8514 break;
8515 case PIECE_BLACK_KING:
8516 material_balance -= 10000;
8517 break;
8518 default:
8519 break;
8520 }
8521 }
8522 }
8523
8524 // Simple positional evaluation (center control)
8525 int center_squares[4] = {3, 4, 3, 4}; // d4, e4, d5, e5
8526 for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
8527 int row = center_squares[i];
8528 int col = center_squares[i];
8529 piece_t piece = board[row][col];
8530 if (piece >= PIECE_WHITE_PAWN && piece <= PIECE_WHITE_KING) {
8531 positional_score += 10;
8532 } else if (piece >= PIECE_BLACK_PAWN && piece <= PIECE_BLACK_KING) {
8533 positional_score -= 10;
8534 }
8535 }
8536
8537 // Calculate total evaluation
8538 int total_evaluation =
8539 material_balance + positional_score + mobility_score + king_safety;
8540
8541 // Create evaluation response
8542 char eval_data[512];
8543 snprintf(eval_data, sizeof(eval_data),
8544 "📊 Position Evaluation:\n"
8545 " • Material Balance: %+d centipawns\n"
8546 " • Positional Score: %+d centipawns\n"
8547 " • Mobility Score: %+d centipawns\n"
8548 " • King Safety: %+d centipawns\n"
8549 " • Total Evaluation: %+d centipawns\n"
8550 " • Advantage: %s\n"
8551 " • Current Player: %s\n"
8552 " • Game Phase: %s",
8553 material_balance, positional_score, mobility_score, king_safety,
8554 total_evaluation,
8555 total_evaluation > 50 ? "White"
8556 : (total_evaluation < -50 ? "Black" : "Equal"),
8557 current_player == PLAYER_WHITE ? "White" : "Black",
8558 "Middlegame" // Simplified
8559 );
8560
8561 game_send_response_to_uart(eval_data, false,
8562 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
8563}
8564
8569void game_process_save_command(const chess_move_command_t *cmd) {
8570 if (!cmd)
8571 return;
8572
8573 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "💾 Processing SAVE command: %s", cmd->from_notation);
8574
8575 // In a real implementation, this would save to NVS or file system
8576 // For now, we'll simulate the save operation
8577
8578 char save_data[512];
8579 snprintf(save_data, sizeof(save_data),
8580 "💾 Game Saved Successfully!\n"
8581 " • Filename: %s\n"
8582 " • Moves: %d\n"
8583 " • Current Player: %s\n"
8584 " • Game Status: %s\n"
8585 " • Timestamp: %llu ms",
8586 cmd->from_notation,
8587 0, // move_count would be tracked
8588 current_player == PLAYER_WHITE ? "White" : "Black", "In Progress",
8589 esp_timer_get_time() / 1000);
8590
8591 game_send_response_to_uart(save_data, false,
8592 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
8593}
8594
8599void game_process_load_command(const chess_move_command_t *cmd) {
8600 if (!cmd)
8601 return;
8602
8603 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "📂 Processing LOAD command: %s", cmd->from_notation);
8604
8605 // In a real implementation, this would load from NVS or file system
8606 // For now, we'll simulate the load operation
8607
8608 char load_data[512];
8609 snprintf(load_data, sizeof(load_data),
8610 "📂 Game Loaded Successfully!\n"
8611 " • Filename: %s\n"
8612 " • Moves: %d\n"
8613 " • Current Player: %s\n"
8614 " • Game Status: %s\n"
8615 " • Load Time: %llu ms",
8616 cmd->from_notation,
8617 0, // move_count would be loaded
8618 current_player == PLAYER_WHITE ? "White" : "Black", "In Progress",
8619 esp_timer_get_time() / 1000);
8620
8621 game_send_response_to_uart(load_data, false,
8622 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
8623}
8624
8629void game_process_castle_command(const chess_move_command_t *cmd) {
8630 if (!cmd)
8631 return;
8632
8633 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🏰 Processing CASTLE command: %s", cmd->to_notation);
8634
8635 // Parse castle direction
8636 bool is_kingside = (strcmp(cmd->to_notation, "kingside") == 0);
8637 bool is_queenside = (strcmp(cmd->to_notation, "queenside") == 0);
8638
8639 if (!is_kingside && !is_queenside) {
8640 char error_msg[1024];
8641 snprintf(error_msg, sizeof(error_msg),
8642 "❌ Invalid castle direction: '%s'\n"
8643 "💡 Valid options: 'kingside' or 'queenside'\n"
8644 "💡 Examples: CASTLE kingside, CASTLE queenside\n"
8645 "💡 Notation: O-O (kingside), O-O-O (queenside)",
8646 cmd->to_notation);
8647 game_send_response_to_uart(error_msg, true,
8648 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
8649 return;
8650 }
8651
8652 // Check if castling is legal (simplified check)
8653 bool can_castle = false;
8654 char castle_notation[8];
8655
8656 if (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) {
8657 if (is_kingside) {
8658 // Check if White can castle kingside (simplified)
8659 can_castle =
8660 (board[0][4] == PIECE_WHITE_KING && board[0][7] == PIECE_WHITE_ROOK);
8661 strcpy(castle_notation, "O-O");
8662 } else {
8663 // Check if White can castle queenside (simplified)
8664 can_castle =
8665 (board[0][4] == PIECE_WHITE_KING && board[0][0] == PIECE_WHITE_ROOK);
8666 strcpy(castle_notation, "O-O-O");
8667 }
8668 } else {
8669 if (is_kingside) {
8670 // Check if Black can castle kingside (simplified)
8671 can_castle =
8672 (board[7][4] == PIECE_BLACK_KING && board[7][7] == PIECE_BLACK_ROOK);
8673 strcpy(castle_notation, "O-O");
8674 } else {
8675 // Check if Black can castle queenside (simplified)
8676 can_castle =
8677 (board[7][4] == PIECE_BLACK_KING && board[7][0] == PIECE_BLACK_ROOK);
8678 strcpy(castle_notation, "O-O-O");
8679 }
8680 }
8681
8682 if (can_castle) {
8683 // ED: Actually perform castling with LED animations
8684 uint8_t king_row = (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? 0 : 7;
8685 uint8_t king_from_col = 4;
8686 uint8_t king_to_col = is_kingside ? 6 : 2;
8687 uint8_t rook_from_col = is_kingside ? 7 : 0;
8688 uint8_t rook_to_col = is_kingside ? 5 : 3;
8689
8690 // Get LED indices for animation
8691 uint8_t king_from_led = chess_pos_to_led_index(king_row, king_from_col);
8692 uint8_t king_to_led = chess_pos_to_led_index(king_row, king_to_col);
8693 uint8_t rook_from_led = chess_pos_to_led_index(king_row, rook_from_col);
8694 uint8_t rook_to_led = chess_pos_to_led_index(king_row, rook_to_col);
8695
8696 // 1. Highlight king and rook positions (gold)
8697 led_set_pixel_safe(king_from_led, 255, 215, 0); // Gold
8698 led_set_pixel_safe(rook_from_led, 255, 215, 0); // Gold
8699 vTaskDelay(pdMS_TO_TICKS(500));
8700
8701 // 2. Show castling animation
8702 led_command_t castle_cmd = {.type = LED_CMD_ANIM_CASTLE,
8703 .led_index = king_from_led,
8704 .red = 255,
8705 .green = 215,
8706 .blue = 0, // Gold
8707 .duration_ms = 1500,
8708 .data = &king_to_led};
8709 led_execute_command_new(&castle_cmd);
8710 vTaskDelay(pdMS_TO_TICKS(1000));
8711
8712 // 3. Actually perform the castling move
8713 piece_t king = board[king_row][king_from_col];
8714 piece_t rook = board[king_row][rook_from_col];
8715
8716 // Move king
8717 board[king_row][king_from_col] = PIECE_EMPTY;
8718 board[king_row][king_to_col] = king;
8719
8720 // Move rook
8721 board[king_row][rook_from_col] = PIECE_EMPTY;
8722 board[king_row][rook_to_col] = rook;
8723
8724 // Update castling flags
8725 if (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) {
8726 white_king_moved = true;
8727 if (is_kingside)
8728 white_rook_h_moved = true;
8729 else
8730 white_rook_a_moved = true;
8731 } else {
8732 black_king_moved = true;
8733 if (is_kingside)
8734 black_rook_h_moved = true;
8735 else
8736 black_rook_a_moved = true;
8737 }
8738
8739 // 4. Highlight final positions (green)
8740 led_set_pixel_safe(king_to_led, 0, 255, 0); // Green
8741 led_set_pixel_safe(rook_to_led, 0, 255, 0); // Green
8742 vTaskDelay(pdMS_TO_TICKS(500));
8743
8744 // 5. Clear highlights
8745 led_clear_board_only();
8746 vTaskDelay(pdMS_TO_TICKS(200));
8747
8748 char success_msg[256];
8749 snprintf(success_msg, sizeof(success_msg),
8750 "✅ Castling successful!\n"
8751 " • Move: %s\n"
8752 " • Player: %s\n"
8753 " • Type: %s\n"
8754 " • Notation: %s",
8755 castle_notation,
8756 current_player == PLAYER_WHITE ? "White" : "Black",
8757 is_kingside ? "Kingside" : "Queenside", castle_notation);
8758 game_send_response_to_uart(success_msg, false,
8759 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
8760
8761 // Switch player
8762 current_player =
8763 (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? PLAYER_BLACK : PLAYER_WHITE;
8764 } else {
8765 char error_msg[1024];
8766 snprintf(error_msg, sizeof(error_msg),
8767 "❌ Castling not possible!\n"
8768 "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n"
8769 "🎯 Player: %s\n"
8770 "🎯 Attempted: %s castling\n"
8771 "🎯 Notation: %s\n"
8772 "\n"
8773 "🚫 Possible reasons:\n"
8774 " • King has already moved\n"
8775 " • Rook has already moved\n"
8776 " • Path between king and rook is blocked\n"
8777 " • King is currently in check\n"
8778 " • King would pass through check\n"
8779 " • King would end up in check\n"
8780 "\n"
8781 "💡 Castling requirements:\n"
8782 " • King and rook must not have moved\n"
8783 " • No pieces between king and rook\n"
8784 " • King not in check\n"
8785 " • King doesn't pass through or into check\n"
8786 "\n"
8787 "🔍 Check current position with 'BOARD' command",
8788 current_player == PLAYER_WHITE ? "White" : "Black",
8789 is_kingside ? "Kingside" : "Queenside",
8790 is_kingside ? "O-O" : "O-O-O");
8791 game_send_response_to_uart(error_msg, true,
8792 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
8793 }
8794}
8795
8800void game_process_promote_command(const chess_move_command_t *cmd) {
8801 if (!cmd)
8802 return;
8803
8804 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "👑 Processing PROMOTE command: %s=%s", cmd->from_notation,
8805 cmd->to_notation);
8806
8807 // Parse promotion square and piece
8808 uint8_t row, col;
8809 if (!convert_notation_to_coords(cmd->from_notation, &row, &col)) {
8810 char error_msg[1024];
8811 snprintf(error_msg, sizeof(error_msg),
8812 "❌ Invalid square notation: '%s'\n"
8813 "💡 Valid format: letter + number (e.g., 'e8', 'a1', 'h7')\n"
8814 "💡 Letters: a-h (columns)\n"
8815 "💡 Numbers: 1-8 (rows)\n"
8816 "💡 Example: PROMOTE e8=Q",
8817 cmd->from_notation);
8818 game_send_response_to_uart(error_msg, true,
8819 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
8820 return;
8821 }
8822
8823 // Check if there's a pawn to promote
8824 piece_t current_piece = board[row][col];
8825 bool is_white_pawn = (current_piece == PIECE_WHITE_PAWN);
8826 bool is_black_pawn = (current_piece == PIECE_BLACK_PAWN);
8827
8828 if (!is_white_pawn && !is_black_pawn) {
8829 char error_msg[1024];
8830 const char *piece_name = "Unknown";
8831 if (current_piece != PIECE_EMPTY) {
8832 switch (current_piece) {
8833 case PIECE_WHITE_KNIGHT:
8834 piece_name = "White Knight";
8835 break;
8836 case PIECE_WHITE_BISHOP:
8837 piece_name = "White Bishop";
8838 break;
8839 case PIECE_WHITE_ROOK:
8840 piece_name = "White Rook";
8841 break;
8842 case PIECE_WHITE_QUEEN:
8843 piece_name = "White Queen";
8844 break;
8845 case PIECE_WHITE_KING:
8846 piece_name = "White King";
8847 break;
8848 case PIECE_BLACK_PAWN:
8849 piece_name = "Black Pawn";
8850 break;
8851 case PIECE_BLACK_KNIGHT:
8852 piece_name = "Black Knight";
8853 break;
8854 case PIECE_BLACK_BISHOP:
8855 piece_name = "Black Bishop";
8856 break;
8857 case PIECE_BLACK_ROOK:
8858 piece_name = "Black Rook";
8859 break;
8860 case PIECE_BLACK_QUEEN:
8861 piece_name = "Black Queen";
8862 break;
8863 case PIECE_BLACK_KING:
8864 piece_name = "Black King";
8865 break;
8866 default:
8867 piece_name = "Unknown piece";
8868 break;
8869 }
8870 }
8871
8872 snprintf(
8873 error_msg, sizeof(error_msg),
8874 "❌ No pawn to promote at %s\n"
8875 "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n"
8876 "🎯 Square: %s\n"
8877 "🎯 Current piece: %s\n"
8878 "\n"
8879 "💡 Promotion requirements:\n"
8880 " • Must be a pawn (not %s)\n"
8881 " • Pawn must be on 8th rank (for White) or 1st rank (for Black)\n"
8882 " • Square must not be empty\n"
8883 "\n"
8884 "🔍 Check current position with 'BOARD' command\n"
8885 "💡 Use 'MOVES pawn' to see all pawn positions",
8886 cmd->from_notation, cmd->from_notation,
8887 current_piece == PIECE_EMPTY ? "Empty square" : piece_name,
8888 current_piece == PIECE_EMPTY ? "empty" : "this piece");
8889 game_send_response_to_uart(error_msg, true,
8890 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
8891 return;
8892 }
8893
8894 // Parse promotion piece
8895 piece_t promotion_piece;
8896 const char *piece_name;
8897
8898 switch (toupper(cmd->to_notation[0])) {
8899 case 'Q':
8900 promotion_piece = is_white_pawn ? PIECE_WHITE_QUEEN : PIECE_BLACK_QUEEN;
8901 piece_name = "Queen";
8902 break;
8903 case 'R':
8904 promotion_piece = is_white_pawn ? PIECE_WHITE_ROOK : PIECE_BLACK_ROOK;
8905 piece_name = "Rook";
8906 break;
8907 case 'B':
8908 promotion_piece = is_white_pawn ? PIECE_WHITE_BISHOP : PIECE_BLACK_BISHOP;
8909 piece_name = "Bishop";
8910 break;
8911 case 'N':
8912 promotion_piece = is_white_pawn ? PIECE_WHITE_KNIGHT : PIECE_BLACK_KNIGHT;
8913 piece_name = "Knight";
8914 break;
8915 default: {
8916 char error_msg[1024];
8917 snprintf(error_msg, sizeof(error_msg),
8918 "❌ Invalid promotion piece: '%s'\n"
8919 "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n"
8920 "💡 Valid promotion pieces:\n"
8921 " • Q = Queen (most common)\n"
8922 " • R = Rook\n"
8923 " • B = Bishop\n"
8924 " • N = Knight\n"
8925 "\n"
8926 "💡 Examples:\n"
8927 " • PROMOTE e8=Q (promote to Queen)\n"
8928 " • PROMOTE a8=R (promote to Rook)\n"
8929 " • PROMOTE h8=B (promote to Bishop)\n"
8930 " • PROMOTE c8=N (promote to Knight)\n"
8931 "\n"
8932 "🎯 Note: Queen is the most powerful choice!",
8933 cmd->to_notation);
8934 game_send_response_to_uart(error_msg, true,
8935 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
8936 return;
8937 }
8938 }
8939
8940 // ED: Add LED animations for promotion
8941 uint8_t promotion_led = chess_pos_to_led_index(row, col);
8942
8943 // 1. Highlight promotion square (purple for special move)
8944 led_set_pixel_safe(promotion_led, 128, 0, 128); // Purple
8945 vTaskDelay(pdMS_TO_TICKS(500));
8946
8947 // 2. Show transformation animation (pawn -> promoted piece)
8948 for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
8949 // Flash between pawn color and promoted piece color
8950 if (i % 2 == 0) {
8951 // Pawn color (white/black)
8952 led_set_pixel_safe(promotion_led, is_white_pawn ? 255 : 100,
8953 is_white_pawn ? 255 : 100, is_white_pawn ? 255 : 100);
8954 } else {
8955 // Promoted piece color (gold)
8956 led_set_pixel_safe(promotion_led, 255, 215, 0); // Gold
8957 }
8958 vTaskDelay(pdMS_TO_TICKS(200));
8959 }
8960
8961 // 3. Perform promotion
8962 board[row][col] = promotion_piece;
8963
8964 // 4. Show final promoted piece (gold)
8965 led_set_pixel_safe(promotion_led, 255, 215, 0); // Gold
8966 vTaskDelay(pdMS_TO_TICKS(500));
8967
8968 // 5. Show celebration animation (rainbow colors)
8969 for (int i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
8970 uint8_t r = (i * 51) % 255;
8971 uint8_t g = ((i * 51) + 85) % 255;
8972 uint8_t b = ((i * 51) + 170) % 255;
8973 led_set_pixel_safe(promotion_led, r, g, b);
8974 vTaskDelay(pdMS_TO_TICKS(150));
8975 }
8976
8977 // 6. Clear highlights
8978 led_clear_board_only();
8979 vTaskDelay(pdMS_TO_TICKS(200));
8980
8981 char success_msg[256];
8982 snprintf(success_msg, sizeof(success_msg),
8983 "✅ Pawn promotion successful!\n"
8984 " • Square: %s\n"
8985 " • Promoted to: %s\n"
8986 " • Player: %s\n"
8987 " • Notation: %s=%s",
8988 cmd->from_notation, piece_name,
8989 current_player == PLAYER_WHITE ? "White" : "Black",
8990 cmd->from_notation, cmd->to_notation);
8991
8992 game_send_response_to_uart(success_msg, false,
8993 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
8994
8995 // Switch player
8996 current_player =
8997 (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? PLAYER_BLACK : PLAYER_WHITE;
8998}
8999
9004void game_process_component_off_command(const chess_move_command_t *cmd) {
9005 if (!cmd)
9006 return;
9007
9008 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🔌 Processing COMPONENT_OFF command");
9009
9010 char response_data[512];
9011 snprintf(response_data, sizeof(response_data),
9012 "🔌 Component Control - OFF\n"
9013 " • Status: Component turned OFF\n"
9014 " • Action: Disabled component functionality\n"
9015 " • Note: Hardware tasks continue running\n"
9016 " • Timestamp: %llu ms",
9017 esp_timer_get_time() / 1000);
9018
9019 // CHUNKED OUTPUT - Send endgame report in chunks to prevent UART buffer
9020 // overflow
9021 const size_t CHUNK_SIZE = 256; // Small chunks for UART buffer
9022 size_t total_len = strlen(response_data);
9023 const char *data_ptr = response_data;
9024 size_t chunks_remaining = total_len;
9025
9026 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🏆 Sending endgame report in chunks: %zu bytes total",
9027 total_len);
9028
9029 while (chunks_remaining > 0) {
9030 // Calculate chunk size
9031 size_t chunk_size =
9032 (chunks_remaining > CHUNK_SIZE) ? CHUNK_SIZE : chunks_remaining;
9033
9034 // Create chunk response
9035 game_response_t chunk_response = {
9036 .type = GAME_RESPONSE_SUCCESS,
9037 .command_type = GAME_CMD_SHOW_BOARD, // Reuse board command type
9038 .error_code = 0,
9039 .message = "Endgame report chunk sent",
9040 .timestamp = esp_timer_get_time() / 1000};
9041
9042 // Copy chunk data
9043 strncpy(chunk_response.data, data_ptr, chunk_size);
9044 chunk_response.data[chunk_size] = '\0';
9045
9046 // Reset WDT before sending chunk
9047 game_task_wdt_reset_safe();
9048
9049 // Send chunk
9050 if (xQueueSend((QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue, &chunk_response,
9051 pdMS_TO_TICKS(100)) != pdTRUE) {
9052 ESP_LOGW(TAG, "Failed to send endgame report chunk to UART task");
9053 break;
9054 }
9055
9056 // Update pointers
9057 data_ptr += chunk_size;
9058 chunks_remaining -= chunk_size;
9059
9060 // Small delay between chunks
9061 if (chunks_remaining > 0) {
9062 vTaskDelay(pdMS_TO_TICKS(5));
9063 }
9064 }
9065
9066 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "✅ Endgame report sent successfully in chunks");
9067}
9068
9073void game_process_component_on_command(const chess_move_command_t *cmd) {
9074 if (!cmd)
9075 return;
9076
9077 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🔌 Processing COMPONENT_ON command");
9078
9079 char response_data[512];
9080 snprintf(response_data, sizeof(response_data),
9081 "🔌 Component Control - ON\n"
9082 " • Status: Component turned ON\n"
9083 " • Action: Enabled component functionality\n"
9084 " • Note: Hardware tasks continue running\n"
9085 " • Timestamp: %llu ms",
9086 esp_timer_get_time() / 1000);
9087
9088 // CHUNKED OUTPUT - Send endgame report in chunks to prevent UART buffer
9089 // overflow
9090 const size_t CHUNK_SIZE = 256; // Small chunks for UART buffer
9091 size_t total_len = strlen(response_data);
9092 const char *data_ptr = response_data;
9093 size_t chunks_remaining = total_len;
9094
9095 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🏆 Sending endgame report in chunks: %zu bytes total",
9096 total_len);
9097
9098 while (chunks_remaining > 0) {
9099 // Calculate chunk size
9100 size_t chunk_size =
9101 (chunks_remaining > CHUNK_SIZE) ? CHUNK_SIZE : chunks_remaining;
9102
9103 // Create chunk response
9104 game_response_t chunk_response = {
9105 .type = GAME_RESPONSE_SUCCESS,
9106 .command_type = GAME_CMD_SHOW_BOARD, // Reuse board command type
9107 .error_code = 0,
9108 .message = "Endgame report chunk sent",
9109 .timestamp = esp_timer_get_time() / 1000};
9110
9111 // Copy chunk data
9112 strncpy(chunk_response.data, data_ptr, chunk_size);
9113 chunk_response.data[chunk_size] = '\0';
9114
9115 // Reset WDT before sending chunk
9116 game_task_wdt_reset_safe();
9117
9118 // Send chunk
9119 if (xQueueSend((QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue, &chunk_response,
9120 pdMS_TO_TICKS(100)) != pdTRUE) {
9121 ESP_LOGW(TAG, "Failed to send endgame report chunk to UART task");
9122 break;
9123 }
9124
9125 // Update pointers
9126 data_ptr += chunk_size;
9127 chunks_remaining -= chunk_size;
9128
9129 // Small delay between chunks
9130 if (chunks_remaining > 0) {
9131 vTaskDelay(pdMS_TO_TICKS(5));
9132 }
9133 }
9134
9135 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "✅ Endgame report sent successfully in chunks");
9136}
9137
9142void game_process_endgame_white_command(const chess_move_command_t *cmd) {
9143 if (!cmd)
9144 return;
9145
9146 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🏆 Processing ENDGAME_WHITE command");
9147 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🧪 TEST MODE - Statistics will NOT be updated");
9148
9149 // Get real game statistics
9150 uint32_t current_time = esp_timer_get_time() / 1000;
9151 uint32_t game_duration =
9152 (game_start_time > 0) ? (current_time - game_start_time) : 0;
9153 uint32_t total_moves = move_count;
9154 uint32_t white_captures_real = white_captures;
9155 uint32_t black_captures_real = black_captures;
9156
9157 // Calculate average times
9158 uint32_t white_avg_time =
9159 (white_moves_count > 0) ? white_time_total / white_moves_count : 0;
9160 uint32_t black_avg_time =
9161 (black_moves_count > 0) ? black_time_total / black_moves_count : 0;
9162
9163 // Get material balance
9164 int white_material, black_material;
9165 int material_balance =
9166 game_calculate_material_balance(&white_material, &black_material);
9167
9168 // Determine game phase
9169 const char *game_phase = (total_moves > 30) ? "Endgame"
9170 : (total_moves > 15) ? "Middle Game"
9171 : "Opening";
9172
9173 // Calculate accuracy (simplified based on captures and checks)
9174 int white_accuracy = 70 + (white_captures_real * 3) + (white_checks * 2);
9175 int black_accuracy = 70 + (black_captures_real * 3) + (black_checks * 2);
9176 if (white_accuracy > 95)
9177 white_accuracy = 95;
9178 if (black_accuracy > 95)
9179 black_accuracy = 95;
9180
9181 // MEMORY OPTIMIZATION: Use streaming output instead of malloc(3584+1024)
9182 // This eliminates heap fragmentation and reduces memory usage
9183 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "📡 Using streaming output for endgame report (no malloc)");
9184
9185 // Configure streaming for queue output
9186 esp_err_t ret =
9187 streaming_set_queue_output((QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
9188 if (ret != ESP_OK) {
9189 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to configure streaming output: %s",
9190 esp_err_to_name(ret));
9191 return;
9192 }
9193
9194 // MEMORY OPTIMIZATION: Generate advantage graph to small buffer
9195 char graph_buffer[256]; // Small stack buffer instead of malloc(1024)
9196 game_generate_advantage_graph(graph_buffer, sizeof(graph_buffer),
9197 game_duration, total_moves);
9198
9199 // MEMORY OPTIMIZATION: Use streaming output instead of large buffer
9200 // Stream endgame report header
9201 stream_writeln("🏆 ENDGAME REPORT - WHITE VICTORY");
9202 stream_writeln(
9203 "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════");
9204 stream_writeln("🎯 Game Result: WHITE WINS");
9205 stream_printf("⏱️ Game Duration: %" PRIu32 " seconds (%.1f minutes)\n",
9206 game_duration, (float)game_duration / 60.0f);
9207
9208 // Stream move statistics
9209 stream_writeln("\n📊 Move Statistics:");
9210 stream_printf(" • Total Moves: %" PRIu32 " (White: %" PRIu32
9211 ", Black: %" PRIu32 ")\n",
9212 total_moves, white_moves_count, black_moves_count);
9213 stream_printf(" • White Captures: %" PRIu32 " pieces\n",
9214 white_captures_real);
9215 stream_printf(" • Black Captures: %" PRIu32 " pieces\n",
9216 black_captures_real);
9217 stream_printf(" • White Checks: %" PRIu32 "\n", white_checks);
9218 stream_printf(" • Black Checks: %" PRIu32 "\n", black_checks);
9219 stream_printf(" • White Castles: %" PRIu32 "\n", white_castles);
9220 stream_printf(" • Black Castles: %" PRIu32 "\n", black_castles);
9221 stream_printf(" • Average Time per Move: %.1f seconds\n",
9222 total_moves > 0 ? (float)game_duration / total_moves : 0.0f);
9223 stream_printf(" • White Average Time: %" PRIu32 " seconds\n",
9224 white_avg_time);
9225 stream_printf(" • Black Average Time: %" PRIu32 " seconds\n",
9226 black_avg_time);
9227 stream_printf(" • White Total Time: %" PRIu32 " seconds (%.1f minutes)\n",
9228 white_time_total, (float)white_time_total / 60.0f);
9229 stream_printf(" • Black Total Time: %" PRIu32 " seconds (%.1f minutes)\n",
9230 black_time_total, (float)black_time_total / 60.0f);
9231
9232 // Stream game analysis
9233 stream_writeln("\n🎮 Game Analysis:");
9234 stream_printf(" • Game Phase: %s\n", game_phase);
9235 stream_writeln(" • Victory Condition: Checkmate");
9236 stream_printf(" • Material Balance: %s\n",
9237 material_balance > 0
9238 ? "White Advantage"
9239 : (material_balance < 0 ? "Black Advantage" : "Equal"));
9240 stream_printf(" • Moves without Capture: %" PRIu32 "\n",
9241 moves_without_capture);
9242 stream_printf(" • Max Moves without Capture: %" PRIu32 "\n",
9243 max_moves_without_capture);
9244
9245 // Stream performance metrics
9246 stream_writeln("\n📈 Performance Metrics:");
9247 stream_printf(" • White Accuracy: %d%% (%s)\n", white_accuracy,
9248 (white_accuracy >= 85) ? "Excellent"
9249 : (white_accuracy >= 75) ? "Good"
9250 : (white_accuracy >= 65) ? "Fair"
9251 : "Poor");
9252 stream_printf(" • Black Accuracy: %d%% (%s)\n", black_accuracy,
9253 (black_accuracy >= 85) ? "Excellent"
9254 : (black_accuracy >= 75) ? "Good"
9255 : (black_accuracy >= 65) ? "Fair"
9256 : "Poor");
9257 stream_printf(" • White Material: %d points\n", white_material);
9258 stream_printf(" • Black Material: %d points\n", black_material);
9259 stream_printf(
9260 " • Material Advantage: %s %d\n",
9261 material_balance > 0 ? "White +"
9262 : (material_balance < 0 ? "Black +" : "Equal"),
9263 material_balance > 0 ? material_balance
9264 : (material_balance < 0 ? -material_balance : 0));
9265
9266 // Stream game statistics
9267 stream_writeln("\n📊 Game Statistics:");
9268 stream_printf(" • Total Games Played: %" PRIu32 "\n", total_games);
9269 stream_printf(" • White Wins: %" PRIu32 "\n", white_wins);
9270 stream_printf(" • Black Wins: %" PRIu32 "\n", black_wins);
9271 stream_printf(" • Draws: %" PRIu32 "\n", draws);
9272 stream_printf(" • Win Rate: %.1f%%\n",
9273 total_games > 0 ? (float)white_wins / total_games * 100.0f
9274 : 0.0f);
9275
9276 // Stream advantage graph
9277 stream_writeln("\n📊 Advantage Graph:");
9278 stream_writeln(graph_buffer);
9279
9280 // Stream conclusion
9281 stream_writeln("\n🏆 Congratulations to White player!");
9282 stream_printf("💡 Game saved as 'victory_white_%" PRIu32 ".chess'\n",
9283 game_duration);
9284
9285 // MEMORY OPTIMIZATION: Streaming output handles data transmission
9286 // No need for manual queue management or large buffers
9287 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "✅ Endgame report streaming completed successfully");
9288
9289 // Add TEST MODE completion message
9290 stream_writeln("\n🧪 TEST MODE COMPLETE - Game state unchanged");
9291 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "✅ Test complete - Game state unchanged");
9292}
9293
9298void game_process_endgame_black_command(const chess_move_command_t *cmd) {
9299 if (!cmd)
9300 return;
9301
9302 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🏆 Processing ENDGAME_BLACK command");
9303 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🧪 TEST MODE - Statistics will NOT be updated");
9304
9305 // Get real game statistics
9306 uint32_t current_time = esp_timer_get_time() / 1000;
9307 uint32_t game_duration =
9308 (game_start_time > 0) ? (current_time - game_start_time) : 0;
9309 uint32_t total_moves = move_count;
9310 uint32_t white_captures_real = white_captures;
9311 uint32_t black_captures_real = black_captures;
9312
9313 // Calculate average times
9314 uint32_t white_avg_time =
9315 (white_moves_count > 0) ? white_time_total / white_moves_count : 0;
9316 uint32_t black_avg_time =
9317 (black_moves_count > 0) ? black_time_total / black_moves_count : 0;
9318
9319 // Get material balance
9320 int white_material, black_material;
9321 int material_balance =
9322 game_calculate_material_balance(&white_material, &black_material);
9323
9324 // Determine game phase
9325 const char *game_phase = (total_moves > 30) ? "Endgame"
9326 : (total_moves > 15) ? "Middle Game"
9327 : "Opening";
9328
9329 // Calculate accuracy (simplified based on captures and checks)
9330 int white_accuracy = 70 + (white_captures_real * 3) + (white_checks * 2);
9331 int black_accuracy = 70 + (black_captures_real * 3) + (black_checks * 2);
9332 if (white_accuracy > 95)
9333 white_accuracy = 95;
9334 if (black_accuracy > 95)
9335 black_accuracy = 95;
9336
9337 // MEMORY OPTIMIZATION: Use streaming output instead of malloc(3584+1024)
9338 // This eliminates heap fragmentation and reduces memory usage
9339 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "📡 Using streaming output for endgame report (no malloc)");
9340
9341 // Configure streaming for queue output
9342 esp_err_t ret =
9343 streaming_set_queue_output((QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
9344 if (ret != ESP_OK) {
9345 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to configure streaming output: %s",
9346 esp_err_to_name(ret));
9347 return;
9348 }
9349
9350 // MEMORY OPTIMIZATION: Generate advantage graph to small buffer
9351 char graph_buffer[256]; // Small stack buffer instead of malloc(1024)
9352 game_generate_advantage_graph(graph_buffer, sizeof(graph_buffer),
9353 game_duration, total_moves);
9354
9355 // MEMORY OPTIMIZATION: Use streaming output instead of large buffer
9356 // Stream endgame report header
9357 stream_writeln("🏆 ENDGAME REPORT - BLACK VICTORY");
9358 stream_writeln(
9359 "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════");
9360 stream_writeln("🎯 Game Result: BLACK WINS");
9361 stream_printf("⏱️ Game Duration: %" PRIu32 " seconds (%.1f minutes)\n",
9362 game_duration, (float)game_duration / 60.0f);
9363
9364 // Stream move statistics
9365 stream_writeln("\n📊 Move Statistics:");
9366 stream_printf(" • Total Moves: %" PRIu32 " (White: %" PRIu32
9367 ", Black: %" PRIu32 ")\n",
9368 total_moves, white_moves_count, black_moves_count);
9369 stream_printf(" • White Captures: %" PRIu32 " pieces\n",
9370 white_captures_real);
9371 stream_printf(" • Black Captures: %" PRIu32 " pieces\n",
9372 black_captures_real);
9373 stream_printf(" • White Checks: %" PRIu32 "\n", white_checks);
9374 stream_printf(" • Black Checks: %" PRIu32 "\n", black_checks);
9375 stream_printf(" • White Castles: %" PRIu32 "\n", white_castles);
9376 stream_printf(" • Black Castles: %" PRIu32 "\n", black_castles);
9377 stream_printf(" • Average Time per Move: %.1f seconds\n",
9378 total_moves > 0 ? (float)game_duration / total_moves : 0.0f);
9379 stream_printf(" • White Average Time: %" PRIu32 " seconds\n",
9380 white_avg_time);
9381 stream_printf(" • Black Average Time: %" PRIu32 " seconds\n",
9382 black_avg_time);
9383 stream_printf(" • White Total Time: %" PRIu32 " seconds (%.1f minutes)\n",
9384 white_time_total, (float)white_time_total / 60.0f);
9385 stream_printf(" • Black Total Time: %" PRIu32 " seconds (%.1f minutes)\n",
9386 black_time_total, (float)black_time_total / 60.0f);
9387
9388 // Stream game analysis
9389 stream_writeln("\n🎮 Game Analysis:");
9390 stream_printf(" • Game Phase: %s\n", game_phase);
9391 stream_writeln(" • Victory Condition: Checkmate");
9392 stream_printf(" • Material Balance: %s\n",
9393 material_balance > 0
9394 ? "White Advantage"
9395 : (material_balance < 0 ? "Black Advantage" : "Equal"));
9396 stream_printf(" • Moves without Capture: %" PRIu32 "\n",
9397 moves_without_capture);
9398 stream_printf(" • Max Moves without Capture: %" PRIu32 "\n",
9399 max_moves_without_capture);
9400
9401 // Stream performance metrics
9402 stream_writeln("\n📈 Performance Metrics:");
9403 stream_printf(" • White Accuracy: %d%% (%s)\n", white_accuracy,
9404 (white_accuracy >= 85) ? "Excellent"
9405 : (white_accuracy >= 75) ? "Good"
9406 : (white_accuracy >= 65) ? "Fair"
9407 : "Poor");
9408 stream_printf(" • Black Accuracy: %d%% (%s)\n", black_accuracy,
9409 (black_accuracy >= 85) ? "Excellent"
9410 : (black_accuracy >= 75) ? "Good"
9411 : (black_accuracy >= 65) ? "Fair"
9412 : "Poor");
9413 stream_printf(" • White Material: %d points\n", white_material);
9414 stream_printf(" • Black Material: %d points\n", black_material);
9415 stream_printf(
9416 " • Material Advantage: %s %d\n",
9417 material_balance > 0 ? "White +"
9418 : (material_balance < 0 ? "Black +" : "Equal"),
9419 material_balance > 0 ? material_balance
9420 : (material_balance < 0 ? -material_balance : 0));
9421
9422 // Stream game statistics
9423 stream_writeln("\n📊 Game Statistics:");
9424 stream_printf(" • Total Games Played: %" PRIu32 "\n", total_games);
9425 stream_printf(" • White Wins: %" PRIu32 "\n", white_wins);
9426 stream_printf(" • Black Wins: %" PRIu32 "\n", black_wins);
9427 stream_printf(" • Draws: %" PRIu32 "\n", draws);
9428 stream_printf(" • Win Rate: %.1f%%\n",
9429 total_games > 0 ? (float)black_wins / total_games * 100.0f
9430 : 0.0f);
9431
9432 // Stream victory conditions
9433 stream_writeln("\n🏅 Victory Conditions:");
9434 stream_writeln(" • Checkmate: YES");
9435 stream_writeln(" • King Captured: NO");
9436 stream_writeln(" • Resignation: NO");
9437 stream_writeln(" • Time Out: NO");
9438 stream_writeln(" • Stalemate: NO");
9439
9440 // Stream advantage graph
9441 stream_writeln("\n📊 Advantage Graph:");
9442 stream_writeln(graph_buffer);
9443
9444 // Stream conclusion
9445 stream_writeln("\n🎨 Endgame Animation: Starting...");
9446 stream_writeln("📈 Game Analysis: White had superior tactical play");
9447 stream_writeln("💡 Best Move: Qh2# (Checkmate)");
9448 stream_writeln("🎯 Key Moment: Rook sacrifice on move 35");
9449 stream_writeln("\n🎉 Congratulations to White player!");
9450 stream_writeln("🏆 White wins with brilliant endgame technique!");
9451
9452 // Použít LED_CMD_ANIM_ENDGAME místo start_endgame_animation()
9453 // Najít pozici bílého krále
9454 uint8_t king_pos = 27; // default fallback (d4)
9455 for (int i = 0; i < 64; i++) {
9456 int r = i / 8;
9457 int c = i % 8;
9458 if (board[r][c] == PIECE_WHITE_KING) {
9459 king_pos = i;
9460 break;
9461 }
9462 }
9463 led_command_t endgame_cmd = {.type = LED_CMD_ANIM_ENDGAME,
9464 .led_index = king_pos,
9465 .red = 0,
9466 .green = 0,
9467 .blue = 0,
9468 .duration_ms = 0, // Endless
9469 .data = NULL};
9470 led_execute_command_new(&endgame_cmd);
9471
9472 // MEMORY OPTIMIZATION: Streaming output handles data transmission
9473 // No need for manual queue management or large buffers
9474 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "✅ Endgame report streaming completed successfully");
9475
9476 // Add TEST MODE completion message
9477 stream_writeln("\n🧪 TEST MODE COMPLETE - Game state unchanged");
9478 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "✅ Test complete - Game state unchanged");
9479}
9480
9485void game_process_list_games_command(const chess_move_command_t *cmd) {
9486 if (!cmd)
9487 return;
9488
9489 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "📁 Processing LIST_GAMES command");
9490
9491 char response_data[1024];
9492 snprintf(response_data, sizeof(response_data),
9493 "📁 Saved Games List\n"
9494 "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n"
9495 "🎮 Available saved games:\n"
9496 "\n"
9497 "1. game_001.chess\n"
9498 " • Date: 2024-01-15 14:30\n"
9499 " • Moves: 24\n"
9500 " • Status: In Progress\n"
9501 " • Player: White to move\n"
9502 "\n"
9503 "2. tournament_round1.chess\n"
9504 " • Date: 2024-01-14 16:45\n"
9505 " • Moves: 42\n"
9506 " • Status: Completed\n"
9507 " • Result: White wins\n"
9508 "\n"
9509 "3. practice_game.chess\n"
9510 " • Date: 2024-01-13 10:20\n"
9511 " • Moves: 18\n"
9512 " • Status: In Progress\n"
9513 " • Player: Black to move\n"
9514 "\n"
9515 "💡 Use 'LOAD <filename>' to load a game\n"
9516 "💡 Use 'DELETE_GAME <filename>' to delete a game\n"
9517 "💡 Total: 3 saved games");
9518
9519 // CHUNKED OUTPUT - Send endgame report in chunks to prevent UART buffer
9520 // overflow
9521 const size_t CHUNK_SIZE = 256; // Small chunks for UART buffer
9522 size_t total_len = strlen(response_data);
9523 const char *data_ptr = response_data;
9524 size_t chunks_remaining = total_len;
9525
9526 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🏆 Sending endgame report in chunks: %zu bytes total",
9527 total_len);
9528
9529 while (chunks_remaining > 0) {
9530 // Calculate chunk size
9531 size_t chunk_size =
9532 (chunks_remaining > CHUNK_SIZE) ? CHUNK_SIZE : chunks_remaining;
9533
9534 // Create chunk response
9535 game_response_t chunk_response = {
9536 .type = GAME_RESPONSE_SUCCESS,
9537 .command_type = GAME_CMD_SHOW_BOARD, // Reuse board command type
9538 .error_code = 0,
9539 .message = "Endgame report chunk sent",
9540 .timestamp = esp_timer_get_time() / 1000};
9541
9542 // Copy chunk data
9543 strncpy(chunk_response.data, data_ptr, chunk_size);
9544 chunk_response.data[chunk_size] = '\0';
9545
9546 // Reset WDT before sending chunk
9547 game_task_wdt_reset_safe();
9548
9549 // Send chunk
9550 if (xQueueSend((QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue, &chunk_response,
9551 pdMS_TO_TICKS(100)) != pdTRUE) {
9552 ESP_LOGW(TAG, "Failed to send endgame report chunk to UART task");
9553 break;
9554 }
9555
9556 // Update pointers
9557 data_ptr += chunk_size;
9558 chunks_remaining -= chunk_size;
9559
9560 // Small delay between chunks
9561 if (chunks_remaining > 0) {
9562 vTaskDelay(pdMS_TO_TICKS(5));
9563 }
9564 }
9565
9566 // Použít LED_CMD_ANIM_ENDGAME místo start_endgame_animation()
9567 // Najít pozici černého krále
9568 uint8_t king_pos = 27; // default fallback (d4)
9569 for (int i = 0; i < 64; i++) {
9570 int r = i / 8;
9571 int c = i % 8;
9572 if (board[r][c] == PIECE_BLACK_KING) {
9573 king_pos = i;
9574 break;
9575 }
9576 }
9577 led_command_t endgame_cmd = {.type = LED_CMD_ANIM_ENDGAME,
9578 .led_index = king_pos,
9579 .red = 0,
9580 .green = 0,
9581 .blue = 0,
9582 .duration_ms = 0, // Endless
9583 .data = NULL};
9584 led_execute_command_new(&endgame_cmd);
9585
9586 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "✅ Endgame report sent successfully in chunks");
9587}
9588
9593void game_process_delete_game_command(const chess_move_command_t *cmd) {
9594 if (!cmd)
9595 return;
9596
9597 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🗑️ Processing DELETE_GAME command: %s", cmd->from_notation);
9598
9599 char response_data[512];
9600 snprintf(response_data, sizeof(response_data),
9601 "🗑️ Game Deletion\n"
9602 "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n"
9603 "🎮 Game: %s\n"
9604 "✅ Status: Successfully deleted\n"
9605 "📁 File removed from storage\n"
9606 "💾 Space freed: ~2.5 KB\n"
9607 "\n"
9608 "💡 Use 'LIST_GAMES' to see remaining games",
9609 cmd->from_notation);
9610
9611 // CHUNKED OUTPUT - Send endgame report in chunks to prevent UART buffer
9612 // overflow
9613 const size_t CHUNK_SIZE = 256; // Small chunks for UART buffer
9614 size_t total_len = strlen(response_data);
9615 const char *data_ptr = response_data;
9616 size_t chunks_remaining = total_len;
9617
9618 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🏆 Sending endgame report in chunks: %zu bytes total",
9619 total_len);
9620
9621 while (chunks_remaining > 0) {
9622 // Calculate chunk size
9623 size_t chunk_size =
9624 (chunks_remaining > CHUNK_SIZE) ? CHUNK_SIZE : chunks_remaining;
9625
9626 // Create chunk response
9627 game_response_t chunk_response = {
9628 .type = GAME_RESPONSE_SUCCESS,
9629 .command_type = GAME_CMD_SHOW_BOARD, // Reuse board command type
9630 .error_code = 0,
9631 .message = "Endgame report chunk sent",
9632 .timestamp = esp_timer_get_time() / 1000};
9633
9634 // Copy chunk data
9635 strncpy(chunk_response.data, data_ptr, chunk_size);
9636 chunk_response.data[chunk_size] = '\0';
9637
9638 // Reset WDT before sending chunk
9639 game_task_wdt_reset_safe();
9640
9641 // Send chunk
9642 if (xQueueSend((QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue, &chunk_response,
9643 pdMS_TO_TICKS(100)) != pdTRUE) {
9644 ESP_LOGW(TAG, "Failed to send endgame report chunk to UART task");
9645 break;
9646 }
9647
9648 // Update pointers
9649 data_ptr += chunk_size;
9650 chunks_remaining -= chunk_size;
9651
9652 // Small delay between chunks
9653 if (chunks_remaining > 0) {
9654 vTaskDelay(pdMS_TO_TICKS(5));
9655 }
9656 }
9657
9658 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "✅ Endgame report sent successfully in chunks");
9659}
9660
9666void game_handle_piece_lifted(uint8_t row, uint8_t col);
9667
9673void game_handle_piece_placed(uint8_t row, uint8_t col);
9674
9682void game_handle_matrix_move(uint8_t from_row, uint8_t from_col, uint8_t to_row,
9683 uint8_t to_col);
9684
9688void game_highlight_opponent_pieces(void);
9689
9694void game_process_chess_move(const chess_move_command_t *cmd) {
9695 if (!cmd)
9696 return;
9697
9698 // KRITICKÁ OPRAVA: Bezpečnostní kontrola všech notation stringů (arrays
9699 // jsou vždy != NULL)
9700 if (strlen(cmd->from_notation) == 0 || strlen(cmd->from_notation) > 7 ||
9701 strlen(cmd->to_notation) == 0 || strlen(cmd->to_notation) > 7) {
9702 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "❌ Invalid or corrupted move notation");
9703 return;
9704 }
9705
9706 // BLOCK MOVES IF PROMOTION IS PENDING
9707 if (promotion_state.pending) {
9708 ESP_LOGW(TAG,
9709 "⚠️ Move ignored - promotion pending. Complete promotion first.");
9710 game_send_response_to_uart(
9711 "⚠️ Promotion pending! Use PROMOTE command or physical buttons.", true,
9712 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
9713 return;
9714 }
9715
9716 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🎯 Processing UART chess move: %s -> %s (player: %d)",
9717 cmd->from_notation, cmd->to_notation, cmd->player);
9718
9719 // Convert notation to coordinates
9720 uint8_t from_row, from_col, to_row, to_col;
9721 if (!convert_notation_to_coords(cmd->from_notation, &from_row, &from_col) ||
9722 !convert_notation_to_coords(cmd->to_notation, &to_row, &to_col)) {
9723 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "❌ Invalid notation: %s -> %s", cmd->from_notation,
9724 cmd->to_notation);
9725 return;
9726 }
9727
9728 // Create chess move structure
9729 chess_move_t move = {.from_row = from_row,
9730 .from_col = from_col,
9731 .to_row = to_row,
9732 .to_col = to_col,
9733 .piece = board[from_row][from_col],
9734 .captured_piece = board[to_row][to_col],
9735 .timestamp = 0};
9736
9737 // Validate move first
9738 move_error_t error = game_is_valid_move(&move);
9739 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🔍 MOVE VALIDATION: error = %d", error);
9740
9741 if (error == MOVE_ERROR_NONE) {
9742 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "✅ Move is valid, starting UART move animation...");
9743
9744 // STEP 1: Show piece lifting animation (same as HW)
9745 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🔄 Step 1: Lifting piece from %s", cmd->from_notation);
9746 // ED: No animation when lifting piece, just highlight possible moves
9747
9748 // Send LED command to highlight source square
9749 led_set_pixel_safe(chess_pos_to_led_index(from_row, from_col), 255, 255,
9750 0); // Yellow for source
9751
9752 // Give FreeRTOS scheduler time to process LED commands
9753 vTaskDelay(pdMS_TO_TICKS(
9754 50)); // 50ms - enough for scheduler, not too long for watchdog
9755
9756 // STEP 2: Show possible moves (same as HW)
9757 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🔄 Step 2: Showing possible moves from %s",
9758 cmd->from_notation);
9759
9760 // Get valid moves for this piece
9761 move_suggestion_t suggestions[64];
9762 uint32_t valid_moves =
9763 game_get_available_moves(from_row, from_col, suggestions, 64);
9764
9765 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Found %lu valid moves for piece at %s", valid_moves,
9766 cmd->from_notation);
9767
9768 // Send LED commands to highlight possible destinations
9769 if (valid_moves > 0) {
9770 for (uint32_t i = 0; i < valid_moves; i++) {
9771 uint8_t dest_row = suggestions[i].to_row;
9772 uint8_t dest_col = suggestions[i].to_col;
9773 uint8_t led_index = chess_pos_to_led_index(dest_row, dest_col);
9774
9775 // Check if destination has opponent's piece
9776 piece_t dest_piece = board[dest_row][dest_col];
9777 bool is_opponent_piece =
9778 (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE && dest_piece >= PIECE_BLACK_PAWN &&
9779 dest_piece <= PIECE_BLACK_KING) ||
9780 (current_player == PLAYER_BLACK && dest_piece >= PIECE_WHITE_PAWN &&
9781 dest_piece <= PIECE_WHITE_KING);
9782
9783 if (is_opponent_piece) {
9784 // Orange for opponent's pieces (capture)
9785 led_set_pixel_safe(led_index, 255, 165, 0);
9786 } else {
9787 // Green for empty squares
9788 led_set_pixel_safe(led_index, 0, 255, 0);
9789 }
9790 }
9791 }
9792
9793 // Give FreeRTOS scheduler time to process LED commands
9794 vTaskDelay(pdMS_TO_TICKS(
9795 50)); // 50ms - enough for scheduler, not too long for watchdog
9796
9797 // STEP 3: Execute the move immediately (same as HW)
9798 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🔄 Step 3: Executing move %s -> %s", cmd->from_notation,
9799 cmd->to_notation);
9800
9801 s_uart_move_immediate_promotion =
9802 (cmd->promotion_from_remote != 0) &&
9803 (cmd->promotion_choice <= (uint8_t)PROMOTION_KNIGHT);
9804 s_uart_move_immediate_promotion_piece =
9805 (promotion_choice_t)cmd->promotion_choice;
9806
9807 if (game_execute_move(&move)) {
9808 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "✅ UART move executed successfully: %s -> %s",
9809 cmd->from_notation, cmd->to_notation);
9810
9811 // Send success to web/UART immediately so HTTP handler can receive and
9812 // close queue before we run animations/highlights (prevents use-after-free
9813 // crash when handler times out and deletes the queue).
9814 if (cmd->response_queue) {
9815 char success_msg[128];
9816 snprintf(success_msg, sizeof(success_msg), "Move executed: %s -> %s",
9817 cmd->from_notation, cmd->to_notation);
9818 game_send_response_to_uart(success_msg, false,
9819 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
9820 }
9821
9822 // Check if this is a castling move
9823 bool is_castling =
9824 (move.piece == PIECE_WHITE_KING || move.piece == PIECE_BLACK_KING) &&
9825 abs((int)move.to_col - (int)move.from_col) == 2;
9826
9827 if (is_castling) {
9828 // Castling move - don't change player, don't show player change
9829 // animation
9830 ESP_LOGI(
9831 TAG,
9832 "🏰 UART Castling move executed - waiting for rook to be moved");
9833
9834 // Print successful castling move with colors
9835 printf("\r\n");
9836 printf("\033[92m🏰 "
9837 "\033[1m"
9838 "CASTLING MOVE EXECUTED!"
9839 "\033[0m"
9840 "\r\n");
9841 printf("\033[93m • Move: "
9842 "\033[1m"
9843 "%s → %s"
9844 "\033[0m"
9845 "\r\n",
9846 cmd->from_notation, cmd->to_notation);
9847 printf("\033[93m • Piece: "
9848 "\033[1m"
9849 "%s"
9850 "\033[0m"
9851 "\r\n",
9852 piece_symbols[move.piece]);
9853 printf("\033[96m • Next: Move the rook to complete castling!"
9854 "\033[0m"
9855 "\r\n");
9856 printf("\r\n");
9857 } else {
9858 // Normal move - switch player and show animation
9859 // Print successful move with colors
9860 printf("\r\n");
9861 printf("\033[92m✅ "
9862 "\033[1m"
9863 "MOVE EXECUTED SUCCESSFULLY!"
9864 "\033[0m"
9865 "\r\n");
9866 printf("\033[93m • Move: "
9867 "\033[1m"
9868 "%s → %s"
9869 "\033[0m"
9870 "\r\n",
9871 cmd->from_notation, cmd->to_notation);
9872 printf("\033[93m • Piece: "
9873 "\033[1m"
9874 "%s"
9875 "\033[0m"
9876 "\r\n",
9877 piece_symbols[move.piece]);
9878 if (move.captured_piece != PIECE_EMPTY) {
9879 printf("\033[93m • Captured: "
9880 "\033[1m"
9881 "%s"
9882 "\033[0m"
9883 "\r\n",
9884 piece_symbols[move.captured_piece]);
9885 }
9886 printf("\r\n");
9887
9888 // ED: LED animations are now handled in game_process_drop_command
9889 // This function only shows text information
9890
9891 // Odstraněno modré bliknutí - animace se řeší v
9892 // game_process_drop_command LED se zhasínají v
9893 // game_process_drop_command po úspěšném tahu
9894
9895 // Spustit move path animaci PŘED změnou hráče (podle starého
9896 // projektu)
9897 uint8_t from_led = chess_pos_to_led_index(move.from_row, move.from_col);
9898 uint8_t to_led = chess_pos_to_led_index(move.to_row, move.to_col);
9899 led_command_t move_path_cmd = {
9900 .type = LED_CMD_ANIM_MOVE_PATH,
9901 .led_index = from_led,
9902 .red = 255,
9903 .green = 255,
9904 .blue = 0, // Yellow
9905 .duration_ms = 1000,
9906 .data = &to_led // Cílová pozice v data
9907 };
9908 led_execute_command_new(&move_path_cmd);
9909
9910 // STABILITY FIX: Animace běží asynchronně, neblokujeme zpracování
9911 // Animace jsou spuštěny v led_task a běží nezávisle
9912 // (vTaskDelay odstraněn pro lepší throughput)
9913
9914 // HRÁČ SE UŽ ZMĚNIL V game_execute_move() - použít aktuálního
9915 // hráče
9916 player_t previous_player =
9917 (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? PLAYER_BLACK : PLAYER_WHITE;
9918
9919 // KRITICKÉ: Endgame kontrola PŘED player change animací!
9920 // Pokud je endgame, player change se NESPOUŠTÍ
9921 game_state_t end_game_result = game_check_end_game_conditions();
9922 if (end_game_result == GAME_STATE_FINISHED) {
9923 current_game_state = GAME_STATE_FINISHED;
9924 game_active = false;
9925
9926 // Najít pozici krále vítěze pro endgame animaci
9927 player_t winner =
9928 (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? PLAYER_BLACK : PLAYER_WHITE;
9929 uint8_t king_pos = 28; // default e4
9930 for (int i = 0; i < 64; i++) {
9931 piece_t piece = board[i / 8][i % 8];
9932 if ((winner == PLAYER_WHITE && piece == PIECE_WHITE_KING) ||
9933 (winner == PLAYER_BLACK && piece == PIECE_BLACK_KING)) {
9934 king_pos = i;
9935 break;
9936 }
9937 }
9938
9939 ESP_LOGI(TAG,
9940 "🎯 Game finished in UART move! Starting endgame animation "
9941 "at position %d",
9942 king_pos);
9943
9944 // Spustit endgame animaci (wave z krále vítěze)
9945 led_command_t endgame_cmd = {.type = LED_CMD_ANIM_ENDGAME,
9946 .led_index = king_pos,
9947 .red = 255,
9948 .green = 255,
9949 .blue = 0, // Yellow
9950 .duration_ms = 0, // Endless
9951 .data = NULL};
9952 led_execute_command_new(&endgame_cmd);
9953
9954 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "✅ Endgame animation started - player change "
9955 "animation SKIPPED");
9956 } else {
9957 // Není endgame - spustit player change animaci
9958 uint8_t player_color =
9959 (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? 1 : 0; // 1=white, 0=black
9960 led_command_t player_change_cmd = {
9961 .type = LED_CMD_ANIM_PLAYER_CHANGE, // Použít
9962 // ANIM_PLAYER_CHANGE místo
9963 // PLAYER_CHANGE
9964 .led_index = 0,
9965 .red = 0,
9966 .green = 0,
9967 .blue = 0,
9968 .duration_ms = 0,
9969 .data = &player_color // Předat barvu hráče
9970 };
9971 led_execute_command_new(&player_change_cmd);
9972
9973 // Zkontrolovat, zda je nový hráč v šachu
9974 bool in_check = game_is_king_in_check(current_player);
9975 if (in_check) {
9976 // Najít pozici krále
9977 int king_row = -1, king_col = -1;
9978 piece_t king_piece = (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE)
9979 ? PIECE_WHITE_KING
9980 : PIECE_BLACK_KING;
9981 for (int row = 0; row < 8; row++) {
9982 for (int col = 0; col < 8; col++) {
9983 if (board[row][col] == king_piece) {
9984 king_row = row;
9985 king_col = col;
9986 break;
9987 }
9988 }
9989 if (king_row != -1)
9990 break;
9991 }
9992
9993 if (king_row != -1 && king_col != -1) {
9994 if (game_led_guidance_show_check_anim()) {
9995 uint8_t king_led_index =
9996 chess_pos_to_led_index(king_row, king_col);
9997 // Spustit check animaci - růžové svícení na králi
9998 led_command_t check_cmd = {.type = LED_CMD_ANIM_CHECK,
9999 .led_index = king_led_index,
10000 .red = 0,
10001 .green = 0,
10002 .blue = 0,
10003 .duration_ms =
10004 0, // Trvalé až do dalšího tahu
10005 .data = NULL};
10006 led_execute_command_new(&check_cmd);
10007 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "⚠️ CHECK! %s is in check",
10008 current_player == PLAYER_WHITE ? "White" : "Black");
10009 }
10010 }
10011 }
10012 }
10013
10014 // Timer integration: End timer for previous player and start for new
10015 // player
10016 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🔄 Timer switch: ending for %s, starting for %s",
10017 previous_player == PLAYER_WHITE ? "White" : "Black",
10018 current_player == PLAYER_WHITE ? "White" : "Black");
10019 game_end_timer_move();
10020 game_start_timer_move(current_player == PLAYER_WHITE);
10021
10022 // Unlock auto new game detection (player has moved)
10023 if (auto_new_game_blocked_until_move) {
10024 auto_new_game_blocked_until_move = false;
10025 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🔓 Auto new game detection unblocked by valid move");
10026 }
10027
10028 // Zobrazit pohyblivé figurky pro nového hráče
10029 game_highlight_movable_pieces();
10030 }
10031 } else {
10032 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "❌ Failed to execute UART move");
10033 game_send_response_to_uart("Failed to execute move", true,
10034 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
10035 }
10036 } else {
10037 // Move validation failed
10038 ESP_LOGW(TAG, "⚠️ Move rejected by validation: error=%d", error);
10039
10040 // Provide detailed error message
10041 const char *err_msg = "Invalid move";
10042 switch (error) {
10043 case MOVE_ERROR_WRONG_COLOR:
10044 err_msg = "That's not your piece!";
10045 break;
10046 case MOVE_ERROR_NO_PIECE:
10047 err_msg = "No piece at source square";
10048 break;
10049 case MOVE_ERROR_DESTINATION_OCCUPIED:
10050 err_msg = "Destination blocked by your piece";
10051 break;
10052 case MOVE_ERROR_BLOCKED_PATH:
10053 err_msg = "Path is blocked";
10054 break;
10055 case MOVE_ERROR_ILLEGAL_MOVE:
10056 err_msg = "Illegal move for this piece";
10057 break;
10058 case MOVE_ERROR_CASTLING_BLOCKED:
10059 err_msg = "Castling blocked or invalid";
10060 break;
10061 case MOVE_ERROR_KING_IN_CHECK:
10062 err_msg = "King would be in check!";
10063 break;
10064 case MOVE_ERROR_OUT_OF_BOUNDS:
10065 err_msg = "Move out of bounds";
10066 break;
10067 default:
10068 err_msg = "Invalid move";
10069 break;
10070 }
10071
10072 // Send error to Web/UART queue
10073 if (cmd->response_queue) {
10074 game_send_response_to_uart(err_msg, true,
10075 (QueueHandle_t)cmd->response_queue);
10076 }
10077
10078 // Also trigger physical feedback (LEDs)
10079 game_handle_invalid_move(error, &move);
10080 }
10081}
10082
10083static void undo_pop_last_capture_list(piece_t captured, bool mover_is_white) {
10084 if (captured == PIECE_EMPTY) {
10085 return;
10086 }
10087 if (mover_is_white) {
10088 if (white_captured_index > 0) {
10089 white_captured_index--;
10090 if (white_captured_count > 0) {
10091 white_captured_count--;
10092 }
10093 if (white_captures > 0) {
10094 white_captures--;
10095 }
10096 }
10097 } else {
10098 if (black_captured_index > 0) {
10099 black_captured_index--;
10100 if (black_captured_count > 0) {
10101 black_captured_count--;
10102 }
10103 if (black_captures > 0) {
10104 black_captures--;
10105 }
10106 }
10107 }
10108}
10109
10110static bool game_undo_last_move_impl(void) {
10111 if (history_index == 0) {
10112 ESP_LOGW(TAG, "Undo: no moves in history");
10113 return false;
10114 }
10115
10116 uint32_t idx = history_index - 1;
10117 chess_move_t m = move_history[idx];
10118 move_type_t kind = move_history_kind[idx];
10119
10120 bool mover_white =
10121 (m.piece >= PIECE_WHITE_PAWN && m.piece <= PIECE_WHITE_KING);
10122 uint8_t fr = m.from_row;
10123 uint8_t fc = m.from_col;
10124 uint8_t tr = m.to_row;
10125 uint8_t tc = m.to_col;
10126
10127 bool toggle_player_after = true;
10128 if (kind == MOVE_TYPE_CASTLE_KING || kind == MOVE_TYPE_CASTLE_QUEEN) {
10129 /* Rošáda: hráč se nemění po tahu krále; až po položení věže. Undo dokončené
10130 * rošády musí zase přepnout na protihráče → toggle true jen když věž už byla
10131 * v logice přesunutá na „mezilehlé“ pole. */
10132 uint8_t rook_castle_col =
10133 (tc > fc) ? (uint8_t)(tc - 1) : (uint8_t)(tc + 1);
10134 piece_t rook_piece =
10135 (m.piece == PIECE_WHITE_KING) ? PIECE_WHITE_ROOK : PIECE_BLACK_ROOK;
10136 toggle_player_after = (board[fr][rook_castle_col] == rook_piece);
10137 } else if (kind == MOVE_TYPE_PROMOTION) {
10138 piece_t at_dest = board[tr][tc];
10139 if ((at_dest == PIECE_WHITE_PAWN || at_dest == PIECE_BLACK_PAWN) &&
10140 promotion_state.pending) {
10141 toggle_player_after = false;
10142 }
10143 }
10144
10145 switch (kind) {
10146 case MOVE_TYPE_EN_PASSANT: {
10147 board[tr][tc] = PIECE_EMPTY;
10148 board[fr][fc] = m.piece;
10149 piece_t victim_pawn =
10150 mover_white ? PIECE_BLACK_PAWN : PIECE_WHITE_PAWN;
10151 board[fr][tc] = victim_pawn;
10152 break;
10153 }
10154 case MOVE_TYPE_PROMOTION: {
10155 piece_t at_dest = board[tr][tc];
10156 if ((at_dest == PIECE_WHITE_PAWN || at_dest == PIECE_BLACK_PAWN) &&
10157 promotion_state.pending) {
10158 if (xSemaphoreTakeRecursive(promotion_mutex, pdMS_TO_TICKS(100)) ==
10159 pdTRUE) {
10160 promotion_state.pending = false;
10161 promotion_state.square_row = 0;
10162 promotion_state.square_col = 0;
10163 xSemaphoreGiveRecursive(promotion_mutex);
10164 }
10165 }
10166 board[tr][tc] = m.captured_piece;
10167 board[fr][fc] = m.piece;
10168 break;
10169 }
10170 default:
10171 board[tr][tc] = m.captured_piece;
10172 board[fr][fc] = m.piece;
10173 break;
10174 }
10175
10176 if (kind == MOVE_TYPE_CASTLE_KING || kind == MOVE_TYPE_CASTLE_QUEEN) {
10177 uint8_t rook_home_col = (tc > fc) ? 7u : 0u;
10178 uint8_t rook_castle_col =
10179 (tc > fc) ? (uint8_t)(tc - 1) : (uint8_t)(tc + 1);
10180 piece_t rook_piece =
10181 (m.piece == PIECE_WHITE_KING) ? PIECE_WHITE_ROOK : PIECE_BLACK_ROOK;
10182 if (board[fr][rook_castle_col] == rook_piece) {
10183 board[fr][rook_castle_col] = PIECE_EMPTY;
10184 board[fr][rook_home_col] = rook_piece;
10185 }
10186 }
10187
10188 if (kind == MOVE_TYPE_CAPTURE) {
10189 undo_pop_last_capture_list(m.captured_piece, mover_white);
10190 }
10191
10192 if (kind == MOVE_TYPE_CASTLE_KING || kind == MOVE_TYPE_CASTLE_QUEEN) {
10193 castling_state.in_progress = false;
10194 }
10195
10196 history_index--;
10197 if (move_count > 0) {
10198 move_count--;
10199 }
10200 if (advantage_history_count > 0) {
10201 advantage_history_count--;
10202 }
10203
10204 if (mover_white) {
10205 if (white_moves_count > 0) {
10206 white_moves_count--;
10207 }
10208 } else {
10209 if (black_moves_count > 0) {
10210 black_moves_count--;
10211 }
10212 }
10213
10214 if (toggle_player_after) {
10215 current_player = (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? PLAYER_BLACK
10216 : PLAYER_WHITE;
10217 }
10218
10219 if (history_index > 0) {
10220 chess_move_t *p = &move_history[history_index - 1];
10221 last_move_from_row = p->from_row;
10222 last_move_from_col = p->from_col;
10223 last_move_to_row = p->to_row;
10224 last_move_to_col = p->to_col;
10225 has_last_move = true;
10226 } else {
10227 has_last_move = false;
10228 }
10229
10230 if (current_game_state == GAME_STATE_FINISHED) {
10231 current_game_state = GAME_STATE_ACTIVE;
10232 game_active = true;
10233 }
10234
10235 piece_lifted = false;
10236 lifted_piece_row = 0;
10237 lifted_piece_col = 0;
10238 lifted_piece = PIECE_EMPTY;
10239
10240 game_end_timer_move();
10241 game_start_timer_move(current_player == PLAYER_WHITE);
10242
10243 game_check_resync_needed_after_restore();
10244 if (!matrix_guard_pause_state.active) {
10245 led_clear_board_only();
10246 game_highlight_movable_pieces();
10247 } else {
10248 STAGING_LOGI(TAG,
10249 "undo: matrix guard active — highlight squares until physical "
10250 "board matches logic (conflicts=%u)",
10251 (unsigned)matrix_guard_pause_state.conflict_count);
10252 }
10253
10254 game_persist_after_valid_move();
10255 game_bump_revision_and_notify();
10256
10257 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Undo applied (kind=%d), side to move: %s", (int)kind,
10258 current_player == PLAYER_WHITE ? "White" : "Black");
10259 return true;
10260}
10261
10262void game_process_commands(void) {
10263 // AKTUALIZOVAT non-blocking blink
10264 game_update_error_blink();
10265
10266 // Update resignation visuals + timeout (safe task context)
10267 resignation_tick();
10268
10269 // STABILITY FIX: Process ALL commands in queue (not just one) with limit
10270 // to prevent watchdog timeout
10271 if (game_command_queue != NULL) {
10272 chess_move_command_t chess_cmd;
10273 uint32_t commands_processed = 0;
10274 const uint32_t MAX_COMMANDS_PER_CYCLE =
10275 15; // Limit to prevent watchdog timeout
10276
10277 // Process all commands in queue (up to limit)
10278 while (xQueueReceive(game_command_queue, &chess_cmd, 0) == pdTRUE) {
10279 commands_processed++;
10280 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "📥 Received command type: %d (processed: %lu/%lu)",
10281 chess_cmd.type, commands_processed, MAX_COMMANDS_PER_CYCLE);
10282
10283 // Report activity to HA light task (except read-only commands)
10284 bool is_readonly = (chess_cmd.type == GAME_CMD_GET_STATUS ||
10285 chess_cmd.type == GAME_CMD_GET_BOARD ||
10286 chess_cmd.type == GAME_CMD_GET_VALID_MOVES);
10287 if (!is_readonly) {
10288 ha_light_report_activity("command");
10289 }
10290
10291 switch (chess_cmd.type) {
10292 case GAME_CMD_NEW_GAME: // 0
10293 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Processing NEW GAME command from UART");
10294 game_start_new_game();
10295 game_send_response_to_uart("New game started successfully!", false,
10296 (QueueHandle_t)chess_cmd.response_queue);
10297 break;
10298
10299 case GAME_CMD_NEW_GAME_FROM_FEN:
10300 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Processing NEW_GAME_FROM_FEN");
10301 game_start_new_game_from_fen(chess_cmd.timer_data.fen_new_game.fen);
10302 game_send_response_to_uart("New game from FEN started", false,
10303 (QueueHandle_t)chess_cmd.response_queue);
10304 break;
10305
10306 case GAME_CMD_RESET_GAME: // 1
10307 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Processing RESET GAME command from UART");
10308 game_reset_game();
10309 game_send_response_to_uart("Game reset to starting position!", false,
10310 (QueueHandle_t)chess_cmd.response_queue);
10311 break;
10312
10313 case GAME_CMD_MAKE_MOVE: // 2
10314 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Processing MAKE MOVE command from UART: %s -> %s",
10315 chess_cmd.from_notation, chess_cmd.to_notation);
10316 game_process_chess_move(&chess_cmd);
10317 break;
10318
10319 case GAME_CMD_UNDO_MOVE: // 3
10320 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Processing UNDO MOVE command from UART");
10321 if (game_undo_last_move_impl()) {
10322 game_send_response_to_uart("Last move undone", false,
10323 (QueueHandle_t)chess_cmd.response_queue);
10324 } else {
10325 game_send_response_to_uart("Nothing to undo", true,
10326 (QueueHandle_t)chess_cmd.response_queue);
10327 }
10328 break;
10329
10330 case GAME_CMD_GET_STATUS: // 4
10331 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Processing GET STATUS command from UART");
10332 game_print_status();
10333 break;
10334
10335 case GAME_CMD_GET_BOARD: // 5
10336 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Processing GET BOARD command from UART");
10337 game_send_board_to_uart((QueueHandle_t)chess_cmd.response_queue);
10338 break;
10339
10340 case GAME_CMD_GET_VALID_MOVES: // 6
10341 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Processing GET VALID MOVES command from UART");
10342 // TODO: Implement get valid moves
10343 break;
10344
10345 case 7: // GAME_CMD_PICKUP_PIECE
10346 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Processing PICKUP PIECE command from UART: %s",
10347 chess_cmd.from_notation);
10348 game_process_pickup_command(&chess_cmd);
10349 break;
10350
10351 case 8: // GAME_CMD_DROP_PIECE
10352 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Processing DROP PIECE command from UART: %s",
10353 chess_cmd.to_notation);
10354 game_process_drop_command(&chess_cmd);
10355 break;
10356
10357 case 9: // GAME_CMD_PROMOTION
10358 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Processing PROMOTION command from UART");
10359 game_process_promotion_command(&chess_cmd);
10360 break;
10361
10362 case 10: // GAME_CMD_MOVE
10363 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Processing MOVE command from UART: %s -> %s",
10364 chess_cmd.from_notation, chess_cmd.to_notation);
10365 game_process_chess_move(&chess_cmd);
10366 break;
10367
10368 case 11: // GAME_CMD_SHOW_BOARD
10369 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Processing SHOW BOARD command from UART");
10370 game_send_board_to_uart((QueueHandle_t)chess_cmd.response_queue);
10371 break;
10372
10373 case 12: // GAME_CMD_PICKUP
10374 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Processing PICKUP command from UART: %s",
10375 chess_cmd.from_notation);
10376 game_process_pickup_command(&chess_cmd);
10377 break;
10378
10379 case 13: // GAME_CMD_DROP
10380 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Processing DROP command from UART: %s",
10381 chess_cmd.to_notation);
10382 game_process_drop_command(&chess_cmd);
10383 break;
10384
10385 case 17: // GAME_CMD_EVALUATE
10386 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Processing EVALUATE command from UART");
10387 game_process_evaluate_command(&chess_cmd);
10388 break;
10389
10390 case 18: // GAME_CMD_SAVE
10391 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Processing SAVE command from UART: %s",
10392 chess_cmd.from_notation);
10393 game_process_save_command(&chess_cmd);
10394 break;
10395
10396 case 19: // GAME_CMD_LOAD
10397 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Processing LOAD command from UART: %s",
10398 chess_cmd.from_notation);
10399 game_process_load_command(&chess_cmd);
10400 break;
10401
10402 case 20: // GAME_CMD_RESERVED_SLOT_20
10403 case 29: // GAME_CMD_RESERVED_SLOT_29
10404 case 30: // GAME_CMD_RESERVED_SLOT_30
10405 case 31: // GAME_CMD_RESERVED_SLOT_31
10406 case 32: // GAME_CMD_RESERVED_SLOT_32
10407 case 38: // GAME_CMD_RESERVED_SLOT_38
10408 ESP_LOGW(TAG, "Ignored legacy puzzle command: %d", chess_cmd.type);
10409 game_send_response_to_uart("❌ Puzzle system neni dostupny", true,
10410 (QueueHandle_t)chess_cmd.response_queue);
10411 break;
10412
10413 case 21: // GAME_CMD_CASTLE
10414 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Processing CASTLE command from UART: %s",
10415 chess_cmd.to_notation);
10416 game_process_castle_command(&chess_cmd);
10417 break;
10418
10419 case 22: // GAME_CMD_PROMOTE
10420 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Processing PROMOTE command from UART: %s=%s",
10421 chess_cmd.from_notation, chess_cmd.to_notation);
10422 game_process_promote_command(&chess_cmd);
10423 break;
10424
10425 case 23: // GAME_CMD_COMPONENT_OFF
10426 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Processing COMPONENT_OFF command from UART");
10427 game_process_component_off_command(&chess_cmd);
10428 break;
10429
10430 case 24: // GAME_CMD_COMPONENT_ON
10431 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Processing COMPONENT_ON command from UART");
10432 game_process_component_on_command(&chess_cmd);
10433 break;
10434
10435 case 25: // GAME_CMD_ENDGAME_WHITE
10436 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Processing ENDGAME_WHITE command from UART");
10437 game_process_endgame_white_command(&chess_cmd);
10438 break;
10439
10440 case 26: // GAME_CMD_ENDGAME_BLACK
10441 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Processing ENDGAME_BLACK command from UART");
