10442 game_process_endgame_black_command(&chess_cmd);
10443 break;
10444
10445 case 27: // GAME_CMD_LIST_GAMES
10446 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Processing LIST_GAMES command from UART");
10447 game_process_list_games_command(&chess_cmd);
10448 break;
10449
10450 case 28: // GAME_CMD_DELETE_GAME
10451 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Processing DELETE_GAME command from UART: %s",
10452 chess_cmd.from_notation);
10453 game_process_delete_game_command(&chess_cmd);
10454 break;
10455
10456 case 33: // GAME_CMD_TEST_MOVE_ANIM
10457 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Processing TEST_MOVE_ANIM command from UART");
10458 game_test_move_animation();
10459 break;
10460
10461 case 34: // GAME_CMD_TEST_PLAYER_ANIM
10462 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Processing TEST_PLAYER_ANIM command from UART");
10463 game_test_player_change_animation();
10464 break;
10465
10466 case 35: // GAME_CMD_TEST_CASTLE_ANIM
10467 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Processing TEST_CASTLE_ANIM command from UART");
10468 game_test_castle_animation();
10469 break;
10470
10471 case 36: // GAME_CMD_TEST_PROMOTE_ANIM
10472 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Processing TEST_PROMOTE_ANIM command from UART");
10473 game_test_promote_animation();
10474 break;
10475
10476 case 37: // GAME_CMD_TEST_ENDGAME_ANIM
10477 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Processing TEST_ENDGAME_ANIM command from UART");
10478 game_test_endgame_animation();
10479 break;
10480
10481 // Timer System Commands
10482 case GAME_CMD_SET_TIME_CONTROL: // 39
10483 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Processing SET_TIME_CONTROL command");
10484 game_process_timer_command(&chess_cmd);
10485 break;
10486
10487 case GAME_CMD_PAUSE_TIMER: // 40
10488 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Processing PAUSE_TIMER command");
10489 game_process_timer_command(&chess_cmd);
10490 break;
10491
10492 case GAME_CMD_RESUME_TIMER: // 41
10493 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Processing RESUME_TIMER command");
10494 game_process_timer_command(&chess_cmd);
10495 break;
10496
10497 case GAME_CMD_RESET_TIMER: // 42
10498 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Processing RESET_TIMER command");
10499 game_process_timer_command(&chess_cmd);
10500 break;
10501
10502 case GAME_CMD_GET_TIMER_STATE: // 43
10503 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Processing GET_TIMER_STATE command");
10504 game_process_timer_command(&chess_cmd);
10505 break;
10506
10507 case GAME_CMD_TIMER_TIMEOUT: // 44
10508 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Processing TIMER_TIMEOUT command");
10509 game_process_timer_command(&chess_cmd);
10510 break;
10511
10512 case GAME_CMD_MATRIX_GUARD: // 45
10513 ESP_LOGW(TAG, "Processing MATRIX_GUARD command");
10514 game_handle_matrix_guard_command(&chess_cmd);
10515 break;
10516
10517 case GAME_CMD_BOARD_SETUP_TUTORIAL: // 46
10518 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "BOARD_SETUP_TUTORIAL action=%u",
10519 (unsigned)chess_cmd.promotion_choice);
10520 switch (chess_cmd.promotion_choice) {
10521 case 0:
10522 game_enter_board_setup_tutorial();
10523 break;
10524 case 1:
10525 game_exit_board_setup_tutorial(false);
10526 break;
10527 default:
10528 ESP_LOGW(TAG, "BOARD_SETUP_TUTORIAL unknown action");
10529 break;
10530 }
10531 break;
10532
10533 case GAME_CMD_PUZZLE: // 47
10534 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "PUZZLE action/id=%u", (unsigned)chess_cmd.promotion_choice);
10535 if (chess_cmd.promotion_choice == 0U) {
10536 game_puzzle_cancel();
10537 } else if (chess_cmd.promotion_choice >= 101U &&
10538 chess_cmd.promotion_choice <= 105U) {
10539 uint8_t prep_id =
10540 (uint8_t)(chess_cmd.promotion_choice - 100U);
10541 if (!game_puzzle_enter_setup(prep_id)) {
10542 ESP_LOGW(TAG, "PUZZLE prepare failed id=%u", (unsigned)prep_id);
10543 }
10544 } else if (chess_cmd.promotion_choice >= 1U &&
10545 chess_cmd.promotion_choice <= 5U) {
10546 if (!game_puzzle_start(chess_cmd.promotion_choice)) {
10547 ESP_LOGW(TAG, "PUZZLE start failed for id=%u",
10548 (unsigned)chess_cmd.promotion_choice);
10549 }
10550 } else {
10551 ESP_LOGW(TAG, "PUZZLE unknown promotion_choice=%u",
10552 (unsigned)chess_cmd.promotion_choice);
10553 }
10554 break;
10555
10556 default:
10557 ESP_LOGW(TAG, "Unknown game command: %d", chess_cmd.type);
10558 break;
10559 }
10560
10561 // STABILITY FIX: Check limit to prevent watchdog timeout
10562 if (commands_processed >= MAX_COMMANDS_PER_CYCLE) {
10563 ESP_LOGW(TAG,
10564 "Reached max commands per cycle (%lu), processing rest in "
10565 "next cycle",
10566 MAX_COMMANDS_PER_CYCLE);
10567 break; // Process remaining commands in next cycle
10568 }
10569 }
10570
10571 // Log if we processed multiple commands
10572 if (commands_processed > 1) {
10573 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "✅ Processed %lu commands in this cycle",
10574 commands_processed);
10575 }
10576 }
10577
10578 // ============================================================================
10579 // BUTTON EVENT PROCESSING - Physical button support
10580 // ============================================================================
10581
10582 // Process button events from button_task
10583 if (button_event_queue != NULL) {
10584 button_event_t button_event;
10585 while (xQueueReceive(button_event_queue, &button_event, 0) == pdTRUE) {
10586
10587 // Only process PRESS events (ignore release, long press, double press)
10588 if (button_event.type == BUTTON_EVENT_PRESS) {
10589
10590 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🎮 Button pressed: ID=%d", button_event.button_id);
10591
10592 // Reset button (ID 8)
10593 if (button_event.button_id == 8) {
10594 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🔄 Reset button pressed - resetting game");
10595 game_reset_game();
10596 game_check_promotion_needed(); // Update LED indications
10597 continue;
10598 }
10599
10600 // Promotion buttons (ID 0-3) - physical buttons
10601 if (button_event.button_id <= 3) {
10602 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "👑 Promotion button %d pressed",
10603 button_event.button_id);
10604 game_process_promotion_button(button_event.button_id);
10605 continue;
10606 }
10607
10608 // Unknown button
10609 ESP_LOGW(TAG, "⚠️ Unknown button ID: %d", button_event.button_id);
10610 }
10611 }
10612 }
10613
10614 // Keep promo square visually anchored (does not clear board)
10615 game_update_promotion_anchor_led();
10616}
10617
10623// ============================================================================
10624// ENHANCED SMART ERROR HANDLING SYSTEM
10625// ============================================================================
10626
10632void game_handle_invalid_move_smart(const chess_move_t *move,
10633 move_error_t error) {
10634 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🚫 INVALID MOVE - Starting smart recovery");
10635
10636 if (!move) {
10637 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "❌ Critical error: NULL move pointer in error handling");
10638 return;
10639 }
10640
10641 // 1. Červené bliknutí chybného tahu
10642 uint8_t from_led = chess_pos_to_led_index(move->from_row, move->from_col);
10643 uint8_t to_led = chess_pos_to_led_index(move->to_row, move->to_col);
10644
10645 // Flash error - 5 rychlých červených bliknutí
10646 for (int i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
10647 led_set_pixel_safe(from_led, 255, 0, 0); // Red
10648 led_set_pixel_safe(to_led, 255, 0, 0); // Red
10649 vTaskDelay(pdMS_TO_TICKS(100));
10650 led_clear_board_only();
10651 vTaskDelay(pdMS_TO_TICKS(100));
10652 }
10653
10654 // 2. Rosvítit zeleně zdrojové pole (kde je figurka)
10655 led_set_pixel_safe(from_led, 0, 255, 0); // Green - kde vzít figurku
10656
10657 // 3. Rosvítit červeně kolem nevalidního cíle
10658 game_highlight_invalid_target_area(move->to_row, move->to_col);
10659
10660 // 4. Rosvítit validní tahy pro tuto figurku
10661 game_highlight_valid_moves_for_piece(move->from_row, move->from_col);
10662
10663 // 5. KRITICKÉ: Neměnit hráče, nechat ho opravit tah
10664 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "💡 Please return piece to correct square. Valid moves are "
10665 "highlighted.");
10666
10667 // 6. Nastavit internal stav "waiting for correction"
10668 error_recovery_state.waiting_for_move_correction = true;
10669 error_recovery_state.invalid_row = move->from_row;
10670 error_recovery_state.invalid_col = move->from_col;
10671}
10672
10678void game_highlight_invalid_target_area(uint8_t row, uint8_t col) {
10679 // Rosvítit červeně pole okolo nevalidního cíle
10680 for (int dr = -1; dr <= 1; dr++) {
10681 for (int dc = -1; dc <= 1; dc++) {
10682 int new_row = row + dr;
10683 int new_col = col + dc;
10684
10685 if (new_row >= 0 && new_row < 8 && new_col >= 0 && new_col < 8) {
10686 uint8_t led_index = chess_pos_to_led_index(new_row, new_col);
10687 led_set_pixel_safe(led_index, 255, 50, 50); // Light red
10688 }
10689 }
10690 }
10691}
10692
10698void game_highlight_valid_moves_for_piece(uint8_t row, uint8_t col) {
10699 piece_t piece = board[row][col];
10700 if (piece == PIECE_EMPTY)
10701 return;
10702
10703 // Najít všechny validní tahy pro tuto figurku
10704 for (int to_row = 0; to_row < 8; to_row++) {
10705 for (int to_col = 0; to_col < 8; to_col++) {
10706 chess_move_t test_move = {.from_row = row,
10707 .from_col = col,
10708 .to_row = to_row,
10709 .to_col = to_col,
10710 .piece = piece,
10711 .captured_piece = board[to_row][to_col]};
10712
10713 if (game_is_valid_move(&test_move) == MOVE_ERROR_NONE) {
10714 uint8_t led_index = chess_pos_to_led_index(to_row, to_col);
10715 led_set_pixel_safe(led_index, 0, 0, 255); // Blue - validní tahy
10716 }
10717 }
10718 }
10719}
10720
10724void game_handle_invalid_move(move_error_t error, const chess_move_t *move) {
10725 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🚨 ENTERING game_handle_invalid_move - error: %d", error);
10726
10727 // KRITICKÁ OPRAVA: Bezpečnostní kontrola move pointeru
10728 if (!move) {
10729 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "❌ Critical error: NULL move pointer in error handling");
10730 return;
10731 }
10732
10733 // Kontrola validity coordinates před použitím
10734 if (move->from_row >= 8 || move->from_col >= 8 || move->to_row >= 8 ||
10735 move->to_col >= 8) {
10736 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "❌ Critical error: Invalid coordinates in move structure");
10737 return;
10738 }
10739
10740 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🚨 Invalid move detected - smart error handling");
10741 ESP_LOGI(TAG, " Move: %c%d -> %c%d", 'a' + move->from_col,
10742 move->from_row + 1, 'a' + move->to_col, move->to_row + 1);
10743
10744 // Remote / zastaralý UI může poslat tah z prázdného pole. Simulace „figurka je
10745 // fyzicky na to“ kopíruje board[from] na board[to]; když je from prázdné,
10746 // smaže se figurka na cíli (logicky „zmizí“). HW recovery v tomto případě
10747 // nedává smysl — desku neměnit.
10748 piece_t src_piece = board[move->from_row][move->from_col];
10749 if (src_piece == PIECE_EMPTY) {
10750 ESP_LOGW(TAG,
10751 "[STAGING] game_handle_invalid_move: empty source square — "
10752 "skipping board mutation and LED recovery (error=%d)",
10753 (int)error);
10754 return;
10755 }
10756
10757 // Chytrý error handling podle požadavků
10758
10759 // 1. Nastavit červené pole na neplatné pozici
10760 error_recovery_state.has_invalid_piece = true;
10761 error_recovery_state.invalid_row = move->to_row;
10762 error_recovery_state.invalid_col = move->to_col;
10763 error_recovery_state.piece_type = board[move->from_row][move->from_col];
10764
10765 // 2. Zapamatovat si původní validní pozici (odkud byl tah)
10766 error_recovery_state.original_valid_row = move->from_row;
10767 error_recovery_state.original_valid_col = move->from_col;
10768
10769 // 3. Přesunout figurku na neplatnou pozici (simulace HW reality)
10770 board[move->to_row][move->to_col] = board[move->from_row][move->from_col];
10771 board[move->from_row][move->from_col] = PIECE_EMPTY;
10772
10773 // 4. JASNÉ VIZUÁLNÍ UPOZORNĚNÍ - červené pole + blikání pro upoutání
10774 // pozornosti
10775 led_clear_all_safe();
10776 uint8_t invalid_led = chess_pos_to_led_index(move->to_row, move->to_col);
10777
10778 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🚨 STARTING ERROR ANIMATION - RED BLINKING");
10779
10780 // Blikání pro upoutání pozornosti (krátké, non-blocking)
10781 for (int blink = 0; blink < 4; blink++) {
10782 led_set_pixel_safe(invalid_led, 255, 0, 0); // Červená
10783 vTaskDelay(pdMS_TO_TICKS(150));
10784 led_set_pixel_safe(invalid_led, 0, 0, 0); // Zhasnout
10785 vTaskDelay(pdMS_TO_TICKS(150));
10786 }
10787
10788 // Nechat červené pole trvale rozsvícené
10789 led_set_pixel_safe(invalid_led, 255, 0, 0);
10790
10791 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🔴 RED SQUARE ACTIVE: %c%d (piece must be lifted from here)",
10792 'a' + move->to_col, move->to_row + 1);
10793 ESP_LOGI(TAG,
10794 "📍 RECOVERY TARGET: Valid moves will show from %c%d when piece is "
10795 "lifted",
10796 'a' + move->from_col, move->from_row + 1);
10797 ESP_LOGI(TAG,
10798 "💡 USER ACTION REQUIRED: Lift piece from red square to continue");
10799
10800 // KRITICKÁ OPRAVA: NON-BLOCKING error handling - žádné loops!
10801 // Červené pole zůstane rozsvícené dokud se figurka nezvedne
10802 // Recovery se řeší v game_process_pickup_command()
10803
10804 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "💡 Error recovery active - red square will stay lit until "
10805 "piece is lifted");
10806}
10807
10812void game_process_move_command(const void *move_cmd_ptr) {
10813 typedef struct {
10814 uint8_t command_type;
10815 uint8_t from_row;
10816 uint8_t from_col;
10817 uint8_t to_row;
10818 uint8_t to_col;
10819 } move_command_t;
10820
10821 const move_command_t *move_cmd = (const move_command_t *)move_cmd_ptr;
10822
10823 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Processing move: [%d,%d] -> [%d,%d]", move_cmd->from_row,
10824 move_cmd->from_col, move_cmd->to_row, move_cmd->to_col);
10825
10826 // Validate coordinates
10827 if (move_cmd->from_row >= 8 || move_cmd->from_col >= 8 ||
10828 move_cmd->to_row >= 8 || move_cmd->to_col >= 8) {
10829 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Invalid coordinates: out of board range");
10830 return;
10831 }
10832
10833 // Get pieces at source and destination
10834 piece_t from_piece = board[move_cmd->from_row][move_cmd->from_col];
10835 piece_t to_piece = board[move_cmd->to_row][move_cmd->to_col];
10836
10837 // Check if source square has a piece
10838 if (from_piece == PIECE_EMPTY) {
10839 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Invalid move: no piece at [%d,%d]", move_cmd->from_row,
10840 move_cmd->from_col);
10841 return;
10842 }
10843
10844 // Check if piece belongs to current player
10845 bool is_white_piece =
10846 (from_piece >= PIECE_WHITE_PAWN && from_piece <= PIECE_WHITE_KING);
10847 bool is_black_piece =
10848 (from_piece >= PIECE_BLACK_PAWN && from_piece <= PIECE_BLACK_KING);
10849
10850 if ((current_player == PLAYER_WHITE && !is_white_piece) ||
10851 (current_player == PLAYER_BLACK && !is_black_piece)) {
10852 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Invalid move: cannot move opponent's piece");
10853 return;
10854 }
10855
10856 // Check if destination is occupied by own piece
10857 if (to_piece != PIECE_EMPTY) {
10858 bool dest_is_white =
10859 (to_piece >= PIECE_WHITE_PAWN && to_piece <= PIECE_WHITE_KING);
10860 bool dest_is_black =
10861 (to_piece >= PIECE_BLACK_PAWN && to_piece <= PIECE_BLACK_KING);
10862
10863 if ((current_player == PLAYER_WHITE && dest_is_white) ||
10864 (current_player == PLAYER_BLACK && dest_is_black)) {
10865 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Invalid move: destination occupied by own piece");
10866 return;
10867 }
10868 }
10869
10870 // TODO: Add proper chess move validation (piece-specific rules)
10871 // For now, just allow any move that passes basic checks
10872
10873 // Create chess move structure for validation
10874 chess_move_t chess_move = {.from_row = move_cmd->from_row,
10875 .from_col = move_cmd->from_col,
10876 .to_row = move_cmd->to_row,
10877 .to_col = move_cmd->to_col,
10878 .piece = from_piece,
10879 .captured_piece = to_piece,
10880 .timestamp = esp_timer_get_time() / 1000};
10881
10882 // Validate move using enhanced validation
10883 move_error_t move_error = game_is_valid_move(&chess_move);
10884 if (move_error != MOVE_ERROR_NONE) {
10885 // NEW ERROR HANDLING: Don't return, handle invalid move properly
10886 game_handle_invalid_move(move_error, &chess_move);
10887 return;
10888 }
10889
10890 // Use game_execute_move() instead of direct board
10891 // manipulation This ensures all game state is properly updated (castling
10892 // flags, en passant, etc.) and player is changed correctly
10893 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Executing move: %s piece from [%d,%d] to [%d,%d]",
10894 (is_white_piece ? "White" : "Black"), move_cmd->from_row,
10895 move_cmd->from_col, move_cmd->to_row, move_cmd->to_col);
10896
10897 // Execute the move using proper game_execute_move() function
10898 if (!game_execute_move(&chess_move)) {
10899 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to execute move from [%d,%d] to [%d,%d]",
10900 move_cmd->from_row, move_cmd->from_col, move_cmd->to_row,
10901 move_cmd->to_col);
10902 // Note: move_cmd doesn't have response_queue, this is legacy function
10903 return;
10904 }
10905
10906 // HRÁČ SE UŽ ZMĚNIL V game_execute_move() - použít aktuálního hráče
10907 player_t previous_player =
10908 (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? PLAYER_BLACK : PLAYER_WHITE;
10909
10910 // Spustit move path animaci PŘED změnou hráče (podle starého projektu)
10911 uint8_t from_led =
10912 chess_pos_to_led_index(move_cmd->from_row, move_cmd->from_col);
10913 uint8_t to_led = chess_pos_to_led_index(move_cmd->to_row, move_cmd->to_col);
10914 led_command_t move_path_cmd = {
10915 .type = LED_CMD_ANIM_MOVE_PATH,
10916 .led_index = from_led,
10917 .red = 255,
10918 .green = 255,
10919 .blue = 0, // Yellow
10920 .duration_ms = 1000,
10921 .data = &to_led // Cílová pozice v data
10922 };
10923 led_execute_command_new(&move_path_cmd);
10924
10925 // STABILITY FIX: Animace běží asynchronně, neblokujeme zpracování
10926 // Animace jsou spuštěny v led_task a běží nezávisle
10927 // (vTaskDelay odstraněn pro lepší throughput)
10928
10929 // KRITICKÉ: Endgame kontrola PŘED player change animací!
10930 // Pokud je endgame, player change se NESPOUŠTÍ
10931 game_state_t end_game_result = game_check_end_game_conditions();
10932 if (end_game_result == GAME_STATE_FINISHED) {
10933 current_game_state = GAME_STATE_FINISHED;
10934 game_active = false;
10935
10936 // Najít pozici krále vítěze pro endgame animaci
10937 player_t winner =
10938 previous_player; // Vítěz je předchozí hráč (ten, kdo udělal tah)
10939 uint8_t king_pos = 28; // default e4
10940 for (int i = 0; i < 64; i++) {
10941 piece_t piece = board[i / 8][i % 8];
10942 if ((winner == PLAYER_WHITE && piece == PIECE_WHITE_KING) ||
10943 (winner == PLAYER_BLACK && piece == PIECE_BLACK_KING)) {
10944 king_pos = i;
10945 break;
10946 }
10947 }
10948
10949 ESP_LOGI(TAG,
10950 "🎯 Game finished in move command! Starting endgame animation at "
10951 "position %d",
10952 king_pos);
10953
10954 // Spustit endgame animaci (wave z krále vítěze)
10955 led_command_t endgame_cmd = {.type = LED_CMD_ANIM_ENDGAME,
10956 .led_index = king_pos,
10957 .red = 255,
10958 .green = 255,
10959 .blue = 0, // Yellow
10960 .duration_ms = 0, // Endless
10961 .data = NULL};
10962 led_execute_command_new(&endgame_cmd);
10963
10964 ESP_LOGI(TAG,
10965 "✅ Endgame animation started - player change animation SKIPPED");
10966 } else {
10967 // Není endgame - spustit player change animaci s NOVÝM hráčem
10968 // (current_player)
10969 uint8_t player_color =
10970 (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? 1 : 0; // 1=white, 0=black
10971 led_command_t player_change_cmd = {
10972 .type = LED_CMD_ANIM_PLAYER_CHANGE, // Použít
10973 // ANIM_PLAYER_CHANGE místo
10974 // PLAYER_CHANGE
10975 .led_index = 0,
10976 .red = 0,
10977 .green = 0,
10978 .blue = 0,
10979 .duration_ms = 0,
10980 .data = &player_color // Předat barvu NOVÉHO hráče
10981 };
10982 led_execute_command_new(&player_change_cmd);
10983
10984 // Zkontrolovat, zda je nový hráč v šachu
10985 bool in_check = game_is_king_in_check(current_player);
10986 if (in_check) {
10987 // Najít pozici krále
10988 int king_row = -1, king_col = -1;
10989 piece_t king_piece = (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? PIECE_WHITE_KING
10990 : PIECE_BLACK_KING;
10991 for (int row = 0; row < 8; row++) {
10992 for (int col = 0; col < 8; col++) {
10993 if (board[row][col] == king_piece) {
10994 king_row = row;
10995 king_col = col;
10996 break;
10997 }
10998 }
10999 if (king_row != -1)
11000 break;
11001 }
11002
11003 if (king_row != -1 && king_col != -1) {
11004 if (game_led_guidance_show_check_anim()) {
11005 uint8_t king_led_index = chess_pos_to_led_index(king_row, king_col);
11006 // Spustit check animaci - růžové svícení na králi
11007 led_command_t check_cmd = {.type = LED_CMD_ANIM_CHECK,
11008 .led_index = king_led_index,
11009 .red = 0,
11010 .green = 0,
11011 .blue = 0,
11012 .duration_ms =
11013 0, // Trvalé až do dalšího tahu
11014 .data = NULL};
11015 led_execute_command_new(&check_cmd);
11016 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "⚠️ CHECK! %s is in check",
11017 current_player == PLAYER_WHITE ? "White" : "Black");
11018 }
11019 }
11020 }
11021 }
11022
11023 // History and last_move tracking is already done in
11024 // game_execute_move() - no need to duplicate here
11025
11026 // Track captured pieces
11027 if (to_piece != PIECE_EMPTY) {
11028 if (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) {
11029 // Black piece was captured by white
11030 if (black_captured_index < 16) {
11031 black_captured_pieces[black_captured_index++] = to_piece;
11032 black_captured_count++;
11033 }
11034 } else {
11035 // White piece was captured by black
11036 if (white_captured_index < 16) {
11037 white_captured_pieces[white_captured_index++] = to_piece;
11038 white_captured_count++;
11039 }
11040 }
11041 moves_without_capture = 0; // Reset counter on capture
11042 } else {
11043 moves_without_capture++; // Increment counter for non-capture moves
11044 if (moves_without_capture > max_moves_without_capture) {
11045 max_moves_without_capture = moves_without_capture;
11046 }
11047 }
11048
11049 // Update time statistics
11050 uint32_t current_time = esp_timer_get_time() / 1000;
11051 uint32_t move_time = current_time - last_move_time;
11052
11053 if (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) {
11054 // Black just moved
11055 black_time_total += move_time;
11056 black_moves_count++;
11057 } else {
11058 // White just moved
11059 white_time_total += move_time;
11060 white_moves_count++;
11061 }
11062
11063 // Update position history for draw detection
11064 game_add_position_to_history();
11065
11066 // Note: End-game conditions already checked earlier in this function (line
11067 // 6612) If game finished, it was already handled with endgame animation
11068
11069 // Check if king is in check
11070 if (game_is_king_in_check(current_player)) {
11071 if (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) {
11072 white_checks++;
11073 } else {
11074 black_checks++;
11075 }
11076 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "⚠️ CHECK! %s king is under attack!",
11077 (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? "White" : "Black");
11078 }
11079
11080 // Update last move time for next move
11081 last_move_time = current_time;
11082
11083 // Display updated board (check auto-display setting)
11084 // Note: Auto-display control is in UART task, board is always shown for now
11085 game_print_board();
11086
11087 // Check for check/checkmate conditions
11088 game_check_game_conditions();
11089}
11090
11100void game_show_move_animation(uint8_t from_row, uint8_t from_col,
11101 uint8_t to_row, uint8_t to_col, piece_t piece,
11102 piece_t captured) {
11103 // Convert coordinates to chess notation
11104 char from_square[4], to_square[4];
11105 game_coords_to_square(from_row, from_col, from_square);
11106 game_coords_to_square(to_row, to_col, to_square);
11107
11108 // Get piece symbol and name
11109 const char *piece_symbol = piece_symbols[piece];
11110 const char *piece_name = game_get_piece_name(piece);
11111
11112 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "╭─────────────────────────────────╮");
11113 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "│ MOVE ANIMATION │");
11114 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "├─────────────────────────────────┤");
11115 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "│ %s %s moves from %s to %s │", piece_symbol, piece_name,
11116 from_square, to_square);
11117
11118 if (captured != PIECE_EMPTY) {
11119 const char *captured_symbol = piece_symbols[captured];
11120 const char *captured_name = game_get_piece_name(captured);
11121 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "│ Captures: %s %s │", captured_symbol,
11122 captured_name);
11123 } else {
11124 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "│ No capture │");
11125 }
11126
11127 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "╰─────────────────────────────────╯");
11128
11129 // ED: LED animations are now handled in game_process_drop_command
11130 // This function only shows text information
11131
11132 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🎯 Move: %s -> %s", from_square, to_square);
11133 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "♟️ %s %s moves...", piece_symbol, piece_name);
11134 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "✨ ...to %s", to_square);
11135
11136 if (captured != PIECE_EMPTY) {
11137 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "💥 %s captured!", game_get_piece_name(captured));
11138 }
11139
11140 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "✅ Move completed!");
11141}
11142
11148void game_show_player_change_animation(player_t previous_player,
11149 player_t current_player) {
11150 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🔄 Showing player change animation: %s -> %s",
11151 previous_player == PLAYER_WHITE ? "White" : "Black",
11152 current_player == PLAYER_WHITE ? "White" : "Black");
11153
11154 // Clear board first
11155 led_clear_board_only();
11156 vTaskDelay(pdMS_TO_TICKS(200));
11157
11158 // ED: Find all pieces first, then animate all columns simultaneously
11159 int prev_pieces[8] = {-1, -1, -1, -1,
11160 -1, -1, -1, -1}; // Row positions for each column
11161 int curr_pieces[8] = {-1, -1, -1, -1,
11162 -1, -1, -1, -1}; // Row positions for each column
11163
11164 // Find closest pieces for all columns
11165 for (int col = 0; col < 8; col++) {
11166 // Find closest piece of previous player (closest to opponent's side)
11167 if (previous_player == PLAYER_WHITE) {
11168 // Look from top (row 7) down to find white piece closest to black side
11169 for (int row = 7; row >= 0; row--) {
11170 piece_t piece = board[row][col];
11171 if (piece >= PIECE_WHITE_PAWN && piece <= PIECE_WHITE_KING) {
11172 prev_pieces[col] = row;
11173 break;
11174 }
11175 }
11176 } else {
11177 // Look from bottom (row 0) up to find black piece closest to white side
11178 for (int row = 0; row < 8; row++) {
11179 piece_t piece = board[row][col];
11180 if (piece >= PIECE_BLACK_PAWN && piece <= PIECE_BLACK_KING) {
11181 prev_pieces[col] = row;
11182 break;
11183 }
11184 }
11185 }
11186
11187 // Find closest piece of current player (closest to previous player's
11188 // side)
11189 if (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) {
11190 // Look from bottom (row 0) up to find white piece closest to black side
11191 for (int row = 0; row < 8; row++) {
11192 piece_t piece = board[row][col];
11193 if (piece >= PIECE_WHITE_PAWN && piece <= PIECE_WHITE_KING) {
11194 curr_pieces[col] = row;
11195 break;
11196 }
11197 }
11198 } else {
11199 // Look from top (row 7) down to find black piece closest to white side
11200 for (int row = 7; row >= 0; row--) {
11201 piece_t piece = board[row][col];
11202 if (piece >= PIECE_BLACK_PAWN && piece <= PIECE_BLACK_KING) {
11203 curr_pieces[col] = row;
11204 break;
11205 }
11206 }
11207 }
11208 }
11209
11210 // ENHANCED: Ultra-smooth player change animation with harmonious colors
11211 for (int step = 0; step < 8; step++) { // Reduced steps for speed
11212 float progress = (float)step / 7.0f;
11213
11214 // Clear board first
11215 led_clear_board_only();
11216
11217 // Animate all columns at once with ultra-smooth trail effect
11218 for (int col = 0; col < 8; col++) {
11219 if (prev_pieces[col] != -1 && curr_pieces[col] != -1) {
11220 // Create ultra-smooth trail effect - show multiple points along the
11221 // path
11222 for (int trail = 0; trail < 5; trail++) {
11223 float trail_progress = progress - (trail * 0.12f);
11224 if (trail_progress < 0)
11225 continue;
11226 if (trail_progress > 1)
11227 break;
11228
11229 // Calculate intermediate position with smooth easing
11230 float eased_progress = trail_progress * trail_progress *
11231 (3.0f - 2.0f * trail_progress); // Smooth step
11232 int inter_row =
11233 prev_pieces[col] +
11234 (curr_pieces[col] - prev_pieces[col]) * eased_progress;
11235 int inter_col = col;
11236 uint8_t inter_led = chess_pos_to_led_index(inter_row, inter_col);
11237
11238 // Harmonious color transition: Deep Blue -> Purple -> Magenta ->
11239 // Pink
11240 // -> Gold -> Yellow
11241 uint8_t red, green, blue;
11242 if (trail_progress < 0.16f) {
11243 // Deep Blue to Purple
11244 float local_progress = trail_progress / 0.16f;
11245 red = (uint8_t)(128 * local_progress);
11246 green = 0;
11247 blue = 255;
11248 } else if (trail_progress < 0.33f) {
11249 // Purple to Magenta
11250 float local_progress = (trail_progress - 0.16f) / 0.17f;
11251 red = 128 + (uint8_t)(127 * local_progress);
11252 green = 0;
11253 blue = 255;
11254 } else if (trail_progress < 0.5f) {
11255 // Magenta to Pink
11256 float local_progress = (trail_progress - 0.33f) / 0.17f;
11257 red = 255;
11258 green = (uint8_t)(128 * local_progress);
11259 blue = 255 - (uint8_t)(128 * local_progress);
11260 } else if (trail_progress < 0.66f) {
11261 // Pink to Gold
11262 float local_progress = (trail_progress - 0.5f) / 0.16f;
11263 red = 255;
11264 green = 128 + (uint8_t)(127 * local_progress);
11265 blue = 127 - (uint8_t)(127 * local_progress);
11266 } else if (trail_progress < 0.83f) {
11267 // Gold to Yellow
11268 red = 255;
11269 green = 255;
11270 blue = 0;
11271 } else {
11272 // Yellow to Bright White
11273 float local_progress = (trail_progress - 0.83f) / 0.17f;
11274 red = 255;
11275 green = 255;
11276 blue = (uint8_t)(255 * local_progress);
11277 }
11278
11279 // Enhanced trail brightness effect - smoother gradient
11280 float trail_brightness = 1.0f - (trail * 0.18f);
11281 red = (uint8_t)(red * trail_brightness);
11282 green = (uint8_t)(green * trail_brightness);
11283 blue = (uint8_t)(blue * trail_brightness);
11284
11285 // Enhanced pulsing effect with multiple harmonics
11286 float pulse1 = 0.7f + 0.3f * sin(progress * 6.28f + trail * 1.26f);
11287 float pulse2 = 0.9f + 0.1f * sin(progress * 12.56f + trail * 2.51f);
11288 float combined_pulse = pulse1 * pulse2;
11289
11290 red = (uint8_t)(red * combined_pulse);
11291 green = (uint8_t)(green * combined_pulse);
11292 blue = (uint8_t)(blue * combined_pulse);
11293
11294 led_set_pixel_safe(inter_led, red, green, blue);
11295 }
11296 }
11297 }
11298
11299 vTaskDelay(pdMS_TO_TICKS(25)); // Faster animation - half the time
11300 }
11301
11302 // Clear board after animation
11303 led_clear_board_only();
11304 vTaskDelay(pdMS_TO_TICKS(200));
11305
11306 // Finally, highlight movable pieces for current player
11307 game_highlight_movable_pieces();
11308}
11309
11313void game_test_move_animation(void) {
11314 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🎬 Testing move animation...");
11315
11316 // Test move from e2 to e4
11317 // uint8_t to_led = chess_pos_to_led_index(3, 4); // e4 - removed unused
11318 // variable
11319
11320 // Progressive color animation from green to blue - ZRYCHLENO
11321 for (int step = 0; step < 6; step++) { // ZRYCHLENO: z 10 na 6 kroků
11322 float progress = (float)step / 5.0f;
11323
11324 // Calculate intermediate position
11325 int inter_row = 1 + (3 - 1) * progress;
11326 int inter_col = 4;
11327 uint8_t inter_led = chess_pos_to_led_index(inter_row, inter_col);
11328
11329 // Calculate color transition (green -> blue)
11330 uint8_t red = 0;
11331 uint8_t green = 255 - (255 * progress); // 255 -> 0
11332 uint8_t blue = 0 + (255 * progress); // 0 -> 255
11333
11334 led_clear_board_only();
11335 led_set_pixel_safe(inter_led, red, green, blue);
11336 vTaskDelay(pdMS_TO_TICKS(50)); // ZRYCHLENO: z 100ms na 50ms
11337 }
11338
11339 // Odstraněno modré bliknutí na konci - animace končí plynule
11340}
11341
11345void game_test_player_change_animation(void) {
11346 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🎬 Testing player change animation...");
11347 game_show_player_change_animation(PLAYER_WHITE, PLAYER_BLACK);
11348}
11349
11353void game_test_castle_animation(void) {
11354 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🎬 Testing castling animation...");
11355
11356 // Test white kingside castling
11357 uint8_t king_from_led = chess_pos_to_led_index(0, 4); // e1
11358 uint8_t king_to_led = chess_pos_to_led_index(0, 6); // g1
11359 uint8_t rook_from_led = chess_pos_to_led_index(0, 7); // h1
11360 uint8_t rook_to_led = chess_pos_to_led_index(0, 5); // f1
11361
11362 // 1. Highlight king and rook positions (gold)
11363 led_set_pixel_safe(king_from_led, 255, 215, 0); // Gold
11364 led_set_pixel_safe(rook_from_led, 255, 215, 0); // Gold
11365 vTaskDelay(pdMS_TO_TICKS(500));
11366
11367 // 2. Show castling animation
11368 led_command_t castle_cmd = {.type = LED_CMD_ANIM_CASTLE,
11369 .led_index = king_from_led,
11370 .red = 255,
11371 .green = 215,
11372 .blue = 0, // Gold
11373 .duration_ms = 1500,
11374 .data = &king_to_led};
11375 led_execute_command_new(&castle_cmd);
11376 vTaskDelay(pdMS_TO_TICKS(1000));
11377
11378 // 3. Highlight final positions (green)
11379 led_set_pixel_safe(king_to_led, 0, 255, 0); // Green
11380 led_set_pixel_safe(rook_to_led, 0, 255, 0); // Green
11381 vTaskDelay(pdMS_TO_TICKS(500));
11382
11383 // 4. Clear highlights
11384 led_clear_board_only();
11385}
11386

11419

11433
11437void game_check_game_conditions(void) {
11438 // TODO: Implement check detection
11439 // For now, just log the current state
11440
11441 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🔍 Checking game conditions...");
11442
11443 // Check if king is in check (simplified)
11444 bool white_king_found = false;
11445 bool black_king_found = false;
11446
11447 for (int row = 0; row < 8; row++) {
11448 for (int col = 0; col < 8; col++) {
11449 if (board[row][col] == PIECE_WHITE_KING) {
11450 white_king_found = true;
11451 } else if (board[row][col] == PIECE_BLACK_KING) {
11452 black_king_found = true;
11453 }
11454 }
11455 }
11456
11457 if (!white_king_found) {
11458 ESP_LOGW(TAG, "⚠️ WHITE KING MISSING - Black wins!");
11459 current_game_state = GAME_STATE_FINISHED;
11460 } else if (!black_king_found) {
11461 ESP_LOGW(TAG, "⚠️ BLACK KING MISSING - White wins!");
11462 current_game_state = GAME_STATE_FINISHED;
11463 }
11464
11465 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Game state: %s",
11466 (current_game_state == GAME_STATE_ACTIVE) ? "Active"
11467 : (current_game_state == GAME_STATE_IDLE) ? "Idle"
11468 : (current_game_state == GAME_STATE_PAUSED) ? "Paused"
11469 : "Finished");
11470}
11471
11472// ============================================================================
11473// END-GAME DETECTION
11474// ============================================================================
11475
11481bool game_is_king_in_check(player_t player) {
11482 // Find king position
11483 int king_row = -1, king_col = -1;
11484 piece_t king_piece =
11485 (player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? PIECE_WHITE_KING : PIECE_BLACK_KING;
11486
11487 for (int row = 0; row < 8; row++) {
11488 for (int col = 0; col < 8; col++) {
11489 if (board[row][col] == king_piece) {
11490 king_row = row;
11491 king_col = col;
11492 break;
11493 }
11494 }
11495 if (king_row != -1)
11496 break;
11497 }
11498
11499 if (king_row == -1)
11500 return false; // King not found
11501
11502 // Check if any opponent piece can capture the king
11503 piece_t opponent_pieces_start =
11504 (player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? PIECE_BLACK_PAWN : PIECE_WHITE_PAWN;
11505 piece_t opponent_pieces_end =
11506 (player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? PIECE_BLACK_KING : PIECE_WHITE_KING;
11507
11508 for (int row = 0; row < 8; row++) {
11509 for (int col = 0; col < 8; col++) {
11510 piece_t piece = board[row][col];
11511 if (piece >= opponent_pieces_start && piece <= opponent_pieces_end) {
11512 // Create temporary move to check if it can capture king
11513 chess_move_t temp_move = {.from_row = row,
11514 .from_col = col,
11515 .to_row = king_row,
11516 .to_col = king_col,
11517 .piece = piece,
11518 .captured_piece = king_piece,
11519 .timestamp = 0};
11520
11521 // Check if this move is valid (would capture king)
11522 if (game_validate_piece_move_enhanced(&temp_move, piece) ==
11523 MOVE_ERROR_NONE) {
11524 return true; // King is in check
11525 }
11526 }
11527 }
11528 }
11529
11530 return false;
11531}
11532
11538bool game_has_legal_moves(player_t player) {
11539 // Use existing move generation system instead of brute force
11540 uint32_t moves_count = game_generate_legal_moves(player);
11541
11542 return (moves_count > 0);
11543}
11544
11552bool game_is_enemy_piece(piece_t piece, player_t player) {
11553 if (piece == PIECE_EMPTY)
11554 return false;
11555 return (player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? game_is_black_piece(piece)
11556 : game_is_white_piece(piece);
11557}
11558
11559bool game_is_insufficient_material(void) {
11560 int white_pieces = 0, black_pieces = 0;
11561 int white_minors = 0, black_minors = 0; // Knights and bishops
11562 bool white_has_bishop = false, black_has_bishop = false;
11563 bool white_has_knight = false, black_has_knight = false;
11564 bool white_bishop_color = false,
11565 black_bishop_color = false; // false = light, true = dark
11566
11567 // Count pieces and analyze material
11568 for (int row = 0; row < 8; row++) {
11569 for (int col = 0; col < 8; col++) {
11570 piece_t piece = board[row][col];
11571
11572 switch (piece) {
11573 case PIECE_WHITE_PAWN:
11574 case PIECE_WHITE_ROOK:
11575 case PIECE_WHITE_QUEEN:
11576 white_pieces++;
11577 break;
11578 case PIECE_WHITE_BISHOP:
11579 white_pieces++;
11580 white_minors++;
11581 white_has_bishop = true;
11582 white_bishop_color = ((row + col) % 2 == 0); // Light squares = false
11583 break;
11584 case PIECE_WHITE_KNIGHT:
11585 white_pieces++;
11586 white_minors++;
11587 white_has_knight = true;
11588 break;
11589 case PIECE_BLACK_PAWN:
11590 case PIECE_BLACK_ROOK:
11591 case PIECE_BLACK_QUEEN:
11592 black_pieces++;
11593 break;
11594 case PIECE_BLACK_BISHOP:
11595 black_pieces++;
11596 black_minors++;
11597 black_has_bishop = true;
11598 black_bishop_color = ((row + col) % 2 == 0); // Light squares = false
11599 break;
11600 case PIECE_BLACK_KNIGHT:
11601 black_pieces++;
11602 black_minors++;
11603 black_has_knight = true;
11604 break;
11605 default:
11606 break;
11607 }
11608 }
11609 }
11610
11611 // King vs King - always insufficient
11612 if (white_pieces == 0 && black_pieces == 0) {
11613 return true;
11614 }
11615
11616 // King + minor vs King - insufficient
11617 if ((white_pieces == 1 && black_pieces == 0) ||
11618 (white_pieces == 0 && black_pieces == 1)) {
11619 return true;
11620 }
11621
11622 // King + Bishop vs King + Bishop (same color) - insufficient
11623 if (white_pieces == 1 && black_pieces == 1 && white_has_bishop &&
11624 black_has_bishop && white_bishop_color == black_bishop_color) {
11625 return true;
11626 }
11627
11628 // King + Knight vs King + Knight - insufficient
11629 if (white_pieces == 1 && black_pieces == 1 && white_has_knight &&
11630 black_has_knight) {
11631 return true;
11632 }
11633
11634 // King + 2 Knights vs King - insufficient (very rare, but technically
11635 // insufficient)
11636 if ((white_pieces == 2 && black_pieces == 0 && white_minors == 2 &&
11637 white_has_knight) ||
11638 (white_pieces == 0 && black_pieces == 2 && black_minors == 2 &&
11639 black_has_knight)) {
11640 return true;
11641 }
11642
11643 return false; // Sufficient material for checkmate
11644}
11645
11674game_state_t game_check_end_game_conditions(void) {
11675 // Check if current player is in check
11676 bool in_check = game_is_king_in_check(current_player);
11677
11678 // Check if current player has legal moves
11679 bool has_moves = game_has_legal_moves(current_player);
11680
11681 if (in_check && !has_moves) {
11682 // Checkmate - určit typ podle posledního tahu
11683 game_result = GAME_STATE_FINISHED;
11684 current_result_type = (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? RESULT_BLACK_WINS
11685 : RESULT_WHITE_WINS;
11686
11687 // Rozlišit typ šachmatu podle posledního tahu
11688 switch (last_move_type) {
11689 case LAST_MOVE_EN_PASSANT:
11690 current_endgame_reason = ENDGAME_REASON_CHECKMATE_EN_PASSANT;
11691 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🎯 CHECKMATE BY EN PASSANT! %s wins in %" PRIu32 " moves!",
11692 (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? "Black" : "White",
11693 move_count);
11694 break;
11695 case LAST_MOVE_CASTLING:
11696 current_endgame_reason = ENDGAME_REASON_CHECKMATE_CASTLING;
11697 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🎯 CHECKMATE BY CASTLING! %s wins in %" PRIu32 " moves!",
11698 (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? "Black" : "White",
11699 move_count);
11700 break;
11701 case LAST_MOVE_PROMOTION:
11702 current_endgame_reason = ENDGAME_REASON_CHECKMATE_PROMOTION;
11703 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🎯 CHECKMATE BY PROMOTION! %s wins in %" PRIu32 " moves!",
11704 (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? "Black" : "White",
11705 move_count);
11706 break;
11707 case LAST_MOVE_DISCOVERED:
11708 current_endgame_reason = ENDGAME_REASON_CHECKMATE_DISCOVERED;
11709 ESP_LOGI(
11710 TAG,
11711 "🎯 CHECKMATE BY DISCOVERED CHECK! %s wins in %" PRIu32 " moves!",
11712 (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? "Black" : "White", move_count);
11713 break;
11714 default:
11715 current_endgame_reason = ENDGAME_REASON_CHECKMATE;
11716 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🎯 CHECKMATE! %s wins in %" PRIu32 " moves!",
11717 (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? "Black" : "White",
11718 move_count);
11719 break;
11720 }
11721
11722 game_update_endgame_statistics(current_result_type);
11723 endgame_report_requested = true; // Požadavek na report
11724
11725 // Zastavit timer (hra skončila)
11726 timer_pause();
11727
11728 // UNIFIED VICTORY ANIMATION
11729 // Checkmate = Victory for current_player (who delivered mate? No wait.)
11730 // Logic: if current_player is in check & no moves, they LOST.
11731 // Winner is the OPPONENT.
11732 player_t winner =
11733 (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? PLAYER_BLACK : PLAYER_WHITE;
11734 game_trigger_victory_animation(winner);
11735
11736 return GAME_STATE_FINISHED;
11737 } else if (!in_check && !has_moves) {
11738 // Stalemate
11739 game_result = GAME_STATE_FINISHED;
11740 current_result_type = RESULT_DRAW_STALEMATE;
11741 current_endgame_reason = ENDGAME_REASON_STALEMATE; // Označit jako stalemate
11742 game_update_endgame_statistics(current_result_type);
11743 endgame_report_requested = true; // Požadavek na report
11744
11745 // Zastavit timer (hra skončila)
11746 timer_pause();
11747
11748 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🤝 STALEMATE! Game drawn in %" PRIu32 " moves", move_count);
11749 return GAME_STATE_FINISHED;
11750 }
11751
11752 // BUG #13: Check for draw conditions
11753 // 50-move rule: 50 plných tahů = 100 půltahů (half-moves/ply)
11754 // moves_without_capture počítá půltahy, takže >= 100
11755 if (moves_without_capture >= 100) {
11756 game_result = GAME_STATE_FINISHED;
11757 current_result_type = RESULT_DRAW_50_MOVE;
11758 current_endgame_reason =
11759 ENDGAME_REASON_50_MOVE; // Označit jako 50-move rule
11760 game_update_endgame_statistics(current_result_type);
11761 endgame_report_requested = true; // Požadavek na report
11762
11763 // Zastavit timer (hra skončila)
11764 timer_pause();
11765
11766 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🤝 DRAW! 50 moves without capture (50-move rule)");
11767 return GAME_STATE_FINISHED;
11768 }
11769
11770 if (game_is_position_repeated()) {
11771 game_result = GAME_STATE_FINISHED;
11772 current_result_type = RESULT_DRAW_REPETITION;
11773 current_endgame_reason =
11774 ENDGAME_REASON_REPETITION; // Označit jako threefold repetition
11775 game_update_endgame_statistics(current_result_type);
11776 endgame_report_requested = true; // Požadavek na report
11777
11778 // Zastavit timer (hra skončila)
11779 timer_pause();
11780
11781 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🤝 DRAW! Position repeated (draw by repetition)");
11782 return GAME_STATE_FINISHED;
11783 }
11784
11785 // Check for insufficient material
11786 if (game_is_insufficient_material()) {
11787 game_result = GAME_STATE_FINISHED;
11788 current_result_type = RESULT_DRAW_INSUFFICIENT;
11789 current_endgame_reason =
11790 ENDGAME_REASON_INSUFFICIENT; // Označit jako insufficient material
11791 game_update_endgame_statistics(current_result_type);
11792 endgame_report_requested = true; // Požadavek na report
11793
11794 // Zastavit timer (hra skončila)
11795 timer_pause();
11796
11797 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🤝 DRAW! Insufficient material to checkmate");
11798 return GAME_STATE_FINISHED;
11799 }
11800
11801 return GAME_STATE_ACTIVE;
11802}
11803
11804// ============================================================================
11805// GAME CONTROL FUNCTIONS
11806// ============================================================================
11807
11812void game_toggle_timer(bool enabled) {
11813 timer_enabled = enabled;
11814 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Game timer %s", enabled ? "enabled" : "disabled");
11815}
11816
11821void game_save_game(const char *game_name) {
11822 if (game_name == NULL || strlen(game_name) == 0) {
11823 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Invalid game name for save");
11824 return;
11825 }
11826
11827 // This is a placeholder - in a real implementation you would:
11828 // 1. Save board state to NVS
11829 // 2. Save move history to NVS
11830 // 3. Save game statistics to NVS
11831
11832 strncpy(saved_game_name, game_name, sizeof(saved_game_name) - 1);
11833 saved_game_name[sizeof(saved_game_name) - 1] = '\0';
11834 game_saved = true;
11835
11836 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "💾 Game saved as: %s", saved_game_name);
11837}
11838
11843void game_load_game(const char *game_name) {
11844 if (game_name == NULL || strlen(game_name) == 0) {
11845 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Invalid game name for load");
11846 return;
11847 }
11848
11849 // This is a placeholder - in a real implementation you would:
11850 // 1. Load board state from NVS
11851 // 2. Load move history from NVS
11852 // 3. Load game statistics from NVS
11853
11854 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "📂 Loading game: %s", game_name);
11855 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "⚠️ Game loading not yet implemented");
11856}
11857
11863void game_export_pgn(char *pgn_buffer, size_t buffer_size) {
11864 if (pgn_buffer == NULL || buffer_size == 0) {
11865 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Invalid PGN buffer");
11866 return;
11867 }
11868
11869 // Start PGN with metadata
11870 int pos = snprintf(pgn_buffer, buffer_size,
11871 "[Event \"ESP32 Chess Game\"]\n"
11872 "[Site \"ESP32-C6\"]\n"
11873 "[Date \"%s\"]\n"
11874 "[Round \"1\"]\n"
11875 "[White \"Player 1\"]\n"
11876 "[Black \"Player 2\"]\n"
11877 "[Result \"*\"]\n\n",
11878 "2025-01-01"); // TODO: Get actual date
11879
11880 // Add moves
11881 for (uint32_t i = 0; i < history_index && pos < buffer_size - 50; i++) {
11882 const chess_move_t *move = &move_history[i];
11883 char from_square[4], to_square[4];
11884 game_coords_to_square(move->from_row, move->from_col, from_square);
11885 game_coords_to_square(move->to_row, move->to_col, to_square);
11886
11887 if (i % 2 == 0) {
11888 // White move
11889 pos += snprintf(pgn_buffer + pos, buffer_size - pos, "%" PRIu32 ". %s%s",
11890 (i / 2) + 1, from_square, to_square);
11891 } else {
11892 // Black move
11893 pos += snprintf(pgn_buffer + pos, buffer_size - pos, " %s%s ",
11894 from_square, to_square);
11895 }
11896
11897 // Add newline every 10 moves
11898 if ((i + 1) % 20 == 0) {
11899 pos += snprintf(pgn_buffer + pos, buffer_size - pos, "\n");
11900 }
11901 }
11902
11903 // Add result
11904 if (game_result == GAME_STATE_FINISHED) {
11905 if (strstr(saved_game_name, "CHECKMATE")) {
11906 pos += snprintf(pgn_buffer + pos, buffer_size - pos, " 1-0");
11907 } else if (strstr(saved_game_name, "STALEMATE")) {
11908 pos += snprintf(pgn_buffer + pos, buffer_size - pos, " 1/2-1/2");
11909 } else {
11910 pos += snprintf(pgn_buffer + pos, buffer_size - pos, " 1/2-1/2");
11911 }
11912 } else {
11913 pos += snprintf(pgn_buffer + pos, buffer_size - pos, " *");
11914 }
11915
11916 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "📄 PGN export completed (%d characters)", pos);
11917}
11918
11925void game_coords_to_square(uint8_t row, uint8_t col, char *square) {
11926 if (square == NULL)
11927 return;
11928
11929 // Convert column to file (a-h)
11930 square[0] = 'a' + col;
11931
11932 // Convert row to rank (1-8) - row 0 = rank 1, row 7 = rank 8
11933 square[1] = '1' + row;
11934
11935 square[2] = '\0';
11936}
11937
11938void game_print_status(void) {
11939 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Game Status:");
11940 ESP_LOGI(TAG, " State: %d", current_game_state);
11941 ESP_LOGI(TAG, " Current player: %s",
11942 (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? "White" : "Black");
11943 ESP_LOGI(TAG, " Move count: %lu", move_count);
11944 ESP_LOGI(TAG, " Game active: %s", game_active ? "Yes" : "No");
11945 ESP_LOGI(TAG, " Total games: %lu", total_games);
11946 ESP_LOGI(TAG, " White wins: %lu", white_wins);
11947 ESP_LOGI(TAG, " Black wins: %lu", black_wins);
11948 ESP_LOGI(TAG, " Draws: %lu", draws);
11949}
11950
11951// ============================================================================
11952// MAIN TASK FUNCTION
11953// ============================================================================
11954
11955void game_task_start(void *pvParameters) {
11956 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Game task started successfully");
11957
11958 // CRITICAL: Register with TWDT from within task
11959 esp_err_t wdt_ret = esp_task_wdt_add(NULL);
11960 if (wdt_ret != ESP_OK && wdt_ret != ESP_ERR_INVALID_ARG) {
11961 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to register Game task with TWDT: %s",
11962 esp_err_to_name(wdt_ret));
11963 } else {
11964 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "✅ Game task registered with TWDT");
11965 }
11966
11967 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Features:");
11968 ESP_LOGI(TAG, " • Standard chess rules");
11969 ESP_LOGI(TAG, " • Move validation");
11970 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Game task initialized - ready to start game");
11971 ESP_LOGI(TAG, " • Board initialized with starting position");
11972 ESP_LOGI(TAG, " • Command queue ready for UART/Web/Button inputs");
11973 ESP_LOGI(TAG, " • LED animations ready");
11974 ESP_LOGI(TAG, " • 1 second game loop cycle");
11975
11976 // #2: Initialize promotion mutex for concurrency protection
11977 // Použít recursive mutex, protože game_execute_move() může být volána
11978 // reentrantně (např. z capture flow, který volá game_execute_move(), který
11979 // může detekovat promotion)
11980 promotion_mutex = xSemaphoreCreateRecursiveMutex();
11981 if (promotion_mutex == NULL) {
11982 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "❌ CRITICAL: Failed to create promotion mutex!");
11983 } else {
11984 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "✅ Promotion recursive mutex initialized");
11985 }
11986
11987 task_running = true;
11988
11989 // Initialize timer system
11990 esp_err_t timer_ret = game_init_timer_system();
11991 if (timer_ret != ESP_OK) {
11992 ESP_LOGW(TAG,
11993 "Timer system initialization failed, continuing without timer");
11994 }
11995
11996 // Load configuration from NVS
11997 system_config_t config;
11998 esp_err_t config_ret = config_load_from_nvs(&config);
11999 if (config_ret == ESP_OK) {
12000 starting_position_check_enabled = config.starting_position_check_enabled;
12001 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Configuration loaded: starting_position_check=%s",
12002 starting_position_check_enabled ? "ON" : "OFF");
12003 } else {
12004 ESP_LOGW(TAG, "Failed to load configuration, using defaults");
12005 starting_position_check_enabled = false; // Default: disabled
12006 }
12007
12008 /*
12009 * Start logicke hry: vychozi deska, pak NVS nebo boot tracker.
12010 * - Platny klic v NVS: vypnout nucenou novou hru z boot trackeru, nacist snapshot,
12011 * game_check_resync_needed_after_restore() pri nesouladu matice.
12012 * - Jinak: boot_new_game_triggered z game_boot_tracker_should_force_new_game();
12013 * pri true volat game_start_new_game() (main pak neposle druhy NEW_GAME).
12014 * - Pri uspesnem nacteni snapshotu nastavi game_load_snapshot_from_nvs() i game_active.
12015 */
12016 game_initialize_board();
12017
12018 bool has_valid_snapshot = game_nvs_has_valid_snapshot();
12019 if (has_valid_snapshot) {
12020 boot_new_game_triggered = false;
12021 STAGING_LOGI(TAG,
12022 "boot: valid NVS snapshot present — skipping force-new-game "
12023 "heuristic");
12024 } else {
12025 boot_new_game_triggered = game_boot_tracker_should_force_new_game();
12026 }
12027 if (boot_new_game_triggered) {
12028 ESP_LOGW(TAG, "Boot rule triggered: forcing new game (2 boots / 1 minute)");
12029 game_start_new_game();
12030 snapshot_loaded_on_boot = false;
12031 } else {
12032 esp_err_t restore_ret = game_load_snapshot_from_nvs();
12033 if (restore_ret == ESP_OK) {
12034 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Game snapshot restored from NVS");
12035 game_check_resync_needed_after_restore();
12036 } else {
12037 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "No valid snapshot found, using fresh board");
12038 }
12039 }
12040
12041 // Main task loop
12042 uint32_t loop_count = 0;
12043 TickType_t last_wake_time = xTaskGetTickCount();
12044
12045 for (;;) {
12046 // =========================================================================
12047 // 🛑 BOOT ANIMATION PROTECTION - BLOKUJE VŠECHNY GAME OPERACE BĚHEM BOOT
12048 // =========================================================================
12049 // Pokud běží boot animace (řízená z main.c), game task NESMÍ dělat NIC!
12050 // Auto new game detection, LED operace, cokoliv by mohlo přerušit
12051 // animaci.
12052 if (led_is_booting()) {
12053 // Reset WDT aby task nespadl, ale nic nedělat
12054 game_task_wdt_reset_safe();
12055 vTaskDelay(pdMS_TO_TICKS(10)); // 10ms - rychlé probuzení po fade_out!
12056 continue; // Přeskočit zbytek smyčky
12057 }
12058 // =========================================================================
12059
12060 // CRITICAL: Reset watchdog for game task in every iteration (only if
12061 // registered)
12062 esp_err_t wdt_ret = game_task_wdt_reset_safe();
12063 if (wdt_ret != ESP_OK && wdt_ret != ESP_ERR_NOT_FOUND) {
12064 // Task not registered with TWDT yet - this is normal during startup
12065 }
12066
12067 // Process game commands
12068 game_process_commands();
12069
12070 // BUG FIX 1: Automatický přechod z WAITING_FOR_BOARD_SETUP do ACTIVE
12071 if (current_game_state == GAME_STATE_WAITING_FOR_BOARD_SETUP) {
12072 // Pokud je hlídání počáteční pozice vypnuto, přejdeme rovnou do ACTIVE
12073 bool should_check_position = starting_position_check_enabled;
12074 bool position_ok = should_check_position ? game_is_board_in_starting_position() : true;
12075
12076 if (position_ok) {
12077 // Deska je připravena (nebo hlídání je vypnuto) - aktivovat hru
12078 current_game_state = GAME_STATE_ACTIVE;
12079 game_active = true;
12080 game_start_time = esp_timer_get_time() / 1000;
12081 last_move_time = game_start_time;
12082
12083 // Zastavit případné běžící animace
12084 unified_animation_stop_all();
12085 led_stop_endgame_animation();
12086 stop_endgame_animation();
12087
12088 // Vyčistit LED
12089 led_clear_board_only();
12090
12091 // Aktualizovat promotion LED indikace
12092 game_check_promotion_needed();
12093
12094 // Spustit timer pro bílého hráče pokud je aktivní
12095 if (game_is_timer_active()) {
12096 game_start_timer_move(true);
12097 }
12098
12099 // Zvýraznit pohyblivé figurky
12100 game_highlight_movable_pieces();
12101
12102 // Notify web
12103 game_bump_revision_and_notify();
12104
12105 if (should_check_position) {
12106 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "✅ Board setup complete - game now ACTIVE, White to move");
12107 } else {
12108 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "✅ Game ACTIVE (starting position check disabled), White to move");
12109 }
12110 } else {
12111 // Periodicky aktualizovat LED indikaci chybějících figur
12112 static uint32_t last_led_update = 0;
12113 uint32_t now = esp_timer_get_time() / 1000;
12114 if (now - last_led_update > 500) { // Každých 500ms
12115 game_show_missing_pieces_led();
12116 last_led_update = now;
12117 }
12118 }
12119 }
12120
12121 // Process matrix events (moves)
12122 // DEPRECATED: Matrix events are now processed via game_command_queue
12123 // game_process_matrix_events(); // No longer needed
12124
12125 // Update timer display and check for timeout
12126 game_update_timer_display();
12127
12128 // Zpracovat endgame report request (s dostatečným stackem 10KB)
12129 if (endgame_report_requested) {
12130 endgame_report_requested = false; // Reset flag
12131 game_print_endgame_report_uart(current_result_type);
12132 }
12133
12134 // Auto new game detection (kdyz jsou figurky v pocatecni pozici 2s)
12135 // Logic update: Must not be blocked (require 1 move)
12136 // BUG FIX 1: Během WAITING_FOR_BOARD_SETUP nesmí auto-new game zasáhnout
12137 // BUG FIX 2: Auto-new game jen když je hlídání počáteční pozice zapnuto
12138 bool in_start_pos =
12139 starting_position_check_enabled &&
12140 !board_setup_tutorial_active &&
12141 current_game_state != GAME_STATE_WAITING_FOR_BOARD_SETUP &&
12142 game_is_board_in_starting_position();
12143
12144 if (in_start_pos && !auto_new_game_triggered &&
12145 !auto_new_game_blocked_until_move) {
12146 if (!auto_new_game_in_starting_position) {
12147 auto_new_game_in_starting_position = true;
12148 auto_new_game_timer_start = esp_timer_get_time() / 1000;
12149 ESP_LOGI(TAG,
12150 "Auto new game: Starting position detected, waiting 2s...");
12151 } else if ((esp_timer_get_time() / 1000 - auto_new_game_timer_start) >
12152 AUTO_NEW_GAME_CONFIRMATION_TIME_MS) {
12153 ESP_LOGI(
12154 TAG,
12155 "Auto new game: Position confirmed for 2s - triggering new game");
12156 chess_move_command_t cmd = {
12157 .type = GAME_CMD_NEW_GAME, .player = 0, .response_queue = NULL};
12158 if (game_command_queue != NULL) {
12159 xQueueSend(game_command_queue, &cmd, pdMS_TO_TICKS(100));
12160 }
12161 auto_new_game_triggered = true;
12162 // Block auto-new game detection until at least one move
12163 // is made. This prevents infinite loop when auto-new game is triggered
12164 // while pieces are already in starting position.
12165 auto_new_game_blocked_until_move = true;
12166 ESP_LOGI(
12167 TAG,
12168 "🔒 Auto new game detection blocked until first move (prevents "
12169 "infinite loop)");
12170 }
12171 } else {
12172 if (!in_start_pos)
12173 auto_new_game_triggered = false;
12174 auto_new_game_in_starting_position = false;
12175 }
12176
12177 // Periodic status update
12178 if (loop_count % 5000 == 0) { // Every 5 seconds
12179 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Game Task Status: loop=%d, state=%d, player=%d, moves=%lu",
12180 loop_count, current_game_state, current_player, move_count);
12181 }
12182
12183 loop_count++;
12184
12185 // Wait for next cycle (100ms)
12186 vTaskDelayUntil(&last_wake_time, pdMS_TO_TICKS(100));
12187 }
12188}
12189
12197void game_process_matrix_events(void) {
12198 // Matrix events are now processed via game_command_queue
12199 // This function is kept for compatibility but does nothing
12200}
12201
12202// ============================================================================
12203// ENHANCED CHESS LOGIC IMPLEMENTATION
12204// ============================================================================
12205
12206// Direction vectors for piece movement (knight_moves moved to top of file)
12207
12208static const int8_t king_moves[8][2] = {{-1, -1}, {-1, 0}, {-1, 1}, {0, -1},
12209 {0, 1}, {1, -1}, {1, 0}, {1, 1}};
12210
12211static const int8_t bishop_dirs[4][2] = {{-1, -1}, {-1, 1}, {1, -1}, {1, 1}};
12212
12213static const int8_t rook_dirs[4][2] = {{-1, 0}, {1, 0}, {0, -1}, {0, 1}};
12214
12215// Castling flags (moved to top of file)
12216
12217// En passant state (moved to top of file)
12218
12219// Lifted piece state tracking (already defined above)
12220
12221// Move generation buffers
12222static chess_move_extended_t legal_moves_buffer[128];
12223static uint32_t legal_moves_count = 0;
12224
12225// Game position history for draw detection (declared earlier in the file)
12226// static uint32_t position_hashes[100];
12227// static uint32_t position_history_count = 0;
12228// fifty_move_counter is now declared in GAME STATE VARIABLES section
12229
12230// Promotion state (for future use)
12231// static bool promotion_pending = false;
12232// static chess_move_extended_t promotion_move;
12233
12234// ============================================================================
12235// BASIC UTILITY FUNCTIONS
12236// ============================================================================
12237
12241bool game_is_valid_square(int row, int col) {
12242 return (row >= 0 && row < 8 && col >= 0 && col < 8);
12243}
12244
12248bool game_is_own_piece(piece_t piece, player_t player) {
12249 if (piece == PIECE_EMPTY)
12250 return false;
12251 return (player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? game_is_white_piece(piece)
12252 : game_is_black_piece(piece);
12253}
12254
12255// ============================================================================
12256// ATTACK AND CHECK DETECTION
12257// ============================================================================
12258
12262bool game_is_square_attacked(uint8_t row, uint8_t col, player_t by_player) {
12263 // Check pawn attacks
12264 int pawn_dir = (by_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? 1 : -1;
12265 int pawn_row = row - pawn_dir;
12266 piece_t attacking_pawn =
12267 (by_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? PIECE_WHITE_PAWN : PIECE_BLACK_PAWN;
12268
12269 if (game_is_valid_square(pawn_row, col - 1) &&
12270 board[pawn_row][col - 1] == attacking_pawn)
12271 return true;
12272 if (game_is_valid_square(pawn_row, col + 1) &&
12273 board[pawn_row][col + 1] == attacking_pawn)
12274 return true;
12275
12276 // Check knight attacks
12277 piece_t attacking_knight =
12278 (by_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? PIECE_WHITE_KNIGHT : PIECE_BLACK_KNIGHT;
12279 for (int i = 0; i < 8; i++) {
12280 int nr = row + knight_moves[i][0];
12281 int nc = col + knight_moves[i][1];
12282 if (game_is_valid_square(nr, nc) && board[nr][nc] == attacking_knight) {
12283 return true;
12284 }
12285 }
12286
12287 // Check bishop/queen diagonal attacks
12288 piece_t attacking_bishop =
12289 (by_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? PIECE_WHITE_BISHOP : PIECE_BLACK_BISHOP;
12290 piece_t attacking_queen =
12291 (by_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? PIECE_WHITE_QUEEN : PIECE_BLACK_QUEEN;
12292
12293 for (int d = 0; d < 4; d++) {
12294 int dr = bishop_dirs[d][0];
12295 int dc = bishop_dirs[d][1];
12296
12297 for (int nr = row + dr, nc = col + dc; game_is_valid_square(nr, nc);
12298 nr += dr, nc += dc) {
12299 piece_t piece = board[nr][nc];
12300 if (piece == PIECE_EMPTY)
12301 continue;
12302
12303 if (piece == attacking_bishop || piece == attacking_queen) {
12304 return true;
12305 }
12306 break; // Blocked by any piece
12307 }
12308 }
12309
12310 // Check rook/queen orthogonal attacks
12311 piece_t attacking_rook =
12312 (by_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? PIECE_WHITE_ROOK : PIECE_BLACK_ROOK;
12313
12314 for (int d = 0; d < 4; d++) {
12315 int dr = rook_dirs[d][0];
12316 int dc = rook_dirs[d][1];
12317
12318 for (int nr = row + dr, nc = col + dc; game_is_valid_square(nr, nc);
12319 nr += dr, nc += dc) {
12320 piece_t piece = board[nr][nc];
12321 if (piece == PIECE_EMPTY)
12322 continue;
12323
12324 if (piece == attacking_rook || piece == attacking_queen) {
12325 return true;
12326 }
12327 break; // Blocked by any piece
12328 }
12329 }
12330
12331 // Check king attacks
12332 piece_t attacking_king =
12333 (by_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? PIECE_WHITE_KING : PIECE_BLACK_KING;
12334 for (int i = 0; i < 8; i++) {
12335 int nr = row + king_moves[i][0];
12336 int nc = col + king_moves[i][1];
12337 if (game_is_valid_square(nr, nc) && board[nr][nc] == attacking_king) {
12338 return true;
12339 }
12340 }
12341
12342 return false;
12343}
12344
12345// ============================================================================
12346// MOVE VALIDATION AND SIMULATION
12347// ============================================================================
12348
12352bool game_simulate_move_check(chess_move_extended_t *move, player_t player) {
12353 // Save original state
12354 piece_t original_piece = board[move->to_row][move->to_col];
12355 piece_t original_en_passant = PIECE_EMPTY;
12356
12357 // Handle en passant capture
12358 if (move->move_type == MOVE_TYPE_EN_PASSANT) {
12359 original_en_passant = board[en_passant_victim_row][en_passant_victim_col];
12360 board[en_passant_victim_row][en_passant_victim_col] = PIECE_EMPTY;
12361 }
12362
12363 // Make the move
12364 board[move->to_row][move->to_col] = move->piece;
12365 board[move->from_row][move->from_col] = PIECE_EMPTY;
12366
12367 // Check if king is in check after this move
12368 bool king_in_check = game_is_king_in_check(player);
12369
12370 // Restore original state
12371 board[move->from_row][move->from_col] = move->piece;
12372 board[move->to_row][move->to_col] = original_piece;
12373
12374 if (move->move_type == MOVE_TYPE_EN_PASSANT) {
12375 board[en_passant_victim_row][en_passant_victim_col] = original_en_passant;
12376 }
12377
12378 return !king_in_check; // Return true if move is legal (doesn't leave king
12379 // in check)
12380}
12381
12382// ============================================================================
12383// MOVE GENERATION - INDIVIDUAL PIECES
12384// ============================================================================
12385
12389void game_generate_pawn_moves(uint8_t from_row, uint8_t from_col,
12390 player_t player) {
12391 piece_t pawn = board[from_row][from_col];
12392 bool is_white = (player == PLAYER_WHITE);
12393 int direction = is_white ? 1 : -1;
12394 int start_row = is_white ? 1 : 6;
12395 int promotion_row = is_white ? 7 : 0;
12396
12397 // Forward move
12398 int to_row = from_row + direction;
12399 if (game_is_valid_square(to_row, from_col) &&
12400 board[to_row][from_col] == PIECE_EMPTY) {
12401
12402 if (to_row == promotion_row) {
12403 // Promotion moves
12404 for (int promo = PROMOTION_QUEEN; promo <= PROMOTION_KNIGHT; promo++) {
12405 if (legal_moves_count >= 128)
12406 return;
12407
12408 chess_move_extended_t *move = &legal_moves_buffer[legal_moves_count];
12409 move->from_row = from_row;
12410 move->from_col = from_col;
12411 move->to_row = to_row;
12412 move->to_col = from_col;
12413 move->piece = pawn;
12414 move->captured_piece = PIECE_EMPTY;
12415 move->move_type = MOVE_TYPE_PROMOTION;
12416 move->promotion_piece = (promotion_choice_t)promo;
12417
12418 if (game_simulate_move_check(move, player)) {
12419 legal_moves_count++;
12420 }
12421 }
12422 } else {
12423 // Normal forward move
12424 if (legal_moves_count >= 128)
12425 return;
12426
12427 chess_move_extended_t *move = &legal_moves_buffer[legal_moves_count];
12428 move->from_row = from_row;
12429 move->from_col = from_col;
12430 move->to_row = to_row;
12431 move->to_col = from_col;
12432 move->piece = pawn;
12433 move->captured_piece = PIECE_EMPTY;
12434 move->move_type = MOVE_TYPE_NORMAL;
12435
12436 if (game_simulate_move_check(move, player)) {
12437 legal_moves_count++;
12438 }
12439
12440 // Double move from starting position
12441 if (from_row == start_row &&
12442 board[to_row + direction][from_col] == PIECE_EMPTY) {
12443 if (legal_moves_count >= 128)
12444 return;
12445
12446 move = &legal_moves_buffer[legal_moves_count];
12447 move->from_row = from_row;
12448 move->from_col = from_col;
12449 move->to_row = to_row + direction;
12450 move->to_col = from_col;
12451 move->piece = pawn;
12452 move->captured_piece = PIECE_EMPTY;
12453 move->move_type = MOVE_TYPE_NORMAL;
12454
12455 if (game_simulate_move_check(move, player)) {
12456 legal_moves_count++;
12457 }
12458 }
12459 }
12460 }
12461
12462 // Captures (diagonal)
12463 for (int dc = -1; dc <= 1; dc += 2) {
12464 int to_col = from_col + dc;
12465 if (game_is_valid_square(to_row, to_col)) {
12466 piece_t target = board[to_row][to_col];
12467
12468 if (game_is_enemy_piece(target, player)) {
12469 if (to_row == promotion_row) {
12470 // Capture with promotion
12471 for (int promo = PROMOTION_QUEEN; promo <= PROMOTION_KNIGHT;
12472 promo++) {
12473 if (legal_moves_count >= 128)
12474 return;
12475
12476 chess_move_extended_t *move =
12477 &legal_moves_buffer[legal_moves_count];
12478 move->from_row = from_row;
12479 move->from_col = from_col;
12480 move->to_row = to_row;
12481 move->to_col = to_col;
12482 move->piece = pawn;
12483 move->captured_piece = target;
12484 move->move_type = MOVE_TYPE_PROMOTION;
12485 move->promotion_piece = (promotion_choice_t)promo;
12486
12487 if (game_simulate_move_check(move, player)) {
12488 legal_moves_count++;
12489 }
12490 }
12491 } else {
12492 // Normal capture
12493 if (legal_moves_count >= 128)
12494 return;
12495
12496 chess_move_extended_t *move = &legal_moves_buffer[legal_moves_count];
12497 move->from_row = from_row;
12498 move->from_col = from_col;
12499 move->to_row = to_row;
12500 move->to_col = to_col;
12501 move->piece = pawn;
12502 move->captured_piece = target;
12503 move->move_type = MOVE_TYPE_CAPTURE;
12504
12505 if (game_simulate_move_check(move, player)) {
12506 legal_moves_count++;
12507 }
12508 }
12509 }
12510 }
12511 }
12512
12513 // En passant
12514 if (en_passant_available && from_row == (is_white ? 4 : 3)) {
12515 for (int dc = -1; dc <= 1; dc += 2) {
12516 if (from_col + dc == en_passant_target_col) {
12517 if (legal_moves_count >= 128)
12518 return;
12519
12520 chess_move_extended_t *move = &legal_moves_buffer[legal_moves_count];
12521 move->from_row = from_row;
12522 move->from_col = from_col;
12523 move->to_row = en_passant_target_row;
12524 move->to_col = en_passant_target_col;
12525 move->piece = pawn;
12526 move->captured_piece =
12527 board[en_passant_victim_row][en_passant_victim_col];
12528 move->move_type = MOVE_TYPE_EN_PASSANT;
12529
12530 if (game_simulate_move_check(move, player)) {
12531 legal_moves_count++;
12532 }
12533 }
12534 }
12535 }
12536}
12537
12541void game_generate_knight_moves(uint8_t from_row, uint8_t from_col,
12542 player_t player) {
12543 piece_t knight = board[from_row][from_col];
12544
12545 for (int i = 0; i < 8; i++) {
12546 int to_row = from_row + knight_moves[i][0];
12547 int to_col = from_col + knight_moves[i][1];
12548
12549 if (!game_is_valid_square(to_row, to_col))
12550 continue;
12551
12552 piece_t target = board[to_row][to_col];
12553
12554 // Skip if occupied by own piece
12555 if (game_is_own_piece(target, player))
12556 continue;
12557
12558 if (legal_moves_count >= 128)
12559 return;
12560
12561 chess_move_extended_t *move = &legal_moves_buffer[legal_moves_count];
12562 move->from_row = from_row;
12563 move->from_col = from_col;
12564 move->to_row = to_row;
12565 move->to_col = to_col;
12566 move->piece = knight;
12567 move->captured_piece = target;
12568 move->move_type =
12569 (target == PIECE_EMPTY) ? MOVE_TYPE_NORMAL : MOVE_TYPE_CAPTURE;
12570
12571 if (game_simulate_move_check(move, player)) {
12572 legal_moves_count++;
12573 }
12574 }
12575}
12576
12580void game_generate_sliding_moves(uint8_t from_row, uint8_t from_col,
12581 player_t player, const int8_t directions[][2],
12582 int num_directions) {
12583 piece_t piece = board[from_row][from_col];
12584
12585 for (int d = 0; d < num_directions; d++) {
12586 int dr = directions[d][0];
12587 int dc = directions[d][1];
12588
12589 for (int to_row = from_row + dr, to_col = from_col + dc;
12590 game_is_valid_square(to_row, to_col); to_row += dr, to_col += dc) {
12591
12592 piece_t target = board[to_row][to_col];
12593
12594 // Can't move to square occupied by own piece
12595 if (game_is_own_piece(target, player))
12596 break;
12597
12598 if (legal_moves_count >= 128)
12599 return;
12600
12601 chess_move_extended_t *move = &legal_moves_buffer[legal_moves_count];
12602 move->from_row = from_row;
12603 move->from_col = from_col;
12604 move->to_row = to_row;
12605 move->to_col = to_col;
12606 move->piece = piece;
12607 move->captured_piece = target;
12608 move->move_type =
12609 (target == PIECE_EMPTY) ? MOVE_TYPE_NORMAL : MOVE_TYPE_CAPTURE;
12610
12611 if (game_simulate_move_check(move, player)) {
12612 legal_moves_count++;
12613 }
12614
12615 // Stop if we hit any piece
12616 if (target != PIECE_EMPTY)
12617 break;
12618 }
12619 }
12620}
12621
12625void game_generate_king_moves(uint8_t from_row, uint8_t from_col,
12626 player_t player) {
12627 piece_t king = board[from_row][from_col];
12628
12629 // Normal king moves
12630 for (int i = 0; i < 8; i++) {
12631 int to_row = from_row + king_moves[i][0];
12632 int to_col = from_col + king_moves[i][1];
12633
12634 if (!game_is_valid_square(to_row, to_col))
12635 continue;
12636
12637 piece_t target = board[to_row][to_col];
12638
12639 // Skip if occupied by own piece
12640 if (game_is_own_piece(target, player))
12641 continue;
12642
12643 if (legal_moves_count >= 128)
12644 return;
12645
12646 chess_move_extended_t *move = &legal_moves_buffer[legal_moves_count];
12647 move->from_row = from_row;
12648 move->from_col = from_col;
12649 move->to_row = to_row;
12650 move->to_col = to_col;
12651 move->piece = king;
12652 move->captured_piece = target;
12653 move->move_type =
12654 (target == PIECE_EMPTY) ? MOVE_TYPE_NORMAL : MOVE_TYPE_CAPTURE;
12655
12656 if (game_simulate_move_check(move, player)) {
12657 legal_moves_count++;
12658 }
12659 }
12660
12661 // Castling - FIXED: Use proper bounds checking and correct coordinates
12662 if (game_is_king_in_check(player))
12663 return; // Can't castle when in check
12664
12665 if (player == PLAYER_WHITE && !white_king_moved) {
12666 // White kingside castling
12667 if (!white_rook_h_moved && board[0][5] == PIECE_EMPTY &&
12668 board[0][6] == PIECE_EMPTY &&
12669 !game_is_square_attacked(0, 5, PLAYER_BLACK) &&
12670 !game_is_square_attacked(0, 6, PLAYER_BLACK)) {
12671
12672 if (legal_moves_count >= 128)
12673 return; // ED: Proper bounds checking
12674
12675 chess_move_extended_t *move = &legal_moves_buffer[legal_moves_count];
12676 move->from_row = from_row; // ED: Use actual king position
12677 move->from_col = from_col;
12678 move->to_row = 0;
12679 move->to_col = 6;
12680 move->piece = king;
12681 move->captured_piece = PIECE_EMPTY;
12682 move->move_type = MOVE_TYPE_CASTLE_KING;
12683 legal_moves_count++;
12684 }
12685
12686 // White queenside castling
12687 if (!white_rook_a_moved && board[0][1] == PIECE_EMPTY &&
12688 board[0][2] == PIECE_EMPTY && board[0][3] == PIECE_EMPTY &&
12689 !game_is_square_attacked(0, 2, PLAYER_BLACK) &&
12690 !game_is_square_attacked(0, 3, PLAYER_BLACK)) {
12691
12692 if (legal_moves_count >= 128)
12693 return; // ED: Proper bounds checking
12694
12695 chess_move_extended_t *move = &legal_moves_buffer[legal_moves_count];
12696 move->from_row = from_row; // ED: Use actual king position
12697 move->from_col = from_col;
12698 move->to_row = 0;
12699 move->to_col = 2;
12700 move->piece = king;
12701 move->captured_piece = PIECE_EMPTY;
12702 move->move_type = MOVE_TYPE_CASTLE_QUEEN;
12703 legal_moves_count++;
12704 }
12705 }
12706
12707 if (player == PLAYER_BLACK && !black_king_moved) {
12708 // Black kingside castling
12709 if (!black_rook_h_moved && board[7][5] == PIECE_EMPTY &&
12710 board[7][6] == PIECE_EMPTY &&
12711 !game_is_square_attacked(7, 5, PLAYER_WHITE) &&
12712 !game_is_square_attacked(7, 6, PLAYER_WHITE)) {
12713
12714 if (legal_moves_count >= 128)
12715 return; // ED: Proper bounds checking
12716
12717 chess_move_extended_t *move = &legal_moves_buffer[legal_moves_count];
12718 move->from_row = from_row; // ED: Use actual king position
12719 move->from_col = from_col;
12720 move->to_row = 7;
12721 move->to_col = 6;
12722 move->piece = king;
12723 move->captured_piece = PIECE_EMPTY;
12724 move->move_type = MOVE_TYPE_CASTLE_KING;
12725 legal_moves_count++;
12726 }
12727
12728 // Black queenside castling
12729 if (!black_rook_a_moved && board[7][1] == PIECE_EMPTY &&
12730 board[7][2] == PIECE_EMPTY && board[7][3] == PIECE_EMPTY &&
12731 !game_is_square_attacked(7, 2, PLAYER_WHITE) &&
12732 !game_is_square_attacked(7, 3, PLAYER_WHITE)) {
12733
12734 if (legal_moves_count >= 128)
12735 return; // ED: Proper bounds checking
12736
12737 chess_move_extended_t *move = &legal_moves_buffer[legal_moves_count];
12738 move->from_row = from_row; // ED: Use actual king position
12739 move->from_col = from_col;
12740 move->to_row = 7;
12741 move->to_col = 2;
12742 move->piece = king;
12743 move->captured_piece = PIECE_EMPTY;
12744 move->move_type = MOVE_TYPE_CASTLE_QUEEN;
12745 legal_moves_count++;
12746 }
12747 }
12748}
12749
12750// ============================================================================
12751// MAIN MOVE GENERATION
12752// ============================================================================
12753
12757uint32_t game_generate_legal_moves(player_t player) {
12758 legal_moves_count = 0;
12759
12760 for (int row = 0; row < 8; row++) {
12761 for (int col = 0; col < 8; col++) {
12762 piece_t piece = board[row][col];
12763
12764 if (!game_is_own_piece(piece, player))
12765 continue;
12766
12767 switch (piece) {
12768 case PIECE_WHITE_PAWN:
12769 case PIECE_BLACK_PAWN:
12770 game_generate_pawn_moves(row, col, player);
12771 break;
12772
12773 case PIECE_WHITE_KNIGHT:
12774 case PIECE_BLACK_KNIGHT:
12775 game_generate_knight_moves(row, col, player);
12776 break;
12777
12778 case PIECE_WHITE_BISHOP:
12779 case PIECE_BLACK_BISHOP:
12780 game_generate_sliding_moves(row, col, player, bishop_dirs, 4);
12781 break;
12782
12783 case PIECE_WHITE_ROOK:
12784 case PIECE_BLACK_ROOK:
12785 game_generate_sliding_moves(row, col, player, rook_dirs, 4);
12786 break;
12787
12788 case PIECE_WHITE_QUEEN:
12789 case PIECE_BLACK_QUEEN:
12790 game_generate_sliding_moves(row, col, player, bishop_dirs, 4);
12791 game_generate_sliding_moves(row, col, player, rook_dirs, 4);
12792 break;
12793
12794 case PIECE_WHITE_KING:
12795 case PIECE_BLACK_KING:
12796 game_generate_king_moves(row, col, player);
12797 break;
12798
12799 default:
12800 break;
12801 }
12802 }
12803 }
12804
12805 return legal_moves_count;
12806}
12807
12808// ============================================================================
12809// MOVE EXECUTION
12810// ============================================================================
12811
12818static piece_t game_piece_for_promotion_choice(piece_t pawn,
12819 promotion_choice_t choice) {
12820 if (pawn == PIECE_WHITE_PAWN) {
12821 switch (choice) {
12822 case PROMOTION_ROOK:
12823 return PIECE_WHITE_ROOK;
12824 case PROMOTION_BISHOP:
12825 return PIECE_WHITE_BISHOP;
12826 case PROMOTION_KNIGHT:
12827 return PIECE_WHITE_KNIGHT;
12828 case PROMOTION_QUEEN:
12829 default:
12830 return PIECE_WHITE_QUEEN;
12831 }
12832 }
12833 if (pawn == PIECE_BLACK_PAWN) {
12834 switch (choice) {
12835 case PROMOTION_ROOK:
12836 return PIECE_BLACK_ROOK;
12837 case PROMOTION_BISHOP:
12838 return PIECE_BLACK_BISHOP;
12839 case PROMOTION_KNIGHT:
12840 return PIECE_BLACK_KNIGHT;
12841 case PROMOTION_QUEEN:
12842 default:
12843 return PIECE_BLACK_QUEEN;
12844 }
12845 }
12846 ESP_LOGW(TAG,
12847 "game_piece_for_promotion_choice: očekáván pesec, mám piece=%d — "
12848 "vracím bílou damu",
12849 (int)pawn);
12850 return PIECE_WHITE_QUEEN;
12851}
12852
12856bool game_execute_move_enhanced(chess_move_extended_t *move) {
12857 if (move == NULL)
12858 return false;
12859
12860 // Nastavit typ posledního tahu pro detekci speciálních šachmatů
12861 switch (move->move_type) {
12862 case MOVE_TYPE_EN_PASSANT:
12863 // Remove the captured pawn
12864 board[en_passant_victim_row][en_passant_victim_col] = PIECE_EMPTY;
12865 last_move_type = LAST_MOVE_EN_PASSANT; // Označit jako en passant
12866 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "⚔️ En passant move executed");
12867 break;
12868
12869 case MOVE_TYPE_CASTLE_KING:
12870 // Věž se nepřesunuje automaticky - hráč ji musí přesunout sám
12871 // Věž zůstává na původní pozici, animace donutí hráče ji přesunout
12872 last_move_type = LAST_MOVE_CASTLING; // Označit jako castling
12873 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🏰 Kingside castling - rook stays in place, waiting for "
12874 "player to move it");
12875 break;
12876
12877 case MOVE_TYPE_CASTLE_QUEEN:
12878 // Věž se nepřesunuje automaticky - hráč ji musí přesunout sám
12879 // Věž zůstává na původní pozici, animace donutí hráče ji přesunout
12880 last_move_type = LAST_MOVE_CASTLING; // Označit jako castling
12881 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🏰 Queenside castling - rook stays in place, waiting for "
12882 "player to move it");
12883 break;
12884
12885 case MOVE_TYPE_PROMOTION:
12886 // Handle promotion - the piece will be set below
12887 last_move_type = LAST_MOVE_PROMOTION; // Označit jako promotion
12888 break;
12889
12890 default:
12891 // Normal move or capture - nothing special needed
12892 last_move_type = LAST_MOVE_NORMAL; // Resetovat na normální tah
12893 break;
12894 }
12895
12896 // Make the basic move
12897 board[move->to_row][move->to_col] = move->piece;
12898 board[move->from_row][move->from_col] = PIECE_EMPTY;
12899
12900 // Handle promotion
12901 if (move->move_type == MOVE_TYPE_PROMOTION) {
12902 // Zkontrolovat zda je promotion_state.pending
12903 // Pokud ano, pak uživatel ještě nevybral figurku - ponechat pěšce na místě
12904 // Pokud ne, pak promotion_piece je nastaveno a můžeme provést promoci
