12905 if (promotion_state.pending) {
12906 // Promotion je pending - uživatel ještě nevybral figurku
12907 // Ponechat pěšce na promotion rank (už je tam přesunutý v předchozím
12908 // kroku)
12909 ESP_LOGI(TAG,
12910 "⏸️ Promotion pending - keeping pawn at %c%d, waiting for user "
12911 "selection",
12912 'a' + move->to_col, move->to_row + 1);
12913 } else {
12914 // Promotion není pending - promotion_piece je nastaveno, provést promoci
12915 piece_t promoted_piece =
12916 game_piece_for_promotion_choice(move->piece, move->promotion_piece);
12917 board[move->to_row][move->to_col] = promoted_piece;
12918 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "✅ Promotion executed immediately with piece %d",
12919 (int)move->promotion_piece);
12920 }
12921 }
12922
12923 // Update castling flags
12924 if (move->piece == PIECE_WHITE_KING)
12925 white_king_moved = true;
12926 if (move->piece == PIECE_BLACK_KING)
12927 black_king_moved = true;
12928 if (move->piece == PIECE_WHITE_ROOK) {
12929 if (move->from_col == 0)
12930 white_rook_a_moved = true;
12931 if (move->from_col == 7)
12932 white_rook_h_moved = true;
12933 }
12934 if (move->piece == PIECE_BLACK_ROOK) {
12935 if (move->from_col == 0)
12936 black_rook_a_moved = true;
12937 if (move->from_col == 7)
12938 black_rook_h_moved = true;
12939 }
12940
12941 // Update en passant state
12942 en_passant_available = false;
12943 if ((move->piece == PIECE_WHITE_PAWN || move->piece == PIECE_BLACK_PAWN) &&
12944 abs(move->to_row - move->from_row) == 2) {
12945 // Pawn made a double move - enable en passant
12946 en_passant_available = true;
12947 en_passant_target_row = (move->from_row + move->to_row) / 2;
12948 en_passant_target_col = move->from_col;
12949 en_passant_victim_row = move->to_row;
12950 en_passant_victim_col = move->to_col;
12951 }
12952
12953 // Update fifty-move counter
12954 if (move->piece == PIECE_WHITE_PAWN || move->piece == PIECE_BLACK_PAWN ||
12955 move->captured_piece != PIECE_EMPTY) {
12956 fifty_move_counter = 0;
12957 } else {
12958 fifty_move_counter++;
12959 }
12960
12961 // Update move counters and statistics
12962 if (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) {
12963 white_moves_count++;
12964 } else {
12965 black_moves_count++;
12966 }
12967
12968 // NEMĚNIT HRÁČE ZDE - hráč se mění v game_execute_move() po
12969 // dokončení tahu Switch players - REMOVED: player is switched in
12970 // game_execute_move() after move execution
12971
12972 return true;
12973}
12974
12975// ============================================================================
12976// ENHANCED BOARD DISPLAY
12977// ============================================================================
12978
12982void game_print_board_enhanced(void) {
12983 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "╔═══════════════════════════════╗");
12984 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "║ CHESS BOARD ║");
12985 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "╚═══════════════════════════════╝");
12986
12987 // Print board from rank 8 to rank 1
12988 for (int row = 7; row >= 0; row--) {
12989 char line[64] = "";
12990 char *ptr = line;
12991
12992 ptr += sprintf(ptr, " %d │", row + 1);
12993
12994 for (int col = 0; col < 8; col++) {
12995 piece_t piece = board[row][col];
12996 const char *symbol;
12997
12998 switch (piece) {
12999 case PIECE_WHITE_PAWN:
13000 symbol = "♙";
13001 break;
13002 case PIECE_WHITE_KNIGHT:
13003 symbol = "♘";
13004 break;
13005 case PIECE_WHITE_BISHOP:
13006 symbol = "♗";
13007 break;
13008 case PIECE_WHITE_ROOK:
13009 symbol = "♖";
13010 break;
13011 case PIECE_WHITE_QUEEN:
13012 symbol = "♕";
13013 break;
13014 case PIECE_WHITE_KING:
13015 symbol = "♔";
13016 break;
13017 case PIECE_BLACK_PAWN:
13018 symbol = "♟";
13019 break;
13020 case PIECE_BLACK_KNIGHT:
13021 symbol = "♞";
13022 break;
13023 case PIECE_BLACK_BISHOP:
13024 symbol = "♝";
13025 break;
13026 case PIECE_BLACK_ROOK:
13027 symbol = "♜";
13028 break;
13029 case PIECE_BLACK_QUEEN:
13030 symbol = "♛";
13031 break;
13032 case PIECE_BLACK_KING:
13033 symbol = "♚";
13034 break;
13035 default:
13036 symbol = "·";
13037 break;
13038 }
13039
13040 ptr += sprintf(ptr, " %s │", symbol);
13041 }
13042
13043 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "%s", line);
13044 if (row > 0) {
13045 ESP_LOGI(TAG, " ├───┼───┼───┼───┼───┼───┼───┼───┤");
13046 }
13047 }
13048
13049 ESP_LOGI(TAG, " └───┴───┴───┴───┴───┴───┴───┴───┘");
13050 ESP_LOGI(TAG, " a b c d e f g h ");
13051
13052 // Print game status
13053 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "");
13054 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Game Status: %s to move",
13055 (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? "White" : "Black");
13056 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Move #%lu", move_count + 1);
13057
13058 if (game_is_king_in_check(current_player)) {
13059 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "⚠️ CHECK!");
13060 }
13061}
13062
13063// ============================================================================
13064// INTEGRATION WITH EXISTING GAME TASK
13065// ============================================================================
13066
13070move_error_t game_validate_move_enhanced(uint8_t from_row, uint8_t from_col,
13071 uint8_t to_row, uint8_t to_col) {
13072 // Basic coordinate validation
13073 if (!game_is_valid_square(from_row, from_col) ||
13074 !game_is_valid_square(to_row, to_col)) {
13075 return MOVE_ERROR_INVALID_COORDINATES;
13076 }
13077
13078 // Check if there's a piece at source
13079 piece_t piece = board[from_row][from_col];
13080 if (piece == PIECE_EMPTY) {
13081 return MOVE_ERROR_NO_PIECE;
13082 }
13083
13084 // Check if it's player's piece
13085 if (!game_is_own_piece(piece, current_player)) {
13086 return MOVE_ERROR_WRONG_COLOR;
13087 }
13088
13089 // Generate all legal moves and check if this move is in the list
13090 uint32_t num_legal = game_generate_legal_moves(current_player);
13091
13092 for (uint32_t i = 0; i < num_legal; i++) {
13093 chess_move_extended_t *move = &legal_moves_buffer[i];
13094 if (move->from_row == from_row && move->from_col == from_col &&
13095 move->to_row == to_row && move->to_col == to_col) {
13096 return MOVE_ERROR_NONE; // Move is legal
13097 }
13098 }
13099
13100 return MOVE_ERROR_ILLEGAL_MOVE;
13101}
13102
13103// ============================================================================
13104// MATRIX LED WORKFLOW IMPLEMENTATION
13105// ============================================================================
13106
13112bool game_detect_new_game_setup(void) {
13113 if (board_setup_tutorial_active) {
13114 return false;
13115 }
13116
13117 // Zkontrolovat, jestli jsou řádky 1, 2, 7, 8 obsazené figurkami
13118 // a řádky 3, 4, 5, 6 jsou prázdné
13119
13120 // Zkontrolovat řádky 0, 1 (bílé figurky) a 6, 7 (černé figurky)
13121 bool rows_0_1_6_7_occupied = true;
13122 bool rows_2_3_4_5_empty = true;
13123
13124 // Zkontrolovat řádky 0, 1, 6, 7 - musí být obsazené
13125 for (int row = 0; row < 8; row++) {
13126 bool row_has_pieces = false;
13127 for (int col = 0; col < 8; col++) {
13128 if (board[row][col] != PIECE_EMPTY) {
13129 row_has_pieces = true;
13130 break;
13131 }
13132 }
13133
13134 if ((row == 0 || row == 1 || row == 6 || row == 7)) {
13135 // Tyto řádky musí být obsazené
13136 if (!row_has_pieces) {
13137 rows_0_1_6_7_occupied = false;
13138 break;
13139 }
13140 } else if (row >= 2 && row <= 5) {
13141 // Tyto řádky musí být prázdné
13142 if (row_has_pieces) {
13143 rows_2_3_4_5_empty = false;
13144 break;
13145 }
13146 }
13147 }
13148
13149 bool is_starting_setup = rows_0_1_6_7_occupied && rows_2_3_4_5_empty;
13150
13151 if (is_starting_setup) {
13152 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🎮 Starting position detected: rows 0,1,6,7 occupied, rows "
13153 "2,3,4,5 empty");
13154 }
13155
13156 return is_starting_setup;
13157}
13158
13171void game_handle_piece_lifted(uint8_t row, uint8_t col) {
13172 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🖐️ Matrix: Piece lifted from %c%d", 'a' + col, row + 1);
13173
13174 // Check if there's a piece at the square
13175 piece_t piece = board[row][col];
13176 if (piece == PIECE_EMPTY) {
13177 ESP_LOGW(TAG, "❌ No piece to lift at %c%d", 'a' + col, row + 1);
13178 return;
13179 }
13180
13181 // Check if it's the current player's piece
13182 bool is_white_piece =
13183 (piece >= PIECE_WHITE_PAWN && piece <= PIECE_WHITE_KING);
13184 bool is_current_player = (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE && is_white_piece) ||
13185 (current_player == PLAYER_BLACK && !is_white_piece);
13186
13187 if (!is_current_player) {
13188 ESP_LOGW(TAG, "❌ Cannot lift opponent's piece at %c%d", 'a' + col,
13189 row + 1);
13190 return;
13191 }
13192
13193 // Check if castle animation is active and this is a rook
13194 if (game_is_castle_animation_active()) {
13195 bool is_rook = (piece == PIECE_WHITE_ROOK || piece == PIECE_BLACK_ROOK);
13196
13197 if (is_rook) {
13198 // Check if rook is being lifted from the correct position for castling
13199 if (row == rook_from_row && col == rook_from_col) {
13200 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "✅ Rook lifted from correct position for castling");
13201 // Continue with normal move highlighting
13202 } else {
13203 // Rook lifted from wrong position - show error and valid moves from
13204 // correct position
13205 ESP_LOGW(TAG,
13206 "❌ Rook lifted from wrong position for castling: %c%d "
13207 "(expected: %c%d)",
13208 'a' + col, row + 1, 'a' + rook_from_col, rook_from_row + 1);
13209
13210 // Show error animation - blink red
13211 led_clear_board_only();
13212 for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
13213 led_set_pixel_safe(chess_pos_to_led_index(row, col), 255, 0,
13214 0); // Red
13215 vTaskDelay(pdMS_TO_TICKS(200));
13216 led_clear_board_only();
13217 vTaskDelay(pdMS_TO_TICKS(200));
13218 }
13219
13220 // Show valid moves from the correct rook position
13221 led_set_pixel_safe(chess_pos_to_led_index(rook_from_row, rook_from_col),
13222 255, 255,
13223 0); // Yellow
13224 led_set_pixel_safe(chess_pos_to_led_index(rook_to_row, rook_to_col), 0,
13225 255, 0); // Green
13226
13227 return;
13228 }
13229 } else {
13230 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🏰 Castle animation active - only rook can be moved");
13231 return;
13232 }
13233 }
13234
13235 // Show possible moves for this piece
13236 move_suggestion_t suggestions[64];
13237 uint32_t valid_moves = game_get_available_moves(row, col, suggestions, 64);
13238
13239 if (valid_moves > 0) {
13240 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "💡 Found %lu valid moves for piece at %c%d", valid_moves,
13241 'a' + col, row + 1);
13242
13243 // Send LED commands to highlight possible moves
13244 // Highlight source square in yellow
13245 // Highlight source square (yellow)
13246 led_set_pixel_safe(chess_pos_to_led_index(row, col), 255, 255,
13247 0); // Yellow for source
13248
13249 // Highlight possible destinations
13250 if (game_led_guidance_show_destinations()) {
13251 for (uint32_t i = 0; i < valid_moves; i++) {
13252 uint8_t dest_row = suggestions[i].to_row;
13253 uint8_t dest_col = suggestions[i].to_col;
13254 uint8_t led_index = chess_pos_to_led_index(dest_row, dest_col);
13255
13256 // Check if destination has opponent's piece
13257 piece_t dest_piece = board[dest_row][dest_col];
13258 bool is_opponent_piece =
13259 (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE && dest_piece >= PIECE_BLACK_PAWN &&
13260 dest_piece <= PIECE_BLACK_KING) ||
13261 (current_player == PLAYER_BLACK && dest_piece >= PIECE_WHITE_PAWN &&
13262 dest_piece <= PIECE_WHITE_KING);
13263
13264 if (is_opponent_piece) {
13265 // Orange for opponent's pieces (capture)
13266 led_set_pixel_safe(led_index, 255, 165, 0);
13267 } else {
13268 // Green for empty squares
13269 led_set_pixel_safe(led_index, 0, 255, 0);
13270 }
13271 }
13272 }
13273 } else {
13274 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "💡 No valid moves for piece at %c%d", 'a' + col, row + 1);
13275 }
13276
13277 // Po zvednutí figurky spustit animaci změny hráče a zobrazit
13278 // pohyblivé figurky (pouze pokud není aktivní animace rosady a není
13279 // očekávána rosada)
13280 if (!game_is_castle_animation_active() && !game_is_castling_expected()) {
13281 // After piece is lifted, show pieces that the opponent can move
13282 // This completes the cycle as requested by the user
13283 game_highlight_movable_pieces();
13284 }
13285}
13286
13295void game_handle_piece_placed(uint8_t row, uint8_t col) {
13296 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "✋ Matrix: Piece placed at %c%d", 'a' + col, row + 1);
13297
13298 // Detekce nové hry po endgame animaci
13299 // Zkontrolovat, jestli se figurky rozestavily na startovní pozice (řádky 1,
13300 // 2, 7, 8)
13301 if (game_detect_new_game_setup()) {
13302 ESP_LOGI(TAG,
13303 "🎮 NEW GAME DETECTED! Pieces arranged in starting positions");
13304
13305 // Zastavit všechny animace
13306 unified_animation_stop_all();
13307
13308 // Spustit novou hru
13309 game_start_new_game();
13310
13311 return; // Ukončit - nová hra byla spuštěna
13312 }
13313
13314 // Check if castle animation is active
13315 if (game_is_castle_animation_active()) {
13316 ESP_LOGI(
13317 TAG,
13318 "🏰 Castle animation active - checking if rook was placed correctly");
13319
13320 // Check if this is a rook piece being placed
13321 piece_t piece = board[row][col];
13322 bool is_rook = (piece == PIECE_WHITE_ROOK || piece == PIECE_BLACK_ROOK);
13323
13324 if (is_rook) {
13325 // Check if rook was placed on correct position for castling
13326 if (row == rook_to_row && col == rook_to_col) {
13327 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "✅ Rook placed on correct position for castling");
13328 // The move will be completed in game_handle_matrix_move
13329 return;
13330 } else {
13331 // Rook placed on wrong position - show error
13332 ESP_LOGW(TAG,
13333 "❌ Rook placed on wrong position for castling: %c%d "
13334 "(expected: %c%d)",
13335 'a' + col, row + 1, 'a' + rook_to_col, rook_to_row + 1);
13336
13337 // Show error animation - blink red then show valid moves
13338 led_clear_board_only();
13339
13340 // Blink the wrong position red
13341 for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
13342 led_set_pixel_safe(chess_pos_to_led_index(row, col), 255, 0,
13343 0); // Red
13344 vTaskDelay(pdMS_TO_TICKS(200));
13345 led_clear_board_only();
13346 vTaskDelay(pdMS_TO_TICKS(200));
13347 }
13348
13349 // Show correct rook position and destination
13350 led_set_pixel_safe(chess_pos_to_led_index(rook_from_row, rook_from_col),
13351 255, 255,
13352 0); // Yellow
13353 led_set_pixel_safe(chess_pos_to_led_index(rook_to_row, rook_to_col), 0,
13354 255, 0); // Green
13355
13356 return;
13357 }
13358 } else {
13359 ESP_LOGI(TAG,
13360 "🏰 Castle animation active - waiting for rook to be moved");
13361 return;
13362 }
13363 }
13364
13365 // Clear only board LEDs
13366 led_clear_board_only();
13367
13368 // Po umístění figurky spustit animaci změny hráče a zobrazit
13369 // pohyblivé figurky (pouze pokud není aktivní animace rosady a není
13370 // očekávána rosada)
13371 if (!game_is_castle_animation_active() && !game_is_castling_expected()) {
13372 // After piece is placed, show pieces that the opponent can move
13373 // This completes the cycle as requested by the user
13374 game_highlight_opponent_pieces();
13375 }
13376}
13377
13388void game_handle_matrix_move(uint8_t from_row, uint8_t from_col, uint8_t to_row,
13389 uint8_t to_col) {
13390 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🎯 Matrix: Complete move %c%d -> %c%d", 'a' + from_col,
13391 from_row + 1, 'a' + to_col, to_row + 1);
13392
13393 // Check if castle animation is active
13394 if (game_is_castle_animation_active()) {
13395 if (game_complete_castle_animation(from_row, from_col, to_row, to_col)) {
13396 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "✅ Castle animation completed via matrix move");
13397 return;
13398 } else {
13399 ESP_LOGW(TAG,
13400 "❌ Invalid rook move for castling - waiting for correct move");
13401 return;
13402 }
13403 }
13404
13405 // Convert matrix event to chess move
13406 chess_move_t move = {
13407 .from_row = from_row,
13408 .from_col = from_col,
13409 .to_row = to_row,
13410 .to_col = to_col,
13411
13412 .piece = board[from_row][from_col], // Skutečná figurka ze zdrojového pole
13413 .captured_piece =
13414 board[to_row][to_col], // Skutečná figurka z cílového pole
13415 .timestamp = esp_timer_get_time() / 1000};
13416
13417 // KRITICKÁ OPRAVA: Validace tahu před voláním game_execute_move (stejně
13418 // jako UART flow)
13419 move_error_t error = game_is_valid_move(&move);
13420 if (error != MOVE_ERROR_NONE) {
13421 ESP_LOGW(TAG, "❌ Invalid matrix move rejected: %c%d -> %c%d (error: %d)",
13422 'a' + from_col, from_row + 1, 'a' + to_col, to_row + 1, error);
13423
13424 // Clear LEDs on invalid move
13425 led_clear_board_only();
13426
13427 // Show error animation
13428 led_set_pixel_safe(chess_pos_to_led_index(from_row, from_col), 255, 0,
13429 0); // Red for source
13430 led_set_pixel_safe(chess_pos_to_led_index(to_row, to_col), 255, 0,
13431 0); // Red for destination
13432
13433 return; // Reject invalid move
13434 }
13435
13436 // Detekce rosady před voláním game_execute_move
13437 bool is_castling =
13438 (move.piece == PIECE_WHITE_KING || move.piece == PIECE_BLACK_KING) &&
13439 abs((int)move.to_col - (int)move.from_col) == 2;
13440
13441 if (is_castling) {
13442 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🏰 CASTLING DETECTED in matrix move: %c%d -> %c%d",
13443 'a' + move.from_col, move.from_row + 1, 'a' + move.to_col,
13444 move.to_row + 1);
13445 }
13446
13447 // Execute move (already validated)
13448 if (game_execute_move(&move)) {
13449 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "✅ Matrix move executed successfully");
13450
13451 // KRITICKÁ OPRAVA: Kontrola checkmate/stalemate po každém tahu!
13452 game_state_t end_game_result = game_check_end_game_conditions();
13453 if (end_game_result == GAME_STATE_FINISHED) {
13454 current_game_state = GAME_STATE_FINISHED;
13455 game_active = false;
13456 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🎉 Game finished detected in matrix move!");
13457 }
13458
13459 if (is_castling) {
13460 // Pro rosadu nespouštět game_highlight_opponent_pieces
13461 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🏰 Castling move completed - waiting for rook animation");
13462 } else {
13463 // Po úspěšném tahu spustit animaci změny hráče a zobrazit
13464 // pohyblivé figurky (pouze pokud není aktivní animace rosady a není
13465 // očekávána rosada)
13466 if (!game_is_castle_animation_active() && !game_is_castling_expected()) {
13467 // After successful move, show pieces that the opponent can move
13468 game_highlight_movable_pieces();
13469 }
13470 }
13471 } else {
13472 ESP_LOGW(TAG, "❌ Invalid matrix move rejected");
13473
13474 // Clear LEDs on invalid move
13475 led_clear_board_only();
13476 }
13477}
13478
13482void game_highlight_opponent_pieces(void) {
13483 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🔄 Highlighting opponent pieces that can move");
13484
13485 // LED command queue removed - using direct LED calls now
13486
13487 // Switch to opponent's perspective temporarily
13488 player_t opponent =
13489 (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? PLAYER_BLACK : PLAYER_WHITE;
13490
13491 // Find all pieces that the opponent can move
13492 for (int row = 0; row < 8; row++) {
13493 for (int col = 0; col < 8; col++) {
13494 piece_t piece = board[row][col];
13495 if (piece == PIECE_EMPTY)
13496 continue;
13497
13498 // Check if it's opponent's piece
13499 bool is_opponent_piece =
13500 (opponent == PLAYER_WHITE && piece >= PIECE_WHITE_PAWN &&
13501 piece <= PIECE_WHITE_KING) ||
13502 (opponent == PLAYER_BLACK && piece >= PIECE_BLACK_PAWN &&
13503 piece <= PIECE_BLACK_KING);
13504
13505 if (is_opponent_piece) {
13506 // Check if this piece has valid moves
13507 move_suggestion_t suggestions[64];
13508 uint32_t valid_moves =
13509 game_get_available_moves(row, col, suggestions, 64);
13510
13511 if (valid_moves > 0) {
13512 // Highlight this piece in blue (indicating it can move)
13513 led_set_pixel_safe(chess_pos_to_led_index(row, col), 0, 0,
13514 255); // Blue for pieces that can move
13515 }
13516 }
13517 }
13518 }
13519}
13520
13525void game_process_promotion_command(const chess_move_command_t *cmd) {
13526 if (!cmd) {
13527 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "❌ Invalid promotion command");
13528 return;
13529 }
13530
13531 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "👑 Processing promotion command");
13532
13533 // #2 & #3: Atomic check with mutex to prevent double execution
13534 // Použít recursive mutex funkce (promotion_mutex je recursive mutex)
13535 if (xSemaphoreTakeRecursive(promotion_mutex, pdMS_TO_TICKS(100)) != pdTRUE) {
13536 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "❌ Failed to acquire promotion mutex");
13537 return;
13538 }
13539
13540 // Check if promotion is still pending (might have been processed by another
13541 // task)
13542 if (!promotion_state.pending) {
13543 xSemaphoreGiveRecursive(promotion_mutex);
13544 ESP_LOGW(TAG, "⚠️ Promotion already processed by another task");
13545 return;
13546 }
13547
13548 // CRITICAL: Keep mutex held during ENTIRE execution to prevent race!
13549 // DO NOT release here - release only after completion or on error
13550
13551 // Determine promotion choice (default to Queen if invalid or not specified)
13552 promotion_choice_t choice = PROMOTION_QUEEN;
13553
13554 if (cmd->promotion_choice <= PROMOTION_KNIGHT) {
13555 choice = (promotion_choice_t)cmd->promotion_choice;
13556 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "👑 Promotion choice received: %d (%s)", choice,
13557 choice == PROMOTION_QUEEN ? "Queen"
13558 : choice == PROMOTION_ROOK ? "Rook"
13559 : choice == PROMOTION_BISHOP ? "Bishop"
13560 : "Knight");
13561 } else {
13562 ESP_LOGW(TAG,
13563 "⚠️ Invalid or missing promotion choice (%d), defaulting to Queen",
13564 cmd->promotion_choice);
13565 }
13566
13567 // Execute the promotion with the selected piece
13568 if (game_execute_promotion(choice)) {
13569 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "✅ Promotion executed successfully");
13570
13571 // Clear promotion state (mutex already held from line 10419)
13572 promotion_state.pending = false;
13573
13574 // Clear promotion state and return to active gameplay
13575 current_game_state =
13576 GAME_STATE_ACTIVE; // Fix: use constant instead of magic number 6
13577
13578 // Switch to next player
13579 player_t previous_player = current_player;
13580 current_player =
13581 (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? PLAYER_BLACK : PLAYER_WHITE;
13582
13583 // Po dokončení promoce už žádná figurka není zvednutá – aby se zobrazily
13584 // movable pieces (game_highlight_movable_pieces nesmí skipnout kvůli
13585 // piece_lifted).
13586 piece_lifted = false;
13587 lifted_piece_row = 0;
13588 lifted_piece_col = 0;
13589 lifted_piece = PIECE_EMPTY;
13590
13591 // #2: Timer switch AFTER promotion choice
13592 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🔄 Timer switch (promotion): ending for %s, starting for %s",
13593 previous_player == PLAYER_WHITE ? "White" : "Black",
13594 current_player == PLAYER_WHITE ? "White" : "Black");
13595 game_end_timer_move();
13596 game_start_timer_move(current_player == PLAYER_WHITE);
13597
13598 // KRITICKÉ: Endgame kontrola PŘED player change animací!
13599 // Pokud je endgame, player change se NESPOUŠTÍ
13600 game_state_t end_game_result = game_check_end_game_conditions();
13601 if (end_game_result == GAME_STATE_FINISHED) {
13602 current_game_state = GAME_STATE_FINISHED;
13603 game_active = false;
13604
13605 // Najít pozici krále vítěze pro endgame animaci
13606 player_t winner =
13607 (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? PLAYER_BLACK : PLAYER_WHITE;
13608 uint8_t king_pos = 28; // default e4
13609 for (int i = 0; i < 64; i++) {
13610 piece_t piece = board[i / 8][i % 8];
13611 if ((winner == PLAYER_WHITE && piece == PIECE_WHITE_KING) ||
13612 (winner == PLAYER_BLACK && piece == PIECE_BLACK_KING)) {
13613 king_pos = i;
13614 break;
13615 }
13616 }
13617
13618 ESP_LOGI(TAG,
13619 "🎯 Game finished after promotion command! Starting endgame "
13620 "animation at position %d",
13621 king_pos);
13622
13623 // Spustit endgame animaci (wave z krále vítěze)
13624 led_command_t endgame_cmd = {.type = LED_CMD_ANIM_ENDGAME,
13625 .led_index = king_pos,
13626 .red = 255,
13627 .green = 255,
13628 .blue = 0, // Yellow
13629 .duration_ms = 0, // Endless
13630 .data = NULL};
13631 led_execute_command_new(&endgame_cmd);
13632
13633 ESP_LOGI(
13634 TAG,
13635 "✅ Endgame animation started - player change animation SKIPPED");
13636 } else {
13637 // Není endgame - spustit player change animaci
13638 uint8_t player_color =
13639 (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? 1 : 0; // 1=white, 0=black
13640 led_command_t player_change_cmd = {
13641 .type = LED_CMD_ANIM_PLAYER_CHANGE, // Použít
13642 // ANIM_PLAYER_CHANGE místo
13643 // PLAYER_CHANGE
13644 .led_index = 0,
13645 .red = 0,
13646 .green = 0,
13647 .blue = 0,
13648 .duration_ms = 0,
13649 .data = &player_color // Předat barvu hráče
13650 };
13651 led_execute_command_new(&player_change_cmd);
13652
13653 // Print updated board
13654 game_print_board();
13655
13656 // Highlight pieces that the new current player can move
13657 game_highlight_movable_pieces();
13658 led_force_immediate_update(); // Commit highlight so movable pieces show
13659 // right after player change animation
13660
13661 // Zkontrolovat, zda je nový hráč v šachu
13662 bool in_check = game_is_king_in_check(current_player);
13663 if (in_check) {
13664 // Najít pozici krále
13665 int king_row = -1, king_col = -1;
13666 piece_t king_piece = (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE)
13667 ? PIECE_WHITE_KING
13668 : PIECE_BLACK_KING;
13669 for (int row = 0; row < 8; row++) {
13670 for (int col = 0; col < 8; col++) {
13671 if (board[row][col] == king_piece) {
13672 king_row = row;
13673 king_col = col;
13674 break;
13675 }
13676 }
13677 if (king_row != -1)
13678 break;
13679 }
13680
13681 if (king_row != -1 && king_col != -1) {
13682 if (game_led_guidance_show_check_anim()) {
13683 uint8_t king_led_index = chess_pos_to_led_index(king_row, king_col);
13684 // Spustit check animaci - růžové svícení na králi
13685 led_command_t check_cmd = {.type = LED_CMD_ANIM_CHECK,
13686 .led_index = king_led_index,
13687 .red = 0,
13688 .green = 0,
13689 .blue = 0,
13690 .duration_ms =
13691 0, // Trvalé až do dalšího tahu
13692 .data = NULL};
13693 led_execute_command_new(&check_cmd);
13694 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "⚠️ CHECK! %s is in check",
13695 current_player == PLAYER_WHITE ? "White" : "Black");
13696 }
13697 }
13698 }
13699 }
13700
13701 } else {
13702 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "❌ Failed to execute promotion");
13703 }
13704
13705 // CRITICAL: Release mutex at the end of the function to ensure it's always
13706 // released Použít recursive mutex funkce (promotion_mutex je recursive mutex)
13707 xSemaphoreGiveRecursive(promotion_mutex);
13708}
13709
13733static bool game_execute_promotion(promotion_choice_t choice) {
13734 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "👑 Executing pawn promotion: %d", choice);
13735
13736 // Find the pawn that needs to be promoted
13737 // This should be set when a pawn reaches the promotion rank
13738 // For now, we'll implement a basic version
13739
13740 // Convert promotion choice to piece type
13741 piece_t promoted_piece;
13742 // Use promotion_state.player instead of current_player
13743 // current_player has already been switched to the opponent by
13744 // game_execute_move() so we must use the player stored in the promotion
13745 // state
13746 if (promotion_state.player == PLAYER_WHITE) {
13747 switch (choice) {
13748 case PROMOTION_QUEEN:
13749 promoted_piece = PIECE_WHITE_QUEEN;
13750 break;
13751 case PROMOTION_ROOK:
13752 promoted_piece = PIECE_WHITE_ROOK;
13753 break;
13754 case PROMOTION_BISHOP:
13755 promoted_piece = PIECE_WHITE_BISHOP;
13756 break;
13757 case PROMOTION_KNIGHT:
13758 promoted_piece = PIECE_WHITE_KNIGHT;
13759 break;
13760 default:
13761 return false;
13762 }
13763 } else {
13764 switch (choice) {
13765 case PROMOTION_QUEEN:
13766 promoted_piece = PIECE_BLACK_QUEEN;
13767 break;
13768 case PROMOTION_ROOK:
13769 promoted_piece = PIECE_BLACK_ROOK;
13770 break;
13771 case PROMOTION_BISHOP:
13772 promoted_piece = PIECE_BLACK_BISHOP;
13773 break;
13774 case PROMOTION_KNIGHT:
13775 promoted_piece = PIECE_BLACK_KNIGHT;
13776 break;
13777 default:
13778 return false;
13779 }
13780 }
13781
13782 // BUG #3: Use stored position instead of scanning entire board
13783 // The position was already found and stored in promotion_state by
13784 // game_check_promotion_needed()
13785 uint8_t row = promotion_state.square_row;
13786 uint8_t col = promotion_state.square_col;
13787 piece_t piece = board[row][col];
13788
13789 // Verify it's actually a pawn (safety check)
13790 if (piece != PIECE_WHITE_PAWN && piece != PIECE_BLACK_PAWN) {
13791 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "❌ Promotion failed: No pawn at stored position %c%d",
13792 'a' + col, row + 1);
13793 return false;
13794 }
13795
13796 // Promote the pawn
13797 board[row][col] = promoted_piece;
13798 current_game_state = GAME_STATE_ACTIVE; // Restore game state to ACTIVE
13799 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "✅ Promoted %s pawn at %c%d to %s",
13800 current_player == PLAYER_WHITE ? "white" : "black", 'a' + col,
13801 row + 1,
13802 choice == PROMOTION_QUEEN ? "Queen"
13803 : choice == PROMOTION_ROOK ? "Rook"
13804 : choice == PROMOTION_BISHOP ? "Bishop"
13805 : "Knight");
13806
13807 // Spustit promotion animaci
13808 uint8_t promotion_led = chess_pos_to_led_index(row, col);
13809 led_command_t promote_cmd = {.type = LED_CMD_ANIM_PROMOTE,
13810 .led_index = promotion_led,
13811 .red = 255,
13812 .green = 215,
13813 .blue = 0, // Gold
13814 .duration_ms = 2000,
13815 .data = NULL};
13816 led_execute_command_new(&promote_cmd);
13817
13818 return true;
13819}
13820
13824void game_highlight_movable_pieces(void) {
13825 // Do not highlight pieces if system is booting
13826 if (led_is_booting()) {
13827 return;
13828 }
13829
13830 // Do not highlight movable pieces if a piece is already
13831 // lifted This prevents overwriting the "valid moves" (green) with "movable
13832 // pieces" (yellow)
13833 if (piece_lifted) {
13834 ESP_LOGD(TAG, "Highlight skipped - piece is lifted");
13835 return;
13836 }
13837
13838 // Nespouštět highlight během rošády - rošáda má vlastní LED indikaci
13839 if (castling_state.in_progress) {
13840 ESP_LOGD(TAG, "Highlight skipped - castling in progress");
13841 return;
13842 }
13843
13844 if (!game_led_guidance_show_movable_yellow()) {
13845 ESP_LOGD(TAG, "Movable piece highlights skipped (LED guidance level %u)",
13846 (unsigned)led_guidance_level);
13847 return;
13848 }
13849
13850 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🟡 Highlighting movable pieces for %s player",
13851 current_player == PLAYER_WHITE ? "white" : "black");
13852
13853 // Endgame detection is handled in game_analyze_position() called from
13854 // game_execute_move()
13855
13856 // LED command queue removed - using direct LED calls now
13857
13858 uint32_t highlighted_count = 0;
13859
13860 // Scan all squares for current player's pieces
13861 for (uint8_t row = 0; row < 8; row++) {
13862 for (uint8_t col = 0; col < 8; col++) {
13863 piece_t piece = board[row][col];
13864
13865 // Check if piece belongs to current player
13866 bool is_current_player_piece = false;
13867 if (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) {
13868 is_current_player_piece =
13869 (piece >= PIECE_WHITE_PAWN && piece <= PIECE_WHITE_KING);
13870 } else {
13871 is_current_player_piece =
13872 (piece >= PIECE_BLACK_PAWN && piece <= PIECE_BLACK_KING);
13873 }
13874
13875 if (is_current_player_piece) {
13876 // Check if piece has valid moves
13877 // OPTIMIZATION: Reduced buffer size from 64 to 1 to prevent stack
13878 // overflow in Timer Task We only need to know if count > 0, so asking
13879 // for 1 move is enough
13880 move_suggestion_t suggestions[1];
13881 uint32_t valid_moves =
13882 game_get_available_moves(row, col, suggestions, 1);
13883
13884 if (valid_moves > 0) {
13885 // Highlight movable piece in yellow
13886 led_set_pixel_safe(chess_pos_to_led_index(row, col), 255, 255,
13887 0); // Yellow
13888 highlighted_count++;
13889 }
13890 }
13891 }
13892 }
13893
13894 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🟡 Highlighted %lu movable pieces", highlighted_count);
13895}
13896
13897// ============================================================================
13898// PUZZLE COMMAND IMPLEMENTATIONS
13899// ============================================================================
13900
13905void game_detect_and_handle_castling(const chess_move_t *move) {
13906 piece_t piece = move->piece;
13907
13908 // Je to král a pohybuje se o 2 pole?
13909 if ((piece == PIECE_WHITE_KING || piece == PIECE_BLACK_KING) &&
13910 abs((int)move->to_col - (int)move->from_col) == 2) {
13911
13912 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🏰 CASTLING DETECTED! King moved 2 squares");
13913
13914 // Nastavit stav rošády
13915 castling_state.in_progress = true;
13916 castling_state.player = current_player;
13917
13918 // Vypočítat pozice věže
13919 bool is_kingside = (move->to_col == 6);
13920 castling_state.rook_from_row = move->to_row;
13921 castling_state.rook_from_col = is_kingside ? 7 : 0;
13922 castling_state.rook_to_row = move->to_row;
13923 castling_state.rook_to_col = is_kingside ? 5 : 3;
13924
13925 // Zobrazit LED guidance pro věž
13926 game_show_castling_rook_guidance();
13927
13928 // NEZMĚNIT HRÁČE - čekat na dokončení rošády
13929 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "⏳ Waiting for rook move to complete castling...");
13930 }
13931}
13932
13936void game_show_castling_rook_guidance() {
13937 // Vyčistit board
13938 led_clear_board_only();
13939
13940 // Postupná animace od věže k cíli
13941 uint8_t rook_from_led = chess_pos_to_led_index(castling_state.rook_from_row,
13942 castling_state.rook_from_col);
13943 uint8_t rook_to_led = chess_pos_to_led_index(castling_state.rook_to_row,
13944 castling_state.rook_to_col);
13945
13946 // Zvýraznit věž (žlutá)
13947 led_set_pixel_safe(rook_from_led, 255, 255, 0); // Žlutá - zvedni odtud
13948
13949 // Postupně rozsvítit pole od věže k cíli
13950 int from_col = castling_state.rook_from_col;
13951 int to_col = castling_state.rook_to_col;
13952 int step = (to_col > from_col) ? 1 : -1;
13953
13954 for (int col = from_col + step; col != to_col + step; col += step) {
13955 uint8_t led_index =
13956 chess_pos_to_led_index(castling_state.rook_from_row, col);
13957 led_set_pixel_safe(led_index, 0, 255, 0); // Zelená - cesta
13958 vTaskDelay(pdMS_TO_TICKS(300));
13959 }
13960
13961 // Zvýraznit cíl (zelená)
13962 led_set_pixel_safe(rook_to_led, 0, 255, 0); // Zelená - polož sem
13963
13964 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "💡 Move rook from %c%d to %c%d to complete castling",
13965 'a' + castling_state.rook_from_col, castling_state.rook_from_row + 1,
13966 'a' + castling_state.rook_to_col, castling_state.rook_to_row + 1);
13967}
13968
13974bool game_check_castling_completion(const chess_move_t *move) {
13975 if (!castling_state.in_progress)
13976 return false;
13977
13978 // Je to správný tah věže?
13979 if (move->from_row == castling_state.rook_from_row &&
13980 move->from_col == castling_state.rook_from_col &&
13981 move->to_row == castling_state.rook_to_row &&
13982 move->to_col == castling_state.rook_to_col) {
13983
13984 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "✅ CASTLING COMPLETED! Rook moved correctly");
13985
13986 // Provedeme posun věže v board[][]
13987 board[move->to_row][move->to_col] = move->piece;
13988 board[castling_state.rook_from_row][castling_state.rook_from_col] =
13989 PIECE_EMPTY;
13990
13991 // Aktualizovat příznaky pro krále a věž
13992 if (castling_state.player == PLAYER_WHITE) {
13993 white_king_moved = true;
13994 if (castling_state.rook_from_col == 7)
13995 white_rook_h_moved = true;
13996 else
13997 white_rook_a_moved = true;
13998 } else {
13999 black_king_moved = true;
14000 if (castling_state.rook_from_col == 7)
14001 black_rook_h_moved = true;
14002 else
14003 black_rook_a_moved = true;
14004 }
14005
14006 // Zlatá animace dokončení rošády
14007 show_castling_completion_animation();
14008
14009 // Změnit hráče TEPRVE TEĎ
14010 current_player =
14011 (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? PLAYER_BLACK : PLAYER_WHITE;
14012
14013 // KRITICKÉ: Endgame kontrola PŘED player change animací!
14014 // Pokud je endgame, player change se NESPOUŠTÍ
14015 game_state_t end_game_result = game_check_end_game_conditions();
14016 if (end_game_result == GAME_STATE_FINISHED) {
14017 current_game_state = GAME_STATE_FINISHED;
14018 game_active = false;
14019
14020 // Najít pozici krále vítěze pro endgame animaci
14021 player_t winner =
14022 (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? PLAYER_BLACK : PLAYER_WHITE;
14023 uint8_t king_pos = 28; // default e4
14024 for (int i = 0; i < 64; i++) {
14025 piece_t piece = board[i / 8][i % 8];
14026 if ((winner == PLAYER_WHITE && piece == PIECE_WHITE_KING) ||
14027 (winner == PLAYER_BLACK && piece == PIECE_BLACK_KING)) {
14028 king_pos = i;
14029 break;
14030 }
14031 }
14032
14033 ESP_LOGI(TAG,
14034 "🎯 Game finished after castling completion! Starting endgame "
14035 "animation at position %d",
14036 king_pos);
14037
14038 // Spustit endgame animaci (wave z krále vítěze)
14039 led_command_t endgame_cmd = {.type = LED_CMD_ANIM_ENDGAME,
14040 .led_index = king_pos,
14041 .red = 255,
14042 .green = 255,
14043 .blue = 0, // Yellow
14044 .duration_ms = 0, // Endless
14045 .data = NULL};
14046 led_execute_command_new(&endgame_cmd);
14047
14048 ESP_LOGI(
14049 TAG,
14050 "✅ Endgame animation started - player change animation SKIPPED");
14051 } else {
14052 // Není endgame - spustit player change animaci
14053 uint8_t player_color =
14054 (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? 1 : 0; // 1=white, 0=black
14055 led_command_t player_change_cmd = {
14056 .type = LED_CMD_ANIM_PLAYER_CHANGE, // Použít
14057 // ANIM_PLAYER_CHANGE místo
14058 // PLAYER_CHANGE
14059 .led_index = 0,
14060 .red = 0,
14061 .green = 0,
14062 .blue = 0,
14063 .duration_ms = 0,
14064 .data = &player_color // Předat barvu hráče
14065 };
14066 led_execute_command_new(&player_change_cmd);
14067
14068 // Vyčistit stav rošády
14069 memset(&castling_state, 0, sizeof(castling_state));
14070
14071 // Zobrazit pohyblivé figury pro nového hráče
14072 led_clear_board_only();
14073 game_highlight_movable_pieces();
14074
14075 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🏰 Castling completed! %s to move",
14076 (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? "White" : "Black");
14077
14078 // Zkontrolovat, zda je nový hráč v šachu
14079 bool in_check = game_is_king_in_check(current_player);
14080 if (in_check) {
14081 // Najít pozici krále
14082 int king_row = -1, king_col = -1;
14083 piece_t king_piece = (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE)
14084 ? PIECE_WHITE_KING
14085 : PIECE_BLACK_KING;
14086 for (int row = 0; row < 8; row++) {
14087 for (int col = 0; col < 8; col++) {
14088 if (board[row][col] == king_piece) {
14089 king_row = row;
14090 king_col = col;
14091 break;
14092 }
14093 }
14094 if (king_row != -1)
14095 break;
14096 }
14097
14098 if (king_row != -1 && king_col != -1) {
14099 if (game_led_guidance_show_check_anim()) {
14100 uint8_t king_led_index = chess_pos_to_led_index(king_row, king_col);
14101 // Spustit check animaci - růžové svícení na králi
14102 led_command_t check_cmd = {.type = LED_CMD_ANIM_CHECK,
14103 .led_index = king_led_index,
14104 .red = 0,
14105 .green = 0,
14106 .blue = 0,
14107 .duration_ms =
14108 0, // Trvalé až do dalšího tahu
14109 .data = NULL};
14110 led_execute_command_new(&check_cmd);
14111 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "⚠️ CHECK! %s is in check",
14112 current_player == PLAYER_WHITE ? "White" : "Black");
14113 }
14114 }
14115 }
14116 }
14117
14118 return true;
14119 } else {
14120 // Nesprávný tah věže - ukázat znovu guidance
14121 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "❌ Incorrect rook move for castling");
14122 game_show_castling_rook_guidance();
14123 return false;
14124 }
14125}
14126
14130void show_castling_completion_animation() {
14131 // Zlatá animace úspěšné rošády
14132 uint8_t rook_led = chess_pos_to_led_index(castling_state.rook_to_row,
14133 castling_state.rook_to_col);
14134
14135 for (int i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
14136 led_set_pixel_safe(rook_led, 255, 215, 0); // Zlatá
14137 vTaskDelay(pdMS_TO_TICKS(100));
14138 led_set_pixel_safe(rook_led, 0, 0, 0);
14139 vTaskDelay(pdMS_TO_TICKS(100));
14140 }
14141
14142 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🏰✨ CASTLING ANIMATION COMPLETED");
14143}
14144
14145// ============================================================================
14146// CASTLING ANIMATION SYSTEM (LEGACY)
14147// ============================================================================
14148
14153void game_start_castle_animation(const chess_move_extended_t *move) {
14154 if (!move)
14155 return;
14156
14157 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🏰 Starting castle animation for %s",
14158 (move->move_type == MOVE_TYPE_CASTLE_KING) ? "kingside"
14159 : "queenside");
14160
14161 // Calculate rook positions
14162 uint8_t king_row = (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? 0 : 7;
14163
14164 if (move->move_type == MOVE_TYPE_CASTLE_KING) {
14165 // Kingside: rook from h-file to f-file
14166 rook_from_row = king_row;
14167 rook_from_col = 7; // h-file
14168 rook_to_row = king_row;
14169 rook_to_col = 5; // f-file
14170 } else {
14171 // Queenside: rook from a-file to d-file
14172 rook_from_row = king_row;
14173 rook_from_col = 0; // a-file
14174 rook_to_row = king_row;
14175 rook_to_col = 3; // d-file
14176 }
14177
14178 // Store castle move for completion
14179 pending_castle_move = *move;
14180 castle_animation_active = true;
14181
14182 // Clear board and start repeating rook move animation
14183 led_clear_board_only();
14184
14185 // Spustit opakující se animaci pohybu věže
14186 game_start_repeating_rook_animation();
14187
14188 // Show initial animation immediately
14189 uint8_t from_led = chess_pos_to_led_index(rook_from_row, rook_from_col);
14190 uint8_t to_led = chess_pos_to_led_index(rook_to_row, rook_to_col);
14191 led_set_pixel_safe(from_led, 255, 255, 0); // Yellow for rook position
14192 led_set_pixel_safe(to_led, 0, 255, 0); // Green for destination
14193
14194 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🏰 Rook at %c%d needs to move to %c%d", 'a' + rook_from_col,
14195 rook_from_row + 1, 'a' + rook_to_col, rook_to_row + 1);
14196}
14197
14202void rook_animation_timer_callback(TimerHandle_t xTimer) {
14203 if (!rook_animation_active || !castle_animation_active) {
14204 return;
14205 }
14206
14207 // Simple pulsing animation - show rook position and destination
14208 uint8_t from_led = chess_pos_to_led_index(rook_from_row, rook_from_col);
14209 uint8_t to_led = chess_pos_to_led_index(rook_to_row, rook_to_col);
14210
14211 // Clear board first
14212 led_clear_board_only();
14213
14214 // Show rook position in yellow (pulsing)
14215 static bool pulse_state = false;
14216 pulse_state = !pulse_state;
14217
14218 if (pulse_state) {
14219 // Bright yellow for rook position
14220 led_set_pixel_safe(from_led, 255, 255, 0);
14221 // Bright green for destination
14222 led_set_pixel_safe(to_led, 0, 255, 0);
14223 } else {
14224 // Dim yellow for rook position
14225 led_set_pixel_safe(from_led, 128, 128, 0);
14226 // Dim green for destination
14227 led_set_pixel_safe(to_led, 0, 128, 0);
14228 }
14229
14230 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🏰 Rook animation: %c%d -> %c%d (%s)", 'a' + rook_from_col,
14231 rook_from_row + 1, 'a' + rook_to_col, rook_to_row + 1,
14232 pulse_state ? "bright" : "dim");
14233}
14234
14238void game_start_repeating_rook_animation(void) {
14239 if (rook_animation_timer == NULL) {
14240 // Create timer for rook animation
14241 rook_animation_timer =
14242 xTimerCreate("rook_anim_timer",
14243 pdMS_TO_TICKS(500), // 500ms interval (snappier)
14244 pdTRUE, // Auto-reload
14245 NULL, rook_animation_timer_callback);
14246
14247 if (rook_animation_timer == NULL) {
14248 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "❌ Failed to create rook animation timer");
14249 return;
14250 }
14251 }
14252
14253 rook_animation_active = true;
14254
14255 // Start the timer
14256 if (xTimerStart(rook_animation_timer, 0) != pdPASS) {
14257 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "❌ Failed to start rook animation timer");
14258 rook_animation_active = false;
14259 return;
14260 }
14261
14262 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🏰 Started repeating rook animation");
14263}
14264
14268void game_stop_repeating_rook_animation(void) {
14269 if (rook_animation_timer != NULL) {
14270 xTimerStop(rook_animation_timer, 0);
14271 }
14272 rook_animation_active = false;
14273 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🏰 Stopped repeating rook animation");
14274}
14275
14280bool game_is_castle_animation_active(void) { return castle_animation_active; }
14281
14287bool game_is_castling_expected(void) {
14288 // Check if a king is lifted and about to be placed 2 squares away
14289 if (piece_lifted &&
14290 (lifted_piece == PIECE_WHITE_KING || lifted_piece == PIECE_BLACK_KING)) {
14291 // This function is called from game_handle_piece_placed
14292 // We need to check if the king is being placed 2 squares away from its
14293 // original position But we don't have access to the destination
14294 // coordinates here So we return true to prevent premature opponent piece
14295 // highlighting The actual castling detection will happen in
14296 // game_handle_matrix_move
14297 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🏰 King is lifted - castling might be expected");
14298 return true;
14299 }
14300 return false;
14301}
14302
14311bool game_complete_castle_animation(uint8_t from_row, uint8_t from_col,
14312 uint8_t to_row, uint8_t to_col) {
14313 if (!castle_animation_active) {
14314 return false;
14315 }
14316
14317 // Check if rook was moved to correct position
14318 if (from_row == rook_from_row && from_col == rook_from_col &&
14319 to_row == rook_to_row && to_col == rook_to_col) {
14320
14321 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "✅ Castle animation completed! Rook moved correctly.");
14322
14323 // Skutečně přesunout věž až když hráč udělá správný tah
14324 piece_t rook_piece = board[rook_from_row][rook_from_col];
14325 board[rook_from_row][rook_from_col] = PIECE_EMPTY;
14326 board[rook_to_row][rook_to_col] = rook_piece;
14327
14328 // Stop repeating rook animation
14329 game_stop_repeating_rook_animation();
14330
14331 // Complete the castle move
14332 castle_animation_active = false;
14333
14334 // Switch players now that castle is complete
14335 player_t previous_player = current_player;
14336 current_player =
14337 (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? PLAYER_BLACK : PLAYER_WHITE;
14338
14339 // Po úspěšné rošádě spustit animaci změny hráče
14340 game_show_player_change_animation(previous_player, current_player);
14341
14342 // Clear board and show movable pieces for new player
14343 led_clear_board_only();
14344 game_highlight_movable_pieces();
14345
14346 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🏰 Castling completed! %s to move",
14347 (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? "White" : "Black");
14348
14349 return true;
14350 } else {
14351 ESP_LOGW(TAG,
14352 "❌ Invalid rook move for castling: %c%d -> %c%d (expected: %c%d "
14353 "-> %c%d)",
14354 'a' + from_col, from_row + 1, 'a' + to_col, to_row + 1,
14355 'a' + rook_from_col, rook_from_row + 1, 'a' + rook_to_col,
14356 rook_to_row + 1);
14357
14358 // Keep castle animation active, wait for correct move
14359 return false;
14360 }
14361}
14362
14363// ============================================================================
14364// WEB SERVER JSON EXPORT FUNCTIONS
14365// ============================================================================
14366
14367esp_err_t game_get_board_json(char *buffer, size_t size) {
14368 if (buffer == NULL || size == 0) {
14369 return ESP_ERR_INVALID_ARG;
14370 }
14371
14372 // Thread-safe access to board
14373 if (game_mutex != NULL) {
14374 if (xSemaphoreTake(game_mutex, pdMS_TO_TICKS(1000)) != pdTRUE) {
14375 return ESP_ERR_TIMEOUT;
14376 }
14377 }
14378
14379 // Build JSON string manually (more efficient than cJSON)
14380 int offset = 0;
14381
14382 offset += snprintf(buffer + offset, size - offset, "{\"board\":[");
14383
14384 for (int row = 0; row < 8; row++) {
14385 offset += snprintf(buffer + offset, size - offset, "[");
14386 for (int col = 0; col < 8; col++) {
14387 char piece_char = piece_to_char(board[row][col]);
14388 offset += snprintf(buffer + offset, size - offset, "\"%c\"", piece_char);
14389 if (col < 7) {
14390 offset += snprintf(buffer + offset, size - offset, ",");
14391 }
14392 }
14393 offset += snprintf(buffer + offset, size - offset, "]");
14394 if (row < 7) {
14395 offset += snprintf(buffer + offset, size - offset, ",");
14396 }
14397 }
14398
14399 uint64_t timestamp = esp_timer_get_time() / 1000;
14400 offset += snprintf(buffer + offset, size - offset, "],\"timestamp\":%llu}",
14401 timestamp);
14402
14403 if (game_mutex != NULL) {
14404 xSemaphoreGive(game_mutex);
14405 }
14406
14407 return ESP_OK;
14408}
14409
14413uint32_t game_get_move_count(void) {
14414 uint32_t count = 0;
14415 if (xSemaphoreTake(game_mutex, pdMS_TO_TICKS(100)) == pdTRUE) {
14416 count = move_count;
14417 xSemaphoreGive(game_mutex);
14418 }
14419 return count;
14420}
14421
14422static esp_err_t game_status_json_append(int *offset, char *buffer, size_t size,
14423 const char *fmt, ...) {
14424 va_list ap;
14425 va_start(ap, fmt);
14426 if (*offset < 0 || (size_t)*offset >= size) {
14427 va_end(ap);
14428 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "game_get_status_json: offset invalid %d", *offset);
14429 return ESP_ERR_NO_MEM;
14430 }
14431 size_t rem = size - (size_t)*offset;
14432 if (rem <= 1) {
14433 va_end(ap);
14434 return ESP_ERR_NO_MEM;
14435 }
14436 int n = vsnprintf(buffer + *offset, rem, fmt, ap);
14437 va_end(ap);
14438 if (n < 0 || (size_t)n >= rem) {
14439 ESP_LOGE(TAG,
14440 "game_get_status_json: append overflow need=%d rem=%zu off=%d", n,
14441 rem, *offset);
14442 return ESP_ERR_NO_MEM;
14443 }
14444 *offset += n;
14445 return ESP_OK;
14446}
14447
14448#define GAME_STATUS_JSON_APPEND(...) \
14449 do { \
14450 if (game_status_json_append(&offset, buffer, size, __VA_ARGS__) != \
14451 ESP_OK) { \
14452 if (game_mutex != NULL) \
14453 xSemaphoreGive(game_mutex); \
14454 return ESP_ERR_NO_MEM; \
14455 } \
14456 } while (0)
14457
14458esp_err_t game_get_status_json(char *buffer, size_t size) {
14459 if (buffer == NULL || size == 0) {
14460 return ESP_ERR_INVALID_ARG;
14461 }
14462
14463 // Thread-safe access to game state
14464 if (game_mutex != NULL) {
14465 if (xSemaphoreTake(game_mutex, pdMS_TO_TICKS(1000)) != pdTRUE) {
14466 return ESP_ERR_TIMEOUT;
14467 }
14468 }
14469
14470 // Build JSON string
14471 int offset = 0;
14472
14473 // Game state string
14474 const char *game_state_str = "idle";
14475 switch (current_game_state) {
14476 case GAME_STATE_ACTIVE:
14477 game_state_str = "active";
14478 break;
14479 case GAME_STATE_PAUSED:
14480 game_state_str = "paused";
14481 break;
14482 case GAME_STATE_FINISHED:
14483 game_state_str = "finished";
14484 break;
14485 case GAME_STATE_PROMOTION:
14486 game_state_str = "promotion";
14487 break;
14488 case GAME_STATE_WAITING_FOR_RETURN:
14489 game_state_str = "active";
14490 break;
14491 case GAME_STATE_PLAYING:
14492 game_state_str = "playing";
14493 break;
14494 default:
14495 game_state_str = "idle";
14496 break;
14497 }
14498
14499 // Check detection
14500 bool in_check = game_is_king_in_check(current_player);
14501
14502 // Checkmate detection (simplified - king in check and no legal moves)
14503 bool checkmate = false;
14504 if (in_check) {
14505 // Try to generate legal moves - if none, it's checkmate
14506 uint32_t legal_moves = game_generate_legal_moves(current_player);
14507 checkmate = (legal_moves == 0);
14508 }
14509
14510 // Stalemate detection (simplified - not in check but no legal moves)
14511 bool stalemate = false;
14512 if (!in_check) {
14513 uint32_t legal_moves = game_generate_legal_moves(current_player);
14514 stalemate = (legal_moves == 0);
14515 }
14516
14517 GAME_STATUS_JSON_APPEND("{\"game_state\":\"%s\","
14518 "\"current_player\":\"%s\","
14519 "\"move_count\":%" PRIu32 ","
14520 "\"white_time\":%" PRIu32 ","
14521 "\"black_time\":%" PRIu32 ","
14522 "\"in_check\":%s,"
14523 "\"checkmate\":%s,"
14524 "\"stalemate\":%s",
14525 game_state_str,
14526 (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? "White" : "Black",
14527 move_count, white_time_total, black_time_total,
14528 in_check ? "true" : "false", checkmate ? "true" : "false",
14529 stalemate ? "true" : "false");
14530
14531 // Piece lifted info
14532 if (piece_lifted) {
14533 char piece_char = piece_to_char(lifted_piece);
14534 char notation[4] = {0};
14535 convert_coords_to_notation(lifted_piece_row, lifted_piece_col, notation);
14536 GAME_STATUS_JSON_APPEND(",\"piece_lifted\":{\"lifted\":true,\"row\":%d,"
14537 "\"col\":%d,"
14538 "\"piece\":\"%c\",\"notation\":\"%s\"}",
14539 lifted_piece_row, lifted_piece_col, piece_char,
14540 notation);
14541 } else {
14542 GAME_STATUS_JSON_APPEND(",\"piece_lifted\":{\"lifted\":false,\"row\":0,"
14543 "\"col\":"
14544 "0,\"piece\":\" \",\"notation\":\"\"}");
14545 }
14546
14547 /* Rošáda na 2 tahy: web musí vědět, že má čekat na tah věže (deska je mezistav). */
14548 if (castling_state.in_progress) {
14549 char cf[4] = {0}, ct[4] = {0};
14550 convert_coords_to_notation(castling_state.rook_from_row,
14551 castling_state.rook_from_col, cf);
14552 convert_coords_to_notation(castling_state.rook_to_row,
14553 castling_state.rook_to_col, ct);
14554 GAME_STATUS_JSON_APPEND(",\"castling_in_progress\":true,"
14555 "\"castling_from\":\"%s\","
14556 "\"castling_to\":\"%s\"",
14557 cf, ct);
14558 } else {
14559 GAME_STATUS_JSON_APPEND(",\"castling_in_progress\":false");
14560 }
14561
14562 // Game end information - použít current_endgame_reason pro přesné
14563 // rozlišení
14564 if (current_game_state == GAME_STATE_FINISHED) {
14565 const char *end_reason = "Unknown";
14566 const char *winner = "None";
14567 const char *loser = "None";
14568
14569 // Nejprve určit vítěze
14570 if (current_result_type == RESULT_WHITE_WINS) {
14571 winner = "White";
14572 loser = "Black";
14573 } else if (current_result_type == RESULT_BLACK_WINS) {
14574 winner = "Black";
14575 loser = "White";
14576 } else {
14577 winner = "Draw";
14578 loser = "Draw";
14579 }
14580
14581 // Pak určit důvod podle current_endgame_reason
14582 switch (current_endgame_reason) {
14583 case ENDGAME_REASON_CHECKMATE:
14584 end_reason = "Checkmate";
14585 break;
14586 case ENDGAME_REASON_CHECKMATE_EN_PASSANT:
14587 end_reason = "Checkmate (En Passant)";
14588 break;
14589 case ENDGAME_REASON_CHECKMATE_CASTLING:
14590 end_reason = "Checkmate (Castling)";
14591 break;
14592 case ENDGAME_REASON_CHECKMATE_PROMOTION:
14593 end_reason = "Checkmate (Promotion)";
14594 break;
14595 case ENDGAME_REASON_CHECKMATE_DISCOVERED:
14596 end_reason = "Checkmate (Discovered Check)";
14597 break;
14598 case ENDGAME_REASON_RESIGNATION:
14599 end_reason = "Resignation";
14600 break;
14601 case ENDGAME_REASON_TIMEOUT:
14602 end_reason = "Timeout";
14603 break;
14604 case ENDGAME_REASON_STALEMATE:
14605 end_reason = "Stalemate";
14606 break;
14607 case ENDGAME_REASON_50_MOVE:
14608 end_reason = "50-move rule";
14609 break;
14610 case ENDGAME_REASON_REPETITION:
14611 end_reason = "Threefold repetition";
14612 break;
14613 case ENDGAME_REASON_INSUFFICIENT:
14614 end_reason = "Insufficient material";
14615 break;
14616 }
14617
14618 GAME_STATUS_JSON_APPEND(",\"game_end\":{\"ended\":true,\"reason\":\"%s\","
14619 "\"winner\":\"%s\",\"loser\":\"%s\"}",
14620 end_reason, winner, loser);
14621 } else {
14622 GAME_STATUS_JSON_APPEND(",\"game_end\":{\"ended\":false,\"reason\":\"\","
14623 "\"winner\":\"\",\"loser\":\"\"}");
14624 }
14625
14626 // Error recovery state pro vizuální indikaci na webu
14627 if (error_recovery_state.waiting_for_move_correction) {
14628 char invalid_notation[4] = {0};
14629 char original_notation[4] = {0};
14630 convert_coords_to_notation(error_recovery_state.invalid_row,
14631 error_recovery_state.invalid_col,
14632 invalid_notation);
14633 convert_coords_to_notation(error_recovery_state.original_valid_row,
14634 error_recovery_state.original_valid_col,
14635 original_notation);
14636
14637 GAME_STATUS_JSON_APPEND(",\"error_state\":{\"active\":true,"
14638 "\"invalid_pos\":\"%s\","
14639 "\"original_pos\":\"%s\","
14640 "\"error_count\":%d}",
14641 invalid_notation, original_notation,
14642 error_recovery_state.error_count);
14643 } else {
14644 /* Uzavřít objekt error_state — dříve chybějící } rozbíjelo JSON (restore_state
14645 * vnořený do error_state). */
14646 GAME_STATUS_JSON_APPEND(",\"error_state\":{\"active\":false}");
14647 }
14648
14649 GAME_STATUS_JSON_APPEND(
14650 ",\"restore_state\":{\"snapshot_loaded\":%s,\"snapshot_fallback_used\":%s,"
14651 "\"snapshot_restore_failed\":%s,\"snapshot_save_failed\":%s,"
14652 "\"resync_required\":%s,"
14653 "\"boot_new_game_triggered\":%s}",
14654 snapshot_loaded_on_boot ? "true" : "false",
14655 snapshot_fallback_used ? "true" : "false",
14656 snapshot_restore_failed ? "true" : "false",
14657 snapshot_save_failed ? "true" : "false",
14658 resync_required_after_restore ? "true" : "false",
14659 boot_new_game_triggered ? "true" : "false");
14660
14661 GAME_STATUS_JSON_APPEND(",\"board_setup_tutorial\":%s",
14662 board_setup_tutorial_active ? "true" : "false");
14663
14664 const game_puzzle_definition_t *pd_play =
14665 game_get_puzzle_definition(puzzle_active_id);
14666 const game_puzzle_definition_t *pd_setup =
14667 game_get_puzzle_definition(puzzle_setup_id);
14668 const game_puzzle_definition_t *pd =
14669 puzzle_active ? pd_play : (puzzle_setup_active ? pd_setup : NULL);
14670 bool puzzle_phys_match = false;
14671 if (puzzle_setup_active && pd_setup != NULL) {
14672 puzzle_phys_match = game_puzzle_physical_matches_fen(pd_setup->fen);
14673 }
14674 const char *puzzle_fen_json = "";
14675 if (puzzle_setup_active && pd_setup != NULL) {
14676 puzzle_fen_json = pd_setup->fen;
14677 } else if (puzzle_active && pd_play != NULL) {
14678 puzzle_fen_json = pd_play->fen;
14679 }
14680 GAME_STATUS_JSON_APPEND(",\"puzzle\":{\"active\":%s,\"setup_active\":%s,"
14681 "\"setup_id\":%u,\"physical_match\":%s,\"fen\":\"%s\","
14682 "\"id\":%u,\"difficulty\":%u,"
14683 "\"title\":\"%s\",\"teaser\":\"%s\",\"feedback\":\"%s\","
14684 "\"message\":\"%s\"}",
14685 puzzle_active ? "true" : "false",
14686 puzzle_setup_active ? "true" : "false",
14687 (unsigned)puzzle_setup_id,
14688 puzzle_phys_match ? "true" : "false", puzzle_fen_json,
14689 (unsigned)(puzzle_active ? puzzle_active_id
14690 : (puzzle_setup_active
14691 ? puzzle_setup_id
14692 : 0)),
14693 (unsigned)(pd ? pd->difficulty : 0U), pd ? pd->title : "",
14694 pd ? pd->teaser : "", game_puzzle_feedback_key(),
14695 game_puzzle_feedback_message());
14696
14697 if (board_setup_tutorial_active || puzzle_setup_active) {
14698 uint8_t occ[64];
14699 matrix_get_state(occ);
14700 GAME_STATUS_JSON_APPEND(",\"matrix_occupied\":[");
14701 for (int i = 0; i < 64; i++) {
14702 GAME_STATUS_JSON_APPEND("%s%u", (i > 0) ? "," : "",
14703 (unsigned int)occ[i]);
14704 }
14705 GAME_STATUS_JSON_APPEND("]");
14706 }
14707
14708 GAME_STATUS_JSON_APPEND("}");
14709
14710#undef GAME_STATUS_JSON_APPEND
14711
14712 buffer[offset] = '\0';
14713 if (strstr(buffer, "\"game_state\"") == NULL) {
14714 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "game_get_status_json: missing game_state in output");
14715 if (game_mutex != NULL) {
14716 xSemaphoreGive(game_mutex);
14717 }
14718 return ESP_FAIL;
14719 }
14720
14721#ifndef NDEBUG
14722 STAGING_LOGI(TAG, "game_get_status_json: len=%d cap=%zu", offset, size);
14723#endif
14724
14725 if (game_mutex != NULL) {
14726 xSemaphoreGive(game_mutex);
14727 }
14728
14729 return ESP_OK;
14730}
14731
14732esp_err_t game_get_history_json(char *buffer, size_t size) {
14733 if (buffer == NULL || size == 0) {
14734 return ESP_ERR_INVALID_ARG;
14735 }
14736
14737 // Thread-safe access to move history
14738 if (game_mutex != NULL) {
14739 if (xSemaphoreTake(game_mutex, pdMS_TO_TICKS(1000)) != pdTRUE) {
14740 return ESP_ERR_TIMEOUT;
14741 }
14742 }
14743
14744 // Build JSON string
14745 int offset = 0;
14746 offset += snprintf(buffer + offset, size - offset, "{\"moves\":[");
14747
14748 for (uint32_t i = 0; i < history_index && i < MAX_MOVES_HISTORY; i++) {
14749 char from_notation[4] = {0};
14750 char to_notation[4] = {0};
14751 convert_coords_to_notation(move_history[i].from_row,
14752 move_history[i].from_col, from_notation);
14753 convert_coords_to_notation(move_history[i].to_row, move_history[i].to_col,
14754 to_notation);
14755 char piece_char = piece_to_char(move_history[i].piece);
14756
14757 offset += snprintf(buffer + offset, size - offset,
14758 "{\"from\":\"%s\",\"to\":\"%s\",\"piece\":\"%c\","
14759 "\"timestamp\":%" PRIu32 "}",
14760 from_notation, to_notation, piece_char,
14761 move_history[i].timestamp);
14762
14763 if (i < history_index - 1 && i < MAX_MOVES_HISTORY - 1) {
14764 offset += snprintf(buffer + offset, size - offset, ",");
14765 }
14766 }
14767
14768 offset += snprintf(buffer + offset, size - offset, "]}");
14769
14770 if (game_mutex != NULL) {
14771 xSemaphoreGive(game_mutex);
14772 }
14773
14774 return ESP_OK;
14775}
14776
14777esp_err_t game_get_captured_json(char *buffer, size_t size) {
14778 if (buffer == NULL || size == 0) {
14779 return ESP_ERR_INVALID_ARG;
14780 }
14781
14782 // Thread-safe access to captured pieces
14783 if (game_mutex != NULL) {
14784 if (xSemaphoreTake(game_mutex, pdMS_TO_TICKS(1000)) != pdTRUE) {
14785 return ESP_ERR_TIMEOUT;
14786 }
14787 }
14788
14789 // Build JSON string
14790 int offset = 0;
14791 offset += snprintf(buffer + offset, size - offset, "{\"white_captured\":[");
14792
14793 // Add white captured pieces
14794 for (uint32_t i = 0; i < white_captured_count; i++) {
14795 char piece_char = piece_to_char(white_captured_pieces[i]);
14796 offset += snprintf(buffer + offset, size - offset, "\"%c\"", piece_char);
14797 if (i < white_captured_count - 1) {
14798 offset += snprintf(buffer + offset, size - offset, ",");
14799 }
14800 }
14801
14802 offset += snprintf(buffer + offset, size - offset, "],\"black_captured\":[");
14803
14804 // Add black captured pieces
14805 for (uint32_t i = 0; i < black_captured_count; i++) {
14806 char piece_char = piece_to_char(black_captured_pieces[i]);
14807 offset += snprintf(buffer + offset, size - offset, "\"%c\"", piece_char);
14808 if (i < black_captured_count - 1) {
14809 offset += snprintf(buffer + offset, size - offset, ",");
14810 }
14811 }
14812
14813 offset += snprintf(buffer + offset, size - offset, "]}");
14814
14815 if (game_mutex != NULL) {
14816 xSemaphoreGive(game_mutex);
14817 }
14818
14819 return ESP_OK;
14820}
14821
14828esp_err_t game_get_advantage_json(char *buffer, size_t size) {
14829 if (buffer == NULL || size == 0) {
14830 return ESP_ERR_INVALID_ARG;
14831 }
14832
14833 // Thread-safe access
14834 if (game_mutex != NULL) {
14835 if (xSemaphoreTake(game_mutex, pdMS_TO_TICKS(1000)) != pdTRUE) {
14836 return ESP_ERR_TIMEOUT;
14837 }
14838 }
14839
14840 // Build JSON: {"history":[0,1,2,-1,0,...], "count":42, "white_checks":5,
14841 // "black_checks":3, ...}
14842 int offset = 0;
14843 offset += snprintf(buffer + offset, size - offset, "{\"history\":[");
14844
14845 // Add advantage values
14846 for (uint32_t i = 0; i < advantage_history_count; i++) {
14847 offset += snprintf(buffer + offset, size - offset, "%d",
14848 material_advantage_history[i]);
14849 if (i < advantage_history_count - 1) {
14850 offset += snprintf(buffer + offset, size - offset, ",");
14851 }
14852 }
14853
14854 offset += snprintf(buffer + offset, size - offset, "],\"count\":%" PRIu32,
14855 advantage_history_count);
14856
14857 // Přidat další statistiky
14858 offset += snprintf(buffer + offset, size - offset,
14859 ",\"white_checks\":%" PRIu32 ",\"black_checks\":%" PRIu32,
14860 white_checks, black_checks);
14861 offset +=
14862 snprintf(buffer + offset, size - offset,
14863 ",\"white_castles\":%" PRIu32 ",\"black_castles\":%" PRIu32,
14864 white_castles, black_castles);
14865
14866 // Průměrný čas na tah
14867 uint32_t current_time = esp_timer_get_time() / 1000;
14868 uint32_t game_duration =
14869 (game_start_time > 0) ? (current_time - game_start_time) : 0;
14870 uint32_t avg_time_per_move =
14871 (move_count > 0) ? (game_duration / move_count) : 0;
14872 offset += snprintf(buffer + offset, size - offset,
14873 ",\"game_duration_ms\":%" PRIu32
14874 ",\"avg_time_per_move_ms\":%" PRIu32,
14875 game_duration, avg_time_per_move);
14876
14877 offset += snprintf(buffer + offset, size - offset, "}");
14878
14879 if (game_mutex != NULL) {
14880 xSemaphoreGive(game_mutex);
14881 }
14882
14883 return ESP_OK;
14884}
14885
14886// ============================================================================
14887// TIMER SYSTEM INTEGRATION IMPLEMENTATION
14888// ============================================================================
14889
14890esp_err_t game_get_timer_json(char *buffer, size_t size) {
14891 if (buffer == NULL || size == 0) {
14892 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Invalid buffer parameters");
14893 return ESP_ERR_INVALID_ARG;
14894 }
14895
14896 return timer_get_json(buffer, size);
14897}
14898
14899esp_err_t game_set_time_control(const time_control_config_t *config) {
14900 if (config == NULL) {
14901 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Invalid config parameter");
14902 return ESP_ERR_INVALID_ARG;
14903 }
14904
14905 esp_err_t ret = timer_set_time_control(config);
14906 if (ret == ESP_OK) {
14907 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Time control set: %s", config->name);
14908
14909 // Pokud je hra aktivní, spustit timer pro aktuálního hráče
14910 if (current_game_state == GAME_STATE_ACTIVE) {
14911 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Game is active, starting timer for current player");
14912 timer_start_move(current_player == PLAYER_WHITE);
14913 } else {
14914 ESP_LOGI(TAG,
14915 "Game state is %d (not active), timer will start on first move",
14916 current_game_state);
14917 }
14918 }
14919
14920 return ret;
14921}
14922
14923esp_err_t game_start_timer_move(bool is_white_turn) {
14924 ESP_LOGI(
14925 TAG,
14926 "🎮 game_start_timer_move called: is_white_turn=%s, current_player=%s",
14927 is_white_turn ? "WHITE" : "BLACK",
14928 current_player == PLAYER_WHITE ? "WHITE" : "BLACK");
14929 esp_err_t ret = timer_start_move(is_white_turn);
14930 if (ret == ESP_OK) {
14931 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "✅ Timer started successfully for %s",
14932 is_white_turn ? "White" : "Black");
14933 } else {
14934 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "❌ Failed to start timer for %s: %s",
14935 is_white_turn ? "White" : "Black", esp_err_to_name(ret));
14936 }
14937
14938 return ret;
14939}
14940
14941esp_err_t game_end_timer_move(void) {
14942 esp_err_t ret = timer_end_move();
14943 if (ret == ESP_OK) {
14944 ESP_LOGD(TAG, "Timer ended for move");
14945 }
14946
14947 return ret;
14948}
14949
14950esp_err_t game_pause_timer(void) {
14951 esp_err_t ret = timer_pause();
14952 if (ret == ESP_OK) {
14953 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Timer paused");
14954 }
14955
14956 return ret;
14957}
14958
14959esp_err_t game_resume_timer(void) {
14960 esp_err_t ret = timer_resume();
14961 if (ret == ESP_OK) {
14962 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Timer resumed");
14963 }
14964
14965 return ret;
14966}
14967
14968esp_err_t game_reset_timer(void) {
14969 esp_err_t ret = timer_reset();
14970 if (ret == ESP_OK) {
14971 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Timer reset");
14972 }
14973
14974 return ret;
14975}
14976
14977bool game_check_timer_timeout(void) { return timer_check_timeout(); }
14978
14979uint32_t game_get_remaining_time(bool is_white_turn) {
14980 return timer_get_remaining_time(is_white_turn);
14981}
14982
14983esp_err_t game_get_timer_state(chess_timer_t *timer_data) {
14984 if (timer_data == NULL) {
14985 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Invalid timer_data parameter");
14986 return ESP_ERR_INVALID_ARG;
14987 }
14988
14989 return timer_get_state(timer_data);
14990}
14991
14992esp_err_t game_init_timer_system(void) {
14993 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Initializing timer system in game task...");
14994
14995 esp_err_t ret = timer_system_init();
14996 if (ret == ESP_OK) {
14997 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Timer system initialized successfully");
14998 } else {
14999 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to initialize timer system: %s",
15000 esp_err_to_name(ret));
15001 }
15002
15003 return ret;
15004}
15005
15006esp_err_t game_process_timer_command(const chess_move_command_t *cmd) {
15007 if (cmd == NULL) {
15008 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Invalid command parameter");
15009 return ESP_ERR_INVALID_ARG;
15010 }
15011
15012 esp_err_t ret = ESP_OK;
15013
15014 switch (cmd->type) {
15015 case GAME_CMD_SET_TIME_CONTROL: {
15016 time_control_config_t config;
15017 time_control_type_t type =
15018 (time_control_type_t)cmd->timer_data.timer_config.time_control_type;
15019
15020 if (type == TIME_CONTROL_CUSTOM) {
15021 // Vlastní časová kontrola
15022 ret = timer_set_custom_time_control(
15023 cmd->timer_data.timer_config.custom_minutes,
15024 cmd->timer_data.timer_config.custom_increment);
15025 } else {
15026 // Předdefinovaná časová kontrola
15027 ret = timer_get_config_by_type(type, &config);
15028 if (ret == ESP_OK) {
15029 ret = timer_set_time_control(&config);
15030 }
15031 }
15032
15033 if (ret == ESP_OK) {
15034 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Time control command processed successfully");
15035 } else {
15036 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to process time control command");
15037 }
15038 } break;
15039
15040 case GAME_CMD_PAUSE_TIMER:
15041 ret = game_pause_timer();
15042 break;
15043
15044 case GAME_CMD_RESUME_TIMER:
15045 ret = game_resume_timer();
15046 break;
15047
15048 case GAME_CMD_RESET_TIMER:
15049 ret = game_reset_timer();
15050 break;
15051
15052 case GAME_CMD_GET_TIMER_STATE:
15053 // Timer state je získáván přes JSON API
15054 ret = ESP_OK;
15055 break;
15056
15057 case GAME_CMD_TIMER_TIMEOUT:
15058 ret = game_handle_time_expiration();
15059 break;
15060
15061 default:
15062 ESP_LOGW(TAG, "Unknown timer command: %d", cmd->type);
15063 ret = ESP_ERR_INVALID_ARG;
15064 break;
15065 }
15066
15067 return ret;
15068}
15069
15070esp_err_t game_handle_time_expiration(void) {
15071 ESP_LOGW(TAG, "⏰ Time expired! Handling timeout...");
15072
15073 // Získat stav timeru
15074 chess_timer_t timer_data;
15075 esp_err_t ret = timer_get_state(&timer_data);
15076 if (ret != ESP_OK) {
15077 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to get timer state");
15078 return ret;
15079 }
15080
15081 // Určit vítěze
15082 player_t winner = timer_data.is_white_turn ? PLAYER_BLACK : PLAYER_WHITE;
15083 const char *winner_name = (winner == PLAYER_WHITE) ? "White" : "Black";
15084 const char *loser_name = (winner == PLAYER_WHITE) ? "Black" : "White";
15085
15086 ESP_LOGW(TAG, "🏆 %s wins by timeout! %s ran out of time.", winner_name,
15087 loser_name);
15088
15089 // Ukončit hru
15090 current_game_state = GAME_STATE_FINISHED;
15091 game_result = GAME_STATE_FINISHED;
15092 current_result_type =
15093 (winner == PLAYER_WHITE) ? RESULT_WHITE_WINS : RESULT_BLACK_WINS;
15094 current_endgame_reason = ENDGAME_REASON_TIMEOUT; // Označit jako timeout
15095
15096 // Požadavek na endgame report (stejný fix jako u resignation)
15097 game_update_endgame_statistics(current_result_type);
15098 endgame_report_requested = true;
15099
15100 // UNIFIED VICTORY ANIMATION
15101 // Timeout = Winner determined above
15102 game_trigger_victory_animation(winner);
15103
15104 // Zobrazit výsledek na LED (použít existující LED funkce)
15105 // led_show_game_result(game_result); // Funkce neexistuje
15106
15107 // Pozastavit timer
15108 timer_pause();
15109
15110 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Game ended due to timeout. Winner: %s", winner_name);
15111
15112 return ESP_OK;
15113}
15114
15115esp_err_t game_update_timer_display(void) {
15116 // Kontrola timeout
15117 if (timer_check_timeout()) {
15118 return game_handle_time_expiration();
15119 }
15120
15121 return ESP_OK;
15122}
15123
15124uint32_t game_get_available_time_controls(time_control_config_t *controls,
15125 uint32_t max_count) {
15126 if (controls == NULL || max_count == 0) {
15127 return 0;
15128 }
15129
15130 return timer_get_available_controls(controls, max_count);
15131}
15132
15133esp_err_t game_set_custom_time_control(uint32_t minutes,
15134 uint32_t increment_seconds) {
15135 return timer_set_custom_time_control(minutes, increment_seconds);
15136}
15137
15138esp_err_t game_get_timer_stats(uint32_t *total_moves, uint32_t *avg_move_time) {
15139 if (total_moves == NULL || avg_move_time == NULL) {
15140 ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Invalid parameters");
15141 return ESP_ERR_INVALID_ARG;
15142 }
15143
15144 *total_moves = timer_get_total_moves();
15145 *avg_move_time = timer_get_average_move_time();
15146
15147 return ESP_OK;
15148}
15149
15150bool game_is_timer_active(void) { return timer_is_active(); }
15151
15152time_control_type_t game_get_current_time_control_type(void) {
15153 return timer_get_current_type();
15154}
15155
15160void game_refresh_leds(void) {
15161 ESP_LOGI(TAG, "🔄 Refreshing LED state based on game status...");
15162
15163 // If game is not active, just show the board pattern
15164 if (!game_active && current_game_state != GAME_STATE_PROMOTION) {
15165 // If we are in "setup" or "idle" mode
15166 led_show_chess_board();
15167 return;
15168 }
15169
15170 // Clear board first (to remove HA colors)
15171 led_clear_board_only();
15172
15173 if (matrix_guard_pause_state.active) {
15174 ESP_LOGI(TAG, " - Restoring MATRIX GUARD LEDs (physical vs logic)");
15175 game_render_matrix_guard_leds();
15176 game_check_promotion_needed();
15177 return;
15178 }
15179
15180 // 1. Check for Error Recovery State
15181 if (error_recovery_state.waiting_for_move_correction) {
15182 ESP_LOGI(TAG, " - Restoring ERROR state LEDs");
15183 // Show validation error
15184 game_show_invalid_move_error_with_blink(error_recovery_state.invalid_row,
15185 error_recovery_state.invalid_col);
15186
15187 // Also highlight the original valid position (Blue)
15188 led_set_pixel_safe(
15189 chess_pos_to_led_index(error_recovery_state.original_valid_row,
15190 error_recovery_state.original_valid_col),
15191 0, 0, 255);
15192
15193 return;
15194 }
15195
15196 // 2. Check for Lifted Piece State
15197 if (piece_lifted) {
15198 ESP_LOGI(TAG, " - Restoring LIFTED piece state LEDs at %c%d",
15199 'a' + lifted_piece_col, lifted_piece_row + 1);
15200
15201 // Highlight source square (Yellow)
15202 led_set_pixel_safe(
15203 chess_pos_to_led_index(lifted_piece_row, lifted_piece_col), 255, 255,
15204 0);
15205
15206 // Show valid moves for this piece
15207 move_suggestion_t suggestions[64];
15208 uint32_t valid_moves = game_get_available_moves(
15209 lifted_piece_row, lifted_piece_col, suggestions, 64);
15210
15211 if (valid_moves > 0) {
15212 for (uint32_t i = 0; i < valid_moves; i++) {
15213 uint8_t dest_row = suggestions[i].to_row;
15214 uint8_t dest_col = suggestions[i].to_col;
15215 uint8_t led_index = chess_pos_to_led_index(dest_row, dest_col);
15216
15217 // Check if destination has opponent's piece
15218 piece_t dest_piece = board[dest_row][dest_col];
15219 bool is_opponent_piece =
15220 (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE && dest_piece >= PIECE_BLACK_PAWN &&
15221 dest_piece <= PIECE_BLACK_KING) ||
15222 (current_player == PLAYER_BLACK && dest_piece >= PIECE_WHITE_PAWN &&
15223 dest_piece <= PIECE_WHITE_KING);
15224
15225 if (is_opponent_piece) {
15226 led_set_pixel_safe(led_index, 255, 165, 0); // Orange for capture
15227 } else {
15228 led_set_pixel_safe(led_index, 0, 255, 0); // Green for move
15229 }
15230 }
15231 }
15232 return;
15233 }
15234
15235 // 3. Check for Check state
15236 if (game_is_king_in_check(current_player)) {
15237 // Find King
15238 int king_row = -1, king_col = -1;
15239 piece_t king_piece =
15240 (current_player == PLAYER_WHITE) ? PIECE_WHITE_KING : PIECE_BLACK_KING;
15241 for (int row = 0; row < 8; row++) {
15242 for (int col = 0; col < 8; col++) {
15243 if (board[row][col] == king_piece) {
15244 king_row = row;
15245 king_col = col;
15246 break;
15247 }
15248 }
15249 if (king_row != -1)
15250 break;
15251 }
15252
15253 if (king_row != -1) {
15254 if (game_led_guidance_show_check_anim()) {
15255 ESP_LOGI(TAG, " - Restoring CHECK state LEDs");
15256 uint8_t king_led_index = chess_pos_to_led_index(king_row, king_col);
15257 led_command_t check_cmd = {.type = LED_CMD_ANIM_CHECK,
15258 .led_index = king_led_index,
15259 .red = 0,
15260 .green = 0,
15261 .blue = 0,
15262 .duration_ms = 0,
15263 .data = NULL};
15264 led_execute_command_new(&check_cmd);
15265 }
15266 }
15267 }
15268
15269 // 4. Default Active State - Highlight movable pieces
15270 ESP_LOGI(TAG, " - Restoring ACTIVE state LEDs (movable pieces)");
15271 game_highlight_movable_pieces();
15272
15273 // Update button LEDs (64-71) to match current game state (promotion green/blue)
15274 // so they are correct after switching back to game mode (e.g. from HA).
15275 game_check_promotion_needed();
15276}
button_set_led_color
void button_set_led_color(uint8_t led_index, uint8_t red, uint8_t green, uint8_t blue)
Nastav barvu LED pro tlacitko.
